        <div class="wizard-transition-subtitle" id="wizardTransitionSubtitle">
          Aguarde, estamos finalizando.
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <!-- LOGIN OVERLAY -->
    <div class="login-overlay" id="loginOverlay">
      <div class="login-box">
        <img
          src="data:image/png;base64,"
          alt="São Rafael"
          class="login-logo"
        />
        <div class="login-title">Wizard de Orçamento</div>
        <form id="loginForm">
          <input
            type="email"
            class="login-input"
            id="usernameInput"
            placeholder="E-mail"
            required
            autocomplete="email"
          />
          <input
            type="password"
            class="login-input"
            id="passwordInput"
            placeholder="Senha"
            required
            autocomplete="current-password"
          />
          <button type="submit" class="login-btn">Entrar</button>
          <div class="err-msg" id="loginError">Credenciais inválidas</div>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="app-container" id="appContainer" style="display: none">
      <!-- SIDEBAR -->
      <div class="sidebar-overlay" id="sidebarOverlay"></div>
      <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
        <div class="sidebar-header">
          <div class="brand">
            <img
              src="data:image/png;base64,"
              alt="São Rafael"
            />
          </div>
          <button class="sidebar-close" id="sidebarCloseBtn">
            <i data-lucide="x" style="width: 20px; height: 20px"></i>
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="sidebar-user" id="sidebarUser">
          <div class="sidebar-user-avatar" id="sidebarAvatar">A</div>
          <div class="sidebar-user-info">
            <div class="sidebar-user-name" id="sidebarUserName">
              Carregando...
            </div>
            <div class="sidebar-user-role" id="sidebarUserRole">-</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <nav class="sidebar-nav">
          <button class="sidebar-nav-item" id="navEditProfile">
            <i data-lucide="user-pen" class="nav-icon"></i>
            Editar Meu Perfil
          </button>
          <button class="sidebar-nav-item" id="navSubmissions">
            <i data-lucide="file-text" class="nav-icon"></i>
            Meus Orçamentos
          </button>
          <button class="sidebar-nav-item" id="navUsers" style="display: none">
            <i data-lucide="users" class="nav-icon"></i>
            Gerenciar Usuários
          </button>
          <button class="sidebar-nav-item" id="navTheme">
            <i data-lucide="moon" class="nav-icon" id="navThemeIcon"></i>
            <span id="navThemeLabel">Tema Escuro</span>
          </button>
          <div class="sidebar-nav-divider"></div>
          <button class="sidebar-nav-item danger" id="navResetForm">
            <i data-lucide="trash-2" class="nav-icon"></i>
            Limpar Formulário
          </button>
          <button class="sidebar-nav-item danger" id="navResetRag">
            <i data-lucide="rotate-ccw" class="nav-icon"></i>
            Resetar Histórico IA
          </button>
          <button
            class="sidebar-nav-item danger"
            id="navRagReset"
            style="display: none"
          >
            <i data-lucide="refresh-cw" class="nav-icon"></i>
            Resetar RAG
          </button>
          <button
            class="sidebar-nav-item danger"
            id="navDbSetup"
            style="display: none"
          >
            <i data-lucide="database" class="nav-icon"></i>
            Resetar Chat + RAG
          </button>
          <div class="sidebar-nav-divider"></div>
          <button class="sidebar-nav-item danger" id="navLogout">
            <i data-lucide="log-out" class="nav-icon"></i>
            Sair
          </button>
        </nav>
        <div class="sidebar-footer">São Rafael © 2026 — v1.0</div>
      </aside>

      <!-- HEADER -->
      <header class="app-header">
        <div class="header-left">
          <button class="header-btn" id="sidebarOpenBtn" title="Menu">
            <i data-lucide="menu" style="width: 18px; height: 18px"></i>
          </button>
          <div class="brand">
            <img
              src="data:image/png;base64,"
              alt="São Rafael"
            />
          </div>
          <div class="header-tag">Wizard Orçamento</div>
        </div>
        <div class="header-right">
          <div class="connection-badge online" id="connectionBadge">
            <div class="connection-dot"></div>
            <span id="connectionText">Online</span>
          </div>
          <button
            class="header-btn chat-toggle"
            id="chatToggleBtn"
            title="Abrir Assistente IA"
          >
            <i
              data-lucide="message-circle"
              style="width: 14px; height: 14px"
            ></i>
            <span>Assistente IA</span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </header>

      <!-- MAIN CONTENT -->
      <div class="main-content">
        <!-- WIZARD AREA -->
        <div class="wizard-area" id="wizardArea">
          <div class="wizard-container">
            <!-- STEP INDICATOR -->
            <div class="step-indicator" id="stepIndicator"></div>

            <!-- STEP PANELS -->
            <div id="stepPanels"></div>

            <!-- NAVIGATION -->
            <div class="wizard-nav">
              <button
                class="btn-wizard btn-prev"
                id="btnPrev"
                style="visibility: hidden"
              >
                <i
                  data-lucide="arrow-left"
                  style="width: 16px; height: 16px"
                ></i>
                Anterior
              </button>
              <div class="ai-validating-badge" id="aiValidatingBadge">
                <div class="spinner"></div>
                <span>IA analisando...</span>
              </div>
              <button class="btn-wizard btn-next" id="btnNext">
                Próximo
                <i
                  data-lucide="arrow-right"
                  style="width: 16px; height: 16px"
                ></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- CHAT PANEL -->
        <div class="chat-panel" id="chatPanel">
          <div class="chat-panel-header">
            <h3>Assistente de Validação</h3>
            <div class="chat-panel-actions">
              <button
                class="chat-header-btn"
                id="sessionsToggleBtn"
                title="Sessões"
              >
                <i data-lucide="list" style="width: 16px; height: 16px"></i>
              </button>
              <button
                class="chat-header-btn"
                id="newSessionBtn"
                title="Nova Sessão"
              >
                <i data-lucide="plus" style="width: 16px; height: 16px"></i>
              </button>
              <button class="chat-panel-close" id="chatCloseBtn">
                <i data-lucide="x" style="width: 18px; height: 18px"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <!-- VALIDATION TRACKER (collapsible) -->
          <div class="validation-tracker" id="validationTracker">
            <div class="validation-tracker-header" id="validationTrackerToggle">
              <span class="validation-tracker-title">
                <i
                  data-lucide="clipboard-check"
                  style="width: 14px; height: 14px"
                ></i>
                Validações
                <span class="validation-tracker-badge" id="vtBadge">0/6</span>
              </span>
              <i
                data-lucide="chevron-down"
                style="width: 14px; height: 14px"
                class="validation-tracker-chevron"
              ></i>
            </div>
            <div
              class="validation-tracker-body"
              id="validationTrackerBody"
            ></div>
          </div>
          <!-- SESSIONS LIST (toggleable) -->
          <div class="sessions-panel" id="sessionsPanel" style="display: none">
            <div class="sessions-list" id="sessionsList">
              <div class="sessions-loading">Carregando sessões...</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="chatMessages"></div>
          <div class="chat-input-area">
            <input
              type="text"
              id="chatInput"
              placeholder="Pergunte sobre o formulário..."
            />
            <button id="chatSendBtn">
              <i data-lucide="send" style="width: 16px; height: 16px"></i>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <script>
      // ============================================
      // CONFIGURATION
      // ============================================
      const API_BASE = "https://longflatworm-n8n.cloudfy.live/webhook";
      const AGENT_URL = `${API_BASE}/saorafael-AgentRag`; // Unified: chat + validation
      const WIZARD_SUBMIT_URL = `${API_BASE}/saorafael-wizard-submit`; // Final submission only
      const HEALTH_URL = `${API_BASE}/saorafael_health`;
      const SESSIONS_URL = `${API_BASE}/saorafael-sessions`;
      const HISTORY_URL = `${API_BASE}/saorafael-history`;
      const DELETE_SESSION_URL = `${API_BASE}/saorafael-session`;
      const PRUNE_URL = `${API_BASE}/saorafael-prune-history`;
      const DB_SETUP_URL = `${API_BASE}/saorafael-DatabaseSetup`; // Reset DB (RAG only or full) — workflow SãoRafael-DatabaseSetup

      // Supabase Configuration (same instance as Sameka, different company_name)
      const SUPABASE_URL = "https://longflatworm-supabase.cloudfy.live";
      const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY =
        "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJyb2xlIjoiYW5vbiIsImlzcyI6InN1cGFiYXNlIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNjY1NzE2LCJleHAiOjE4MDUyMDE3MTZ9.nM55mAkSiyvvaIoUACEw4pY4GSJVfvrMX7b1q5JVwyg";
      const AUTH_STORAGE_KEY = "saorafael-auth";
      const COMPANY_NAME = "saorafael";

      const authStorage = buildAuthStorage();
      diagnoseAuthStorage(authStorage, AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);

      const sbClient = window.supabase.createClient(
        SUPABASE_URL,
        SUPABASE_ANON_KEY,
        {
          auth: {
            storage: authStorage,
            storageKey: AUTH_STORAGE_KEY,
            autoRefreshToken: true,
            persistSession: true,
            detectSessionInUrl: false,
            flowType: "implicit",
            lock: function (_name, _acquireTimeout, fn) {
              return fn();
            },
          },
        },
      );

      // Session management
      let currentSessionId = null;
      let sessions = [];

      // ============================================
      // LOCALSTORAGE PERSISTENCE
      // ============================================
      const STORAGE_KEY = "wizard_formData";
      const STORAGE_STEP_KEY = "wizard_currentStep";
      const STORAGE_VALIDATED_KEY = "wizard_stepValidated";
      const STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY = "wizard_aiValidations";
      const STORAGE_APPLIED_SUG_KEY = "wizard_appliedSuggestions";

      function saveToStorage() {
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(formData));
          localStorage.setItem(STORAGE_STEP_KEY, String(currentStep));
          localStorage.setItem(
            STORAGE_VALIDATED_KEY,
            JSON.stringify(stepValidated),
          );
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Falha ao salvar no localStorage:", e);
        }
      }

      function loadFromStorage() {
        try {
          const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
          if (saved) {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
            // Merge saved data into formData (preserving schema structure)
            for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
              const key = `step${i}`;
              if (parsed[key]) {
                // MERGE (don't replace) so schema defaults + any non-schema
                // persisted keys (e.g. local_instalacao_*) survive.
                formData[key] = { ...formData[key], ...parsed[key] };
              }
            }
            // Preserve top-level "private" fields too (e.g. _client_id,
            // _client_locked, _editing_submission_id, _editing_protocol).
            Object.keys(parsed).forEach((k) => {
              if (k.startsWith("_")) {
                formData[k] = parsed[k];
              }
            });
          }
          const savedStep = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_STEP_KEY);
          if (savedStep) {
            const s = parseInt(savedStep);
            if (s >= 1 && s <= totalSteps) currentStep = s;
          }
          const savedValidated = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_VALIDATED_KEY);
          if (savedValidated) {
            stepValidated = JSON.parse(savedValidated);
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Falha ao carregar do localStorage:", e);
        }
      }

      function clearFormStorage() {
        localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEY);
        localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_STEP_KEY);
        localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_VALIDATED_KEY);
        localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY);
        localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_APPLIED_SUG_KEY);
      }

      // ============================================
      // HEALTH CHECK (Online/Offline)
      // ============================================
      let healthInterval = null;

      function setConnectionState(isOnline) {
        const badge = document.getElementById("connectionBadge");
        const text = document.getElementById("connectionText");
        if (!badge || !text) return;
        if (isOnline) {
          badge.className = "connection-badge online";
          text.textContent = "Online";
        } else {
          badge.className = "connection-badge offline";
          text.textContent = "Offline";
        }
      }

      async function checkHealth() {
        try {
          const res = await fetch(HEALTH_URL, {
            method: "GET",
            cache: "no-store",
          });
          if (res.ok) {
            const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
            setConnectionState(data.status === "ok" || res.ok);
          } else {
            setConnectionState(false);
          }
        } catch {
          setConnectionState(false);
        }
      }

      function startHealthCheck() {
        checkHealth();
        healthInterval = setInterval(checkHealth, 30000); // every 30s
      }

      // ============================================
      // IBGE API: Estados e Cidades do Brasil
      // ============================================
      const IBGE_API = {
        ESTADOS:
          "https://servicodados.ibge.gov.br/api/v1/localidades/estados?orderBy=nome",
        CIDADES: (uf) =>
          `https://servicodados.ibge.gov.br/api/v1/localidades/estados/${uf}/municipios?orderBy=nome`,
      };

      let ibgeEstados = [];
      let ibgeCidadesCache = {};

      async function fetchIbgeEstados() {
        if (ibgeEstados.length) return ibgeEstados;
        try {
          const res = await fetch(IBGE_API.ESTADOS);
          ibgeEstados = await res.json();
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Falha ao carregar estados IBGE:", e);
          ibgeEstados = [];
        }
        return ibgeEstados;
      }

      async function fetchIbgeCidades(uf) {
        if (!uf) return [];
        if (ibgeCidadesCache[uf]) return ibgeCidadesCache[uf];
        try {
          const res = await fetch(IBGE_API.CIDADES(uf));
          ibgeCidadesCache[uf] = await res.json();
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Falha ao carregar cidades IBGE para", uf, e);
          ibgeCidadesCache[uf] = [];
        }
        return ibgeCidadesCache[uf];
      }

      // Pre-fetch estados on load — and re-render the current step once
      // they arrive, so saved UF/cidade values restored from localStorage
      // re-appear in the dropdowns after a page reload.
      fetchIbgeEstados().then(() => {
        try {
          if (
            typeof renderCurrentStep === "function" &&
            typeof currentStep !== "undefined" &&
            document.getElementById("stepPanels")
          ) {
            renderCurrentStep();
          }
        } catch (e) {
          /* ignore — wizard may not be initialized yet */
        }
      });

              hint: "💡 Deixe em branco para usar o valor calculado automaticamente (volume × fator de temperatura). Preencha apenas se tiver memória de cálculo própria — neste caso o painel de Análise marcará 'manual'.",

      // ============================================
      // STATE MANAGEMENT
      // ============================================
      let currentStep = 1;
      const totalSteps = Object.keys(SCHEMA).length;
      let formData = {};
      let validationErrors = {};
      let stepValidated = {};
      let aiValidationResults = {};
      // Tracks the hash of step-data for which the user already confirmed
      // "Avançar mesmo assim" with pending warnings — avoids re-asking the
      // confirm dialog on every click and prevents the AI re-validation loop
      // (the AI is non-deterministic and would otherwise generate fresh
      // suggestions on every advance).
      let warningsConfirmedHash = {};
      // Stable hash for a step's data — used as the cache key.
      function _stepDataHash(stepNum) {
        try {
          const obj = formData[`step${stepNum}`] || {};
          return JSON.stringify(obj);
        } catch (e) {
          return String(Math.random());
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // APPLIED-SUGGESTIONS MEMORY
      // Tracks which AI suggestions the user has explicitly applied per step.
      // Used to suppress repetitive recommendations on re-validation — the AI
      // is non-deterministic and otherwise re-suggests the same fields with
      // slightly different wording, creating an infinite recommendation loop.
      // ============================================
      let appliedSuggestionsMemory = {}; // { step1: { fieldName: appliedValue }, ... }
      function loadAppliedSuggestionsFromStorage() {
        try {
          const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_APPLIED_SUG_KEY);
          if (saved) appliedSuggestionsMemory = JSON.parse(saved) || {};
        } catch (e) {}
      }
      function saveAppliedSuggestionsToStorage() {
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(
            STORAGE_APPLIED_SUG_KEY,
            JSON.stringify(appliedSuggestionsMemory),
          );
        } catch (e) {}
      }
      loadAppliedSuggestionsFromStorage();

      function _normalizeSugVal(v) {
        if (v == null) return "";
        const s = String(v).trim().toLowerCase();
        if (!s) return "";
        const numLike = /^-?[\d.,]+$/.test(s);
        if (numLike) {
          const n = parseFloat(s.replace(",", "."));
          if (!isNaN(n)) return String(n);
        }
        return s.replace(/\s+/g, " ");
      }

      function _getCurrentFieldValue(stepKey, field) {
        const data = formData[stepKey] || {};
        const arrM = String(field).match(/^(\w+)\[(\d+)\]\.(\w+)$/);
        if (arrM) {
          const arr = data[arrM[1]];
          const idx = parseInt(arrM[2], 10);
          if (Array.isArray(arr) && arr[idx]) return arr[idx][arrM[3]];
          return undefined;
        }
        return data[field];
      }

      function recordAppliedSuggestion(stepKey, fieldName, value) {
        if (!stepKey || !fieldName) return;
        if (!appliedSuggestionsMemory[stepKey])
          appliedSuggestionsMemory[stepKey] = {};
        appliedSuggestionsMemory[stepKey][fieldName] = String(value);
        saveAppliedSuggestionsToStorage();
      }

      // Returns true if a suggestion is already "addressed" — i.e. the user
      // either already has the suggested value (or any valid alternative)
      // in the form, OR previously applied a suggestion for this exact field
      // and the value still matches what they applied.
      function isSuggestionAddressed(stepKey, sug) {
        if (!sug || !sug.field) return false;
        const cur = _getCurrentFieldValue(stepKey, sug.field);
        const curN = _normalizeSugVal(cur);
        if (!curN) return false;
        if (curN === _normalizeSugVal(sug.value)) return true;
        if (Array.isArray(sug.alternatives)) {
          for (const a of sug.alternatives) {
            if (a && curN === _normalizeSugVal(a.value)) return true;
          }
        }
        const applied = appliedSuggestionsMemory[stepKey] || {};
        if (
          applied[sug.field] != null &&
          curN === _normalizeSugVal(applied[sug.field])
        ) {
          return true;
        }
        return false;
      }

      // After applying a suggestion (or after a re-validation), recompute
      // the cached step status by removing addressed suggestions. If nothing
      // remains, promote the confirmed-hash so the next "Avançar" passes
      // through without re-calling the AI nor showing the warnings dialog.
      function recomputeStepValidationStatus(stepKey) {
        const r = aiValidationResults[stepKey];
        if (!r) return;
        const orig = Array.isArray(r.suggestions) ? r.suggestions : [];
        const remaining = orig.filter(
          (s) => !isSuggestionAddressed(stepKey, s),
        );
        const hasCriticalRemaining = remaining.some(
          (s) => String(s.severity || "").toLowerCase() === "critical",
        );
        const hasWarningRemaining = remaining.some(
          (s) => String(s.severity || "").toLowerCase() === "warning",
        );
        r.hasCriticalErrors = hasCriticalRemaining;
        r.hasWarnings =
          hasWarningRemaining || (!r.hasCriticalErrors && remaining.length > 0);
        r._remainingSuggestions = remaining;
        r._addressedCount = orig.length - remaining.length;
        const stepN = parseInt(String(stepKey).replace("step", ""), 10);
        if (!r.hasCriticalErrors && !isNaN(stepN)) {
          // Promote confirm-hash: next "Avançar" click will skip AI re-run
          // and skip the "Avançar mesmo assim?" dialog.
          warningsConfirmedHash[stepKey] = _stepDataHash(stepN);
        }
        try {
          saveValidationsToStorage();
        } catch (e) {}
        try {
          renderValidationTracker();
        } catch (e) {}
      }

      // Initialize formData structure
      function initFormData() {
        for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
          const stepKey = `step${i}`;
          const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
          formData[stepKey] = {};
          if (stepSchema.isDynamic) {
            formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField] = [{}];
          } else {
            Object.keys(stepSchema.fields).forEach((fieldName) => {
              const field = stepSchema.fields[fieldName];
              formData[stepKey][fieldName] =
                field.default !== undefined ? String(field.default) : "";
            });
          }
        }
      }
      initFormData();
      // Load any previously saved data from localStorage
      loadFromStorage();

      // ============================================
      // VALIDATION TRACKER
      // Accumulates AI validation results per step
      // ============================================

      function loadValidationsFromStorage() {
        try {
          const saved = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY);
          if (saved) aiValidationResults = JSON.parse(saved);
        } catch (e) {}
      }
      function saveValidationsToStorage() {
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(
            STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY,
            JSON.stringify(aiValidationResults),
          );
        } catch (e) {}
      }
      loadValidationsFromStorage();

      function renderValidationTracker() {
        const body = document.getElementById("validationTrackerBody");
        const badge = document.getElementById("vtBadge");
        if (!body || !badge) return;

        const validatedCount = Object.keys(aiValidationResults).length;
        badge.textContent = `${validatedCount}/${totalSteps}`;

        let html = "";
        for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
          const key = `step${i}`;
          const result = aiValidationResults[key];
          const title = SCHEMA[key].title;
          let icon,
            statusClass,
            statusText,
            details = "";

          if (!result) {
            icon = "⏳";
            statusClass = "pending";
            statusText = "Pendente";
          } else if (result.hasCriticalErrors) {
            icon = "🔴";
            statusClass = "error";
            statusText = "Erro";
          } else if (result.hasWarnings) {
            icon = "🟡";
            statusClass = "warning";
            statusText = "Alerta";
          } else {
            icon = "✅";
            statusClass = "ok";
            statusText = "OK";
          }

          if (result) {
            // Extract key points from output (first few bullet points)
            const bullets =
              (result.output || "").match(/[•\-]\s*.+|🟢.+|🟡.+|🔴.+/g) || [];
            const topBullets = bullets.slice(0, 4);
            if (topBullets.length > 0) {
              details =
                "<ul>" +
                topBullets
                  .map((b) => `<li>${b.replace(/^[•\-]\s*/, "")}</li>`)
                  .join("") +
                "</ul>";
            }
            if (result.suggestions && result.suggestions.length > 0) {
              details += `<span class="vt-suggestions-count">${result.suggestions.length} sugestão(ões) aplicada(s)</span>`;
            }
          }

          html += `<div class="vt-step">
            <div class="vt-step-header">
              <span class="vt-step-icon">${icon}</span>
              <span class="vt-step-name">Etapa ${i}: ${title}</span>
              <span class="vt-step-status ${statusClass}">${statusText}</span>
            </div>
            ${details ? `<div class="vt-step-details">${details}</div>` : ""}
          </div>`;
        }
        body.innerHTML = html;
      }

      function initValidationTracker() {
        const toggle = document.getElementById("validationTrackerToggle");
        const tracker = document.getElementById("validationTracker");
        if (toggle && tracker) {
          toggle.addEventListener("click", () => {
            tracker.classList.toggle("open");
          });
        }
        renderValidationTracker();
      }

      // ============================================
      // VALIDATION ENGINE (Zod-equivalent in vanilla JS)
      // Guarantees data integrity for all PLANILHA fields
      // ============================================
      function validateField(fieldSchema, value, fieldName) {
        const errors = [];
        const val =
          value === null || value === undefined ? "" : String(value).trim();

        // Required check
        if (fieldSchema.required && !val) {
          errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" é obrigatório.`);
          return errors;
        }

        // If not required and empty, skip further checks
        if (!val) return errors;

        // Type-specific validations
        switch (fieldSchema.type) {
          case "number": {
            const num = parseFloat(val);
            if (isNaN(num)) {
              errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" deve ser um número válido.`);
              break;
            }
            if (fieldSchema.min !== undefined && num < fieldSchema.min) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" mínimo: ${fieldSchema.min}. Valor: ${num}`,
              );
            }
            if (fieldSchema.max !== undefined && num > fieldSchema.max) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" máximo: ${fieldSchema.max}. Valor: ${num}`,
              );
            }
            // Modular step validation (critical for dimensions)
            if (
              fieldSchema.step &&
              fieldSchema.step !== 1 &&
              fieldSchema.step < 1
            ) {
              const base = fieldSchema.min || 0;
              const diff = Math.abs(num - base);
              const remainder = diff % fieldSchema.step;
              const epsilon = 0.001;
              if (
                remainder > epsilon &&
                Math.abs(remainder - fieldSchema.step) > epsilon
              ) {
                errors.push(
                  `"${fieldSchema.label}" deve seguir incrementos de ${fieldSchema.step}m a partir de ${base}m. Valor ${num} não é modular.`,
                );
              }
            }
            break;
          }
          case "text":
          case "cep": {
            if (fieldSchema.minLength && val.length < fieldSchema.minLength) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" mínimo ${fieldSchema.minLength} caracteres.`,
              );
            }
            if (fieldSchema.maxLength && val.length > fieldSchema.maxLength) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" máximo ${fieldSchema.maxLength} caracteres.`,
              );
            }
            if (fieldSchema.pattern) {
              const regex = new RegExp(fieldSchema.pattern);
              if (!regex.test(val)) {
                errors.push(
                  fieldSchema.patternMsg ||
                    `"${fieldSchema.label}" formato inválido.`,
                );
              }
            }
            // Custom CPF/CNPJ validation
            if (fieldSchema.customValidation === "cpfcnpj") {
              const digits = val.replace(/\D/g, "");
              if (digits.length > 0 && digits.length < 11) {
                errors.push(
                  `"${fieldSchema.label}" está incompleto. CPF tem 11 dígitos, CNPJ tem 14.`,
                );
              } else if (digits.length === 11 && !validateCpf(digits)) {
                errors.push(
                  `"${fieldSchema.label}" — CPF inválido (dígitos verificadores não conferem).`,
                );
              } else if (digits.length > 11 && digits.length < 14) {
                errors.push(
                  `"${fieldSchema.label}" está incompleto. CNPJ precisa de 14 dígitos.`,
                );
              } else if (digits.length === 14 && !validateCnpj(digits)) {
                errors.push(
                  `"${fieldSchema.label}" — CNPJ inválido (dígitos verificadores não conferem).`,
                );
              }
            }
            break;
          }
          case "textarea": {
            if (fieldSchema.minLength && val.length < fieldSchema.minLength) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" mínimo ${fieldSchema.minLength} caracteres.`,
              );
            }
            if (fieldSchema.maxLength && val.length > fieldSchema.maxLength) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" excede ${fieldSchema.maxLength} caracteres (atual: ${val.length}).`,
              );
            }
            break;
          }
          case "select": {
            if (
              fieldSchema.options &&
              fieldSchema.required &&
              !fieldSchema.options.includes(val)
            ) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" — "${val}" não é uma opção válida.`,
              );
            }
            break;
          }
          case "creatable": {
            // Creatable accepts custom values, only validate length
            if (fieldSchema.maxLength && val.length > fieldSchema.maxLength) {
              errors.push(
                `"${fieldSchema.label}" excede ${fieldSchema.maxLength} caracteres.`,
              );
            }
            // Custom modular validation for dimensions
            if (fieldSchema.customValidation === "modular028") {
              const num = parseFloat(val);
              if (isNaN(num)) {
                errors.push(
                  `"${fieldSchema.label}" deve ser um número válido.`,
                );
              } else if (num < 1.12) {
                errors.push(`"${fieldSchema.label}" mínimo: 1.12m.`);
              } else {
                const diff = Math.round((num - 1.12) * 100);
                if (diff % 28 !== 0) {
                  // Find nearest valid
                  const lower = 1.12 + Math.floor(diff / 28) * 0.28;
                  const upper = lower + 0.28;
                  errors.push(
                    `"${fieldSchema.label}" deve ser modular (múltiplo de 0.28m a partir de 1.12m). Valores próximos: ${lower.toFixed(2)}m ou ${upper.toFixed(2)}m.`,
                  );
                }
              }
            }
            if (fieldSchema.customValidation === "modular005") {
              const num = parseFloat(val);
              if (isNaN(num)) {
                errors.push(
                  `"${fieldSchema.label}" deve ser um número válido.`,
                );
              } else if (num < 2.0 || num > 6.0) {
                errors.push(
                  `"${fieldSchema.label}" deve estar entre 2.00m e 6.00m.`,
                );
              } else {
                const diff = Math.round((num - 2.0) * 100);
                if (diff % 5 !== 0) {
                  const lower = 2.0 + Math.floor(diff / 5) * 0.05;
                  const upper = lower + 0.05;
                  errors.push(
                    `"${fieldSchema.label}" deve seguir incrementos de 0.05m. Valores próximos: ${lower.toFixed(2)}m ou ${upper.toFixed(2)}m.`,
                  );
                }
              }
            }
            break;
          }
        }
        return errors;
      }

      // Sync all visible DOM fields to formData before validation
      // Prevents stale-state bugs where user changed a field but event didn't fire yet
      function syncFormFromDOM() {
        const panel = document.getElementById("stepPanels");
        if (!panel) return;
        const stepKey = `step${currentStep}`;
        const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];

        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-field-name]").forEach((el) => {
          const fieldName = el.getAttribute("data-field-name");
          const arrayIdx = el.getAttribute("data-array-idx");
          const isCreatable = el.classList.contains("creatable-container");
          const isIbgeCidadeUf = el.classList.contains(
            "ibge-cidade-uf-container",
          );

          let val;
          if (isIbgeCidadeUf) {
            // Combined city/state — skip, handled by its own logic
            return;
          } else if (isCreatable) {
            const input = el.querySelector(".creatable-input");
            val = input ? input.value : "";
          } else {
            val = el.value;
          }

          if (val === undefined) return;

          if (arrayIdx !== null && arrayIdx !== undefined && arrayIdx !== "") {
            const idx = parseInt(arrayIdx);
            if (stepSchema.isDynamic) {
              if (!formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx]) {
                formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx] = {};
              }
              formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx][fieldName] = val;
            }
          } else {
            formData[stepKey][fieldName] = val;
          }
        });
        saveToStorage();
      }

      function validateStep(stepNum) {
        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
        const errors = {};
        let hasErrors = false;

        if (stepSchema.isDynamic) {
          const items = formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField] || [];
          if (items.length < (stepSchema.arrayMin || 1)) {
            errors._array = [
              `Adicione pelo menos ${stepSchema.arrayMin || 1} ${stepSchema.arrayLabel.toLowerCase()}.`,
            ];
            hasErrors = true;
          }
          items.forEach((item, idx) => {
            Object.entries(stepSchema.arrayFields).forEach(
              ([fieldName, fieldSchema]) => {
                const fieldErrors = validateField(
                  fieldSchema,
                  item[fieldName],
                  fieldName,
                );
                if (fieldErrors.length > 0) {
                  const key = `${stepSchema.arrayField}[${idx}].${fieldName}`;
                  errors[key] = fieldErrors;
                  hasErrors = true;
                }
              },
            );
          });
        } else {
          Object.entries(stepSchema.fields).forEach(
            ([fieldName, fieldSchema]) => {
              const value = formData[stepKey][fieldName];
              const fieldErrors = validateField(fieldSchema, value, fieldName);
              if (fieldErrors.length > 0) {
                errors[fieldName] = fieldErrors;
                hasErrors = true;
              }
            },
          );
        }

        // Cross-field validation: luminárias vs área (step3)
        // ÚNICA FONTE DE VERDADE: rcRecommendLuminarias (Reality Check Engine).
        // Antes existia um cálculo paralelo ceil(area/6) aqui, que produzia
        // números diferentes do que a UI/sidebar exibia ao usuário — causa
        // direta da queixa "UI sugere X, agente analisa Y".
        if (stepNum === 3) {
          const qtdLum = parseInt(formData.step3.qtd_luminarias) || 0;
          const iluminacao = formData.step3.iluminacao || "";
          if (
            qtdLum > 0 &&
            !iluminacao.includes("Sem Iluminação") &&
            typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function" &&
            typeof rcRecommendLuminarias === "function" &&
            typeof getChamberSnapshot === "function"
          ) {
            try {
              const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
              const comps = rcComputeCompartments(snap);
              const cfgAll =
                typeof rcGetCompartmentsConfig === "function"
                  ? rcGetCompartmentsConfig()
                  : {};
              // Total recomendado/min/max = soma das recomendações por compartimento
              let totalRec = 0,
                totalMin = 0,
                totalMax = 0,
                totalArea = 0;
              comps.forEach((c) => {
                const cf = cfgAll[c.name] || {};
                const rec = rcRecommendLuminarias(
                  c,
                  cf.categoria_produto,
                  cf.temperatura_setpoint,
                );
                totalRec += rec.recommended || 0;
                totalMin += rec.min || 0;
                totalMax += rec.max || 0;
                totalArea += c.area || 0;
              });
              if (totalRec > 0) {
                if (qtdLum > totalMax * 2) {
                  // Apenas casos claramente absurdos (>2x do teto) bloqueiam.
                  if (!errors.qtd_luminarias) errors.qtd_luminarias = [];
                  errors.qtd_luminarias.push(
                    `Quantidade absurda para ${totalArea.toFixed(1)}m² (${qtdLum} luminárias). Máximo razoável: ${totalMax}. Recomendado: ${totalRec}.`,
                  );
                  hasErrors = true;
                } else if (qtdLum > totalMax) {
                  if (!errors.qtd_luminarias) errors.qtd_luminarias = [];
                  errors.qtd_luminarias.push(
                    `Quantidade alta para ${totalArea.toFixed(1)}m². Recomendado: ${totalRec} (máx razoável: ${totalMax}). Confirme se é intencional.`,
                  );
                  // Soft warning, não bloqueia
                } else if (qtdLum < totalMin) {
                  if (!errors.qtd_luminarias) errors.qtd_luminarias = [];
                  errors.qtd_luminarias.push(
                    `Poucas luminárias para ${totalArea.toFixed(1)}m². Recomendado: ${totalRec} (mín ${totalMin}). Verifique se é intencional.`,
                  );
                  // Soft warning
                }
              }
            } catch (e) {}
          }
        }

        validationErrors[stepKey] = errors;
        // Step 4 portas[] validation (sub-array, not native isDynamic)
        if (stepNum === 4) {
          const portas = (formData.step4 && formData.step4.portas) || [];
          const portaErrors = {};
          // Compartimentos atuais — para validar 'compartimento_id'
          let compNames = [];
          try {
            const snapV = getChamberSnapshot();
            compNames = rcComputeCompartments(snapV).map((c) => c.name);
          } catch (e) {}
          if (portas.length === 0) {
            portaErrors._array = ["Adicione pelo menos uma porta."];
            hasErrors = true;
          }
          portas.forEach((p, idx) => {
            Object.entries(PORTA_FIELDS).forEach(([fname, fschema]) => {
              // Injeta opções dinâmicas para compartimento_id
              const schema =
                fname === "compartimento_id" && compNames.length > 0
                  ? Object.assign({}, fschema, { options: compNames })
                  : fschema;
              const fe = validateField(schema, p[fname], fname);
              if (fe.length > 0) {
                portaErrors[`${idx}.${fname}`] = fe;
                hasErrors = true;
              }
            });
          });
          // Cross-check: each compartment must have ≥1 porta
          try {
            const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
            const comps = rcComputeCompartments(snap);
            if (comps.length > 1) {
              const ids = new Set(
                portas.map((p) => p.compartimento_id).filter(Boolean),
              );
              comps.forEach((c) => {
                if (!ids.has(c.name)) {
                  portaErrors._array = portaErrors._array || [];
                  portaErrors._array.push(
                    `Compartimento ${c.name} sem porta — adicione 1 porta apontando para ${c.name}.`,
                  );
                  hasErrors = true;
                }
              });
            }
          } catch (e) {}
          errors._portas = portaErrors;
          // Achata mensagens de portaErrors em errors (chaves prefixadas) para que
          // showValidationErrorsInChat (Object.values(errors).flat()) exiba strings, não [object Object].
          Object.entries(portaErrors).forEach(([k, v]) => {
            if (Array.isArray(v) && v.length > 0) {
              errors[`_porta_${k}`] = v.map(String);
            }
          });
        }

        // Step 6 mechanical-only validation (compartments inherited from step3 — already validated there)
        if (stepNum === 6) {
          // No additional cross-validation needed: arrayFields validation above
          // already covers all required mechanical fields per compartment.
        }

        return !hasErrors;
      }

      // ============================================
      // AI VALIDATION - Uses unified AgentRag endpoint
      // wizardValidation: true → stateless analysis (not saved to DB)
      // ============================================
      async function aiValidateStep(stepNum) {
        const badge = document.getElementById("aiValidatingBadge");
        badge.classList.add("show");

        try {
          // Collect ALL data filled so far (accumulative)
          const dataToValidate = {};
          for (let i = 1; i <= stepNum; i++) {
            dataToValidate[`step${i}`] = formData[`step${i}`];
          }

          // §17 Reality Check — run BEFORE asking the AI so it can cross-reference
          const rc =
            typeof runRealityCheck === "function" ? runRealityCheck() : null;
          let rcContext = "";
          if (rc) {
            const issuesTxt = rc.issues
              .map(
                (i) =>
                  `- [${i.level.toUpperCase()}] ${i.category || "-"}: ${i.message}`,
              )
              .join("\n");
            // Cálculo determinístico oficial de luminárias por compartimento —
            // expõe o número exato para a IA citar sem inventar.
            let lumTxt = "";
            try {
              const compsLum = rc.derived?.compartments || [];
              const cfgAllLum =
                typeof rcGetCompartmentsConfig === "function"
                  ? rcGetCompartmentsConfig()
                  : {};
              if (
                compsLum.length &&
                typeof rcRecommendLuminarias === "function"
              ) {
                const rows = compsLum.map((c) => {
                  const cf = cfgAllLum[c.name] || {};
                  const r = rcRecommendLuminarias(
                    c,
                    cf.categoria_produto,
                    cf.temperatura_setpoint,
                  );
                  return {
                    compartimento: c.name,
                    area_m2: c.area,
                    alvo_lux: r.targetLux,
                    recomendado: r.recommended,
                    faixa_aceitavel: `${r.min}-${r.max}`,
                  };
                });
                const totalRec = rows.reduce((s, r) => s + r.recomendado, 0);
                const totalMin = rows.reduce(
                  (s, _r, i) => s + (rcRecommendLuminarias(compsLum[i], (cfgAllLum[compsLum[i].name] || {}).categoria_produto, (cfgAllLum[compsLum[i].name] || {}).temperatura_setpoint).min || 0),
                  0,
                );
                const totalMax = rows.reduce(
                  (s, _r, i) => s + (rcRecommendLuminarias(compsLum[i], (cfgAllLum[compsLum[i].name] || {}).categoria_produto, (cfgAllLum[compsLum[i].name] || {}).temperatura_setpoint).max || 0),
                  0,
                );
                lumTxt = `\n\nLUMINÁRIAS — cálculo determinístico oficial (NÃO RECALCULE, NÃO INVENTE OUTRO NÚMERO):\nFórmula: ceil(área × alvo_lux ÷ 4500 lm/luminária). Alvos: 250 lux farmacêutico/laticínios/carne; 200 lux freezer; 175 lux resfriado; 150 lux climatizada.\nPor compartimento: ${JSON.stringify(rows)}\nTOTAL recomendado: ${totalRec} · faixa aceitável: ${totalMin}-${totalMax}.\nREGRA: se 'qtd_luminarias' atual está entre ${totalMin} e ${totalMax}, NÃO sugerir mudança. Se sugerir, value DEVE ser exatamente ${totalRec}.`;
              }
            } catch (e) {}
            rcContext = `\n\nReality Check (cálculo determinístico local — confiável e prioritário):\n${JSON.stringify(
              {
                derived: rc.derived,
                counts: rc.counts,
                blocking: rc.blocking,
              },
            )}\n\nIssues detectados pelo Reality Check:\n${issuesTxt || "(nenhum)"}${lumTxt}\n\nIMPORTANTE: O Reality Check usou as fórmulas oficiais (grade modular 0,28m, espessura PU mínima por temperatura, carga térmica = volume × fator + multiplicadores, luminárias = área × lux ÷ 4500). Se você (IA) detectar algo conflitante, alinhe-se com o cálculo determinístico.`;
          }

          // Render Reality Check inline in chat BEFORE the AI response (single source of truth)
          if (rc && (rc.issues.length || rc.derived.volume_m3 > 0)) {
            renderRcChatSummary(rc, stepNum);
          }

          const isEditingExisting = !!formData._editing_submission_id;
          const editingNote = isEditingExisting
            ? `\n\nMODO EDIÇÃO ATIVO — Este orçamento já foi submetido anteriormente (protocolo ${formData._editing_protocol || "#" + formData._editing_submission_id}). Os valores abaixo já foram aprovados pelo vendedor na submissão original. Trate-os como BASELINE: só gere suggestion se o Reality Check apontar erro real (🔴) ou se houver incoerência técnica CLARA. Não re-recomende campos só por preferência de mercado neste modo.`
            : "";

          const payload = {
            wizardValidation: true, // Flag: don't save to DB, just analyze
            chatInput: `[WIZARD_VALIDATION]\n\nEtapa Atual: ${stepNum}/${totalSteps} — ${SCHEMA["step" + stepNum].title}\n\nDados do Formulário (allData):\n${JSON.stringify(dataToValidate)}\n\nSchema da Etapa Atual (stepSchema):\n${JSON.stringify(getStepFieldsSummary(stepNum))}${rcContext}${editingNote}\n\nSugestões já aplicadas pelo usuário (não recomende de novo nestes campos a menos que o valor atual esteja realmente fora):\n${JSON.stringify(appliedSuggestionsMemory[`step${stepNum}`] || {})}\n\nInstrução: Analise tecnicamente os dados da etapa ${stepNum} cruzando com todas as etapas anteriores. Use o Reality Check como fonte de verdade nos cálculos. Não repita recomendações em campos cuja correção já foi aceita pelo usuário (veja "Sugestões já aplicadas"). REGRA DE CONSISTÊNCIA: o valor citado no markdown 'output' DEVE ser idêntico ao 'suggestions[].value' para o mesmo campo — proibido contradizer-se na própria resposta. REGRA DE NÃO-DUPLICAÇÃO: máximo 1 entrada em suggestions[] por field. REGRA DE OPÇÕES VÁLIDAS: para campos do tipo SELECT, tanto 'value' quanto 'alternatives[].value' DEVEM ser EXATAMENTE uma das strings declaradas em 'options' do stepSchema acima — proibido inventar opções novas (ex.: \"Aço Pré-Pintado\" não existe se as opções são apenas Galvalume, Inox 430, Inox 304, Alumínio Liso, Alumínio Estucado). Se nenhuma opção do schema serve, NÃO emita a suggestion. CLASSIFICAÇÃO DE DEMANDA: sempre devolva também o objeto 'complexity_classification' (level/score/label/factors/engineering_review_required/recommendation) calculado pelas regras de negócio (RAG doc 02 — Hard/Soft Rules) sobre todos os dados disponíveis até esta etapa. Retorne JSON com output, suggestions E complexity_classification.`,
            sessionId: currentSessionId || generateSessionId(),
            currentStep: stepNum,
            stepName: SCHEMA[`step${stepNum}`].title,
            totalSteps: totalSteps,
            allData: dataToValidate,
            stepSchema: getStepFieldsSummary(stepNum),
            realityCheck: rc,
            isEditingExistingSubmission: isEditingExisting,
            addressedSuggestions:
              appliedSuggestionsMemory[`step${stepNum}`] || {},
          };

          const response = await fetch(AGENT_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: {
              "Content-Type": "application/json",
              ...getAuthHeaders(),
            },
            body: JSON.stringify(payload),
          });

          if (!response.ok) {
            console.warn("AI validation endpoint returned:", response.status);
            addChatMessage(
              `✅ Etapa ${stepNum} validada localmente. (Validação IA indisponível)`,
              "system",
            );
            return { valid: true, hasCriticalErrors: false };
          }

          let result = await response.json();

          // Handle case where response is a string containing JSON
          let output = "";
          let suggestions = [];
          let complexityClassification = null;

          // The agent may return the JSON as a string in result.output
          if (typeof result === "string") {
            try {
              result = JSON.parse(result);
            } catch (e) {
              output = result;
            }
          }

          // Try to extract structured response
          if (result.output) {
            // Check if output itself is a JSON string
            if (
              typeof result.output === "string" &&
              result.output.trim().startsWith("{")
            ) {
              try {
                const parsed = JSON.parse(result.output);
                output = parsed.output || result.output;
                suggestions = parsed.suggestions || result.suggestions || [];
                complexityClassification =
                  parsed.complexity_classification ||
                  result.complexity_classification ||
                  null;
              } catch (e) {
                output = result.output;
                suggestions = result.suggestions || [];
                complexityClassification =
                  result.complexity_classification || null;
              }
            } else {
              output = result.output;
              suggestions = result.suggestions || [];
              complexityClassification =
                result.complexity_classification || null;
            }
          } else if (result.message) {
            // Check if message contains JSON
            if (
              typeof result.message === "string" &&
              result.message.trim().startsWith("{")
            ) {
              try {
                const parsed = JSON.parse(result.message);
                output = parsed.output || result.message;
                suggestions = parsed.suggestions || [];
                complexityClassification =
                  parsed.complexity_classification || null;
              } catch (e) {
                output = result.message;
              }
            } else {
              output = result.message;
            }
          } else {
            output = "Etapa validada sem observações.";
          }

          // Clean output: remove wrapping code fences if AI returned ```json blocks
          output = output.replace(/^```json\s*/i, "").replace(/\s*```$/i, "");
          // If output still looks like JSON, try to extract the markdown part
          if (output.trim().startsWith("{")) {
            try {
              const lastTry = JSON.parse(output);
              output = lastTry.output || output;
              suggestions = lastTry.suggestions || suggestions;
              complexityClassification =
                lastTry.complexity_classification || complexityClassification;
            } catch (e) {
              /* keep as-is */
            }
          }

          // Detect severity levels
          // The AI now declares an explicit `severity` per suggestion
          // ("critical" | "warning"). We respect that and only fall back to
          // emoji parsing when the field is missing. Critical = blocks
          // submit; warning = strongly recommended but never blocks.

          // ============================================================
          // SANITIZAÇÃO DETERMINÍSTICA — campos com cálculo oficial no
          // Reality Check NÃO podem ser sobrescritos pela IA. A IA é
          // estatística e frequentemente lê números errados do contexto
          // (já causou recomendar 21 luminárias para 120m² quando a
          // fórmula oficial dá 7). Para esses campos, ou alinhamos o
          // value da sugestão ao RC, ou descartamos a sugestão se já
          // estamos dentro da faixa aceitável.
          // ============================================================
          if (stepNum === 3 && Array.isArray(suggestions)) {
            try {
              const rcSan =
                typeof runRealityCheck === "function" ? runRealityCheck() : null;
              const compsSan =
                rcSan?.derived?.compartments ||
                (typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function" &&
                typeof getChamberSnapshot === "function"
                  ? rcComputeCompartments(getChamberSnapshot())
                  : []);
              const cfgAllSan =
                typeof rcGetCompartmentsConfig === "function"
                  ? rcGetCompartmentsConfig()
                  : {};
              let rcRec = 0,
                rcMin = 0,
                rcMax = 0,
                rcArea = 0;
              compsSan.forEach((c) => {
                const cf = cfgAllSan[c.name] || {};
                const r =
                  typeof rcRecommendLuminarias === "function"
                    ? rcRecommendLuminarias(
                        c,
                        cf.categoria_produto,
                        cf.temperatura_setpoint,
                      )
                    : null;
                if (r) {
                  rcRec += r.recommended || 0;
                  rcMin += r.min || 0;
                  rcMax += r.max || 0;
                  rcArea += c.area || 0;
                }
              });
              if (rcRec > 0) {
                const curQtd = parseInt(formData.step3?.qtd_luminarias) || 0;
                suggestions = suggestions.filter((s) => {
                  if (!s || s.field !== "qtd_luminarias") return true;
                  const aiVal = parseInt(s.value);
                  // Se o valor atual no formulário já está dentro da faixa
                  // determinística [min,max], descartar qualquer sugestão da IA.
                  if (curQtd >= rcMin && curQtd <= rcMax) return false;
                  // Se a IA propôs um número fora da faixa determinística,
                  // corrigir para o recomendado oficial em vez de descartar
                  // (assim o usuário ainda recebe um "Aplicar correção" útil).
                  if (
                    !isFinite(aiVal) ||
                    aiVal < rcMin ||
                    aiVal > rcMax
                  ) {
                    s.value = String(rcRec);
                    s.reason = `Recomendação oficial do Reality Check: ${rcRec} luminárias para ${rcArea.toFixed(1)}m² (faixa aceitável ${rcMin}-${rcMax}). Cálculo: área × alvo_lux ÷ 4500 lm por luminária.`;
                    if (Array.isArray(s.alternatives)) s.alternatives = [];
                  }
                  return true;
                });
              }
            } catch (e) {
              /* sanitização best-effort — não bloqueia validação */
            }
          }

          // ============================================================
          // Filter out suggestions that are ALREADY ADDRESSED — i.e. the
          // user already has the suggested value (or any valid alternative)
          // in the form, OR previously applied a suggestion for the same
          // field. The AI is non-deterministic and frequently re-suggests
          // the same field with slightly different wording on every
          // re-validation, which created an infinite "Como corrigir" loop.
          // ============================================================
          const stepKeyForFilter = `step${stepNum}`;
          const originalSuggestionsCount = (suggestions || []).length;
          const addressedNow = (suggestions || []).filter((s) =>
            isSuggestionAddressed(stepKeyForFilter, s),
          );
          // Persist that these were "addressed" so a future re-validation
          // (where the AI might restate the same field) keeps suppressing.
          addressedNow.forEach((s) => {
            try {
              const cur = _getCurrentFieldValue(stepKeyForFilter, s.field);
              if (cur != null && String(cur) !== "") {
                recordAppliedSuggestion(stepKeyForFilter, s.field, cur);
              }
            } catch (e) {}
          });
          suggestions = (suggestions || []).filter(
            (s) => !isSuggestionAddressed(stepKeyForFilter, s),
          );
          const suppressedCount = originalSuggestionsCount - suggestions.length;

          const hasCriticalSuggestion = (suggestions || []).some(
            (s) => String(s.severity || "").toLowerCase() === "critical",
          );
          const hasWarningSuggestion = (suggestions || []).some(
            (s) => String(s.severity || "").toLowerCase() === "warning",
          );
          // If the AI didn't tag any suggestion explicitly, infer from the
          // markdown output and from old-style "error words" in the reason.
          const anyExplicitSeverity = (suggestions || []).some((s) =>
            ["critical", "warning"].includes(
              String(s.severity || "").toLowerCase(),
            ),
          );
          const hasCriticalErrors = hasCriticalSuggestion
            ? true
            : !anyExplicitSeverity && /🔴/.test(output)
              ? // Backward-compat: if the AI is on the OLD prompt and only
                // emitted 🔴 in markdown without `severity`, still block.
                (suggestions || []).some((s) =>
                  /impossível|incoerente|proibido|fora da grade|abaixo do mínimo|perigoso|inflam|tóxic/i.test(
                    s.reason || "",
                  ),
                ) || /🔴/.test(output)
              : false;
          // hasWarnings is now strictly tied to the (filtered) structured
          // suggestions. We deliberately drop the previous "/🟡/.test(output)"
          // fallback because the AI's prose often re-mentions already-fixed
          // items as 🟡, which used to keep the dialog firing forever.
          const hasWarnings =
            hasWarningSuggestion ||
            (hasCriticalErrors === false && (suggestions || []).length > 0);

          aiValidationResults[`step${stepNum}`] = {
            output,
            suggestions,
            hasCriticalErrors,
            hasWarnings,
            _addressedCount: suppressedCount,
            complexity_classification: complexityClassification || null,
          };
          // Keep latest classification globally so other surfaces (final
          // submit summary, sidebar) can read it without re-walking results.
          if (complexityClassification) {
            window.latestComplexityClassification = complexityClassification;
          }
          saveValidationsToStorage();
          renderValidationTracker();

          // If EVERY suggestion the AI returned was already addressed by the
          // user (filtered out above), avoid re-printing the verbose markdown
          // analysis — that's exactly what generated the repetitive feel.
          // Show a concise confirmation instead and skip the panel.
          const allSuppressed =
            originalSuggestionsCount > 0 &&
            suggestions.length === 0 &&
            !hasCriticalErrors;
          if (allSuppressed) {
            addChatMessage(
              `✅ Etapa ${stepNum} re-validada. ${suppressedCount} recomendaç${suppressedCount === 1 ? "ão" : "ões"} anterior${suppressedCount === 1 ? "" : "es"} já foram aplicadas — nada novo a corrigir. Você pode avançar.`,
              "ai-validation",
            );
          } else {
            // Render demand complexity badge first (separate from analysis)
            if (complexityClassification) {
              try {
                renderComplexityBadgeInChat(stepNum, complexityClassification);
              } catch (e) {
                console.warn("complexity badge render failed:", e);
              }
            }
            // Display the AI validation output (rendered as markdown)
            addChatMessage(
              output,
              "ai-validation",
              hasCriticalErrors
                ? "has-errors"
                : hasWarnings
                  ? "has-issues"
                  : "",
            );
            if (suppressedCount > 0) {
              addChatMessage(
                `ℹ️ ${suppressedCount} recomendaç${suppressedCount === 1 ? "ão já aplicada foi" : "ões já aplicadas foram"} omitida${suppressedCount === 1 ? "" : "s"} desta análise.`,
                "system",
              );
            }
          }

          // Process suggestions
          if (!suggestions || !Array.isArray(suggestions)) {
            suggestions = parseSuggestionsFromOutput(output);
          }
          if (suggestions && suggestions.length > 0) {
            renderFieldSuggestions(stepNum, suggestions);
          }

          // When the AI flagged critical errors or warnings, render an
          // actionable "Como corrigir" panel directly in the chat. This makes
          // the recommended fixes visible even when the form fields are far
          // away (compartment cards, scrolled, etc.) and gives the user a
          // clear next step instead of just an analysis text.
          if ((hasCriticalErrors || hasWarnings) && !allSuppressed) {
            renderSolutionsInChat(stepNum, output, suggestions || []);
          }

          return {
            valid: !hasCriticalErrors,
            hasCriticalErrors,
            hasWarnings,
            suggestions,
          };
        } catch (error) {
          console.warn("AI validation failed:", error.message);
          addChatMessage(
            `✅ Etapa ${stepNum} validada localmente. (Servidor IA não respondeu)`,
            "system",
          );
          return { valid: true, hasCriticalErrors: false };
        } finally {
          badge.classList.remove("show");
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // AI INLINE SUGGESTIONS
      // ============================================

      /**
       * Parse suggestions from AI output text.
       * Agent may return structured JSON in result.suggestions OR
       * embed them in the text with pattern: [SUGESTÃO campo: "valor" — razão]
       */
      function parseSuggestionsFromOutput(output) {
        const suggestions = [];
        // Pattern: [SUGESTÃO field_name: "suggested_value" — reason]
        const regex =
          /\[SUGESTÃO\s+(\w+):\s*"([^"]+)"\s*(?:—|–|-)\s*([^\]]+)\]/gi;
        let match;
        while ((match = regex.exec(output)) !== null) {
          suggestions.push({
            field: match[1],
            value: match[2],
            reason: match[3].trim(),
          });
        }
        return suggestions;
      }

      /**
       * Render suggestion chips near the relevant form fields
       */
      function renderFieldSuggestions(stepNum, suggestions) {
        // Clear existing suggestions
        clearFieldSuggestions();

        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const panel = document.getElementById("stepPanels");
        if (!panel) return;

        suggestions.forEach((suggestion) => {
          const { field, value, reason } = suggestion;
          // Find the form-group containing this field.
          // Supports both static fields ("tensao") and dynamic array fields
          // ("compartimentos[0].tensao") used by the wizard for compartments.
          let targetEl = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${field}"]`);
          if (!targetEl) {
            const arrMatch = field.match(/^(\w+)\[(\d+)\]\.(\w+)$/);
            if (arrMatch) {
              const [, , idx, subField] = arrMatch;
              targetEl = panel.querySelector(
                `[data-array-idx="${idx}"][data-field-name="${subField}"]`,
              );
            }
          }
          if (!targetEl) return;

          // Get the parent .form-group
          const formGroup =
            targetEl.closest(".form-group") || targetEl.parentElement;
          if (!formGroup) return;

          // Create suggestion component
          const suggestionEl = document.createElement("div");
          suggestionEl.className = "ai-suggestion";
          suggestionEl.setAttribute("data-suggestion-field", field);
          suggestionEl.innerHTML = `
            <div class="ai-suggestion-icon">IA</div>
            <div class="ai-suggestion-body">
              <div class="ai-suggestion-label">Sugestão do Agente</div>
              <div class="ai-suggestion-value">${escapeHtml(value)}</div>
              ${reason ? `<div class="ai-suggestion-reason">${escapeHtml(reason)}</div>` : ""}
            </div>
            <div class="ai-suggestion-actions">
              <button class="ai-suggestion-btn accept" data-field="${field}" data-value="${escapeAttr(value)}" title="Aceitar sugestão">
                <i data-lucide="check" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i> Aceitar
              </button>
              <button class="ai-suggestion-btn reject" data-field="${field}" title="Recusar sugestão">
                <i data-lucide="x" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          `;

          formGroup.appendChild(suggestionEl);

          // Bind accept/reject events
          const acceptBtn = suggestionEl.querySelector(
            ".ai-suggestion-btn.accept",
          );
          const rejectBtn = suggestionEl.querySelector(
            ".ai-suggestion-btn.reject",
          );

          acceptBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            applySuggestion(stepKey, field, value, targetEl);
            suggestionEl.remove();
          });

          rejectBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            suggestionEl.style.animation = "suggestionSlide 0.2s ease reverse";
            setTimeout(() => suggestionEl.remove(), 200);
          });
        });

        if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") lucide.createIcons();
      }

      /**
       * Apply accepted suggestion value to the field
       */
      function applySuggestion(stepKey, fieldName, value, targetEl) {
        // Memorize this apply so re-validations don't keep re-suggesting the
        // same field. Schedule a status recompute that runs AFTER this
        // function returns (which has many early-return paths) so the cached
        // validation result is updated and the warnings dialog is skipped on
        // the next "Avançar" click.
        try {
          recordAppliedSuggestion(stepKey, fieldName, value);
        } catch (e) {}
        setTimeout(() => {
          try {
            recomputeStepValidationStatus(stepKey);
          } catch (e) {}
        }, 0);

        // Caso especial: qtd_luminarias da Etapa 3 é READ-ONLY (somatório
        // automático). Aplicar a sugestão direto no input não funciona porque
        // o próximo sync sobrescreve com a soma dos compartimentos. Solução:
        // distribuir o total proposto entre os compartimentos, proporcional
        // à recomendação por área de cada um.
        if (stepKey === "step3" && fieldName === "qtd_luminarias") {
          const target = Math.max(0, parseInt(value) || 0);
          try {
            const snap =
              typeof getChamberSnapshot === "function"
                ? getChamberSnapshot()
                : null;
            const comps =
              snap && typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function"
                ? rcComputeCompartments(snap)
                : [];
            const cfgAll =
              typeof rcGetCompartmentsConfig === "function"
                ? rcGetCompartmentsConfig()
                : {};
            if (comps.length > 0) {
              // Pesos = recomendação por compartimento (para distribuir proporcional)
              const weights = comps.map((c) => {
                const cf = cfgAll[c.name] || {};
                const rec =
                  typeof rcRecommendLuminarias === "function"
                    ? rcRecommendLuminarias(
                        c,
                        cf.categoria_produto,
                        cf.temperatura_setpoint,
                      )
                    : { recommended: Math.max(1, Math.ceil(c.area / 6)) };
                return Math.max(1, rec.recommended || 1);
              });
              const sumW = weights.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) || 1;
              // Distribuição base (floor) + repartição do resto pelos maiores pesos
              const base = weights.map((w) => Math.floor((target * w) / sumW));
              let assigned = base.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
              const remainders = weights
                .map((w, i) => ({ i, frac: (target * w) / sumW - base[i] }))
                .sort((a, b) => b.frac - a.frac);
              let k = 0;
              while (assigned < target && k < remainders.length) {
                base[remainders[k].i] += 1;
                assigned += 1;
                k += 1;
              }
              // Garantir mínimo de 1 luminária por compartimento se houver "orçamento" sobrando
              comps.forEach((c, i) => {
                if (
                  target > 0 &&
                  base[i] === 0 &&
                  assigned < target + comps.length
                ) {
                  base[i] = 1;
                }
              });
              // Persistir no compartments_config
              comps.forEach((c, i) => {
                cfgAll[c.name] = Object.assign({}, cfgAll[c.name] || {}, {
                  qtd_luminarias: base[i],
                });
              });
              if (typeof rcSaveCompartmentsConfig === "function")
                rcSaveCompartmentsConfig(cfgAll);
              formData.step3.qtd_luminarias = String(target);
              if (
                targetEl &&
                (targetEl.tagName === "INPUT" || targetEl.tagName === "SELECT")
              ) {
                targetEl.value = String(target);
              }
              saveToStorage();
              // Re-render para refletir a nova distribuição nos cards de compartimento
              if (typeof renderCurrentStep === "function") renderCurrentStep();
              if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === "function")
                refreshChamberVisualizer();
              if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function") refreshRcSidebar();
              return;
            }
          } catch (e) {
            /* fallback abaixo */
          }
        }

        // Step 4 visual chips: no input element to update — set formData
        // directly and re-render the visual block.
        if (
          stepKey === "step4" &&
          targetEl &&
          targetEl.hasAttribute &&
          targetEl.hasAttribute("data-acc-camara-field")
        ) {
          if (!formData.step4) formData.step4 = {};
          formData.step4[fieldName] = value;
          saveToStorage();
          const oldBlock = document.getElementById("step4AcessoriosBlock");
          if (oldBlock && typeof renderStep4AcessoriosVisual === "function") {
            const wrap = document.createElement("div");
            wrap.innerHTML = renderStep4AcessoriosVisual();
            const newBlock = wrap.firstElementChild;
            oldBlock.replaceWith(newBlock);
            if (typeof bindStep4AcessoriosChips === "function")
              bindStep4AcessoriosChips();
            if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") {
              try {
                lucide.createIcons();
              } catch (e) {}
            }
          }
          if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function") refreshRcSidebar();
          return;
        }

        // Step 4 portas[] fields: route both legacy single-porta and array
        // notation to the modal. We update formData first (best-effort) and
        // then open the porta wizard so the user can review the change.
        if (stepKey === "step4") {
          const portaArr = fieldName.match(/^portas\[(\d+)\]\.(\w+)$/);
          const portaLegacy = fieldName.match(
            /^porta_(tipo|largura|altura|sentido_abertura|parede|acessorios|sentido|posicao|compartimento_id)$/i,
          );
          if (portaArr || portaLegacy) {
            if (!formData.step4) formData.step4 = {};
            if (!Array.isArray(formData.step4.portas))
              formData.step4.portas = [];
            const idx = portaArr ? parseInt(portaArr[1]) : 0;
            const sub = portaArr ? portaArr[2] : portaLegacy[1].toLowerCase();
            if (!formData.step4.portas[idx]) formData.step4.portas[idx] = {};
            formData.step4.portas[idx][sub] = value;
            // Mirror legacy field for the first porta
            if (idx === 0) {
              formData.step4[`porta_${sub}`] = value;
            }
            saveToStorage();
            if (typeof renderCurrentStep === "function") renderCurrentStep();
            if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function") refreshRcSidebar();
            return;
          }
        }

        // Step 4 legacy estante_* fields: estantes are per-compartment in a
        // modal. Spread the suggestion across every compartment's
        // estantes_por_comp[name] and the legacy mirror, then re-render.
        if (
          stepKey === "step4" &&
          (fieldName === "estante_tipo" ||
            fieldName === "estante_quantidade" ||
            fieldName === "estante_niveis")
        ) {
          if (!formData.step4) formData.step4 = {};
          const subKey =
            fieldName === "estante_tipo"
              ? "tipo"
              : fieldName === "estante_quantidade"
                ? "quantidade"
                : "niveis";
          formData.step4[fieldName] = value;
          if (!formData.step4.estantes_por_comp)
            formData.step4.estantes_por_comp = {};
          let comps = [];
          try {
            const snap =
              typeof getChamberSnapshot === "function"
                ? getChamberSnapshot()
                : null;
            comps =
              snap && typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function"
                ? rcComputeCompartments(snap)
                : [];
          } catch (e) {}
          if (comps.length === 0) comps = [{ name: "C1" }];
          comps.forEach((c) => {
            const cur = formData.step4.estantes_por_comp[c.name] || {};
            cur[subKey] = value;
            formData.step4.estantes_por_comp[c.name] = cur;
          });
          saveToStorage();
          if (typeof renderCurrentStep === "function") renderCurrentStep();
          if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function") refreshRcSidebar();
          return;
        }

        // Update formData
        const schema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
        if (schema.isDynamic) {
          // For dynamic arrays — fieldName might be like "compartimentos[0].temperature"
          const arrMatch = fieldName.match(/^(\w+)\[(\d+)\]\.(\w+)$/);
          if (arrMatch) {
            const [, arrName, idx, subField] = arrMatch;
            if (
              formData[stepKey][arrName] &&
              formData[stepKey][arrName][parseInt(idx)]
            ) {
              formData[stepKey][arrName][parseInt(idx)][subField] = value;
            }
          }
        } else {
          formData[stepKey][fieldName] = value;
        }

        // Update the actual input element
        if (targetEl.classList.contains("creatable-container")) {
          const input = targetEl.querySelector(".creatable-input");
          if (input) {
            input.value = value;
            try {
              input.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", { bubbles: true }));
              input.dispatchEvent(new Event("change", { bubbles: true }));
            } catch (e) {}
          }
        } else if (targetEl.classList.contains("ibge-cidade-uf-container")) {
          // Handle combo field
          // value expected format: "Cidade/UF"
          formData[stepKey][fieldName] = value;
        } else if (targetEl.tagName === "SELECT") {
          // SELECT only accepts values that exist as <option>. The AI may
          // emit a slightly different label (e.g. "R-290 / Propano" vs
          // "R-290 (Propano)"). Try exact, then case-insensitive, then
          // substring match before giving up — otherwise the click would
          // silently leave the field blank.
          const opts = Array.from(targetEl.options || []);
          const wanted = String(value).trim();
          const norm = (s) =>
            String(s || "")
              .toLowerCase()
              .replace(/[\s\(\)\/_\-]+/g, "");
          let match = opts.find((o) => o.value === wanted);
          if (!match) match = opts.find((o) => norm(o.value) === norm(wanted));
          if (!match)
            match = opts.find(
              (o) =>
                norm(o.value).includes(norm(wanted)) ||
                norm(wanted).includes(norm(o.value)),
            );
          if (match) {
            targetEl.value = match.value;
            // Reflect the canonical option value in formData too
            if (schema.isDynamic) {
              const am = fieldName.match(/^(\w+)\[(\d+)\]\.(\w+)$/);
              if (am && formData[stepKey][am[1]]?.[parseInt(am[2])]) {
                formData[stepKey][am[1]][parseInt(am[2])][am[3]] = match.value;
