              }
            } else {
              formData[stepKey][fieldName] = match.value;
            }
          } else {
            // Refuse to set a value that isn't in the option list. The old
            // code did `targetEl.value = wanted;` here, which left the
            // select displaying nothing because the browser silently drops
            // unmatched values. Now we abort the apply, flash an error
            // toast, and leave the field untouched so the user can pick
            // manually.
            try {
              console.warn(
                `[applySuggestion] Refusing to set unknown SELECT value for ${fieldName}: "${wanted}". Valid: ${opts
                  .map((o) => o.value)
                  .filter((v) => v)
                  .join(" | ")}`,
              );
            } catch (e) {}
            if (typeof uiAlert === "function") {
              uiAlert(
                `Não consegui aplicar a sugestão para <strong>${escapeHtml(
                  fieldName,
                )}</strong>: o valor "<strong>${escapeHtml(
                  wanted,
                )}</strong>" não existe nas opções deste campo. Selecione manualmente uma das opções disponíveis.`,
                { variant: "warning" },
              );
            }
            return;
          }
          try {
            targetEl.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", { bubbles: true }));
            targetEl.dispatchEvent(new Event("change", { bubbles: true }));
          } catch (e) {}
        } else if (
          targetEl.tagName === "INPUT" ||
          targetEl.tagName === "TEXTAREA"
        ) {
          targetEl.value = value;
          try {
            targetEl.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", { bubbles: true }));
            targetEl.dispatchEvent(new Event("change", { bubbles: true }));
          } catch (e) {}
        }

        saveToStorage();

        // Flash effect to indicate change
        const formGroup =
          targetEl.closest(".form-group") || targetEl.parentElement;
        if (formGroup) {
          formGroup.style.transition = "background 0.3s";
          formGroup.style.background = "rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.1)";
          setTimeout(() => {
            formGroup.style.background = "";
          }, 1500);
        }
      }

      /**
       * Remove all existing suggestion components
       */
      function clearFieldSuggestions() {
        document
          .querySelectorAll(".ai-suggestion")
          .forEach((el) => el.remove());
      }

      /**
       * Resolve the form-input element for a (possibly array) field name.
       * Examples: "tensao" or "compartimentos[0].tensao".
       */
      function findFieldElement(panel, field) {
        if (!panel || !field) return null;
        let el = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${field}"]`);
        if (el) return el;
        const m = field.match(/^(\w+)\[(\d+)\]\.(\w+)$/);
        if (m) {
          const [, , idx, sub] = m;
          el =
            panel.querySelector(
              `[data-array-idx="${idx}"][data-field-name="${sub}"]`,
            ) || null;
          if (el) return el;
        }
        // Step 4 visual chips (cortina_pvc, alarme, estrutura_unidade_condensadora)
        // are buttons with [data-acc-camara-field], not inputs. Return the
        // currently selected button or the first one so navigation works.
        const chips = panel.querySelectorAll(
          `[data-acc-camara-field="${field}"]`,
        );
        if (chips.length > 0) {
          const cur = (formData.step4 && formData.step4[field]) || "";
          let chosen = null;
          chips.forEach((b) => {
            if (!chosen && b.getAttribute("data-acc-camara-value") === cur)
              chosen = b;
          });
          return chosen || chips[0];
        }
        // Step 4 legacy estante fields: estantes são per-compartimento em modal.
        // Fallback para o primeiro botão "📐 Configurar estantes" para
        // direcionar o usuário ao controle certo.
        if (
          field === "estante_tipo" ||
          field === "estante_quantidade" ||
          field === "estante_niveis"
        ) {
          const openBtn = panel.querySelector("[data-open-estantes-modal]");
          if (openBtn) return openBtn;
        }
        // Step 4 portas[] fields: portas são editadas por wizard modal.
        // Aceita "porta_altura" (legacy), "portas[0].altura" e variações.
        // Fallback: primeiro botão de Editar ou Adicionar porta.
        const portaPattern =
          /^porta(?:s)?(?:\[\d+\])?[\._]?(tipo|largura|altura|sentido_abertura|parede|acessorios|sentido|posicao|compartimento_id)?$/i;
        if (portaPattern.test(field)) {
          const editBtn = panel.querySelector(
            "[data-open-porta-wizard][data-edit-porta-idx]",
          );
          if (editBtn) return editBtn;
          const addBtn = panel.querySelector("[data-open-porta-wizard]");
          if (addBtn) return addBtn;
        }
        return null;
      }

      /**
       * Render the demand-complexity classification badge inside the chat.
       * The AI returns a `complexity_classification` object with level/score/
       * factors and the vendor sees a colored summary card before the regular
       * validation analysis. Clicking the card expands the factor list.
       */
      function renderComplexityBadgeInChat(stepNum, classif) {
        if (!classif || typeof classif !== "object") return;
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        if (!chatMessages) return;

        const level = String(classif.level || "standard").toLowerCase();
        const score =
          typeof classif.score === "number"
            ? Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(classif.score)))
            : null;
        const label =
          classif.label ||
          ({
            simple: "Projeto Simples",
            standard: "Projeto Padrão",
            complex: "Projeto Complexo",
            highly_complex: "Projeto Altamente Complexo",
          }[level] ||
            "Classificação");
        const palette =
          {
            simple: { bg: "#dcfce7", fg: "#166534", bar: "#22c55e", icon: "🟢" },
            standard: { bg: "#dbeafe", fg: "#1e40af", bar: "#3b82f6", icon: "🔵" },
            complex: { bg: "#fef3c7", fg: "#92400e", bar: "#f97316", icon: "🟠" },
            highly_complex: { bg: "#fee2e2", fg: "#991b1b", bar: "#ef4444", icon: "🔴" },
          }[level] || { bg: "#e5e7eb", fg: "#374151", bar: "#6b7280", icon: "⚪" };

        const factors = Array.isArray(classif.factors) ? classif.factors : [];
        const reqReview = !!classif.engineering_review_required;
        const reco = classif.recommendation || "";

        const factorsHtml = factors.length
          ? `<ul style="margin:8px 0 0 0;padding-left:18px;font-size:12px;color:${palette.fg};">${factors
              .map(
                (f) =>
                  `<li><strong>${(f.impact || "").toString().replace(/[<>]/g, "")}</strong> · ${(f.factor || "").toString().replace(/[<>]/g, "")} — ${(f.reason || "").toString().replace(/[<>]/g, "")}</li>`,
              )
              .join("")}</ul>`
          : "";

        const reviewBadge = reqReview
          ? `<div style="margin-top:8px;padding:6px 10px;background:#fee2e2;color:#991b1b;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">⚙️ Revisão de engenharia obrigatória antes do fechamento comercial</div>`
          : "";

        const scoreTxt = score != null ? `${score}/100` : "—";
        const barWidth = score != null ? score : 0;

        const wrap = document.createElement("div");
        wrap.className = "chat-message ai-validation complexity-badge";
        wrap.dataset.stepNum = String(stepNum);
        wrap.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:${palette.bg};border-left:4px solid ${palette.bar};padding:10px 12px;border-radius:8px;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
                <span style="font-size:18px;">${palette.icon}</span>
                <strong style="color:${palette.fg};font-size:14px;">Classificação de Demanda · ${label}</strong>
              </div>
              <div style="color:${palette.fg};font-size:12px;font-weight:600;">Score ${scoreTxt}</div>
            </div>
            <div style="margin-top:6px;height:6px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.06);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;">
              <div style="width:${barWidth}%;height:100%;background:${palette.bar};"></div>
            </div>
            ${reco ? `<div style="margin-top:8px;color:${palette.fg};font-size:13px;">${String(reco).replace(/[<>]/g, "")}</div>` : ""}
            ${reviewBadge}
            ${factorsHtml}
          </div>
        `;
        chatMessages.appendChild(wrap);
        chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
      }

      /**
       * Look up a human-readable label for a field name, including the
       * compartment label (e.g. "Tensão · Compartimento C2") when the name
       * uses the array notation.
       */
      function getFieldDisplayLabel(stepNum, field) {
        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const schema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
        if (!schema) return field;
        const arrMatch = field.match(/^(\w+)\[(\d+)\]\.(\w+)$/);
        if (arrMatch && schema.isDynamic) {
          const [, , idx, sub] = arrMatch;
          const fdef = schema.arrayFields && schema.arrayFields[sub];
          const baseLabel = fdef && fdef.label ? fdef.label : sub;
          // Try to resolve the compartment name from formData
          let compName = `#${parseInt(idx) + 1}`;
          try {
            const arrName = arrMatch[1];
            const arr = (formData[stepKey] && formData[stepKey][arrName]) || [];
            const item = arr[parseInt(idx)];
            if (item && (item.name || item.nome)) {
              compName = item.name || item.nome;
            }
          } catch (e) {}
          return `${baseLabel} · Compartimento ${compName}`;
        }
        const fdef = schema.fields && schema.fields[field];
        return fdef && fdef.label ? fdef.label : field;
      }

      // Resolve the schema definition for a field (handles array/dynamic
      // fields like "compartimentos[0].tipo_compressor"). Returns null
      // when the field is not declared in the static SCHEMA.
      function getFieldSchema(stepNum, field) {
        const schema = SCHEMA["step" + stepNum];
        if (!schema || !field) return null;
        const arrMatch = String(field).match(/^(\w+)\[(\d+)\]\.(\w+)$/);
        if (arrMatch && schema.arrayFields) {
          return schema.arrayFields[arrMatch[3]] || null;
        }
        return (schema.fields && schema.fields[field]) || null;
      }

      // Defensive whitelist for AI suggestions: any value the AI hands us
      // for a SELECT field MUST exist in the schema's `options` array.
      // The AI sometimes hallucinates new options (e.g. "Aço Pré-Pintado
      // (branco)" for Revestimento Interno where the only valid values are
      // Galvalume / Inox 430 / Inox 304 / Alumínio Liso / Alumínio Estucado),
      // which would either silently set an empty select or — with the
      // fuzzy-match fallback — store an unmatchable string in formData.
      //
      // Returns { value, alternatives, dropped } where:
      //   • value          → canonical option (fuzzy-resolved) or null when
      //                      no acceptable option exists
      //   • alternatives   → only those that resolve to a real option, with
      //                      `.value` rewritten to the canonical text
      //   • dropped        → array of { value, reason } the caller may want
      //                      to log for debugging
      function _normalizeOptionText(s) {
        return String(s || "")
          .toLowerCase()
          .normalize("NFD")
          .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")
          .replace(/[\s()\/_\-]+/g, "");
      }
      function resolveSuggestionToOption(stepNum, field, value, alternatives) {
        const fdef = getFieldSchema(stepNum, field);
        // Only enforce whitelist on SELECT — `creatable` fields are allowed
        // to accept new free-text values by design.
        if (!fdef || fdef.type !== "select" || !Array.isArray(fdef.options)) {
          return {
            value,
            alternatives: Array.isArray(alternatives) ? alternatives : [],
            dropped: [],
          };
        }
        const opts = fdef.options;
        const tryResolve = (raw) => {
          if (raw == null) return null;
          const wanted = String(raw).trim();
          if (!wanted) return null;
          // 1) exact match
          let hit = opts.find((o) => o === wanted);
          if (hit) return hit;
          // 2) case/accents/punctuation-insensitive
          const nw = _normalizeOptionText(wanted);
          hit = opts.find((o) => _normalizeOptionText(o) === nw);
          if (hit) return hit;
          // 3) substring match — only when unambiguous (single hit)
          const subs = opts.filter(
            (o) =>
              _normalizeOptionText(o).includes(nw) ||
              nw.includes(_normalizeOptionText(o)),
          );
          if (subs.length === 1) return subs[0];
          return null;
        };
        const dropped = [];
        const seen = new Set();
        const cleanAlts = [];
        const pushAlt = (raw, reason) => {
          const canonical = tryResolve(raw);
          if (!canonical) {
            dropped.push({ value: raw, why: "não está nas opções válidas" });
            return;
          }
          if (seen.has(canonical)) return;
          seen.add(canonical);
          cleanAlts.push({
            value: canonical,
            reason: reason || `Opção válida da planilha.`,
          });
        };
        const canonicalMain = tryResolve(value);
        if (canonicalMain) seen.add(canonicalMain);
        (Array.isArray(alternatives) ? alternatives : []).forEach((a) => {
          if (!a) return;
          pushAlt(a.value, a.reason);
        });
        // If the AI's primary value is invalid, promote the first clean
        // alternative to the primary slot so the user still has a working
        // "Aplicar correção" button instead of a broken one.
        if (!canonicalMain) {
          if (cleanAlts.length > 0) {
            const promoted = cleanAlts.shift();
            return {
              value: promoted.value,
              alternatives: cleanAlts,
              dropped,
            };
          }
          // Nothing salvageable — caller should drop the suggestion entirely.
          return { value: null, alternatives: [], dropped };
        }
        return {
          value: canonicalMain,
          alternatives: cleanAlts,
          dropped,
        };
      }

      /**
       * Extract critical (🔴) lines from the AI output that don't already
       * have a structured suggestion. These become "atenção necessária"
       * cards so the user always sees a guided next step.
       */
      function extractUnresolvedCriticalLines(output, suggestions) {
        if (!output) return [];
        const covered = new Set(
          (suggestions || []).map((s) =>
            String(s.field || "")
              .toLowerCase()
              .replace(/\[\d+\]/g, ""),
          ),
        );
        const lines = output.split(/\r?\n/);
        const result = [];
        for (const raw of lines) {
          if (!/🔴/.test(raw)) continue;
          // Skip the conclusion line ("❌ A etapa não pode ser validada...")
          // and bare 🔴 indicators inside tracker headers.
          const text = raw.replace(/^[\s\-•*]+/, "").trim();
          if (text.length < 8) continue;
          // Try to detect a field name in backticks/bold (e.g. **campo** or
          // `campo`) and skip if already covered by a suggestion.
          const fieldHint = (text.match(/\*\*([\w\.\[\]]+)\*\*/) ||
            text.match(/`([\w\.\[\]]+)`/) ||
            [])[1];
          if (fieldHint) {
            const norm = fieldHint.toLowerCase().replace(/\[\d+\]/g, "");
            if (covered.has(norm)) continue;
          }
          result.push(text.replace(/^🔴\s*/, ""));
          if (result.length >= 5) break;
        }
        return result;
      }

      /**
       * Render an actionable "Como corrigir" panel inside the chat with
       * Apply / Ir para o campo buttons for every AI suggestion. This is the
       * primary surface the user interacts with after a failed validation —
       * the small chips next to fields are kept as a secondary affordance.
       */
      function renderSolutionsInChat(stepNum, output, suggestions) {
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        if (!chatMessages) return;

        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const panel = document.getElementById("stepPanels");

        const unresolved = extractUnresolvedCriticalLines(output, suggestions);
        if (
          (!suggestions || suggestions.length === 0) &&
          unresolved.length === 0
        ) {
          return;
        }

        const wrap = document.createElement("div");
        wrap.className = "chat-msg assistant ai-solutions";
        const inner = document.createElement("div");
        inner.className = "msg-content";

        const header = document.createElement("div");
        header.className = "ai-solutions-header";
        header.innerHTML =
          '<i data-lucide="wrench" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i> Como corrigir';
        inner.appendChild(header);

        const subtitle = document.createElement("div");
        subtitle.className = "ai-solutions-subtitle";
        const sCount = (suggestions || []).length;
        const uCount = unresolved.length;
        subtitle.textContent =
          sCount > 0
            ? `${sCount} correç${sCount === 1 ? "ão" : "ões"} sugerida${sCount === 1 ? "" : "s"}` +
              (uCount > 0
                ? ` · ${uCount} ponto${uCount === 1 ? "" : "s"} de atenção`
                : "")
            : `${uCount} ponto${uCount === 1 ? "" : "s"} de atenção identificado${uCount === 1 ? "" : "s"}`;
        inner.appendChild(subtitle);

        // One card per structured suggestion
        (suggestions || []).forEach((s, idx) => {
          // Whitelist guard: if the field is a SELECT, force `value` and
          // every alternative to be a real option from the schema. This
          // prevents the AI from suggesting "Aço Pré-Pintado (branco)" for
          // Revestimento Interno where it doesn't exist as an option.
          const resolved = resolveSuggestionToOption(
            stepNum,
            s.field,
            s.value,
            s.alternatives,
          );
          if (resolved.value == null) {
            // Drop this suggestion entirely — nothing salvageable.
            try {
              console.warn(
                `[suggestion-filter] Dropped invalid suggestion for ${s.field}:`,
                s.value,
                "dropped alts:",
                resolved.dropped,
              );
            } catch (e) {}
            return;
          }
          const { field } = s;
          const value = resolved.value;
          const reason = s.reason;
          const alternatives = resolved.alternatives;
          const card = document.createElement("div");
          // Severity: respect explicit severity from the AI ("critical" |
          // "warning"); fall back to keyword inference for backward compat.
          const explicitSev = String(s.severity || "").toLowerCase();
          const isCritical =
            explicitSev === "critical" ||
            (!explicitSev &&
              /🔴|impossível|incoerente|proibido|incompat|perig|fora da grade|abaixo do mínimo|inflam|tóxic/i.test(
                reason || "",
              ));
          card.className = `ai-solution-card ${isCritical ? "critical" : "warning"}`;
          card.setAttribute("data-solution-idx", String(idx));

          const label = getFieldDisplayLabel(stepNum, field);
          const targetEl = findFieldElement(panel, field);
          // Resolves the field freshly at click time — the panel may have
          // been re-rendered between the suggestion being shown and the
          // user actually clicking, which would invalidate any cached node.
          // Also handles the case where the user has navigated AWAY from the
          // suggestion's home step: we navigate back first, then resolve.
          const ensureCorrectStepThen = (cb) => {
            if (currentStep !== stepNum) {
              currentStep = stepNum;
              try {
                renderCurrentStep();
                if (typeof scrollWizardTop === "function") scrollWizardTop();
              } catch (e) {}
              setTimeout(() => {
                if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function") refreshRcSidebar();
                cb();
              }, 220);
            } else {
              cb();
            }
          };
          const resolveTarget = () => {
            const livePanel = document.getElementById("stepPanels") || panel;
            return findFieldElement(livePanel, field) || targetEl;
          };

          const fieldLine = document.createElement("div");
          fieldLine.className = "ai-solution-field";
          // Severity badge inline with the field name
          const sevBadge = isCritical
            ? '<span class="ai-sev-badge critical">Bloqueante</span>'
            : '<span class="ai-sev-badge warning">Recomendado</span>';
          fieldLine.innerHTML = `${escapeHtml(label)} ${sevBadge}`;
          card.appendChild(fieldLine);

          const valueLine = document.createElement("div");
          valueLine.className = "ai-solution-value";
          const verb = isCritical ? "Alterar para" : "Sugestão";
          valueLine.innerHTML = `${verb} <strong>${escapeHtml(String(value))}</strong>`;
          card.appendChild(valueLine);

          if (reason) {
            const reasonEl = document.createElement("div");
            reasonEl.className = "ai-solution-reason";
            reasonEl.textContent = reason;
            card.appendChild(reasonEl);
          }

          const actions = document.createElement("div");
          actions.className = "ai-solution-actions";

          const applyBtn = document.createElement("button");
          applyBtn.className = "apply";
          applyBtn.type = "button";
          applyBtn.innerHTML =
            '<i data-lucide="check" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i> Aplicar correção';
          applyBtn.title =
            currentStep !== stepNum
              ? `Vamos voltar para a Etapa ${stepNum} antes de aplicar`
              : "";
          applyBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            ensureCorrectStepThen(() => {
              const live = resolveTarget();
              if (!live) {
                addChatMessage(
                  `⚠️ Não consegui localizar o campo **${escapeHtml(label)}** na Etapa ${stepNum}. Provavelmente ele depende de outra escolha — abra a etapa manualmente e revise.`,
                  "system",
                );
                return;
              }
              applySuggestion(stepKey, field, value, live);
              applyBtn.disabled = true;
              applyBtn.innerHTML =
                '<i data-lucide="check-check" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i> Aplicado';
              const chip = document.querySelector(
                `.ai-suggestion[data-suggestion-field="${CSS.escape(field)}"]`,
              );
              if (chip) chip.remove();
              if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") lucide.createIcons();
            });
          });
          actions.appendChild(applyBtn);

          const gotoBtn = document.createElement("button");
          gotoBtn.className = "goto";
          gotoBtn.type = "button";
          gotoBtn.innerHTML =
            currentStep !== stepNum
              ? `<i data-lucide="arrow-left" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i> Voltar p/ Etapa ${stepNum}`
              : '<i data-lucide="arrow-right" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i> Ir para o campo';
          gotoBtn.title = "Navega até a etapa correta e foca no campo";
          gotoBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            ensureCorrectStepThen(() => {
              const live = resolveTarget();
              if (!live) {
                addChatMessage(
                  `⚠️ Campo **${escapeHtml(label)}** não está visível agora. Verifique a Etapa ${stepNum}.`,
                  "system",
                );
                return;
              }
              const fg = live.closest(".form-group") || live;
              try {
                fg.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
              } catch (e) {
                fg.scrollIntoView();
              }
              fg.style.transition = "background 0.4s";
              const prev = fg.style.background;
              fg.style.background = "rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.18)";
              setTimeout(() => {
                fg.style.background = prev;
              }, 1800);
              if (typeof live.focus === "function") {
                try {
                  live.focus({ preventScroll: true });
                } catch (e) {
                  live.focus();
                }
              }
            });
          });
          actions.appendChild(gotoBtn);

          card.appendChild(actions);

          // Alternative valid values — rendered as quick-pick chips so the
          // user sees that this is not a "single right answer" situation
          // and can apply any of the valid choices in one click.
          if (alternatives.length > 0) {
            const altWrap = document.createElement("div");
            altWrap.className = "ai-solution-alternatives";
            const altLabel = document.createElement("div");
            altLabel.className = "ai-solution-alt-label";
            altLabel.textContent = "Outras opções válidas:";
            altWrap.appendChild(altLabel);
            const altRow = document.createElement("div");
            altRow.className = "ai-solution-alt-row";
            alternatives.forEach((alt) => {
              const chip = document.createElement("button");
              chip.type = "button";
              chip.className = "ai-solution-alt-chip";
              chip.innerHTML = `<strong>${escapeHtml(String(alt.value))}</strong>${alt.reason ? `<span>${escapeHtml(alt.reason)}</span>` : ""}`;
              chip.title = alt.reason || `Aplicar ${alt.value}`;
              chip.addEventListener("click", () => {
                const live = resolveTarget();
                if (!live) return;
                applySuggestion(stepKey, field, alt.value, live);
                // Update the main "Aplicado" state
                applyBtn.disabled = true;
                applyBtn.innerHTML =
                  '<i data-lucide="check-check" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i> Aplicado';
                // Reflect the chosen value in the card itself so the user
                // can see which alternative they picked.
                valueLine.innerHTML = `Aplicado: <strong>${escapeHtml(String(alt.value))}</strong>`;
                if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") lucide.createIcons();
              });
              altRow.appendChild(chip);
            });
            altWrap.appendChild(altRow);
            card.appendChild(altWrap);
          }

          inner.appendChild(card);
        });

        // Apply-all action when there are 2+ structured suggestions
        if ((suggestions || []).length >= 2) {
          const applyAllRow = document.createElement("div");
          applyAllRow.className = "ai-solution-actions";
          const applyAllBtn = document.createElement("button");
          applyAllBtn.className = "apply-all";
          applyAllBtn.type = "button";
          applyAllBtn.innerHTML =
            '<i data-lucide="zap" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i> Aplicar todas as correções';
          applyAllBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const livePanel = document.getElementById("stepPanels") || panel;
            (suggestions || []).forEach((s) => {
              const t = findFieldElement(livePanel, s.field);
              if (t) applySuggestion(stepKey, s.field, s.value, t);
            });
            inner
              .querySelectorAll(".ai-solution-actions button.apply")
              .forEach((b) => {
                if (!b.disabled) {
                  b.disabled = true;
                  b.innerHTML =
                    '<i data-lucide="check-check" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i> Aplicado';
                }
              });
            applyAllBtn.disabled = true;
            applyAllBtn.innerHTML =
              '<i data-lucide="check-check" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i> Tudo aplicado';
            document
              .querySelectorAll(".ai-suggestion")
              .forEach((el) => el.remove());
            if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") lucide.createIcons();
          });
          applyAllRow.appendChild(applyAllBtn);
          inner.appendChild(applyAllRow);
        }

        // Cards for critical lines without structured suggestion (no Apply
        // button — these require manual decision by the user).
        unresolved.forEach((line) => {
          const card = document.createElement("div");
          card.className = "ai-solution-card info";
          const fieldLine = document.createElement("div");
          fieldLine.className = "ai-solution-field";
          fieldLine.textContent = "Atenção necessária";
          card.appendChild(fieldLine);
          const reasonEl = document.createElement("div");
          reasonEl.className = "ai-solution-reason";
          reasonEl.textContent = line;
          card.appendChild(reasonEl);
          inner.appendChild(card);
        });

        wrap.appendChild(inner);
        chatMessages.appendChild(wrap);
        chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
        if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") lucide.createIcons();
      }

      function getStepFieldsSummary(stepNum) {
        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const schema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
        if (schema.isDynamic) {
          return {
            type: "dynamic",
            arrayField: schema.arrayField,
            fieldsPerItem: Object.entries(schema.arrayFields).map(([k, v]) => ({
              name: k,
              label: v.label,
              type: v.type,
              required: v.required,
              tag: v.tag || null,
            })),
          };
        }
        return {
          type: "static",
          fields: Object.entries(schema.fields).map(([k, v]) => ({
            name: k,
            label: v.label,
            type: v.type,
            required: v.required,
            tag: v.tag || null,
          })),
        };
      }

      // ============================================
      // CLIENT AUTOCOMPLETE (Step 2)
      // ============================================
      let clientSearchTimeout = null;

      function bindClientAutocomplete(panel, stepKey) {
        const fields = ["razao_social", "cnpj_cpf", "contato_telefone"];
        fields.forEach((fieldName) => {
          const inputEl = panel.querySelector(
            `[data-field-name="${fieldName}"]`,
          );
          if (!inputEl || inputEl.tagName === "SELECT") return;

          // Create dropdown container
          const wrapper = inputEl.closest(".form-group");
          if (!wrapper) return;
          wrapper.style.position = "relative";

          let dropdown = wrapper.querySelector(".client-suggest-dropdown");
          if (!dropdown) {
            dropdown = document.createElement("div");
            dropdown.className = "client-suggest-dropdown";
            wrapper.appendChild(dropdown);
          }

          inputEl.addEventListener("input", () => {
            clearTimeout(clientSearchTimeout);
            const query = inputEl.value.trim();
            if (query.length < 3) {
              dropdown.classList.remove("open");
              return;
            }
            clientSearchTimeout = setTimeout(
              () => searchClients(query, dropdown, panel, stepKey),
              300,
            );
          });

          inputEl.addEventListener("blur", () => {
            // Delay to allow click on dropdown
            setTimeout(() => dropdown.classList.remove("open"), 200);
          });
        });
      }

      async function searchClients(query, dropdown, panel, stepKey) {
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc(
            "saorafael_search_clients",
            { p_query: query },
          );
          if (error || !data || data.length === 0) {
            dropdown.classList.remove("open");
            return;
          }
          dropdown.innerHTML = data
            .map(
              (c) => `
            <div class="client-suggest-item" data-client-id="${c.id}">
              <div class="client-name">${escapeHtml(c.razao_social || "")}</div>
              <div class="client-meta">
                ${c.cnpj_cpf ? escapeHtml(c.cnpj_cpf) + " · " : ""}${escapeHtml(c.cidade || "")}${c.estado ? "/" + escapeHtml(c.estado) : ""}${c.total_orcamentos > 0 ? " · " + c.total_orcamentos + " orçamento(s)" : ""}
              </div>
              ${
                c.total_orcamentos > 0
                  ? `
              <div class="client-actions">
                <button type="button" data-action="select" data-client-id="${c.id}">✅ Selecionar</button>
                <button type="button" data-action="history" data-client-id="${c.id}" data-client-name="${escapeAttr(c.razao_social || "")}">📋 Ver Histórico</button>
              </div>
              `
                  : ""
              }
            </div>
          `,
            )
            .join("");
          dropdown.classList.add("open");

          // Bind click on each item
          dropdown.querySelectorAll(".client-suggest-item").forEach((item) => {
            const clientId = item.getAttribute("data-client-id");
            const client = data.find((c) => c.id === clientId);
            // Action buttons
            item.querySelectorAll("[data-action]").forEach((btn) => {
              btn.addEventListener("mousedown", (e) => {
                e.preventDefault();
                e.stopPropagation();
                const act = btn.getAttribute("data-action");
                if (act === "history") {
                  showClientHistory(
                    clientId,
                    btn.getAttribute("data-client-name"),
                  );
                } else if (act === "select") {
                  if (client) fillClientData(client, panel, stepKey);
                  dropdown.classList.remove("open");
                }
              });
            });
            // Click on body of item (when no buttons) selects
            item.addEventListener("mousedown", (e) => {
              if (e.target.closest("[data-action]")) return;
              e.preventDefault();
              if (client) fillClientData(client, panel, stepKey);
              dropdown.classList.remove("open");
            });
          });
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Client search error:", e);
        }
      }

      async function fillClientData(clientSummary, panel, stepKey) {
        // Fetch full client detail
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc(
            "saorafael_client_detail",
            { p_client_id: clientSummary.id },
          );
          if (error || !data || data.length === 0) return;
          const c = data[0];

          // Map client fields to step2 fields
          const fieldMap = {
            razao_social: c.razao_social,
            cnpj_cpf: c.cnpj_cpf,
            inscricao_estadual: c.inscricao_estadual,
            contato_nome: c.contato_nome,
            contato_telefone: c.contato_telefone || c.telefone,
            contato_email: c.contato_email || c.email,
            endereco_entrega: c.endereco,
            cep: c.cep,
            cidade: c.cidade,
            estado: c.estado,
            dados_tecnicos_resumo: c.dados_tecnicos,
          };

          // Fill formData and DOM inputs
          Object.entries(fieldMap).forEach(([field, value]) => {
            if (!value) return;
            formData[stepKey][field] = value;
            const el = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${field}"]`);
            if (el) {
              if (el.tagName === "INPUT" || el.tagName === "TEXTAREA") {
                el.value = value;
              } else if (el.tagName === "SELECT") {
                el.value = value;
              } else if (el.classList.contains("creatable-container")) {
                const inp = el.querySelector(".creatable-input");
                if (inp) inp.value = value;
              }
            }
          });

          // Special: populate ibge-cidade options for the chosen estado.
          // (Setting el.value alone does not fire change → cidade dropdown
          //  would otherwise stay stuck on "Selecione o Estado primeiro".)
          if (c.estado) {
            const cidadeEl = panel.querySelector('[data-field-name="cidade"]');
            if (cidadeEl && cidadeEl.classList.contains("ibge-cidade-select")) {
              try {
                const cidades = await fetchIbgeCidades(c.estado);
                const wantCidade = c.cidade || "";
                cidadeEl.innerHTML =
                  '<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>' +
                  cidades
                    .map(
                      (ci) =>
                        `<option value="${escapeAttr(ci.nome)}" ${ci.nome === wantCidade ? "selected" : ""}>${escapeHtml(ci.nome)}</option>`,
                    )
                    .join("");
                if (wantCidade) cidadeEl.value = wantCidade;
              } catch (err) {
                console.warn(
                  "Falha ao popular cidades para cliente vinculado:",
                  err,
                );
              }
            }
          }

          // Handle cidade-uf compound field
          if (c.local_instalacao) {
            formData[stepKey]["local_instalacao_municipio"] =
              c.local_instalacao;
          }

          // Store client_id for submission
          formData._client_id = clientSummary.id;

          saveToStorage();

          // Apply lock + banner + edit handlers
          lockClientFields(panel, c.razao_social);
          bindClientLockedFieldHandlers(panel);

          // Visual feedback
          addChatMessage(
            `✅ Dados de **${c.razao_social}** preenchidos automaticamente. Campos de identidade protegidos contra mistura.`,
            "system",
          );
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Fill client error:", e);
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // UI RENDERING
      // ============================================
      function renderStepIndicator() {
        const container = document.getElementById("stepIndicator");
        container.innerHTML = "";
        const STEP_META = {
          1: { icon: "user", short: "Cliente" },
          2: { icon: "clipboard-list", short: "Operação" },
          3: { icon: "ruler", short: "Dimensões" },
          4: { icon: "door-open", short: "Portas & Acessórios" },
          5: { icon: "truck", short: "Instalação" },
          6: { icon: "snowflake", short: "Refrigeração" },
        };
        for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
          if (i > 1) {
            const line = document.createElement("div");
            line.className =
              "step-line" + (stepValidated[`step${i - 1}`] ? " completed" : "");
            container.appendChild(line);
          }
          const item = document.createElement("div");
          item.className = "step-item";
          if (i === currentStep) item.classList.add("active");
          else if (stepValidated[`step${i}`]) item.classList.add("completed");
          const errors = validationErrors[`step${i}`];
          const hasError =
            errors &&
            Object.keys(errors).length > 0 &&
            !stepValidated[`step${i}`];
          if (hasError) item.classList.add("has-error");

          const dot = document.createElement("div");
          dot.className = "step-dot";
          if (i === currentStep) dot.classList.add("active");
          else if (stepValidated[`step${i}`]) dot.classList.add("completed");
          if (hasError) dot.classList.add("has-error");

          const meta = STEP_META[i] || { icon: "circle", short: "" };
          const isDone = stepValidated[`step${i}`] && i !== currentStep;
          const iconName = isDone ? "check" : meta.icon;
          dot.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="${iconName}" style="width:20px;height:20px;stroke-width:2.2;"></i>`;
          dot.title = SCHEMA[`step${i}`].title;

          const label = document.createElement("div");
          label.className = "step-label";
          label.innerHTML = `<span class="step-num">Etapa ${i}</span>${meta.short}`;

          item.appendChild(dot);
          item.appendChild(label);
          item.addEventListener("click", () => navigateToStep(i));
          container.appendChild(item);
        }
        if (typeof lucide !== "undefined" && lucide.createIcons) {
          try {
            lucide.createIcons();
          } catch (e) {}
        }
      }

      function renderCurrentStep() {
        clearFieldSuggestions();
        // Sair/voltar para o último step → invalida avaliação prévia
        if (currentStep !== totalSteps && lastStepEvaluated) {
          lastStepEvaluated = false;
        }
        const container = document.getElementById("stepPanels");
        const stepKey = `step${currentStep}`;
        const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];

        // Banner de modo edição (quando carregado via "Editar")
        let editingBanner = "";
        if (formData && formData._editing_submission_id) {
          const proto =
            formData._editing_protocol ||
            "#" + formData._editing_submission_id;
          editingBanner =
            `<div id="editingModeBanner" style="background:linear-gradient(90deg,#d1fae5,#a7f3d0);border:1px solid #10b981;border-left:4px solid #10b981;border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;">` +
            `<div style="font-size:12.5px;color:#065f46;line-height:1.4;">` +
            `<strong>✏️ Modo edição ativo</strong> — Você está editando o orçamento ` +
            `<strong style="font-family:monospace;">${escapeHtml(proto)}</strong>. ` +
            `Ao enviar, o orçamento será atualizado (mesmo protocolo).` +
            `</div>` +
            `<button type="button" onclick="cancelEditing()" style="padding:5px 12px;font-size:11px;background:#fff;color:#065f46;border:1px solid #10b981;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;">↩️ Cancelar edição</button>` +
            `</div>`;
        }

        let html = editingBanner + `<div class="step-panel active">
        <div class="step-card">
          <div class="step-header" style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <div style="flex:1;min-width:200px;">
              <h2>Etapa ${currentStep}: ${stepSchema.title}</h2>
              <p>${stepSchema.description}</p>
            </div>
            <button type="button" id="btnClearStep" title="Limpar todos os campos desta etapa" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:7px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;">
              <i data-lucide="eraser" style="width:13px;height:13px;"></i> Limpar etapa
            </button>
          </div>`;

        // Inject chamber visualizer for dimension/door steps
        // For step3: visualizer is injected BETWEEN dimension fields and the rest (below)
        if (stepKey === "step4") {
          html += renderChamberVisualizer(stepKey);
        }

        // Step 4 portas[] manager — auto-sync with step3 compartments
        if (stepKey === "step4") {
          syncStep4PortasWithCompartments();
          html += renderPortasManager();
        }

        // Step 6 inherits compartments from step 3 — auto-sync entries
        if (stepKey === "step6" && stepSchema.inheritsFromStep3) {
          syncStep6WithCompartments();
        }

        if (stepSchema.isDynamic) {
          html += renderDynamicStep(stepKey, stepSchema);
        } else if (stepKey === "step3") {
          // Step 3: split into dimension fields first, then visualizer, then remaining fields
          const dimensionFields = ["comprimento", "largura", "altura"];
          const remainingFields = Object.entries(stepSchema.fields).filter(
            ([fn]) => !dimensionFields.includes(fn),
          );
          const hasDimensions =
            parseFloat(formData.step3?.comprimento) > 0 &&
            parseFloat(formData.step3?.largura) > 0 &&
            parseFloat(formData.step3?.altura) > 0;

          // 1) Dimension fields (always shown)
          html += `<div class="form-grid">`;
          dimensionFields.forEach((fn) => {
            if (stepSchema.fields[fn])
              html += renderField(fn, stepSchema.fields[fn], stepKey);
          });
          html += `</div>`;

          // 2) Visualizer + divisorias (only if dimensions filled)
          if (hasDimensions) {
            html += renderChamberVisualizer(stepKey);
            // 3) Remaining fields
            html += `<div class="form-grid">`;
            remainingFields.forEach(([fn, field]) => {
              html += renderField(fn, field, stepKey);
            });
            html += `</div>`;
          } else {
            html += `<div style="padding:16px 20px;margin:12px 0;background:rgba(14,165,233,0.06);border-left:3px solid var(--color-info,#0ea5e9);border-radius:6px;font-size:13px;color:var(--text-secondary);">
              ℹ️ Preencha <strong>Comprimento</strong>, <strong>Largura</strong> e <strong>Altura</strong> para desbloquear a visualização da câmara, divisórias e os demais campos.
            </div>`;
          }
        } else {
          // Step 4: render visual acessórios chips block before generic fields
          if (stepKey === "step4") {
            html += renderStep4AcessoriosVisual();
          }
          html += `<div class="form-grid">`;
          Object.entries(stepSchema.fields).forEach(([fieldName, field]) => {
            // Step 4: estante_* + cortina/alarme/estrutura handled by visual block above
            if (
              stepKey === "step4" &&
              /^(estante_|cortina_pvc|alarme|estrutura_unidade_condensadora)/.test(
                fieldName,
              )
            )
              return;
            html += renderField(fieldName, field, stepKey);
          });
          html += `</div>`;
        }

        html += `</div></div>`;
        container.innerHTML = html;

        // Bind events after render
        bindFieldEvents(stepKey, stepSchema);
        if (stepKey === "step4") bindPortasEvents();
        if (stepKey === "step4") bindStep4AcessoriosChips();
        bindClearStepButton(stepKey);
        updateNavButtons();
        renderStepIndicator();
        if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") lucide.createIcons();
        if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function") refreshRcSidebar();
      }

      function renderField(fieldName, field, stepKey, arrayIdx) {
        const isArray = arrayIdx !== undefined && arrayIdx !== null;
        const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
        const fullKey = isArray
          ? `${stepSchema.arrayField}[${arrayIdx}].${fieldName}`
          : fieldName;
        const dataAttr = isArray
          ? `data-array-idx="${arrayIdx}" data-field-name="${fieldName}"`
          : `data-field-name="${fieldName}"`;
        const value = isArray
          ? (formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][arrayIdx] || {})[
              fieldName
            ] || ""
          : formData[stepKey][fieldName] || "";
        const errors = validationErrors[stepKey] || {};
        const fieldErrors = errors[fullKey] || [];
        const hasError = fieldErrors.length > 0;
        const isFullWidth = field.type === "textarea" || field.type === "local-instalacao-box";

        let html = `<div class="form-group${isFullWidth ? " full-width" : ""}">`;
        html += `<label>
        ${field.required ? '<span class="required">*</span>' : ""}
        ${field.label}
        ${field.tag ? `<span class="field-tag">${field.tag}</span>` : ""}
      </label>`;

        switch (field.type) {
          case "text":
            html += `<input type="text" class="form-input${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
            ${dataAttr} value="${escapeAttr(value)}" 
            placeholder="${field.patternMsg || ""}" />`;
            break;

          case "number":
            html += `<input type="number" class="form-input${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
            ${dataAttr} value="${escapeAttr(value)}" 
            min="${field.min !== undefined ? field.min : ""}" 
            max="${field.max !== undefined ? field.max : ""}" 
            step="${field.step || "any"}"${field.placeholder ? ` placeholder="${escapeAttr(field.placeholder)}"` : ""}${field.readOnly ? ' readonly style="cursor:not-allowed;opacity:0.85;background:var(--bg-body);"' : ""} />`;
            break;

          case "textarea":
            html += `<textarea class="form-textarea${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
            ${dataAttr} rows="3" 
            maxlength="${field.maxLength || ""}">${escapeHtml(value)}</textarea>`;
            break;

          case "select":
            html += `<select class="form-select${hasError ? " error" : ""}" ${dataAttr}>
            <option value="">-- Selecione --</option>
            ${(field.options || [])
              .map((opt) => {
                const lbl =
                  (field.optionLabels && field.optionLabels[opt]) || opt;
                return `<option value="${escapeAttr(opt)}" ${opt === value ? "selected" : ""}>${escapeHtml(lbl)}</option>`;
              })
              .join("")}
          </select>`;
            break;

          case "creatable":
            if (field.readOnly) {
              html += `<input type="text" class="form-input${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
              ${dataAttr} value="${escapeAttr(value)}" readonly 
              style="background: var(--bg-body); cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.8;" />`;
            } else {
              html += `<div class="creatable-container" ${dataAttr}>
            <input type="text" class="creatable-input${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
              value="${escapeAttr(value)}" placeholder="Selecione ou digite..." 
              autocomplete="off" />
            <div class="creatable-chevron"><i data-lucide="chevron-down" style="width:14px;height:14px"></i></div>
            <div class="creatable-dropdown">
              ${(field.options || [])
                .map(
                  (opt) =>
                    `<div class="creatable-option${opt === value ? " selected" : ""}" data-value="${escapeAttr(opt)}">${escapeHtml(opt)}</div>`,
                )
                .join("")}
            </div>
          </div>`;
            }
            break;

          case "ibge-estado":
            html += `<select class="form-select ibge-estado-select${hasError ? " error" : ""}" ${dataAttr}>
            <option value="">-- Selecione o Estado --</option>
            ${
              ibgeEstados.length
                ? ibgeEstados
                    .map(
                      (e) =>
                        `<option value="${e.sigla}" ${e.sigla === value ? "selected" : ""}>${e.sigla} — ${e.nome}</option>`,
                    )
                    .join("")
                : value
                  ? `<option value="${escapeAttr(value)}" selected>${escapeHtml(value)}</option>`
                  : ""
            }
          </select>`;
            break;

          case "ibge-cidade":
            html += `<select class="form-select ibge-cidade-select${hasError ? " error" : ""}" ${dataAttr}>
            ${
              value
                ? `<option value="${escapeAttr(value)}" selected>${escapeHtml(value)}</option>`
                : `<option value="">-- Selecione o Estado primeiro --</option>`
            }
          </select>`;
            break;

          case "ibge-cidade-uf":
            // Combined: state selector + city selector inline
            const ufVal =
              value && value.includes("/") ? value.split("/").pop().trim() : "";
            const cidVal =
              value && value.includes("/") ? value.split("/")[0].trim() : value;
            html += `<div class="ibge-cidade-uf-container" ${dataAttr}>
            <select class="form-select ibge-uf-sub${hasError ? " error" : ""}" data-sub="uf" style="flex:0 0 120px;">
              <option value="">UF</option>
              ${ibgeEstados.map((e) => `<option value="${e.sigla}" ${e.sigla === ufVal ? "selected" : ""}>${e.sigla}</option>`).join("")}
            </select>
            <select class="form-select ibge-cidade-sub${hasError ? " error" : ""}" data-sub="cidade" style="flex:1;">
              <option value="">${ufVal ? "-- Selecione a Cidade --" : "-- Selecione o UF primeiro --"}</option>
            </select>
          </div>`;
            break;

          case "cep":
            html += `<div class="cep-container" ${dataAttr} style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:stretch;">
              <input type="text" class="form-input cep-input${hasError ? " error" : ""}" 
                value="${escapeAttr(value)}" maxlength="9"
                placeholder="00000-000" autocomplete="postal-code" style="flex:1;" />
              <button type="button" class="cep-search-btn" title="Buscar endereço pelo CEP" style="background:var(--color-primary);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:0 14px;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;">
                <i data-lucide="search" style="width:14px;height:14px;"></i> Buscar
              </button>
            </div>`;
            break;

          case "local-instalacao-box":
            const liVal = value || "";
            const liDiferente = formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_diferente || (liVal && liVal !== ((formData[stepKey].cidade || "") + "/" + (formData[stepKey].estado || "")) ? "sim" : "nao");
            const liUfVal = liVal && liVal.includes("/") ? liVal.split("/").pop().trim() : "";
            const liCidVal = liVal && liVal.includes("/") ? liVal.split("/")[0].trim() : "";
            const cidadeAtual = formData[stepKey].cidade || "";
            const estadoAtual = formData[stepKey].estado || "";
            const enderecoAtual = formData[stepKey].endereco_entrega || "";
            const numeroAtual = formData[stepKey].endereco_numero || "";
            const complementoAtual = formData[stepKey].endereco_complemento || "";
            const cepAtual = formData[stepKey].cep || "";
            const enderecoResumo = [
              enderecoAtual,
              numeroAtual ? "nº " + numeroAtual : "",
              complementoAtual ? "(" + complementoAtual + ")" : "",
            ]
              .filter(Boolean)
              .join(" ") || "(endereço não preenchido)";
            html += `<div class="local-instalacao-box" ${dataAttr} style="border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;padding:14px 16px;background:var(--bg-tertiary,rgba(0,0,0,0.02));">
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-weight:600;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:10px;color:var(--text-primary);">
                <i data-lucide="map-pin" style="width:16px;height:16px;color:var(--color-primary);"></i>
                Local de instalação é diferente do endereço acima?
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:18px;margin-bottom:10px;">
                <label style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">
                  <input type="radio" name="li_dif_${stepKey}" value="nao" ${liDiferente === "nao" ? "checked" : ""} /> Não (usar o mesmo)
                </label>
                <label style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;">
                  <input type="radio" name="li_dif_${stepKey}" value="sim" ${liDiferente === "sim" ? "checked" : ""} /> Sim, informar outro endereço
                </label>
              </div>
              <div class="li-resumo-mesmo" style="display:${liDiferente === "nao" ? "block" : "none"};font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);background:rgba(14,165,233,0.06);border-left:3px solid var(--color-info,#0ea5e9);padding:8px 12px;border-radius:6px;">
                ℹ️ A instalação será no endereço informado acima:<br>
                <strong>${escapeHtml(enderecoResumo)}</strong><br>
                ${escapeHtml(cidadeAtual && estadoAtual ? cidadeAtual + "/" + estadoAtual : "(cidade/UF não preenchidos)")}${cepAtual ? " · CEP " + escapeHtml(cepAtual) : ""}
              </div>
              <div class="li-fields-diferente" style="display:${liDiferente === "sim" ? "grid" : "none"};grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:12px;margin-top:6px;">
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>CEP</label>
                  <div class="cep-container" data-li-field="cep" style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:stretch;">
                    <input type="text" class="form-input cep-input" value="${escapeAttr(formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_cep || "")}" maxlength="9" placeholder="00000-000" style="flex:1;" />
                    <button type="button" class="cep-search-btn" title="Buscar endereço pelo CEP" style="background:var(--color-primary);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;padding:0 12px;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;">
                      <i data-lucide="search" style="width:12px;height:12px;"></i> Buscar
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group" style="grid-column:1/-1;">
                  <label>Endereço de Instalação (Logradouro e Bairro)</label>
                  <input type="text" class="form-input" data-li-field="endereco" value="${escapeAttr(formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_endereco || "")}" placeholder="Rua, bairro..." />
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>Número</label>
                  <input type="text" class="form-input" data-li-field="numero" value="${escapeAttr(formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_numero || "")}" placeholder="Nº" maxlength="15" />
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>Complemento (opcional)</label>
                  <input type="text" class="form-input" data-li-field="complemento" value="${escapeAttr(formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_complemento || "")}" placeholder="Sala, bloco, andar..." maxlength="100" />
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>UF</label>
                  <select class="form-select" data-li-field="uf">
                    <option value="">UF</option>
                    ${
                      ibgeEstados.length
                        ? ibgeEstados
                            .map(
                              (e) =>
                                `<option value="${e.sigla}" ${e.sigla === liUfVal ? "selected" : ""}>${e.sigla}</option>`,
                            )
                            .join("")
                        : liUfVal
                          ? `<option value="${escapeAttr(liUfVal)}" selected>${escapeHtml(liUfVal)}</option>`
                          : ""
                    }
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label>Cidade</label>
                  <select class="form-select" data-li-field="cidade">
                    ${
                      liCidVal
                        ? `<option value="${escapeAttr(liCidVal)}" selected>${escapeHtml(liCidVal)}</option>`
                        : `<option value="">${liUfVal ? "-- Selecione a Cidade --" : "-- Selecione o UF primeiro --"}</option>`
                    }
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>`;
            break;
        }

        if (field.hint) {
          html += `<span class="field-hint">${field.hint}</span>`;
        }
        html += `<span class="field-error${hasError ? " show" : ""}" data-error-for="${fullKey}">${fieldErrors.join(" ")}</span>`;
        html += `</div>`;
        return html;
      }

      function renderDynamicStep(stepKey, stepSchema) {
        const items = formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField] || [];
        const inherits = !!stepSchema.inheritsFromStep3;
        let html = `<div class="array-section">
        <div class="array-header">
          <h4>${stepSchema.arrayLabel}${items.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} (${items.length}${inherits ? "" : "/" + stepSchema.arrayMax})</h4>
          ${
            !inherits && items.length < stepSchema.arrayMax
              ? `<button type="button" class="btn-add-item" id="addArrayItem">
              <i data-lucide="plus" style="width:14px;height:14px"></i> Adicionar ${stepSchema.arrayLabel}
            </button>`
              : ""
          }
        </div>`;
        if (inherits) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:12px;background:rgba(14,165,233,0.08);border-left:3px solid var(--color-info,#0ea5e9);padding:10px 12px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:14px;color:var(--text-secondary);">
            ℹ️ <strong>Os compartimentos abaixo foram criados automaticamente a partir das divisórias da Etapa 3.</strong>
            Temperatura, produto e dimensões são herdados — para alterá-los, volte à Etapa 3 e edite a configuração do compartimento.
            Aqui escolha apenas <strong>compressor, evaporador, condensador, tensão, degelo e refrigerante</strong> para cada um.
          </div>`;
        }

        items.forEach((item, idx) => {
          const compId = item.compartimento_id;
          const itemTitle =
            inherits && compId
              ? `${stepSchema.arrayLabel} · <span style="color:var(--color-primary);">${compId}</span>`
              : `${stepSchema.arrayLabel} #${idx + 1}`;
          html += `<div class="array-item" data-index="${idx}">
          <div class="array-item-header">
            <span>${itemTitle}</span>
            ${
              !inherits && items.length > (stepSchema.arrayMin || 1)
                ? `<button type="button" class="btn-remove-item" data-remove-idx="${idx}">Remover</button>`
                : ""
            }
          </div>`;
          if (inherits && compId) {
            const t = item.temperatura_setpoint;
            const tColor =
              typeof rcColorForTemp === "function"
                ? rcColorForTemp(t)
                : "#94a3b8";
            const tLabel =
              typeof rcLabelForTemp === "function"
                ? rcLabelForTemp(t)
                : t !== ""
                  ? t + "°C"
                  : "— °C";
            const carga = item._inherited_carga_kcal_calc;
            const dim = item._inherited_dim || "";
            const area = item._inherited_area_m2 || "";
            const vol = item._inherited_volume_m3 || "";
            const prod =
              item.produto_armazenado ||
              '<em style="color:var(--text-secondary);">não definido</em>';
            html += `<div style="background:var(--bg-tertiary,rgba(0,0,0,0.04));border-left:4px solid ${tColor};border-radius:6px;padding:10px 12px;margin-bottom:12px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:6px 14px;font-size:12px;">
              <div><strong>Dimensões:</strong> ${dim} · ${area}m² · ${vol}m³</div>
              <div><strong>Temperatura:</strong> <span style="color:${tColor};font-weight:600;">${tLabel}</span></div>
              <div><strong>Produto:</strong> ${prod}</div>
              <div><strong>Carga térm. calculada:</strong> ${carga ? carga + " Kcal/h" : "— (sem temperatura)"}</div>
              <div style="grid-column:1/-1;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);">
                ↗️ <a href="javascript:void(0)" onclick="goToStep3ForCompartments()" style="color:var(--color-info);">Editar este compartimento na Etapa 3</a>
              </div>
            </div>`;
          }
          html += `<div class="form-grid">`;
          Object.entries(stepSchema.arrayFields).forEach(
            ([fieldName, field]) => {
              html += renderField(fieldName, field, stepKey, idx);
            },
          );
          html += `</div></div>`;
        });

        // Array-level error
        const errors = validationErrors[stepKey] || {};
        if (errors._array) {
          html += `<span class="field-error show">${errors._array.join(" ")}</span>`;
        }

        html += `</div>`;
        return html;
      }

      function bindClearStepButton(stepKey) {
        const btn = document.getElementById("btnClearStep");
        if (!btn) return;
        btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
          const stepNum = stepKey.replace("step", "");
          const stepSchema = SCHEMA[stepKey];
          const title =
            stepSchema && stepSchema.title
              ? stepSchema.title
              : `Etapa ${stepNum}`;
          if (
            !confirm(
              `Limpar todos os campos da Etapa ${stepNum} (${title})?\n\nIsso apagará apenas os dados desta etapa. As outras etapas continuam preenchidas.`,
            )
          )
            return;
          const fresh = {};
          if (stepSchema && stepSchema.arrayField) {
            fresh[stepSchema.arrayField] = [];
          }
          if (stepKey === "step4") {
            fresh.portas = [];
            fresh.estantes_por_comp = {};
          }
          formData[stepKey] = fresh;
          try {
            saveToStorage();
          } catch (e) {}
          renderCurrentStep();
          if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === "function") {
            try {
              refreshChamberVisualizer();
            } catch (e) {}
          }
          if (typeof showToast === "function") {
            try {
              showToast(`Etapa ${stepNum} limpa.`, "info");
            } catch (e) {}
          } else {
            console.log(`[clearStep] Etapa ${stepNum} limpa.`);
          }
        });
      }

      function bindFieldEvents(stepKey, stepSchema) {
        const panel = document.getElementById("stepPanels");

        // Get all elements with data-field-name
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-field-name]").forEach((el) => {
          const fieldName = el.getAttribute("data-field-name");
          const arrayIdx = el.getAttribute("data-array-idx");
          const isCreatable = el.classList.contains("creatable-container");
          const isIbgeCidadeUf = el.classList.contains(
            "ibge-cidade-uf-container",
          );
          const isLocalInstalacaoBox = el.classList.contains(
            "local-instalacao-box",
          );
          const isCepContainer = el.classList.contains("cep-container");

          // Skip special containers — handled separately below.
          // These containers are <div>s with no .value, so the generic
          // input/change listener would write `undefined` into formData
          // whenever an inner input bubbles an event up to the container.
          if (isIbgeCidadeUf || isLocalInstalacaoBox || isCepContainer) return;

          const inputEl = isCreatable
            ? el.querySelector(".creatable-input")
            : el;
          if (!inputEl) return;

          const updateValue = () => {
            const val = inputEl.value;
            if (
              arrayIdx !== null &&
              arrayIdx !== undefined &&
              arrayIdx !== ""
            ) {
              const idx = parseInt(arrayIdx);
              if (!formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx]) {
                formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx] = {};
              }
              formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx][fieldName] = val;
            } else {
              formData[stepKey][fieldName] = val;
            }
            saveToStorage();
            // Live-refresh chamber visualizer when relevant fields change
            if (stepKey === "step3" || stepKey === "step4") {
              if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === "function")
                refreshChamberVisualizer();
            }
            // Step 3: re-render entire step when all dimensions become available
            // (unlocks the visualizer + remaining fields)
            if (
              stepKey === "step3" &&
              ["comprimento", "largura", "altura"].includes(fieldName)
            ) {
              const c = parseFloat(formData.step3.comprimento) || 0;
              const l = parseFloat(formData.step3.largura) || 0;
              const a = parseFloat(formData.step3.altura) || 0;
              const vizExists = !!document.getElementById(
                "chamberVisual_step3",
              );
              if (c > 0 && l > 0 && a > 0 && !vizExists) {
                renderCurrentStep();
              }
            }
          };

          inputEl.addEventListener("input", updateValue);
          inputEl.addEventListener("change", updateValue);

          // Creatable dropdown behavior
          if (isCreatable) {
            const dropdown = el.querySelector(".creatable-dropdown");
            const options = el.querySelectorAll(".creatable-option");

            inputEl.addEventListener("focus", () => {
              dropdown.classList.add("open");
              filterOptions(el);
            });

            inputEl.addEventListener("input", () => {
              dropdown.classList.add("open");
              filterOptions(el);
            });

            options.forEach((opt) => {
              opt.addEventListener("mousedown", (e) => {
                e.preventDefault(); // Prevent blur before click registers
                inputEl.value = opt.getAttribute("data-value");
                updateValue();
                dropdown.classList.remove("open");
                // Update selected state
                options.forEach((o) => o.classList.remove("selected"));
                opt.classList.add("selected");
              });
            });

            inputEl.addEventListener("blur", () => {
              setTimeout(() => dropdown.classList.remove("open"), 150);
            });
          }
        });

        // ============================================
        // IBGE: Estado → Cidade dynamic loading
        // ============================================
        // Handle ibge-estado selects: when changed, populate the ibge-cidade in same step
        panel.querySelectorAll(".ibge-estado-select").forEach((estadoEl) => {
          const fieldName = estadoEl.getAttribute("data-field-name");

          // On change: update formData + load cities
          estadoEl.addEventListener("change", async () => {
            const uf = estadoEl.value;
            formData[stepKey][fieldName] = uf;
            saveToStorage();

            // Find associated cidade select (dependsOn relationship)
            const cidadeSelect = panel.querySelector(".ibge-cidade-select");
            if (cidadeSelect) {
              cidadeSelect.innerHTML =
                '<option value="">Carregando cidades...</option>';
              if (uf) {
                const cidades = await fetchIbgeCidades(uf);
                const currentCidade =
                  formData[stepKey][
                    cidadeSelect.getAttribute("data-field-name")
                  ] || "";
                cidadeSelect.innerHTML =
                  `<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>` +
                  cidades
                    .map(
                      (c) =>
                        `<option value="${c.nome}" ${c.nome === currentCidade ? "selected" : ""}>${c.nome}</option>`,
                    )
                    .join("");
              } else {
                cidadeSelect.innerHTML =
                  '<option value="">-- Selecione o Estado primeiro --</option>';
              }
            }
          });

          // On initial load: if estado already has value, populate cidades
          const currentUf = formData[stepKey][fieldName] || "";
          if (currentUf) {
            const cidadeSelect = panel.querySelector(".ibge-cidade-select");
            if (cidadeSelect) {
              const currentCidade =
                formData[stepKey][
                  cidadeSelect.getAttribute("data-field-name")
                ] || "";
              (async () => {
                // Keep saved cidade visible while loading so it never blanks
                if (currentCidade) {
                  cidadeSelect.innerHTML = `<option value="${escapeAttr(currentCidade)}" selected>${escapeHtml(currentCidade)}</option>`;
                } else {
                  cidadeSelect.innerHTML =
                    '<option value="">Carregando cidades...</option>';
                }
                const cidades = await fetchIbgeCidades(currentUf);
                if (!cidades || cidades.length === 0) {
                  // Fetch failed/empty → keep saved value as a fallback option
                  if (currentCidade) {
                    cidadeSelect.innerHTML = `<option value="${escapeAttr(currentCidade)}" selected>${escapeHtml(currentCidade)}</option>`;
                  } else {
                    cidadeSelect.innerHTML =
                      '<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>';
                  }
                  return;
                }
                cidadeSelect.innerHTML =
                  `<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>` +
                  cidades
                    .map(
                      (c) =>
                        `<option value="${escapeAttr(c.nome)}" ${c.nome === currentCidade ? "selected" : ""}>${escapeHtml(c.nome)}</option>`,
                    )
                    .join("");
              })();
            }
          }
        });

        // Handle ibge-cidade: update formData on change
        panel.querySelectorAll(".ibge-cidade-select").forEach((cidadeEl) => {
          const fieldName = cidadeEl.getAttribute("data-field-name");
          cidadeEl.addEventListener("change", () => {
            formData[stepKey][fieldName] = cidadeEl.value;
            saveToStorage();
          });
        });

        // Handle ibge-cidade-uf (combined): two selects inside a container
        panel
          .querySelectorAll(".ibge-cidade-uf-container")
          .forEach((container) => {
            const fieldName = container.getAttribute("data-field-name");
            const ufSelect = container.querySelector("[data-sub='uf']");
            const cidadeSelect = container.querySelector("[data-sub='cidade']");

            const updateCombinedValue = () => {
              const cidade = cidadeSelect.value;
              const uf = ufSelect.value;
              if (cidade && uf) {
                formData[stepKey][fieldName] = `${cidade}/${uf}`;
              } else {
                formData[stepKey][fieldName] = "";
              }
              saveToStorage();
            };

            // When UF changes, load cities
            ufSelect.addEventListener("change", async () => {
              const uf = ufSelect.value;
              cidadeSelect.innerHTML =
                '<option value="">Carregando...</option>';
              if (uf) {
                const cidades = await fetchIbgeCidades(uf);
                // Check if there's an existing saved value
                const savedVal = formData[stepKey][fieldName] || "";
                const savedCidade = savedVal.includes("/")
                  ? savedVal.split("/")[0].trim()
                  : "";
                cidadeSelect.innerHTML =
                  `<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>` +
                  cidades
                    .map(
                      (c) =>
                        `<option value="${c.nome}" ${c.nome === savedCidade ? "selected" : ""}>${c.nome}</option>`,
                    )
                    .join("");
              } else {
                cidadeSelect.innerHTML =
                  '<option value="">-- Selecione o UF primeiro --</option>';
              }
              updateCombinedValue();
            });

            cidadeSelect.addEventListener("change", updateCombinedValue);

            // On initial load: if value exists, populate
            const currentVal = formData[stepKey][fieldName] || "";
            if (currentVal && currentVal.includes("/")) {
              const parts = currentVal.split("/");
              const savedUf = parts.pop().trim();
              const savedCidade = parts.join("/").trim();
              if (savedUf && ufSelect.value === savedUf) {
                (async () => {
                  const cidades = await fetchIbgeCidades(savedUf);
                  cidadeSelect.innerHTML =
                    `<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>` +
                    cidades
                      .map(
                        (c) =>
                          `<option value="${c.nome}" ${c.nome === savedCidade ? "selected" : ""}>${c.nome}</option>`,
                      )
                      .join("");
                })();
              }
            }
          });

        // ============================================
        // CEP fields: mask + ViaCEP lookup
        // ============================================
        panel.querySelectorAll(".cep-container").forEach((container) => {
          // Skip CEPs that live inside the local-instalacao-box (handled in that block)
          if (container.closest(".local-instalacao-box")) return;
          const fieldName = container.getAttribute("data-field-name");
          if (!fieldName) return;
          const input = container.querySelector(".cep-input");
          const btn = container.querySelector(".cep-search-btn");

          const persist = () => {
            formData[stepKey][fieldName] = input.value;
            saveToStorage();
          };

          input.addEventListener("input", () => {
            input.value = maskCep(input.value);
            persist();
          });
          input.addEventListener("change", persist);
          input.addEventListener("blur", () => {
            if (input.value.replace(/\D/g, "").length === 8)
              doCepLookup(input.value, stepKey, panel, /*forInstalacao=*/ false);
          });
          btn.addEventListener("click", () =>
            doCepLookup(input.value, stepKey, panel, /*forInstalacao=*/ false),
          );
        });

        // ============================================
        // Local de Instalação box: radio toggle + sub-fields + CEP lookup
        // ============================================
        panel.querySelectorAll(".local-instalacao-box").forEach((box) => {
