          const fieldName = box.getAttribute("data-field-name"); // local_instalacao_municipio
          const radios = box.querySelectorAll(`input[type="radio"]`);
          const resumoMesmo = box.querySelector(".li-resumo-mesmo");
          const fieldsDiferente = box.querySelector(".li-fields-diferente");
          const ufSel = box.querySelector('[data-li-field="uf"]');
          const cidadeSel = box.querySelector('[data-li-field="cidade"]');
          const enderecoInput = box.querySelector('[data-li-field="endereco"]');
          const numeroInput = box.querySelector('[data-li-field="numero"]');
          const complementoInput = box.querySelector('[data-li-field="complemento"]');
          const cepContainer = box.querySelector(".cep-container");
          const cepInput = cepContainer.querySelector(".cep-input");
          const cepBtn = cepContainer.querySelector(".cep-search-btn");

          const syncMunicipio = () => {
            const diferente =
              (formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_diferente || "nao") === "sim";
            if (diferente) {
              const u = ufSel.value;
              const c = cidadeSel.value;
              formData[stepKey][fieldName] = u && c ? `${c}/${u}` : "";
            } else {
              const u = formData[stepKey].estado || "";
              const c = formData[stepKey].cidade || "";
              formData[stepKey][fieldName] = u && c ? `${c}/${u}` : "";
              // Clear "different" sub-fields so we don't carry stale data
              formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_endereco = "";
              formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_numero = "";
              formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_complemento = "";
              formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_cep = "";
            }
            saveToStorage();
          };

          // Radio toggle
          radios.forEach((r) => {
            r.addEventListener("change", () => {
              formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_diferente = r.value;
              if (r.value === "sim") {
                resumoMesmo.style.display = "none";
                fieldsDiferente.style.display = "grid";
              } else {
                resumoMesmo.style.display = "block";
                fieldsDiferente.style.display = "none";
              }
              syncMunicipio();
            });
          });

          // Endereço input
          if (enderecoInput) {
            enderecoInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
              formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_endereco = enderecoInput.value;
              saveToStorage();
            });
          }
          if (numeroInput) {
            numeroInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
              formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_numero = numeroInput.value;
              saveToStorage();
            });
          }
          if (complementoInput) {
            complementoInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
              formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_complemento = complementoInput.value;
              saveToStorage();
            });
          }

          // UF select → load cidades
          const loadCidadesInto = async (uf, selected) => {
            cidadeSel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Carregando...</option>';
            if (!uf) {
              cidadeSel.innerHTML =
                '<option value="">-- Selecione o UF primeiro --</option>';
              return;
            }
            const cidades = await fetchIbgeCidades(uf);
            cidadeSel.innerHTML =
              `<option value="">-- Selecione a Cidade --</option>` +
              cidades
                .map(
                  (c) =>
                    `<option value="${c.nome}" ${c.nome === selected ? "selected" : ""}>${c.nome}</option>`,
                )
                .join("");
          };

          ufSel.addEventListener("change", async () => {
            await loadCidadesInto(ufSel.value, "");
            syncMunicipio();
          });
          cidadeSel.addEventListener("change", syncMunicipio);

          // On initial render, if UF already selected, load its cities.
          // IMPORTANT: loadCidadesInto synchronously wipes cidadeSel.innerHTML
          // to "Carregando..." before the async fetch resolves. If syncMunicipio()
          // runs before the async load completes, cidadeSel.value will be "" and
          // it will overwrite local_instalacao_municipio with an empty string,
          // causing UF/Cidade to disappear on next page reload. Track this and
          // skip the unconditional syncMunicipio() call below until the async
          // load finishes.
          let initialCityLoadPending = false;
          if (ufSel.value) {
            const liVal = formData[stepKey][fieldName] || "";
            const savedCid =
              liVal && liVal.includes("/") ? liVal.split("/")[0].trim() : "";
            initialCityLoadPending = true;
            loadCidadesInto(ufSel.value, savedCid).then(() => {
              initialCityLoadPending = false;
              syncMunicipio();
            });
          }

          // CEP within the box
          const persistLiCep = () => {
            formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_cep = cepInput.value;
            saveToStorage();
          };
          cepInput.addEventListener("input", () => {
            cepInput.value = maskCep(cepInput.value);
            persistLiCep();
          });
          cepInput.addEventListener("change", persistLiCep);
          cepInput.addEventListener("blur", () => {
            if (cepInput.value.replace(/\D/g, "").length === 8)
              doCepLookup(cepInput.value, stepKey, panel, /*forInstalacao=*/ true);
          });
          cepBtn.addEventListener("click", () =>
            doCepLookup(cepInput.value, stepKey, panel, /*forInstalacao=*/ true),
          );

          // Re-sync whenever cidade/estado above change (for "Não" mode)
          const cidadeAboveEl = panel.querySelector(
            '[data-field-name="cidade"]',
          );
          const estadoAboveEl = panel.querySelector(
            '[data-field-name="estado"]',
          );
          // Live-update the "mesmo endereço" resumo when address-above changes
          const refreshResumo = () => {
            if ((formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_diferente || "nao") !== "nao") return;
            const e = formData[stepKey].endereco_entrega || "";
            const n = formData[stepKey].endereco_numero || "";
            const cp = formData[stepKey].endereco_complemento || "";
            const ci = formData[stepKey].cidade || "";
            const uf = formData[stepKey].estado || "";
            const cep = formData[stepKey].cep || "";
            const linha1 =
              [e, n ? "nº " + n : "", cp ? "(" + cp + ")" : ""]
                .filter(Boolean)
                .join(" ") || "(endereço não preenchido)";
            const linha2 =
              (ci && uf ? ci + "/" + uf : "(cidade/UF não preenchidos)") +
              (cep ? " · CEP " + cep : "");
            resumoMesmo.innerHTML =
              `ℹ️ A instalação será no endereço informado acima:<br><strong>${escapeHtml(linha1)}</strong><br>${escapeHtml(linha2)}`;
          };
          ["endereco_entrega", "endereco_numero", "endereco_complemento", "cep"].forEach(
            (fn) => {
              const el = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${fn}"]`);
              if (el) el.addEventListener("input", refreshResumo);
            },
          );
          if (cidadeAboveEl)
            cidadeAboveEl.addEventListener("change", () => {
              if ((formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_diferente || "nao") === "nao") {
                syncMunicipio();
                renderCurrentStep();
              }
            });
          if (estadoAboveEl)
            estadoAboveEl.addEventListener("change", () => {
              if ((formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_diferente || "nao") === "nao") {
                syncMunicipio();
              }
            });

          // Ensure initial value is consistent — but only if we are not
          // waiting on an async cidade list load (otherwise cidadeSel.value
          // would be "" and syncMunicipio would erase the saved municipio).
          if (!initialCityLoadPending) {
            syncMunicipio();
          }
        });

        // CLIENT AUTOCOMPLETE for step2 (razao_social and cnpj_cpf)
        if (stepKey === "step2") {
          bindClientAutocomplete(panel, stepKey);
          // Restore lock state if a client was previously linked
          if (formData._client_id && formData._client_locked) {
            const linkedName = formData.step2?.razao_social || "";
            lockClientFields(panel, linkedName);
            bindClientLockedFieldHandlers(panel);
          }
        }

        // CPF/CNPJ mask binding
        panel
          .querySelectorAll('[data-field-name="cnpj_cpf"]')
          .forEach((inputEl) => {
            inputEl.addEventListener("input", (e) => {
              const cursorPos = e.target.selectionStart;
              const oldLen = e.target.value.length;
              e.target.value = maskCpfCnpj(e.target.value);
              const newLen = e.target.value.length;
              // Adjust cursor position after formatting
              const diff = newLen - oldLen;
              e.target.setSelectionRange(cursorPos + diff, cursorPos + diff);
              // Update formData
              const arrayIdx = inputEl.getAttribute("data-array-idx");
              if (
                arrayIdx !== null &&
                arrayIdx !== undefined &&
                arrayIdx !== ""
              ) {
                const idx = parseInt(arrayIdx);
                if (!formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx])
                  formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx] = {};
                formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField][idx]["cnpj_cpf"] =
                  e.target.value;
              } else {
                formData[stepKey]["cnpj_cpf"] = e.target.value;
              }
              saveToStorage();
            });
            // Validate on blur
            inputEl.addEventListener("blur", (e) => {
              const val = e.target.value;
              const digits = val.replace(/\D/g, "");
              if (digits.length === 0) return; // empty is handled by required validation
              if (digits.length < 11) {
                e.target.style.borderColor = "var(--color-error)";
                e.target.title = "CPF ou CNPJ incompleto";
              } else if (!validateCpfCnpj(val)) {
                e.target.style.borderColor = "var(--color-error)";
                e.target.title =
                  digits.length === 11 ? "CPF inválido" : "CNPJ inválido";
              } else {
                e.target.style.borderColor = "var(--color-success)";
                e.target.title =
                  digits.length === 11 ? "CPF válido ✓" : "CNPJ válido ✓";
              }
            });
            // Apply mask on initial render if value exists
            if (inputEl.value) {
              inputEl.value = maskCpfCnpj(inputEl.value);
            }
          });

        // Luminárias auto-sum from compartment configs (step3 only)
        if (stepKey === "step3") {
          const syncLuminariasTotal = () => {
            const lumInput = panel.querySelector(
              '[data-field-name="qtd_luminarias"]',
            );
            if (!lumInput) return;
            const iluminacao = formData.step3.iluminacao || "";
            if (iluminacao.includes("Sem Iluminação")) {
              lumInput.value = "0";
              formData.step3.qtd_luminarias = "0";
              lumInput.readOnly = true;
              lumInput.style.opacity = "0.5";
              saveToStorage();
              return;
            }
            lumInput.readOnly = true;
            lumInput.style.cursor = "not-allowed";
            lumInput.style.opacity = "0.85";
            // Sum from compartment configs
            const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
            const comps =
              typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function"
                ? rcComputeCompartments(snap)
                : [];
            const cfgAll =
              typeof rcGetCompartmentsConfig === "function"
                ? rcGetCompartmentsConfig()
                : {};
            let total = 0;
            let allSet = true;
            comps.forEach((c) => {
              const cf = cfgAll[c.name];
              if (cf && cf.qtd_luminarias != null && cf.qtd_luminarias !== "") {
                total += parseInt(cf.qtd_luminarias) || 0;
              } else {
                allSet = false;
                // Use suggestion as fallback
                const rec =
                  typeof rcRecommendLuminarias === "function"
                    ? rcRecommendLuminarias(
                        c,
                        cf?.categoria_produto,
                        cf?.temperatura_setpoint,
                      )
                    : { recommended: 1 };
                total += rec.recommended || 1;
              }
            });
            if (comps.length === 0) {
              // No compartments computed yet (no dimensions?) — use area-based default
              const comp_ = parseFloat(formData.step3.comprimento) || 0;
              const larg_ = parseFloat(formData.step3.largura) || 0;
              if (comp_ > 0 && larg_ > 0) {
                total = Math.max(1, Math.ceil((comp_ * larg_) / 6));
              }
            }
            lumInput.value = total;
            formData.step3.qtd_luminarias = String(total);
            // Update hint
            const hintEl = lumInput.parentElement?.querySelector(".field-hint");
            if (hintEl) {
              if (!allSet && comps.length > 0) {
                hintEl.textContent = `Total: ${total} (inclui sugestões automáticas para compartimentos não configurados). Configure cada compartimento para valores exatos.`;
              } else if (comps.length > 0) {
                hintEl.textContent = `Total: ${total} — soma das ${comps.length} zona(s) configurada(s).`;
              } else {
                hintEl.textContent = `Sugerido: ${total} (~1 a cada 6m²). Configure nos compartimentos para ajustar.`;
              }
            }
            saveToStorage();
          };

          // Listen for changes on iluminacao
          const ilumSelect = panel.querySelector(
            '[data-field-name="iluminacao"]',
          );
          if (ilumSelect) {
            ilumSelect.addEventListener("change", syncLuminariasTotal);
          }

          // Run sync on render
          syncLuminariasTotal();
          // Expose globally for use after compartment config save
          window._syncLuminariasTotal = syncLuminariasTotal;
        }

        // Dynamic array: Add button
        if (stepSchema.isDynamic) {
          const addBtn = document.getElementById("addArrayItem");
          if (addBtn) {
            addBtn.addEventListener("click", () => {
              const items = formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField];
              if (items.length < stepSchema.arrayMax) {
                items.push({});
                saveToStorage();
                renderCurrentStep();
              }
            });
          }

          // Remove buttons
          panel.querySelectorAll("[data-remove-idx]").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
              const idx = parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-remove-idx"));
              formData[stepKey][stepSchema.arrayField].splice(idx, 1);
              saveToStorage();
              renderCurrentStep();
            });
          });
        }
      }

      function filterOptions(container) {
        const input = container.querySelector(".creatable-input");
        const val = input.value.toLowerCase().trim();
        container.querySelectorAll(".creatable-option").forEach((opt) => {
          const text = (opt.getAttribute("data-value") || "").toLowerCase();
          if (!val || text.includes(val)) {
            opt.classList.remove("hidden");
          } else {
            opt.classList.add("hidden");
          }
        });
      }

      function updateNavButtons() {
        const prevBtn = document.getElementById("btnPrev");
        const nextBtn = document.getElementById("btnNext");

        prevBtn.style.visibility = currentStep === 1 ? "hidden" : "visible";

        if (currentStep === totalSteps) {
          if (lastStepEvaluating) {
            nextBtn.innerHTML =
              '<i data-lucide="loader-2" class="spin" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i> Avaliando...';
            nextBtn.classList.remove("btn-submit-style");
            nextBtn.disabled = true;
            nextBtn.style.opacity = "0.7";
          } else if (lastStepEvaluated) {
            nextBtn.innerHTML =
              '<i data-lucide="check" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i> Enviar Orçamento';
            nextBtn.classList.add("btn-submit-style");
            nextBtn.disabled = false;
            nextBtn.style.opacity = "1";
            nextBtn.title =
              "Avaliação aprovada — clique para enviar definitivamente";
          } else {
            nextBtn.innerHTML =
              '<i data-lucide="search-check" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i> Avaliar antes de enviar';
            nextBtn.classList.remove("btn-submit-style");
            nextBtn.disabled = false;
            nextBtn.style.opacity = "1";
            nextBtn.title =
              "A IA + Reality Check vão analisar todos os dados antes de liberar o envio";
          }
        } else {
          nextBtn.innerHTML =
            'Próximo <i data-lucide="arrow-right" style="width:16px;height:16px"></i>';
          nextBtn.classList.remove("btn-submit-style");
          nextBtn.disabled = false;
          nextBtn.style.opacity = "1";
          nextBtn.title = "";
        }
        if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") lucide.createIcons();
      }

      // ============================================
      // NAVIGATION LOGIC
      // ============================================
      function navigateToStep(targetStep) {
        if (targetStep === currentStep) return;
        if (targetStep < 1 || targetStep > totalSteps) return;

        // When going backwards, just go
        if (targetStep < currentStep) {
          currentStep = targetStep;
          renderCurrentStep();
          scrollWizardTop();
          return;
        }

        // Going forward: validate each intermediate step
        for (let i = currentStep; i < targetStep; i++) {
          const valid = validateStep(i);
          if (!valid) {
            currentStep = i;
            renderCurrentStep();
            showValidationErrorsInChat(i);
            return;
          }
          stepValidated[`step${i}`] = true;
        }

        // §17 Reality Check — only block on errors that belong to steps up to targetStep.
        // Errors from later steps (e.g. compartment temperature in step 3) must not
        // block forward navigation from step 1 → 2.
        if (typeof runRealityCheck === "function") {
          const rc = runRealityCheck();
          if (rcHasBlockingForStep(rc, targetStep)) {
            const errs = rcIssuesUpToStep(rc, targetStep)
              .filter((it) => it.level === "error")
              .slice(0, 5)
              .map(
                (it) =>
                  `• [Etapa ${rcIssueStep(it)} · ${it.category}] ${it.message}`,
              )
              .join("\n");
            const blockingCount = rcIssuesUpToStep(rc, targetStep).filter(
              (it) => it.level === "error",
            ).length;
            addChatMessage(
              `🚫 **Navegação bloqueada até a Etapa ${targetStep}.** Reality Check detectou ${blockingCount} erro(s) crítico(s) em etapas ≤ ${targetStep}:\n\n${errs}`,
              "system",
              "has-errors",
            );
            refreshRcSidebar();
            return;
          }
        }

        currentStep = targetStep;
        renderCurrentStep();
        scrollWizardTop();
      }

      let isSubmitting = false; // Prevent double-click

      // Step 6 (último step) tem fluxo de 2 cliques: primeiro "Avaliar",
      // depois "Enviar". Esta flag controla a transição.
      let lastStepEvaluated = false;
      let lastStepEvaluating = false;

      function resetLastStepEvaluation(reason) {
        if (lastStepEvaluated || lastStepEvaluating) {
          lastStepEvaluated = false;
          if (currentStep === totalSteps) updateNavButtons();
        }
      }

      // Overlay de transição (envio → reset). Evita o "flash" visual de
      // tudo se redesenhando do zero quando voltamos para a Etapa 1.
      function showWizardTransitionOverlay(title, subtitle) {
        const ov = document.getElementById("wizardTransitionOverlay");
        if (!ov) return;
        const t = document.getElementById("wizardTransitionTitle");
        const s = document.getElementById("wizardTransitionSubtitle");
        if (t && title) t.textContent = title;
        if (s && subtitle) s.textContent = subtitle;
        ov.classList.add("show");
        ov.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
      }
      function updateWizardTransitionOverlay(title, subtitle) {
        const t = document.getElementById("wizardTransitionTitle");
        const s = document.getElementById("wizardTransitionSubtitle");
        if (t && title) t.textContent = title;
        if (s && subtitle) s.textContent = subtitle;
      }
      function hideWizardTransitionOverlay() {
        const ov = document.getElementById("wizardTransitionOverlay");
        if (!ov) return;
        ov.classList.remove("show");
        ov.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
      }

      async function advanceStep() {
        // Sync DOM → formData before validating (prevents stale-state bugs)
        syncFormFromDOM();

        // Validate current step (local validation)
        const valid = validateStep(currentStep);
        if (!valid) {
          renderCurrentStep(); // Re-render with error styles
          showValidationErrorsInChat(currentStep);
          return;
        }

        stepValidated[`step${currentStep}`] = true;

        // Disable button while AI validates
        const btnNext = document.getElementById("btnNext");
        btnNext.disabled = true;
        btnNext.style.opacity = "0.6";

        // §17 Reality Check — BLOCK advancement only if there are errors
        // belonging to steps up to currentStep (errors from later steps are
        // expected to be unresolved and must not block earlier navigation).
        if (typeof runRealityCheck === "function") {
          const rc = runRealityCheck();
          if (rcHasBlockingForStep(rc, currentStep)) {
            btnNext.disabled = false;
            btnNext.style.opacity = "1";
            const list = rcIssuesUpToStep(rc, currentStep).filter(
              (i) => i.level === "error",
            );
            const errs = list
              .slice(0, 5)
              .map(
                (i) =>
                  `• [Etapa ${rcIssueStep(i)} · ${i.category}] ${i.message}`,
              )
              .join("\n");
            addChatMessage(
              `🚫 **Não é possível avançar.** O Reality Check detectou ${list.length} erro(s) crítico(s) na Etapa ${currentStep} (ou anteriores):\n\n${errs}\n\nCorrija ou use "Aplicar correção" no painel "📊 Análise" antes de prosseguir.`,
              "system",
              "has-errors",
            );
            refreshRcSidebar();
            return; // DO NOT advance, DO NOT call AI
          }
        }

        // AI validation (BLOCKING if critical errors found).
        // Skip re-calling the AI when the user already confirmed warnings
        // for this exact step state — the AI is non-deterministic and would
        // otherwise produce fresh suggestions on every click, creating an
        // infinite "confirm warnings" loop.
        const stepHash = _stepDataHash(currentStep);
        const alreadyConfirmed =
          warningsConfirmedHash[`step${currentStep}`] === stepHash;
        let aiResult;
        if (alreadyConfirmed) {
          aiResult = aiValidationResults[`step${currentStep}`] || null;
        } else {
          aiResult = await aiValidateStep(currentStep);
        }

        btnNext.disabled = false;
        btnNext.style.opacity = "1";

        // If AI found critical errors (🔴), BLOCK advancement
        if (aiResult && aiResult.hasCriticalErrors) {
          addChatMessage(
            "🚫 **Não é possível avançar.** A validação IA identificou problemas críticos (🔴) que precisam ser corrigidos antes de prosseguir. Revise os campos destacados acima.",
            "system",
          );
          return; // DO NOT advance
        }

        // If there are non-blocking recommendations (🟡), ask for confirmation
        // before advancing — the user complained that the wizard advanced
        // silently even with pending suggestions in the chat. We honor those
        // explicitly so it's clear the recommendations are still pending.
        const pendingSuggestions = (aiResult?.suggestions || []).length;
        if (
          !alreadyConfirmed &&
          aiResult &&
          aiResult.hasWarnings &&
          pendingSuggestions > 0
        ) {
          const ok = await uiConfirm(
            `Há ${pendingSuggestions} recomendaç${pendingSuggestions === 1 ? "ão" : "ões"} pendente${pendingSuggestions === 1 ? "" : "s"} da IA para esta etapa. Deseja avançar mesmo assim?`,
            {
              variant: "warning",
              confirmText: "Avançar mesmo assim",
              cancelText: "Ficar e revisar",
            },
          );
          if (!ok) {
            addChatMessage(
              `⏸️ Permaneci na Etapa ${currentStep}. Revise as recomendações no painel "Como corrigir" — clique em **Aplicar correção** ou **Ir para o campo**.`,
              "system",
            );
            return; // DO NOT advance
          }
          // Remember the user accepted these warnings for this exact state —
          // next click on Avançar will skip the AI re-run and the dialog.
          warningsConfirmedHash[`step${currentStep}`] = stepHash;
        }

        // Advance (OK or user confirmed warnings)
        if (currentStep < totalSteps) {
          currentStep++;
          renderCurrentStep();
          scrollWizardTop();
          saveToStorage();
        }
      }

      function showValidationErrorsInChat(stepNum) {
        const stepKey = `step${stepNum}`;
        const errors = validationErrors[stepKey] || {};
        const allErrors = Object.values(errors)
          .flatMap((v) => (Array.isArray(v) ? v : [])) // ignora objetos aninhados (ex.: _portas)
          .map((e) =>
            typeof e === "string" ? e : (e && e.message) || JSON.stringify(e),
          );
        if (allErrors.length > 0) {
          const msg = `⚠️ **Corrija os erros na Etapa ${stepNum}:**\n\n${allErrors.map((e) => `• ${e}`).join("\n")}`;
          addChatMessage(msg, "system");
        }
      }

      function scrollWizardTop() {
        document
          .querySelector(".wizard-area")
          .scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: "smooth" });
      }

      // ============================================
      // SUBMIT WIZARD
      // ============================================
      async function evaluateLastStepBeforeSubmit() {
        if (lastStepEvaluating || isSubmitting) return;
        lastStepEvaluating = true;
        lastStepEvaluated = false;
        updateNavButtons();

        // Sync DOM → formData first
        try {
          syncFormFromDOM();
        } catch (e) {}

        // Enforce representante for non-admin users
        if (!isAdmin()) {
          const userName =
            currentUser?.user_metadata?.full_name || currentUser?.email || "";
          if (formData.step1) formData.step1.representante = userName;
        }

        addChatMessage(
          "🔎 **Avaliando orçamento antes do envio...** Validando todas as etapas, executando Reality Check e consultando a IA.",
          "system",
        );

        // 1. Local validation of every step
        let allValid = true;
        let firstErrorStep = null;
        for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
          if (!validateStep(i)) {
            allValid = false;
            if (!firstErrorStep) firstErrorStep = i;
          } else {
            stepValidated[`step${i}`] = true;
          }
        }
        if (!allValid) {
          lastStepEvaluating = false;
          updateNavButtons();
          currentStep = firstErrorStep;
          renderCurrentStep();
          showValidationErrorsInChat(firstErrorStep);
          addChatMessage(
            `❌ **Avaliação reprovada.** Há erros em etapas anteriores (Etapa ${firstErrorStep}). Corrija e clique novamente em "Avaliar antes de enviar".`,
            "system",
          );
          return;
        }

        // 2. Reality Check
        let rc = null;
        try {
          rc = runRealityCheck();
        } catch (e) {
          rc = null;
        }
        if (rc && rc.blocking) {
          const errs = (rc.issues || [])
            .filter((i) => i.level === "error")
            .slice(0, 5)
            .map((i) => `• ${i.message}`)
            .join("\n");
          lastStepEvaluating = false;
          updateNavButtons();
          addChatMessage(
            `🚫 **Avaliação reprovada pelo Reality Check.** ${rc.counts.error} erro(s) crítico(s):\n\n${errs}\n\nCorrija no painel "Análise da Câmara" e clique em "Avaliar antes de enviar" novamente.`,
            "system",
          );
          if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function") refreshRcSidebar();
          return;
        }

        // 3. AI validation of step 6 (or last step)
        let aiResult = null;
        try {
          aiResult = await aiValidateStep(currentStep);
        } catch (e) {
          aiResult = null;
        }
        if (aiResult && aiResult.hasCriticalErrors) {
          lastStepEvaluating = false;
          updateNavButtons();
          addChatMessage(
            "🚫 **Avaliação reprovada pela IA.** Há problemas críticos (🔴) que precisam ser resolvidos. Veja as sugestões no chat e corrija antes de avaliar de novo.",
            "system",
          );
          return;
        }

        // 4. Soft warning for low fit score — confirm but allow
        if (rc && rc.derived && rc.derived.fit_score < 50) {
          const ok = await uiConfirm(
            `Fit Score baixo (${rc.derived.fit_score}/100). Há avisos importantes não resolvidos. Liberar mesmo assim o botão "Enviar"?`,
            { variant: "warning", confirmText: "Liberar envio" },
          );
          if (!ok) {
            lastStepEvaluating = false;
            updateNavButtons();
            addChatMessage(
              "⏸️ Avaliação interrompida. Ajuste os pontos sinalizados e avalie novamente.",
              "system",
            );
            return;
          }
        }

        // 5. PASSOU — libera o botão Enviar
        lastStepEvaluating = false;
        lastStepEvaluated = true;
        updateNavButtons();
        addChatMessage(
          "✅ **Avaliação aprovada!** O botão agora está como **Enviar Orçamento**. Clique para confirmar o envio definitivo.",
          "ai-validation",
        );
      }

      async function submitWizard() {
        // Prevent double submissions
        if (isSubmitting) return;
        isSubmitting = true;

        // Sync current step DOM → formData before validating
        syncFormFromDOM();

        // Enforce representante for non-admin users (prevent DOM tampering)
        if (!isAdmin()) {
          const userName =
            currentUser?.user_metadata?.full_name || currentUser?.email || "";
          formData.step1.representante = userName;
        }

        const btnNext = document.getElementById("btnNext");
        btnNext.disabled = true;
        btnNext.style.opacity = "0.6";

        // Validate ALL steps locally before submitting
        let allValid = true;
        let firstErrorStep = null;

        for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
          if (!validateStep(i)) {
            allValid = false;
            if (!firstErrorStep) firstErrorStep = i;
          } else {
            stepValidated[`step${i}`] = true;
          }
        }

        if (!allValid) {
          currentStep = firstErrorStep;
          renderCurrentStep();
          showValidationErrorsInChat(firstErrorStep);
          addChatMessage(
            "❌ Há erros pendentes em etapas anteriores. Corrija-os antes de enviar.",
            "system",
          );
          isSubmitting = false;
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = "1";
          return;
        }

        // ====== AI VALIDATE STEP 6 BEFORE SUBMITTING ======
        // Pulado se o evaluator já aprovou nesta sessão sem alterações.
        const aiResult = lastStepEvaluated
          ? { hasCriticalErrors: false }
          : await aiValidateStep(currentStep);
        if (aiResult && aiResult.hasCriticalErrors) {
          addChatMessage(
            "🚫 **Não é possível enviar.** A validação IA identificou problemas críticos (🔴) na Etapa 6 que precisam ser corrigidos antes do envio.",
            "system",
          );
          isSubmitting = false;
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = "1";
          return;
        }

        // ====== §17 REALITY CHECK BLOCK ======
        const rc = runRealityCheck();
        if (rc.blocking) {
          const errs = rc.issues
            .filter((i) => i.level === "error")
            .slice(0, 5)
            .map((i) => `• ${i.message}`)
            .join("\n");
          addChatMessage(
            `🚫 **Submissão bloqueada pelo Reality Check.** Há ${rc.counts.error} erro(s) crítico(s):\n\n${errs}\n\nVeja o painel "Análise da Câmara" no canto inferior direito.`,
            "system",
          );
          isSubmitting = false;
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = "1";
          refreshRcSidebar();
          return;
        }
        if (rc.derived.fit_score < 50) {
          if (
            !(await uiConfirm(
              `Fit Score baixo (${rc.derived.fit_score}/100). Há avisos importantes não resolvidos. Deseja enviar mesmo assim?`,
              { variant: "warning", confirmText: "Enviar mesmo assim" },
            ))
          ) {
            isSubmitting = false;
            btnNext.disabled = false;
            btnNext.style.opacity = "1";
            return;
          }
        }

        // ====== SUBMIT TO BACKEND ======
        const badge = document.getElementById("aiValidatingBadge");
        badge.querySelector("span").textContent = "Enviando orçamento...";
        badge.classList.add("show");

        // Mostra overlay full-screen para mascarar o reset visual posterior.
        showWizardTransitionOverlay(
          "Enviando orçamento...",
          "Estamos registrando os dados no servidor. Não feche esta janela.",
        );

        try {
          const editingId = formData._editing_submission_id || null;
          const editingProtocol = formData._editing_protocol || null;
          const response = await fetch(WIZARD_SUBMIT_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: {
              "Content-Type": "application/json",
              ...getAuthHeaders(),
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              formData: formData,
              sessionId: currentSessionId,
              submittedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
              submittedBy: getUser(),
              userRole: getUserRole(),
              version: "1.0",
              // Modo edição: backend pode atualizar o registro existente
              // em vez de criar um novo. Se o workflow ainda não suportar,
              // os campos são ignorados e um novo orçamento será criado.
              editingSubmissionId: editingId,
              editingProtocol: editingProtocol,
              isEdit: !!editingId,
            }),
          });

          if (response.ok) {
            let result = {};
            try {
              result = await response.json();
            } catch (e) {}
            const protocol = result.protocol || editingProtocol || "";
            const wasEdit = !!editingId;
            addChatMessage(
              wasEdit
                ? `✅ **Orçamento atualizado com sucesso!**\n\n${protocol ? "📋 Protocolo: **" + protocol + "**\n\n" : ""}${result.message || "Dados atualizados."}`
                : `✅ **Orçamento enviado com sucesso!**\n\n${protocol ? "📋 Protocolo: **" + protocol + "**\n\n" : ""}${result.message || "Dados registrados."}`,
              "ai-validation",
            );

            // ====== RESET WIZARD FOR NEW SUBMISSION ======
            updateWizardTransitionOverlay(
              "Orçamento enviado com sucesso!",
              protocol
                ? `Protocolo ${protocol}. Preparando um novo orçamento em branco...`
                : "Preparando um novo orçamento em branco...",
            );
            setTimeout(() => {
              try {
                clearFormStorage();
                formData = {};
                validationErrors = {};
                stepValidated = {};
                aiValidationResults = {};
                warningsConfirmedHash = {};
                appliedSuggestionsMemory = {};
                lastStepEvaluated = false;
                lastStepEvaluating = false;
                localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY);
                currentStep = 1;
                initFormData();
                renderCurrentStep();
                renderValidationTracker();
                if (typeof updateNavButtons === "function") updateNavButtons();
                if (typeof scrollWizardTop === "function") scrollWizardTop();
                addChatMessage(
                  `📝 **Novo orçamento iniciado.** O formulário foi limpo para um novo preenchimento.${protocol ? " O protocolo anterior é: " + protocol : ""}`,
                  "system",
                );
              } finally {
                // Pequeno delay para o DOM já estar repintado antes de revelar.
                setTimeout(hideWizardTransitionOverlay, 250);
              }
            }, 1400);
          } else {
            const errText = await response.text().catch(() => "");
            hideWizardTransitionOverlay();
            addChatMessage(
              `❌ Falha ao enviar orçamento (${response.status}). ${errText || "Servidor não retornou detalhes."}`,
              "system",
            );
          }
        } catch (error) {
          console.error("Submit error:", error);
          hideWizardTransitionOverlay();
          addChatMessage(
            "❌ Erro de conexão ao enviar. Verifique sua rede e tente novamente.",
            "system",
          );
        } finally {
          badge.classList.remove("show");
          badge.querySelector("span").textContent = "IA analisando...";
          btnNext.disabled = false;
          btnNext.style.opacity = "1";
          isSubmitting = false;
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // CHAT FUNCTIONALITY
      // ============================================
      function stripChatContext(text) {
        if (!text) return text;
        // Remove [CONTEXTO DO WIZARD] and everything after it
        return text.replace(/\s*\[CONTEXTO[^\]]*\].*$/s, "").trim();
      }

      function addChatMessage(content, type = "assistant", extraClass = "") {
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        content = stripChatContext(content);
        if (!content) return; // skip empty messages after stripping
        const msg = document.createElement("div");
        msg.className = `chat-msg ${type} ${extraClass}`.trim();

        const div = document.createElement("div");
        div.className = "msg-content";
        div.innerHTML = marked.parse(content);
        msg.appendChild(div);

        chatMessages.appendChild(msg);
        chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;

        // Auto-open chat if closed for important messages.
        // No mobile (≤ 900px) só abrimos automaticamente quando a mensagem é
        // BLOQUEANTE (extraClass === 'has-errors' ou começa com 🚫), porque o
        // chat ocupa a tela inteira. Para avisos normais, mostramos um badge
        // pulsante no botão do chat.
        const isMobile = window.matchMedia("(max-width: 900px)").matches;
        const isBlocking = extraClass === "has-errors" || /^🚫/.test(content);
        const panel = document.getElementById("chatPanel");
        const isClosed = panel && !panel.classList.contains("open");
        if (isClosed && (type === "ai-validation" || type === "system")) {
          if (!isMobile || isBlocking) {
            toggleChat();
          } else {
            // Sinaliza ao usuário que há nova mensagem importante no chat
            const btn = document.getElementById("chatToggleBtn");
            if (btn) btn.classList.add("has-unread");
          }
        }
      }

      async function sendChatMessage(message) {
        if (!message.trim()) return;
        addChatMessage(message, "user");

        // Ensure we have a session
        if (!currentSessionId) {
          currentSessionId = generateSessionId();
        }

        // Show typing indicator
        showTypingIndicator();

        try {
          const response = await fetch(AGENT_URL, {
            method: "POST",
            headers: {
              "Content-Type": "application/json",
              ...getAuthHeaders(),
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({
              chatInput: message,
              sessionId: currentSessionId,
              wizardValidation: false, // Flag: save to DB for session memory
              context: JSON.stringify({
                wizardStep: currentStep,
                stepName: SCHEMA[`step${currentStep}`].title,
                currentFormData: formData,
              }),
            }),
          });

          removeTypingIndicator();

          if (response.ok) {
            const data = await response.json();
            addChatMessage(
              data.output || data.message || "Sem resposta do agente.",
              "assistant",
            );
            // Refresh sessions list after new message
            debouncedFetchSessions();
          } else {
            addChatMessage(
              "Erro ao consultar o assistente. Tente novamente.",
              "system",
            );
          }
        } catch (error) {
          removeTypingIndicator();
          addChatMessage("Falha de conexão com o assistente.", "system");
        }
      }

      function showTypingIndicator() {
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        const existing = chatMessages.querySelector(".chat-msg.typing");
        if (existing) return; // already showing
        const msg = document.createElement("div");
        msg.className = "chat-msg typing";
        msg.innerHTML =
          '<div class="typing-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></div>';
        chatMessages.appendChild(msg);
        chatMessages.scrollTop = chatMessages.scrollHeight;
      }

      function removeTypingIndicator() {
        const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        const typing = chatMessages.querySelector(".chat-msg.typing");
        if (typing) typing.remove();
      }

      function toggleChat() {
        const panel = document.getElementById("chatPanel");
        const btn = document.getElementById("chatToggleBtn");
        panel.classList.toggle("open");
        btn.classList.toggle("active");
        // Limpa o sinal de "não-lido" ao abrir
        if (panel.classList.contains("open")) {
          btn.classList.remove("has-unread");
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // SESSION MANAGEMENT
      // ============================================
      let sessionsFetchTimeout = null;

      function debouncedFetchSessions() {
        clearTimeout(sessionsFetchTimeout);
        sessionsFetchTimeout = setTimeout(() => loadSessions(), 2000);
      }

      async function loadSessions() {
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc("saorafael_list_sessions");
          if (error) {
            console.warn("Failed to load sessions:", error.message);
            return;
          }
          sessions = Array.isArray(data) ? data : [];
          renderSessions();
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Failed to load sessions:", e);
        }
      }

      async function loadSessionHistory(sessionId) {
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc("saorafael_get_history", {
            p_session_id: sessionId,
          });
          if (error || !data) return [];
          return data.map((item) => {
            if (item.message) {
              return {
                role: item.message.type === "human" ? "user" : "assistant",
                content: stripChatContext(item.message.content || ""),
                timestamp: item.created_at,
              };
            }
            return item;
          });
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Failed to load history:", e);
          return [];
        }
      }

      async function deleteSessionById(sessionId) {
        try {
          const { error } = await sbClient.rpc("saorafael_delete_session", {
            p_session_id: sessionId,
          });
          return !error;
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Failed to delete session:", e);
          return false;
        }
      }

      function renderSessions() {
        const list = document.getElementById("sessionsList");
        if (!sessions || sessions.length === 0) {
          list.innerHTML =
            '<div class="sessions-loading">Nenhuma sessão encontrada</div>';
          return;
        }
        list.innerHTML = sessions
          .map((s) => {
            const isActive = s.session_id === currentSessionId;
            const title =
              s.titulo || s.session_id?.substring(0, 30) || "Sessão sem título";
            const date = s.data_ultimo
              ? new Date(s.data_ultimo).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")
              : "";
            const msgs = s.total_mensagens || 0;
            return `
            <div class="session-item ${isActive ? "active" : ""}" data-session-id="${s.session_id}">
              <div class="session-item-info" onclick="switchSession('${s.session_id}')">
                <div class="session-item-title">${escapeHtml(title)}</div>
                <div class="session-item-meta">${date} · ${msgs} msgs</div>
              </div>
              <button class="session-delete-btn" onclick="handleDeleteSession('${s.session_id}', event)" title="Excluir sessão">
                <i data-lucide="trash-2" style="width:12px;height:12px"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          `;
          })
          .join("");
        if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") lucide.createIcons();
      }

      async function switchSession(sessionId) {
        currentSessionId = sessionId;
        renderSessions();

        // Clear chat and load history
        const chatEl = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
        chatEl.innerHTML =
          '<div class="sessions-loading">Carregando histórico...</div>';

        const history = await loadSessionHistory(sessionId);
        chatEl.innerHTML = "";

        if (history.length === 0) {
          addChatMessage(
            "📭 Sessão vazia. Envie uma mensagem para começar.",
            "system",
          );
        } else {
          history.forEach((msg) => {
            addChatMessage(
              msg.content,
              msg.role === "user" ? "user" : "assistant",
            );
          });
        }

        // Close sessions panel
        document.getElementById("sessionsPanel").style.display = "none";
      }

      async function handleDeleteSession(sessionId, event) {
        event.stopPropagation();
        if (
          !(await uiConfirm("Excluir esta sessão e todo seu histórico?", {
            danger: true,
            confirmText: "Excluir",
          }))
        )
          return;

        const success = await deleteSessionById(sessionId);
        if (success) {
          sessions = sessions.filter((s) => s.session_id !== sessionId);
          renderSessions();
          if (currentSessionId === sessionId) {
            currentSessionId = null;
            document.getElementById("chatMessages").innerHTML = "";
            addChatMessage(
              "🗑️ Sessão excluída. Crie uma nova sessão para continuar.",
              "system",
            );
          }
        } else {
          uiAlert("Falha ao excluir sessão.", { variant: "error" });
        }
      }

      function startNewSession() {
        currentSessionId = generateSessionId();
        document.getElementById("chatMessages").innerHTML = "";
        addChatMessage(
          "🆕 **Nova sessão criada!** Envie mensagens ou avance no wizard para interagir com o assistente.",
          "system",
        );
        document.getElementById("sessionsPanel").style.display = "none";
        renderSessions();
      }

      function toggleSessionsPanel() {
        const panel = document.getElementById("sessionsPanel");
        if (panel.style.display === "none") {
          panel.style.display = "block";
          loadSessions();
        } else {
          panel.style.display = "none";
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // UTILITY FUNCTIONS
      // ============================================
      // ============================================
      // CEP Mask & ViaCEP lookup
      // ============================================
      function maskCep(value) {
        const d = (value || "").replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 8);
        if (d.length > 5) return d.slice(0, 5) + "-" + d.slice(5);
        return d;
      }

      async function doCepLookup(cepRaw, stepKey, panel, forInstalacao) {
        const cep = (cepRaw || "").replace(/\D/g, "");
        if (cep.length !== 8) {
          if (typeof showToast === "function")
            showToast("CEP deve ter 8 dígitos.", "warning");
          return;
        }
        try {
          const res = await fetch(`https://viacep.com.br/ws/${cep}/json/`);
          const data = await res.json();
          if (data.erro) {
            if (typeof showToast === "function")
              showToast("CEP não encontrado.", "warning");
            return;
          }
          const logradouro = [data.logradouro, data.bairro]
            .filter(Boolean)
            .join(", ");
          const uf = (data.uf || "").toUpperCase();
          const cidade = data.localidade || "";
          if (forInstalacao) {
            // Fill local instalação fields
            formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_cep = maskCep(cep);
            formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_endereco = logradouro;
            formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_diferente = "sim";
            formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_municipio =
              cidade && uf ? `${cidade}/${uf}` : "";
          } else {
            // Fill main address fields
            formData[stepKey].cep = maskCep(cep);
            if (logradouro) formData[stepKey].endereco_entrega = logradouro;
            if (uf) formData[stepKey].estado = uf;
            if (cidade) formData[stepKey].cidade = cidade;
            // Keep local_instalacao_municipio in sync if user chose "mesmo endereço"
            if ((formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_diferente || "nao") === "nao") {
              formData[stepKey].local_instalacao_municipio =
                cidade && uf ? `${cidade}/${uf}` : "";
            }
          }
          saveToStorage();
          if (typeof showToast === "function")
            showToast("Endereço preenchido pelo CEP.", "success");
          // Re-render to reflect the populated fields (including cascading cidade list)
          if (typeof renderCurrentStep === "function") renderCurrentStep();
        } catch (e) {
          console.warn("Falha ao consultar ViaCEP:", e);
          if (typeof showToast === "function")
            showToast("Falha ao consultar CEP.", "error");
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // CPF / CNPJ Mask & Validation
      // ============================================
      function maskCpfCnpj(value) {        let digits = (value || "").replace(/\D/g, "").slice(0, 14);
        if (digits.length <= 11) {
          // CPF: 000.000.000-00
          digits = digits.slice(0, 11);
          if (digits.length > 9)
            return digits.replace(
              /(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{1,2})/,
              "$1.$2.$3-$4",
            );
          if (digits.length > 6)
            return digits.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{1,3})/, "$1.$2.$3");
          if (digits.length > 3)
            return digits.replace(/(\d{3})(\d{1,3})/, "$1.$2");
          return digits;
        } else {
          // CNPJ: 00.000.000/0000-00
          if (digits.length > 12)
            return digits.replace(
              /(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{4})(\d{1,2})/,
              "$1.$2.$3/$4-$5",
            );
          if (digits.length > 8)
            return digits.replace(
              /(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{3})(\d{1,4})/,
              "$1.$2.$3/$4",
            );
          if (digits.length > 5)
            return digits.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{3})(\d{1,3})/, "$1.$2.$3");
          if (digits.length > 2)
            return digits.replace(/(\d{2})(\d{1,3})/, "$1.$2");
          return digits;
        }
      }

      function validateCpf(cpf) {
        const digits = cpf.replace(/\D/g, "");
        if (digits.length !== 11) return false;
        // Reject known invalid sequences
        if (/^(\d)\1{10}$/.test(digits)) return false;
        // First check digit
        let sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 9; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * (10 - i);
        let rest = (sum * 10) % 11;
        if (rest === 10) rest = 0;
        if (rest !== parseInt(digits[9])) return false;
        // Second check digit
        sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * (11 - i);
        rest = (sum * 10) % 11;
        if (rest === 10) rest = 0;
        return rest === parseInt(digits[10]);
      }

      function validateCnpj(cnpj) {
        const digits = cnpj.replace(/\D/g, "");
        if (digits.length !== 14) return false;
        if (/^(\d)\1{13}$/.test(digits)) return false;
        const weights1 = [5, 4, 3, 2, 9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2];
        const weights2 = [6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 9, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2];
        let sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 12; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * weights1[i];
        let rest = sum % 11;
        const d1 = rest < 2 ? 0 : 11 - rest;
        if (parseInt(digits[12]) !== d1) return false;
        sum = 0;
        for (let i = 0; i < 13; i++) sum += parseInt(digits[i]) * weights2[i];
        rest = sum % 11;
        const d2 = rest < 2 ? 0 : 11 - rest;
        return parseInt(digits[13]) === d2;
      }

      function validateCpfCnpj(value) {
        const digits = (value || "").replace(/\D/g, "");
        if (digits.length === 11) return validateCpf(digits);
        if (digits.length === 14) return validateCnpj(digits);
        return false; // incomplete
      }

      function escapeHtml(text) {
        const div = document.createElement("div");
        div.textContent = text || "";
        return div.innerHTML;
      }

      function escapeAttr(text) {
        return (text || "")
          .replace(/&/g, "&")
          .replace(/"/g, """)
          .replace(/'/g, "'")
          .replace(/</g, "<")
          .replace(/>/g, ">");
      }

      // ============================================
      // STYLED MODAL DIALOGS (replaces native alert/confirm)
      // ============================================
      function _uiDialog({
        title,
        message,
        variant = "info",
        confirmText = "OK",
        cancelText = null,
        danger = false,
      }) {
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
          const overlay = document.createElement("div");
          overlay.className = "ui-dialog-overlay";
          overlay.style.cssText =
            "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(15,23,42,0.62);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:99999;animation:uiDialogFadeIn 0.15s ease-out;";
          const accent = danger
            ? "#dc2626"
            : variant === "warning"
              ? "#f97316"
              : variant === "success"
                ? "#16a34a"
                : variant === "error"
                  ? "#dc2626"
                  : "var(--color-primary, #0ea5e9)";
          const icon = danger
            ? "⚠️"
            : variant === "warning"
              ? "⚠️"
              : variant === "success"
                ? "✅"
                : variant === "error"
                  ? "🔴"
                  : variant === "question"
                    ? "❓"
                    : "ℹ️";
          const safeMsg = String(message || "")
            .replace(/&/g, "&")
            .replace(/</g, "<")
            .replace(/>/g, ">")
            .replace(/\n/g, "<br>");
          const safeTitle = String(title || "")
            .replace(/&/g, "&")
            .replace(/</g, "<")
            .replace(/>/g, ">");
          overlay.innerHTML = `
            <div class="ui-dialog" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" style="background:var(--bg-card,#1e293b);color:var(--text-primary,#f1f5f9);border-radius:14px;box-shadow:0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);width:92%;max-width:440px;overflow:hidden;animation:uiDialogScaleIn 0.18s ease-out;border:1px solid var(--border-color,#334155);">
              <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;padding:20px 22px 12px;align-items:flex-start;border-top:4px solid ${accent};">
                <div style="font-size:28px;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;">${icon}</div>
                <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
                  ${title ? `<h3 style="margin:0 0 6px;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary,#f1f5f9);">${safeTitle}</h3>` : ""}
                  <div style="font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-secondary,#cbd5e1);">${safeMsg}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;padding:14px 22px 18px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.12);">
                ${cancelText ? `<button class="ui-dialog-cancel" style="padding:9px 16px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color,#475569);color:var(--text-secondary,#cbd5e1);border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;">${cancelText}</button>` : ""}
                <button class="ui-dialog-ok" style="padding:9px 18px;background:${accent};border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.15s;box-shadow:0 2px 6px ${accent}55;">${confirmText}</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          `;
          document.body.appendChild(overlay);
          const close = (val) => {
            overlay.remove();
            document.removeEventListener("keydown", onKey);
            resolve(val);
          };
          const onKey = (e) => {
            if (e.key === "Escape") close(cancelText ? false : true);
            if (e.key === "Enter") close(true);
          };
          document.addEventListener("keydown", onKey);
          overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
            if (e.target === overlay && cancelText) close(false);
          });
          overlay
            .querySelector(".ui-dialog-ok")
            .addEventListener("click", () => close(true));
          const cancelBtn = overlay.querySelector(".ui-dialog-cancel");
          if (cancelBtn)
            cancelBtn.addEventListener("click", () => close(false));
          setTimeout(() => overlay.querySelector(".ui-dialog-ok").focus(), 50);
        });
      }
      function uiAlert(message, opts = {}) {
        return _uiDialog({
          title: opts.title || null,
          message,
          variant: opts.variant || (opts.error ? "error" : "info"),
          confirmText: opts.confirmText || "OK",
        });
      }
      function uiConfirm(message, opts = {}) {
        return _uiDialog({
          title: opts.title || null,
          message,
          variant: opts.variant || "question",
          confirmText: opts.confirmText || "Confirmar",
          cancelText: opts.cancelText || "Cancelar",
          danger: !!opts.danger,
        });
      }
      // Multi-button choice dialog.
      // opts.choices = [{ value, label, variant?, primary? }]
      // Returns the selected `value` or null if dismissed.
      function uiChoice(message, opts = {}) {
        return new Promise((resolve) => {
          const overlay = document.createElement("div");
          overlay.className = "ui-dialog-overlay";
          overlay.style.cssText =
            "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(15,23,42,0.62);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:99999;animation:uiDialogFadeIn 0.15s ease-out;";
          const variant = opts.variant || "question";
          const accent =
            variant === "warning"
              ? "#f97316"
              : variant === "success"
                ? "#16a34a"
                : variant === "error"
                  ? "#dc2626"
                  : "var(--color-primary, #0ea5e9)";
          const icon =
            variant === "warning"
              ? "⚠️"
              : variant === "success"
                ? "✅"
                : variant === "error"
                  ? "🔴"
                  : variant === "question"
                    ? "❓"
                    : "ℹ️";
          const safeMsg = String(message || "")
            .replace(/&/g, "&")
            .replace(/</g, "<")
            .replace(/>/g, ">")
            .replace(/\n/g, "<br>");
          const safeTitle = String(opts.title || "")
            .replace(/&/g, "&")
            .replace(/</g, "<")
            .replace(/>/g, ">");
          const choices = Array.isArray(opts.choices) ? opts.choices : [];
          const btnHtml = choices
            .map((c, i) => {
              const cAccent =
                c.variant === "danger"
                  ? "#dc2626"
                  : c.variant === "warning"
                    ? "#f97316"
                    : c.variant === "success"
                      ? "#16a34a"
                      : c.variant === "neutral"
                        ? "transparent"
                        : accent;
              const isOutline = c.variant === "neutral";
              const style = isOutline
                ? `padding:9px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color,#475569);color:var(--text-secondary,#cbd5e1);border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;`
                : `padding:9px 14px;background:${cAccent};border:none;color:#fff;border-radius:7px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 2px 6px ${cAccent}55;`;
              return `<button data-choice-idx="${i}" style="${style}">${String(
                c.label || "",
              )
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")}</button>`;
            })
            .join("");
          const checkboxHtml = opts.rememberLabel
            ? `<label style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary,#cbd5e1);margin-right:auto;cursor:pointer;"><input type="checkbox" class="ui-dialog-remember" style="margin:0;"> ${String(opts.rememberLabel).replace(/&/g, "&").replace(/</g, "<")}</label>`
            : "";
          overlay.innerHTML = `
            <div class="ui-dialog" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" style="background:var(--bg-card,#1e293b);color:var(--text-primary,#f1f5f9);border-radius:14px;box-shadow:0 25px 50px -12px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);width:92%;max-width:520px;overflow:hidden;animation:uiDialogScaleIn 0.18s ease-out;border:1px solid var(--border-color,#334155);">
              <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;padding:20px 22px 12px;align-items:flex-start;border-top:4px solid ${accent};">
                <div style="font-size:28px;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0;">${icon}</div>
                <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
                  ${opts.title ? `<h3 style="margin:0 0 6px;font-size:16px;font-weight:700;">${safeTitle}</h3>` : ""}
                  <div style="font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-secondary,#cbd5e1);">${safeMsg}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;align-items:center;padding:14px 22px 18px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.12);flex-wrap:wrap;">
                ${checkboxHtml}
                ${btnHtml}
              </div>
            </div>
          `;
          document.body.appendChild(overlay);
          const close = (val) => {
            const cb = overlay.querySelector(".ui-dialog-remember");
            const remember = !!(cb && cb.checked);
            overlay.remove();
            document.removeEventListener("keydown", onKey);
            resolve({ value: val, remember });
          };
          const onKey = (e) => {
            if (e.key === "Escape") close(null);
          };
          document.addEventListener("keydown", onKey);
          overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
            if (e.target === overlay) close(null);
          });
          overlay.querySelectorAll("[data-choice-idx]").forEach((btn) => {
            btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
              const idx = parseInt(btn.dataset.choiceIdx, 10);
              close(choices[idx] ? choices[idx].value : null);
            });
          });
        });
      }
      // Keep on window for use from inline onclick handlers
      window.uiAlert = uiAlert;
      window.uiConfirm = uiConfirm;
      window.uiChoice = uiChoice;

      // ============================================
      // AUTHENTICATION (Supabase)
      // ============================================
      let currentUser = null;
      let appStarted = false;

      function getAuthHeaders() {
        // Try to get token from authStorage (robust: works in iframes, sandboxed contexts)
        const headers = {};
        try {
          const raw = authStorage.getItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);
          if (raw) {
            const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
            const token = parsed?.access_token || parsed?.session?.access_token;
            if (token) headers["Authorization"] = `Bearer ${token}`;
          }
        } catch {}
        // Always include user ID if available
        if (currentUser?.id) {
          headers["x-user-id"] = currentUser.id;
        }
        return headers;
      }

      function generateSessionId() {
        const id = `session-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9)}`;
        currentSessionId = id;
        return id;
      }

      async function checkAuth() {
        try {
          const {
            data: { session },
          } = await sbClient.auth.getSession();
          if (session && session.user) {
            // Verify company_name
            const meta = session.user.user_metadata || {};
            if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) {
              await sbClient.auth.signOut();
              showLogin();
              return;
            }
            currentUser = session.user;
            hideLogin();
            startApp();
          } else {
            showLogin();
          }
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("Auth check failed:", e);
          showLogin();
        }
      }

      // Listen for auth state changes
      sbClient.auth.onAuthStateChange((event, session) => {
        if (event === "SIGNED_IN" && session?.user) {
          const meta = session.user.user_metadata || {};
          if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) {
            sbClient.auth.signOut();
            return;
          }
          currentUser = session.user;
          hideLogin();
          startApp();
        } else if (event === "SIGNED_OUT") {
          currentUser = null;
          showLogin();
        }
      });

      function showLogin() {
        document.getElementById("loginOverlay").style.display = "flex";
        document.getElementById("appContainer").style.display = "none";
        if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function") refreshRcSidebar();
      }
      function hideLogin() {
        document.getElementById("loginOverlay").style.display = "none";
        document.getElementById("appContainer").style.display = "flex";
        if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function")
          setTimeout(refreshRcSidebar, 100);
      }

      function getUser() {
        if (currentUser) return currentUser.email || currentUser.id;
        return "unknown";
      }

      function getUserRole() {
        if (!currentUser) return "usuario";
        return currentUser.user_metadata?.role || "usuario";
      }

      function isAdmin() {
        return getUserRole() === "admin";
      }

      document
        .getElementById("loginForm")
        .addEventListener("submit", async (e) => {
          e.preventDefault();
          const email = document.getElementById("usernameInput").value.trim();
          const pass = document.getElementById("passwordInput").value;
          const errorEl = document.getElementById("loginError");
          const btn = e.target.querySelector('button[type="submit"]');

          btn.disabled = true;
          btn.textContent = "Entrando...";
          errorEl.style.display = "none";

          try {
            const { data, error } = await sbClient.auth.signInWithPassword({
              email: email,
              password: pass,
            });

            if (error) {
              errorEl.textContent =
                error.message === "Invalid login credentials"
                  ? "E-mail ou senha inválidos"
                  : error.message;
              errorEl.style.display = "block";
            } else if (data.user) {
              // Check company_name
              const meta = data.user.user_metadata || {};
              if (meta.company_name && meta.company_name !== COMPANY_NAME) {
                await sbClient.auth.signOut();
                errorEl.textContent = "Usuário não pertence a esta empresa.";
                errorEl.style.display = "block";
              }
              // Auth state change listener will handle the rest
            }
          } catch (err) {
            errorEl.textContent = "Erro de conexão. Tente novamente.";
            errorEl.style.display = "block";
          } finally {
            btn.disabled = false;
            btn.textContent = "Entrar";
          }
        });

      // ============================================
      // THEME TOGGLE
      // ============================================
      function initTheme() {
        const saved = localStorage.getItem("wizard_theme") || "light";
        document.documentElement.setAttribute("data-theme", saved);
        updateThemeIcon(saved);
      }

      function toggleTheme() {
        const current = document.documentElement.getAttribute("data-theme");
        const next = current === "dark" ? "light" : "dark";
        document.documentElement.setAttribute("data-theme", next);
        localStorage.setItem("wizard_theme", next);
        updateThemeIcon(next);
      }

      function updateThemeIcon(theme) {
        const iconEl = document.getElementById("navThemeIcon");
        const labelEl = document.getElementById("navThemeLabel");
        if (iconEl) {
          iconEl.setAttribute("data-lucide", theme === "dark" ? "sun" : "moon");
        }
        if (labelEl) {
          labelEl.textContent = theme === "dark" ? "Tema Claro" : "Tema Escuro";
        }
        if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") lucide.createIcons();
      }

      // Sidebar toggle
      function openSidebar() {
        document.getElementById("sidebar").classList.add("open");
        document.getElementById("sidebarOverlay").classList.add("open");
        updateSidebarUser();
      }
      function closeSidebar() {
        document.getElementById("sidebar").classList.remove("open");
        document.getElementById("sidebarOverlay").classList.remove("open");
      }
      function updateSidebarUser() {
        if (!currentUser) return;
        const name =
          currentUser.user_metadata?.full_name || currentUser.email || "";
        const role = currentUser.user_metadata?.role || "usuário";
        document.getElementById("sidebarUserName").textContent = name;
        document.getElementById("sidebarUserRole").textContent = role;
        document.getElementById("sidebarAvatar").textContent = (
          name[0] || "U"
        ).toUpperCase();
        // Show users nav for admin
        if (isAdmin()) {
          document.getElementById("navUsers").style.display = "flex";
          document.getElementById("navRagReset").style.display = "flex";
          document.getElementById("navDbSetup").style.display = "flex";
        }
      }

      document
        .getElementById("sidebarOpenBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", openSidebar);
      document
        .getElementById("sidebarCloseBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", closeSidebar);
      document
        .getElementById("sidebarOverlay")
        .addEventListener("click", closeSidebar);

      document
        .getElementById("navEditProfile")
        .addEventListener("click", () => {
          closeSidebar();
          showEditProfilePanel();
        });
      document.getElementById("navTheme").addEventListener("click", () => {
        toggleTheme();
      });
      document
        .getElementById("navSubmissions")
        .addEventListener("click", () => {
          closeSidebar();
          showSubmissionsPanel();
        });
      document.getElementById("navUsers").addEventListener("click", () => {
        closeSidebar();
        showAdminPanel();
      });
      document
        .getElementById("navResetForm")
        .addEventListener("click", async () => {
          if (
            !(await uiConfirm(
              "Tem certeza que deseja limpar TODOS os dados do formulário? Esta ação não pode ser desfeita.",
              { danger: true, confirmText: "Limpar tudo" },
            ))
          )
            return;
          closeSidebar();
          clearFormStorage();
          formData = {};
          validationErrors = {};
          stepValidated = {};
          aiValidationResults = {};
          warningsConfirmedHash = {};
          appliedSuggestionsMemory = {};
          localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY);
          currentStep = 1;
          initFormData();
          renderCurrentStep();
          renderValidationTracker();
          addChatMessage(
            "🗑️ Formulário resetado. Todos os dados foram apagados.",
            "system",
          );
        });
      document
        .getElementById("navResetRag")
        .addEventListener("click", async () => {
          if (
            !(await uiConfirm(
              "Resetar todo o histórico do chat IA? As mensagens da sessão atual serão apagadas.",
              { danger: true, confirmText: "Resetar" },
            ))
          )
            return;
          closeSidebar();
          // Clear chat messages from UI
          const chatMessages = document.getElementById("chatMessages");
          if (chatMessages) chatMessages.innerHTML = "";
          // Start new session
          currentSessionId = generateSessionId();
          addChatMessage(
            "🔄 Histórico IA resetado. Nova sessão iniciada.",
            "system",
          );
        });
      document
        .getElementById("navRagReset")
        .addEventListener("click", async () => {
          if (
            !(await uiConfirm(
              "Isso vai RESETAR apenas o RAG (base de conhecimento da IA).\n\nSeus orçamentos, clientes e histórico de chat serão PRESERVADOS.\n\nA reindexação dos documentos do Drive pode levar vários minutos.",
              {
                danger: true,
                title: "Resetar RAG",
                confirmText: "Sim, resetar RAG",
              },
            ))
          )
            return;
          closeSidebar();
          const btn = document.getElementById("navRagReset");
          const btnDb = document.getElementById("navDbSetup");
          btn.disabled = true;
          if (btnDb) btnDb.disabled = true;
          const loadingMsg = addChatMessage(
            "⏳ **Resetando RAG e reindexando documentos do Drive…**\n\nIsso pode levar vários minutos. Não feche a página.",
            "system",
          );
          try {
            const res = await fetch(DB_SETUP_URL, {
              method: "POST",
              headers: {
                "Content-Type": "application/json",
                ...getAuthHeaders(),
              },
              body: JSON.stringify({
                action: "rag_only",
                triggeredBy: getUser(),
                timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
              }),
            });
            if (res.ok) {
              const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
              addChatMessage(
                `✅ **RAG reindexado!**\n\n${data.message || "Base de conhecimento reconstruída. Orçamentos e clientes preservados."}`,
                "ai-validation",
              );
            } else {
              const errText = await res.text().catch(() => "");
              addChatMessage(
                `❌ Falha no reset do RAG (${res.status}). ${errText}`,
                "system",
              );
            }
          } catch (err) {
            addChatMessage(
              `❌ Erro de conexão ao resetar RAG: ${err.message}`,
              "system",
            );
          } finally {
            btn.disabled = false;
            if (btnDb) btnDb.disabled = false;
          }
        });
      document
        .getElementById("navDbSetup")
        .addEventListener("click", async () => {
          if (
            !(await uiConfirm(
              "Isso vai RESETAR o RAG e o HISTÓRICO DE CHAT de todos os usuários.\n\nOrçamentos e clientes serão PRESERVADOS.\n\nDeseja continuar?",
              { danger: true, title: "ATENÇÃO", confirmText: "Continuar" },
            ))
          )
            return;
          if (
            !(await uiConfirm(
              "Esta ação apaga o RAG e o chat de TODOS os usuários e é IRREVERSÍVEL. Tem certeza absoluta?",
              {
                danger: true,
                title: "ÚLTIMA CONFIRMAÇÃO",
                confirmText: "Sim, resetar chat + RAG",
              },
            ))
          )
            return;
          closeSidebar();
          const btnDb2 = document.getElementById("navDbSetup");
          const btnRag2 = document.getElementById("navRagReset");
          btnDb2.disabled = true;
          if (btnRag2) btnRag2.disabled = true;
          addChatMessage(
            "⏳ **Resetando chat + RAG e reindexando documentos do Drive…**\n\nIsso pode levar vários minutos. Não feche a página.",
            "system",
          );
          try {
            const res = await fetch(DB_SETUP_URL, {
              method: "POST",
              headers: {
                "Content-Type": "application/json",
