                ...getAuthHeaders(),
              },
              body: JSON.stringify({
                action: "full_reset",
                triggeredBy: getUser(),
                timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
              }),
            });
            if (res.ok) {
              const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
              addChatMessage(
                `✅ **Reset concluído!**\n\n${data.message || "RAG e chat resetados. Orçamentos e clientes preservados."}`,
                "ai-validation",
              );
            } else {
              const errText = await res.text().catch(() => "");
              addChatMessage(
                `❌ Falha no reset (${res.status}). ${errText}`,
                "system",
              );
            }
          } catch (err) {
            addChatMessage(
              `❌ Erro de conexão ao resetar DB: ${err.message}`,
              "system",
            );
          } finally {
            btnDb2.disabled = false;
            if (btnRag2) btnRag2.disabled = false;
          }
        });
      document
        .getElementById("navLogout")
        .addEventListener("click", async () => {
          closeSidebar();
          await sbClient.auth.signOut();
          currentUser = null;
          currentSessionId = null;
          location.reload();
        });

      initTheme();

      // ============================================
      // EVENT BINDINGS
      // ============================================
      document.getElementById("btnPrev").addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (currentStep > 1) {
          currentStep--;
          renderCurrentStep();
          scrollWizardTop();
          saveToStorage();
        }
      });

      document.getElementById("btnNext").addEventListener("click", () => {
        if (currentStep === totalSteps) {
          if (lastStepEvaluating) return;
          if (lastStepEvaluated) {
            submitWizard();
          } else {
            evaluateLastStepBeforeSubmit();
          }
        } else {
          advanceStep();
        }
      });

      // Qualquer alteração nos campos do wizard invalida a avaliação prévia
      // do último step (força nova avaliação antes do envio).
      (function bindLastStepInvalidation() {
        const sp = document.getElementById("stepPanels");
        if (!sp) return;
        const handler = () => {
          if (currentStep === totalSteps && lastStepEvaluated) {
            resetLastStepEvaluation("user-edit");
            addChatMessage(
              "ℹ️ Você alterou um campo após a avaliação. Clique em **Avaliar antes de enviar** novamente.",
              "system",
            );
          }
        };
        sp.addEventListener("input", handler, true);
        sp.addEventListener("change", handler, true);
      })();

      document
        .getElementById("chatToggleBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", toggleChat);
      document
        .getElementById("chatCloseBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", toggleChat);
      document
        .getElementById("sessionsToggleBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", toggleSessionsPanel);
      document
        .getElementById("newSessionBtn")
        .addEventListener("click", startNewSession);

      document.getElementById("chatSendBtn").addEventListener("click", () => {
        const input = document.getElementById("chatInput");
        sendChatMessage(input.value);
        input.value = "";
      });

      document.getElementById("chatInput").addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
        if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) {
          e.preventDefault();
          document.getElementById("chatSendBtn").click();
        }
      });

      // ============================================
      // APP INITIALIZATION
      // ============================================

      /**
       * Setup representante field:
       * - Admin: loads list of all company users as options
       * - Regular user: auto-fills with their own name (read-only)
       */
      async function setupRepresentanteField() {
        const field = SCHEMA.step1.fields.representante;

        if (isAdmin()) {
          // Admin sees a list of all users
          try {
            const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc("saorafael_list_users");
            if (!error && data && data.length > 0) {
              field.options = data
                .filter((u) => u.confirmed)
                .map((u) => u.full_name || u.email);
            }
          } catch (e) {
            console.warn("Falha ao carregar lista de representantes:", e);
          }
          field.readOnly = false;
        } else {
          // Regular user: always force their own name, read-only
          const userName =
            currentUser?.user_metadata?.full_name || currentUser?.email || "";
          field.options = [userName];
          field.readOnly = true;

          // Always overwrite with current name (prevents impersonation)
          formData.step1.representante = userName;
          saveToStorage();
        }
      }

      async function startApp() {
        if (appStarted) return;
        appStarted = true;

        // Generate session ID if none exists
        if (!currentSessionId) {
          currentSessionId = generateSessionId();
        }

        // Ensure IBGE estados are loaded before rendering (needed for step 2+)
        await fetchIbgeEstados();

        // Populate representante field based on role
        await setupRepresentanteField();

        startHealthCheck();
        renderCurrentStep();
        loadSessions(); // Load session list

        // Update sidebar user info
        updateSidebarUser();

        // Welcome message in chat
        const hasSavedData = localStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEY);
        if (hasSavedData) {
          addChatMessage(
            "🔄 **Dados restaurados!** Seus dados foram recuperados do último preenchimento. Continue de onde parou ou use o menu lateral para limpar.",
            "system",
          );
        } else {
          addChatMessage(
            "👋 **Bem-vindo ao Wizard de Orçamento!**\n\nSou o assistente de validação. A cada etapa que você avançar, vou analisar suas respostas e verificar se estão tecnicamente corretas.\n\nCampos marcados com **PLANILHA** são críticos — serão inseridos diretamente na planilha de cálculo.\n\nSeus dados são salvos automaticamente. Se recarregar a página, eles estarão aqui.\n\nUse este chat para tirar dúvidas a qualquer momento.",
            "system",
          );
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // ADMIN PANEL (User Management)
      // ============================================
      async function showAdminPanel() {
        if (!isAdmin()) return;
        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "adminOverlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10000;";
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;width:90%;max-width:650px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">
              <h2 style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Gerenciar Usuários</h2>
              <button onclick="closeAdminPanel()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:20px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div id="adminUsersList" style="margin-bottom:16px;">Carregando...</div>
            <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);padding-top:16px;">
              <h3 style="font-size:14px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:12px;">Criar Novo Usuário</h3>
              <form id="createUserForm" style="display:grid;gap:10px;">
                <input type="email" id="newUserEmail" placeholder="E-mail" required style="padding:10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                <input type="text" id="newUserName" placeholder="Nome completo" style="padding:10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                <input type="password" id="newUserPass" placeholder="Senha" required minlength="6" style="padding:10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                <select id="newUserRole" style="padding:10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                  <option value="usuario">Usuário</option>
                  <option value="visualizador">Visualizador</option>
                  <option value="admin">Administrador</option>
                </select>
                <button type="submit" style="padding:10px;background:var(--color-primary);color:white;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Criar Usuário</button>
              </form>
              <div id="createUserMsg" style="margin-top:8px;font-size:12px;display:none;"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === overlay) closeAdminPanel();
        });

        // Load users
        await loadAdminUsers();

        // Create user form
        document
          .getElementById("createUserForm")
          .addEventListener("submit", async (e) => {
            e.preventDefault();
            const email = document.getElementById("newUserEmail").value.trim();
            const name = document.getElementById("newUserName").value.trim();
            const pass = document.getElementById("newUserPass").value;
            const role = document.getElementById("newUserRole").value;
            const msgEl = document.getElementById("createUserMsg");

            try {
              const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc(
                "saorafael_create_user",
                {
                  p_email: email,
                  p_password: pass,
                  p_full_name: name,
                  p_role: role,
                },
              );
              if (error) throw error;
              msgEl.style.display = "block";
              msgEl.style.color = "var(--color-success)";
              msgEl.textContent =
                "✅ Usuário " + email + " criado com sucesso!";
              document.getElementById("createUserForm").reset();
              await loadAdminUsers();
            } catch (err) {
              msgEl.style.display = "block";
              msgEl.style.color = "var(--color-error)";
              msgEl.textContent =
                "❌ " + (err.message || "Erro ao criar usuário");
            }
          });
      }

      function closeAdminPanel() {
        const overlay = document.getElementById("adminOverlay");
        if (overlay) overlay.remove();
      }

      // ==================== SUBMISSIONS PANEL ====================
      async function showSubmissionsPanel() {
        const admin = isAdmin();
        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "submissionsOverlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10000;";
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;width:95%;max-width:900px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">
              <h2 style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">
                ${admin ? "📋 Todos os Orçamentos" : "📋 Meus Orçamentos"}
              </h2>
              <button onclick="closeSubmissionsPanel()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:20px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            ${
              admin
                ? `
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:16px;">
              <select id="filterStatus" onchange="applySubmissionFilters()" style="padding:8px 12px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
                <option value="">Todos Status</option>
                <option value="submitted">📝 Submetido</option>
                <option value="processing">⏳ Processando</option>
                <option value="completed">✅ Concluído</option>
                <option value="error">❌ Erro</option>
              </select>
              <input type="text" id="filterSearch" onkeyup="applySubmissionFilters()" placeholder="Buscar protocolo, cliente, vendedor..." style="flex:1;min-width:180px;padding:8px 12px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
              <input type="date" id="filterDateFrom" onchange="applySubmissionFilters()" title="Data inicial" style="padding:8px 10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
              <input type="date" id="filterDateTo" onchange="applySubmissionFilters()" title="Data final" style="padding:8px 10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
            </div>
            `
                : ""
            }
            <div id="submissionsBulkBar" style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 14px;margin-bottom:12px;">
              <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;min-width:0;">
                <span id="submissionsSelectedCount" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Nenhum selecionado</span>
                <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Marque ☑ na coluna à esquerda para baixar apenas alguns. Sem seleção, o botão "Exportar tudo" baixa o resultado filtrado abaixo.</span>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;">
                <button onclick="exportSelectedSubmissions('xlsx')" id="btnExpSelXlsx" disabled style="padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;background:var(--color-info);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:not-allowed;font-weight:700;opacity:0.5;">📊 Baixar selecionados (Excel)</button>
                <button onclick="exportSelectedSubmissions('csv')" id="btnExpSelCsv" disabled style="padding:7px 12px;font-size:12px;background:var(--color-success);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:not-allowed;font-weight:700;opacity:0.5;">📥 CSV</button>
                <button onclick="clearSubmissionSelection()" id="btnExpSelClear" disabled style="padding:7px 10px;font-size:11px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:6px;cursor:not-allowed;opacity:0.5;">Limpar</button>
                <span style="width:1px;height:22px;background:var(--border-color);margin:0 4px;"></span>
                <button onclick="exportAllSubmissions('xlsx')" title="Exporta todas as linhas que aparecem na tabela considerando os filtros atuais" style="padding:7px 12px;font-size:12px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--color-info);color:var(--color-info);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;">📊 Exportar tudo (Excel)</button>
                <button onclick="exportAllSubmissions('csv')" style="padding:7px 10px;font-size:11px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--color-success);color:var(--color-success);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:700;">CSV</button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div id="submissionsContent" style="font-size:13px;">Carregando...</div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === overlay) closeSubmissionsPanel();
        });

        await loadSubmissions();
      }

      function closeSubmissionsPanel() {
        const overlay = document.getElementById("submissionsOverlay");
        if (overlay) overlay.remove();
      }

      let allSubmissions = [];
      let selectedSubmissionIds = new Set();

      // Toggle selection of a single submission row (called inline from checkbox).
      function toggleSubmissionSelection(id, checked) {
        const numId = typeof id === "number" ? id : parseInt(id, 10);
        if (Number.isNaN(numId)) return;
        if (checked) selectedSubmissionIds.add(numId);
        else selectedSubmissionIds.delete(numId);
        // Sync header "select all" tri-state
        const all = document.getElementById("subSelectAll");
        if (all) {
          const boxes = document.querySelectorAll(".sub-checkbox");
          const checkedBoxes = document.querySelectorAll(
            ".sub-checkbox:checked",
          );
          all.checked =
            boxes.length > 0 && boxes.length === checkedBoxes.length;
          all.indeterminate =
            checkedBoxes.length > 0 && checkedBoxes.length < boxes.length;
        }
        updateSubmissionBulkBar();
      }

      async function loadSubmissions() {
        const contentEl = document.getElementById("submissionsContent");
        if (!contentEl) return;
        try {
          let query = sbClient
            .from("saorafael_wizard_submission")
            .select("*")
            .order("submitted_at", { ascending: false });

          // RLS handles visibility, but for non-admin we explicitly filter
          if (!isAdmin()) {
            query = query.eq("user_id", currentUser.id);
          }

          const { data, error } = await query;
          if (error) throw error;
          allSubmissions = data || [];
          renderSubmissionsTable(allSubmissions);
        } catch (err) {
          contentEl.innerHTML =
            '<p style="color:var(--color-error);">Erro ao carregar orçamentos: ' +
            escapeHtml(err.message) +
            "</p>";
        }
      }

      function applySubmissionFilters() {
        const status = document.getElementById("filterStatus")?.value || "";
        const search = (
          document.getElementById("filterSearch")?.value || ""
        ).toLowerCase();
        const dateFrom = document.getElementById("filterDateFrom")?.value || "";
        const dateTo = document.getElementById("filterDateTo")?.value || "";

        let filtered = [...allSubmissions];

        if (status) {
          filtered = filtered.filter((s) => s.status === status);
        }
        if (search) {
          filtered = filtered.filter((s) => {
            const fd = s.form_data || {};
            const s1 = fd.step1 || {};
            const s2 = fd.step2 || {};
            const searchStr = [
              s.protocol || "",
              s2.razao_social || "",
              s1.representante || "",
              s1.tipo_produto || "",
              s2.cidade || "",
              s.notes || "",
            ]
              .join(" ")
              .toLowerCase();
            return searchStr.includes(search);
          });
        }
        if (dateFrom) {
          filtered = filtered.filter(
            (s) => s.submitted_at && s.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) >= dateFrom,
          );
        }
        if (dateTo) {
          filtered = filtered.filter(
            (s) => s.submitted_at && s.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) <= dateTo,
          );
        }

        renderSubmissionsTable(filtered);
      }

      function renderSubmissionsTable(submissions) {
        const contentEl = document.getElementById("submissionsContent");
        if (!contentEl) return;

        if (!submissions || submissions.length === 0) {
          contentEl.innerHTML =
            '<p style="color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:center;padding:24px;">Nenhum orçamento encontrado.</p>';
          return;
        }

        const statusBadge = (status) => {
          const map = {
            submitted: {
              icon: "📝",
              label: "Submetido",
              color: "var(--color-info)",
            },
            processing: {
              icon: "⏳",
              label: "Processando",
              color: "var(--color-warning)",
            },
            completed: {
              icon: "✅",
              label: "Concluído",
              color: "var(--color-success)",
            },
            error: { icon: "❌", label: "Erro", color: "var(--color-error)" },
          };
          const s = map[status] || {
            icon: "❓",
            label: status || "Desconhecido",
            color: "var(--text-secondary)",
          };
          return `<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;background:${s.color}15;color:${s.color};">${s.icon} ${s.label}</span>`;
        };

        const formatDate = (iso) => {
          if (!iso) return "—";
          const d = new Date(iso);
          return (
            d.toLocaleDateString("pt-BR") +
            " " +
            d.toLocaleTimeString("pt-BR", {
              hour: "2-digit",
              minute: "2-digit",
            })
          );
        };

        const admin = isAdmin();

        let html = `
          <div style="overflow-x:auto;">
            <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;">
              <thead>
                <tr style="border-bottom:2px solid var(--border-color);text-align:left;">
                  <th style="padding:10px 6px;width:30px;text-align:center;"><input type="checkbox" id="subSelectAll" onchange="toggleSelectAllSubmissions(this.checked)" style="cursor:pointer;"></th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Protocolo</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Data</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Tipo</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Cliente</th>
                  ${admin ? '<th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Vendedor</th>' : ""}
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Status</th>
                  <th style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);text-align:center;">Ações</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
        `;

        submissions.forEach((sub, idx) => {
          const fd = sub.form_data || {};
          const s1 = fd.step1 || {};
          const s2 = fd.step2 || {};
          const s3 = fd.step3 || {};
          const isChecked = selectedSubmissionIds.has(sub.id);
          html += `
            <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);${idx % 2 === 0 ? "" : "background:var(--bg-tertiary);"}" id="sub-row-${sub.id}">
              <td style="padding:10px 6px;text-align:center;"><input type="checkbox" class="sub-checkbox" data-sub-id="${sub.id}" ${isChecked ? "checked" : ""} onchange="toggleSubmissionSelection(${sub.id}, this.checked)" style="cursor:pointer;"></td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;font-weight:600;color:var(--color-primary);font-family:monospace;">${escapeHtml(sub.protocol || "—")}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-secondary);white-space:nowrap;">${formatDate(sub.submitted_at)}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(s1.tipo_produto || "—")}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(s2.razao_social || "—")}</td>
              ${admin ? `<td style="padding:10px 8px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${escapeHtml(s1.representante || "—")}</td>` : ""}
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;">${statusBadge(sub.status)}</td>
              <td style="padding:10px 8px;text-align:center;white-space:nowrap;">
                <button onclick="toggleSubmissionDetail(${sub.id})" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-info);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;">Detalhes</button>
                <button onclick="editSubmission(${sub.id})" title="Editar este orçamento (carrega no wizard mantendo o mesmo protocolo)" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-success, #10b981);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;margin-left:4px;">✏️ Editar</button>
                <button onclick="duplicateSubmissionAsBase(${sub.id})" title="Duplicar como base para novo orçamento" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-warning);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;margin-left:4px;">Duplicar</button>
                ${admin ? `<button onclick="deleteSubmission(${sub.id}, '${escapeAttr(sub.protocol || "")}')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-error);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;margin-left:4px;">Excluir</button>` : ""}
              </td>
            </tr>
            <tr id="sub-detail-${sub.id}" style="display:none;">
              <td colspan="${admin ? 8 : 7}" style="padding:0;">
                <div style="padding:16px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;margin:4px 8px 12px 8px;">
                  ${renderSubmissionDetail(sub)}
                </div>
              </td>
            </tr>
          `;
        });

        html += "</tbody></table></div>";
        html += `<p style="margin-top:12px;font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:right;">${submissions.length} orçamento(s) encontrado(s)</p>`;
        contentEl.innerHTML = html;
        updateSubmissionBulkBar();
      }

      function renderSubmissionDetail(sub) {
        const fd = sub.form_data || {};
        const s1 = fd.step1 || {};
        const s2 = fd.step2 || {};
        const s3 = fd.step3 || {};
        const s4 = fd.step4 || {};
        const s5 = fd.step5 || {};
        const s6 = fd.step6 || {};
        const compartimentos = s6.compartimentos || [];
        const sections = [];

        // Helper: only add if has value
        const add = (arr, label, val, suffix) => {
          if (val !== undefined && val !== null && val !== "") {
            arr.push([label, suffix ? val + suffix : val]);
          }
        };

        // ===== Step 1: Dados Comerciais =====
        const comercial = [];
        add(comercial, "Representante", s1.representante);
        add(comercial, "Origem Contato", s1.origem_contato);
        add(comercial, "Tipo Produto", s1.tipo_produto);
        add(comercial, "Comissão Rep.", s1.comissao_representante, "%");
        add(comercial, "Comissão Vend.", s1.comissao_vendedor, "%");
        add(comercial, "Obs. Comerciais", s1.observacoes_comerciais);
        if (comercial.length)
          sections.push({ title: "💼 Dados Comerciais", items: comercial });

        // ===== Step 2: Cadastro e Logística =====
        const cadastro = [];
        add(cadastro, "Razão Social", s2.razao_social);
        add(cadastro, "CNPJ/CPF", s2.cnpj_cpf);
        add(cadastro, "Inscrição Estadual", s2.inscricao_estadual);
        add(cadastro, "Endereço Entrega", s2.endereco_entrega);
        add(cadastro, "Cidade", s2.cidade);
        add(cadastro, "Estado", s2.estado);
        add(cadastro, "CEP", s2.cep);
        add(cadastro, "Local Instalação", s2.local_instalacao_municipio);
        add(cadastro, "Resumo Técnico", s2.dados_tecnicos_resumo);
        add(cadastro, "Contato", s2.contato_nome);
        add(cadastro, "Telefone", s2.contato_telefone);
        add(cadastro, "E-mail", s2.contato_email);
        add(cadastro, "Exigência Faturamento", s2.exigencia_faturamento);
        add(cadastro, "Prazo Pagamento", s2.prazo_pagamento);
        if (cadastro.length)
          sections.push({ title: "👤 Cadastro & Logística", items: cadastro });

        // ===== Step 3: Especificações Construtivas =====
        const espec = [];
        add(espec, "Comprimento", s3.comprimento, "m");
        add(espec, "Largura", s3.largura, "m");
        add(espec, "Altura", s3.altura, "m");
        if (s3.comprimento && s3.largura) {
          const area = (
            parseFloat(s3.comprimento) * parseFloat(s3.largura)
          ).toFixed(1);
          const vol = s3.altura
            ? (
                parseFloat(s3.comprimento) *
                parseFloat(s3.largura) *
                parseFloat(s3.altura)
              ).toFixed(1)
            : null;
          espec.push(["Área", area + "m²"]);
          if (vol) espec.push(["Volume", vol + "m³"]);
        }
        add(espec, "Tipo Isolamento", s3.tipo_isolamento);
        add(espec, "Espessura Painel", s3.espessura_painel, "mm");
        add(espec, "Revest. Interno", s3.revestimento_interno);
        add(espec, "Revest. Externo", s3.revestimento_externo);
        add(espec, "Cor Revestimento", s3.cor_revestimento);
        add(espec, "Piso", s3.piso);
        add(espec, "Iluminação", s3.iluminacao);
        add(espec, "Qtd Luminárias", s3.qtd_luminarias);
        // Divisórias
        if (s3.divisorias) {
          espec.push(["Divisórias internas", String(s3.divisorias)]);
        }
        if (espec.length)
          sections.push({
            title: "📐 Especificações Construtivas",
            items: espec,
          });

        // ===== Step 3 (extra): Configuração de uso por compartimento =====
        let compsCfg = null;
        if (s3.compartments_config) {
          try {
            compsCfg =
              typeof s3.compartments_config === "string"
                ? JSON.parse(s3.compartments_config)
                : s3.compartments_config;
          } catch (e) {
            compsCfg = null;
          }
        }
        if (compsCfg && typeof compsCfg === "object") {
          Object.entries(compsCfg).forEach(([compName, cfg]) => {
            if (!cfg || typeof cfg !== "object") return;
            const u = [];
            if (cfg.set_point !== undefined && cfg.set_point !== "")
              u.push(["Set Point", cfg.set_point + "°C"]);
            if (cfg.produto) u.push(["Produto", cfg.produto]);
            if (cfg.frequencia_aberturas)
              u.push(["Freq. Aberturas", cfg.frequencia_aberturas]);
            if (cfg.produto_quente) u.push(["Produto Quente", "Sim"]);
            if (cfg.empilhadeira) u.push(["Empilhadeira", "Sim"]);
            if (cfg.paleteira) u.push(["Paleteira", "Sim"]);
            if (cfg.observacoes) u.push(["Observações", cfg.observacoes]);
            if (u.length)
              sections.push({
                title: `🧊 Uso · ${compName}`,
                items: u,
              });
          });
        }

        // ===== Step 4: Acessórios e Fechamentos =====
        const portas = [];
        // Portas[] (preferred) or legacy single porta
        const portasArr = Array.isArray(s4.portas) ? s4.portas : [];
        if (portasArr.length > 0) {
          portasArr.forEach((p, i) => {
            const tag = p.compartimento_id
              ? `${p.compartimento_id}`
              : `Porta ${i + 1}`;
            if (p.tipo) portas.push([`${tag} · Tipo`, p.tipo]);
            if (p.largura) portas.push([`${tag} · Largura`, p.largura + "mm"]);
            if (p.altura) portas.push([`${tag} · Altura`, p.altura + "mm"]);
            if (p.parede) portas.push([`${tag} · Parede`, p.parede]);
            if (p.posicao_pct !== "" && p.posicao_pct != null)
              portas.push([`${tag} · Posição`, p.posicao_pct + "%"]);
            if (p.sentido_abertura)
              portas.push([`${tag} · Sentido`, p.sentido_abertura]);
            if (p.acessorios)
              portas.push([`${tag} · Acessórios`, p.acessorios]);
          });
        } else {
          add(portas, "Tipo Porta", s4.porta_tipo);
          add(portas, "Largura Porta", s4.porta_largura, "mm");
          add(portas, "Altura Porta", s4.porta_altura, "mm");
          add(portas, "Qtd Portas", s4.porta_quantidade);
          add(portas, "Sentido Abertura", s4.porta_sentido_abertura);
          add(portas, "Parede", s4.porta_parede);
          if (
            s4.porta_posicao_pct !== undefined &&
            s4.porta_posicao_pct !== ""
          ) {
            portas.push(["Posição na Parede", s4.porta_posicao_pct + "%"]);
          }
          add(portas, "Acessórios Porta", s4.porta_acessorios);
        }
        add(portas, "Estante", s4.estante_tipo);
        add(portas, "Qtd Estantes", s4.estante_quantidade);
        add(portas, "Níveis/Estante", s4.estante_niveis);
        // Per-compartment estantes (preferred)
        const estPC =
          s4.estantes_por_comp && typeof s4.estantes_por_comp === "object"
            ? s4.estantes_por_comp
            : {};
        Object.entries(estPC).forEach(([compName, e]) => {
          if (!e) return;
          const hasGrupos = Array.isArray(e.grupos) && e.grupos.length > 0;
          const totQtd = hasGrupos
            ? e.grupos.reduce((s, g) => s + (parseInt(g.qtd) || 0), 0)
            : parseInt(e.quantidade) || 0;
          if (!e.tipo && !totQtd && !e.niveis && !e.encosto && !hasGrupos)
            return;
          if (e.tipo) portas.push([`${compName} · Estante`, e.tipo]);
          if (totQtd) portas.push([`${compName} · Qtd Estantes`, totQtd]);
          if (e.niveis) portas.push([`${compName} · Níveis`, e.niveis]);
          if (e.encosto) portas.push([`${compName} · Encosto`, e.encosto]);
          if (hasGrupos) {
            e.grupos.forEach((g, gi) => {
              const tag = `${compName} · Grupo ${gi + 1}`;
              const partes = [];
              if (g.parede) partes.push(`parede ${g.parede}`);
              if (g.fracao !== undefined && g.fracao !== "")
                partes.push(`fração ${g.fracao}`);
              if (g.alinhamento) partes.push(g.alinhamento);
              if (g.qtd) partes.push(`${g.qtd} un`);
              if (partes.length) portas.push([tag, partes.join(" · ")]);
            });
          }
        });
        add(portas, "Cortina PVC", s4.cortina_pvc);
        add(portas, "Alarme Temp.", s4.alarme);
        add(
          portas,
          "Estrutura Condensadora",
          s4.estrutura_unidade_condensadora,
        );
        if (portas.length)
          sections.push({
            title: "🚪 Acessórios & Fechamentos",
            items: portas,
          });

        // ===== Step 5: Instalação e Frete =====
        const install = [];
        add(install, "Horário Entrega", s5.horario_entrega);
        add(install, "Horário Instalação", s5.horario_instalacao);
        add(install, "Transporte Vertical", s5.transporte_vertical);
        add(install, "Andar", s5.andar);
        add(install, "Fatur. Mão de Obra", s5.faturamento_mao_obra);
        add(install, "Tipo Frete", s5.tipo_frete);
        add(install, "Distância", s5.distancia_km, " km");
        add(install, "Exigências Local", s5.exigencias_local);
        add(install, "Obs. Instalação", s5.observacoes_instalacao);
        if (install.length)
          sections.push({ title: "🚚 Instalação & Frete", items: install });

        // ===== Step 6: Compartimentos (com herança Etapa 3) =====
        if (compartimentos.length > 0) {
          compartimentos.forEach((comp, idx) => {
            const c = [];
            const compId =
              comp.compartimento_id || comp.nome_compartimento || `#${idx + 1}`;
            // Inherited from Etapa 3 (or legacy fields)
            if (
              comp.temperatura_setpoint !== "" &&
              comp.temperatura_setpoint != null
            )
              c.push(["Set Point", comp.temperatura_setpoint + "°C"]);
            else if (comp.set_point)
              c.push(["Set Point", comp.set_point + "°C"]);
            if (comp.produto_armazenado)
              c.push(["Produto", comp.produto_armazenado]);
            if (comp._inherited_dim) c.push(["Dimensões", comp._inherited_dim]);
            if (comp._inherited_volume_m3)
              c.push(["Volume", comp._inherited_volume_m3 + "m³"]);
            if (!comp._inherited_dim && comp.localizacao_compartimento) {
              add(c, "Localização", comp.localizacao_compartimento);
            }
            if (comp.carga_termica_kcal)
              c.push([
                "Carga Térmica (informada)",
                comp.carga_termica_kcal + " Kcal/h",
              ]);
            else if (comp._inherited_carga_kcal_calc)
              c.push([
                "Carga Térmica (calculada)",
                comp._inherited_carga_kcal_calc + " Kcal/h",
              ]);
            // Mechanical
            add(c, "Compressor", comp.tipo_compressor);
            add(c, "Marca", comp.marca_preferencia);
            add(c, "Evaporador", comp.tipo_evaporador);
            add(c, "Condensador", comp.tipo_condensador);
            add(c, "Tensão", comp.tensao);
            add(c, "Degelo", comp.degelo);
            add(c, "Fluido", comp.fluido_refrigerante);
            if (c.length) sections.push({ title: `❄️ ${compId}`, items: c });
          });
        }

        // ===== Observações gerais =====
        const obs = [];
        if (s1.observacoes_comerciais)
          obs.push(["Obs. Comerciais", s1.observacoes_comerciais]);
        if (s5.observacoes_instalacao)
          obs.push(["Obs. Instalação", s5.observacoes_instalacao]);
        if (sub.notes) obs.push(["Notas do Sistema", sub.notes]);
        if (obs.length) sections.push({ title: "📝 Observações", items: obs });

        // ===== RENDER =====
        let html = "";
        // Header bar with quick download actions for THIS submission
        const protoLbl = escapeHtml(sub.protocol || "—");
        html += `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);">
          <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Orçamento ${protoLbl} <span style="font-weight:400;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:11px;">· ${sections.length} seções</span></div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <button onclick="exportOneSubmission(${sub.id}, 'pdf')" title="Abre uma versão formatada para impressão / salvar como PDF" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:#dc2626;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">📄 PDF</button>
            <button onclick="exportOneSubmission(${sub.id}, 'svg')" title="Baixa as plantas (planta baixa + corte lateral) em SVG" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:#7c3aed;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">🖼️ Plantas SVG</button>
            <button onclick="exportOneSubmission(${sub.id}, 'xlsx')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-info);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">📊 Excel</button>
            <button onclick="exportOneSubmission(${sub.id}, 'csv')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-success);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">📥 CSV</button>
            <button onclick="exportOneSubmission(${sub.id}, 'json')" title="Backup completo (JSON bruto)" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-primary);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">{ } JSON</button>
          </div>
        </div>`;
        try {
          const mini = buildMiniReviewSVG(fd);
          if (mini) html += mini;
        } catch (e) {
          /* ignore */
        }
        html +=
          '<div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:12px;">';
        sections.forEach((sec) => {
          html += `<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);">`;
          html += `<h4 style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:8px;">${sec.title}</h4>`;
          sec.items.forEach(([label, value]) => {
            const strVal = String(value || "—");
            const isLong = strVal.length > 40;
            if (isLong) {
              html += `<div style="margin-bottom:6px;"><span style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:11px;display:block;">${escapeHtml(label)}:</span><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-primary);display:block;margin-top:2px;word-break:break-word;">${escapeHtml(strVal)}</span></div>`;
            } else {
              html += `<div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;gap:8px;"><span style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:11px;white-space:nowrap;">${escapeHtml(label)}</span><span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);text-align:right;">${escapeHtml(strVal)}</span></div>`;
            }
          });
          html += "</div>";
        });
        html += "</div>";

        // Metadata
        html += `<div style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">`;
        html += `<span>ID: ${sub.id}</span>`;
        html += `<span>Protocolo: ${escapeHtml(sub.protocol || "—")}</span>`;
        html += `<span>Session: ${escapeHtml(sub.session_id || "—")}</span>`;
        if (sub.user_id)
          html += `<span>User: ${escapeHtml(sub.user_id)}</span>`;
        if (sub.processed_at)
          html += `<span>Processado: ${new Date(sub.processed_at).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR")}</span>`;
        html += `<span>Enviado: ${sub.submitted_at ? new Date(sub.submitted_at).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR") + " " + new Date(sub.submitted_at).toLocaleTimeString("pt-BR", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" }) : "—"}</span>`;
        html += "</div>";

        return html;
      }

      function toggleSubmissionDetail(id) {
        const detailRow = document.getElementById("sub-detail-" + id);
        if (!detailRow) return;
        detailRow.style.display =
          detailRow.style.display === "none" ? "table-row" : "none";
      }

      async function deleteSubmission(id, protocol) {
        if (!isAdmin()) return;
        if (
          !(await uiConfirm(
            `Excluir orçamento ${protocol || "#" + id}?\nSe o cliente não tiver outros orçamentos, será removido também.\nEsta ação é irreversível.`,
            { danger: true, confirmText: "Excluir" },
          ))
        )
          return;
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc(
            "saorafael_delete_submission_smart",
            { p_submission_id: id },
          );
          if (error) throw error;
          // Remove from local array and re-render
          allSubmissions = allSubmissions.filter((s) => s.id !== id);
          renderSubmissionsTable(allSubmissions);
          let msg = `🗑️ Orçamento ${protocol || "#" + id} excluído.`;
          if (data?.client_deleted) {
            msg += ` Cliente "${data.client_name}" também removido (sem outros orçamentos).`;
          }
          addChatMessage(msg, "system");
        } catch (err) {
          uiAlert("Erro ao excluir: " + err.message, { variant: "error" });
        }
      }
      // ==================== END SUBMISSIONS PANEL ====================

      async function loadAdminUsers() {
        const listEl = document.getElementById("adminUsersList");
        if (!listEl) return;
        const myId = currentUser?.id || "";
        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc("saorafael_list_users");
          if (error) throw error;
          if (!data || data.length === 0) {
            listEl.innerHTML =
              '<p style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:13px;">Nenhum usuário encontrado.</p>';
            return;
          }
          listEl.innerHTML = data
            .map((u) => {
              const isSelf = u.id === myId;
              let actionButtons = "";
              if (isSelf) {
                // Self: no actions in admin panel (edit own name via sidebar "Editar Meu Perfil")
                actionButtons =
                  '<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;">Use "Editar Meu Perfil" no menu</span>';
              } else {
                // Other users: confirm, change role, delete
                actionButtons += !u.confirmed
                  ? "<button onclick=\"confirmUser('" +
                    u.id +
                    '\')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-success);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;">Confirmar</button>'
                  : "";
                actionButtons +=
                  "<button onclick=\"editUserRole('" +
                  u.id +
                  "','" +
                  escapeAttr(u.role) +
                  '\')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-info);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;">Alterar Papel</button>';
                actionButtons +=
                  "<button onclick=\"deleteUser('" +
                  u.id +
                  "','" +
                  escapeAttr(u.email) +
                  '\')" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-error);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;">Excluir</button>';
              }
              return `
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:12px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;${isSelf ? "background:rgba(33,150,243,0.05);border-color:rgba(33,150,243,0.2);" : ""}" id="user-row-${u.id}">
              <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
                <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(u.full_name || "Sem nome")}${isSelf ? ' <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--color-info);font-weight:700;">(você)</span>' : ""}</div>
                <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${escapeHtml(u.email)}</div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;">
                  <span style="display:inline-block;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;${u.role === "admin" ? "background:rgba(216,36,68,0.1);color:var(--color-primary);" : "background:rgba(33,150,243,0.1);color:var(--color-info);"}">${escapeHtml(u.role)}</span>
                  ${u.confirmed ? '<span style="color:var(--color-success);margin-left:6px;">✅</span>' : '<span style="color:var(--color-warning);margin-left:6px;">⏳ Pendente</span>'}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-shrink:0;">
                ${actionButtons}
              </div>
            </div>`;
            })
            .join("");
        } catch (err) {
          listEl.innerHTML =
            '<p style="color:var(--color-error);font-size:13px;">Erro: ' +
            escapeHtml(err.message) +
            "</p>";
        }
      }

      async function confirmUser(userId) {
        try {
          const { error } = await sbClient.rpc("saorafael_confirm_user", {
            target_user_id: userId,
          });
          if (error) throw error;
          await loadAdminUsers();
        } catch (err) {
          uiAlert("Erro ao confirmar: " + err.message, { variant: "error" });
        }
      }

      // Admin: edit role of another user
      function editUserRole(userId, currentRole) {
        const row = document.getElementById("user-row-" + userId);
        if (!row) return;

        row.innerHTML = `
          <div style="flex:1;display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
            <select id="edit-role-${userId}" style="flex:1;padding:8px 10px;border:2px solid var(--color-info);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);">
              <option value="usuario" ${currentRole === "usuario" ? "selected" : ""}>Usuário</option>
              <option value="visualizador" ${currentRole === "visualizador" ? "selected" : ""}>Visualizador</option>
              <option value="admin" ${currentRole === "admin" ? "selected" : ""}>Admin</option>
            </select>
            <button onclick="saveRoleEdit('${userId}')" style="padding:8px 14px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-success);color:white;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">Salvar</button>
            <button onclick="loadAdminUsers()" style="padding:8px 14px;font-size:11px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>
          </div>
        `;
      }

      // Admin: save role change for another user
      async function saveRoleEdit(userId) {
        const roleEl = document.getElementById("edit-role-" + userId);
        if (!roleEl) return;
        const newRole = roleEl.value;
        try {
          const { error } = await sbClient.rpc("saorafael_update_user", {
            target_user_id: userId,
            new_role: newRole,
          });
          if (error) throw error;
          await loadAdminUsers();
        } catch (err) {
          uiAlert("Erro ao atualizar papel: " + err.message, {
            variant: "error",
          });
        }
      }

      // Any user: edit own profile (name)
      function showEditProfilePanel() {
        const currentName = currentUser?.user_metadata?.full_name || "";
        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "profileOverlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10000;";
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;width:90%;max-width:420px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:16px;">
              <h2 style="font-size:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">Editar Meu Perfil</h2>
              <button onclick="document.getElementById('profileOverlay').remove()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:20px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div style="margin-bottom:12px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">E-mail: ${escapeHtml(currentUser?.email || "")}</div>
            <label style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);display:block;margin-bottom:6px;">Nome completo</label>
            <input type="text" id="profileNameInput" value="${escapeAttr(currentName)}" placeholder="Seu nome" style="width:100%;padding:10px;border:2px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:16px;">
            <div id="profileMsg" style="margin-bottom:10px;font-size:12px;display:none;"></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;">
              <button onclick="document.getElementById('profileOverlay').remove()" style="padding:10px 18px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>
              <button onclick="saveOwnName()" style="padding:10px 18px;background:var(--color-primary);color:white;border:none;border-radius:8px;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Salvar</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove();
        });
        document.getElementById("profileNameInput").focus();
      }

      async function saveOwnName() {
        const nameEl = document.getElementById("profileNameInput");
        const msgEl = document.getElementById("profileMsg");
        if (!nameEl) return;
        const newName = nameEl.value.trim();
        if (!newName) {
          msgEl.style.display = "block";
          msgEl.style.color = "var(--color-error)";
          msgEl.textContent = "O nome não pode ser vazio.";
          return;
        }
        try {
          // Use auth.updateUser to update metadata AND refresh the session token
          // This ensures the name persists after page reload
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.auth.updateUser({
            data: { full_name: newName },
          });
          if (error) throw error;
          // Update currentUser with the refreshed session data
          if (data?.user) {
            currentUser = data.user;
          } else {
            if (currentUser.user_metadata)
              currentUser.user_metadata.full_name = newName;
          }
          updateSidebarUser();
          // Refresh representante field with new name
          await setupRepresentanteField();
          renderCurrentStep();
          msgEl.style.display = "block";
          msgEl.style.color = "var(--color-success)";
          msgEl.textContent = "✅ Nome atualizado com sucesso!";
          setTimeout(() => {
            const overlay = document.getElementById("profileOverlay");
            if (overlay) overlay.remove();
          }, 1200);
        } catch (err) {
          msgEl.style.display = "block";
          msgEl.style.color = "var(--color-error)";
          msgEl.textContent = "❌ " + (err.message || "Erro ao salvar");
        }
      }

      async function deleteUser(userId, email) {
        if (userId === (currentUser?.id || "")) {
          uiAlert("Você não pode excluir a si mesmo.", { variant: "warning" });
          return;
        }
        if (
          !(await uiConfirm("Excluir o usuário " + email + "?", {
            danger: true,
            confirmText: "Excluir",
          }))
        )
          return;
        try {
          const { error } = await sbClient.rpc("saorafael_delete_user", {
            target_user_id: userId,
          });
          if (error) throw error;
          uiAlert("Usuário " + email + " excluído.", { variant: "success" });
          if (typeof loadUsers === "function") await loadUsers();
        } catch (err) {
          uiAlert("Erro ao excluir usuário: " + (err.message || err), {
            variant: "error",
          });
        }
      }

      function toggleSelectAllSubmissions(checked) {
        document.querySelectorAll(".sub-checkbox").forEach((cb) => {
          cb.checked = checked;
          const id = parseInt(cb.dataset.subId);
          if (checked) selectedSubmissionIds.add(id);
          else selectedSubmissionIds.delete(id);
        });
        updateSubmissionBulkBar();
      }

      function clearSubmissionSelection() {
        selectedSubmissionIds.clear();
        document.querySelectorAll(".sub-checkbox").forEach((cb) => {
          cb.checked = false;
        });
        const all = document.getElementById("subSelectAll");
        if (all) all.checked = false;
        updateSubmissionBulkBar();
      }

      function updateSubmissionBulkBar() {
        const count = document.getElementById("submissionsSelectedCount");
        const n = selectedSubmissionIds.size;
        ["btnExpSelCsv", "btnExpSelXlsx", "btnExpSelClear"].forEach((id) => {
          const b = document.getElementById(id);
          if (!b) return;
          b.disabled = n === 0;
          b.style.opacity = n === 0 ? "0.5" : "1";
          b.style.cursor = n === 0 ? "not-allowed" : "pointer";
        });
        if (count) {
          count.textContent =
            n === 0
              ? "Nenhum selecionado"
              : `${n} orçamento${n > 1 ? "s" : ""} selecionado${n > 1 ? "s" : ""}`;
        }
      }

      // Export a single submission (per-row download). Defaults to XLSX which
      // is more useful when the user wants to share that specific orçamento.
      function exportOneSubmission(id, format) {
        const sub = allSubmissions.find((s) => s.id === id);
        if (!sub) {
          uiAlert("Orçamento não encontrado.", { variant: "error" });
          return;
        }
        if (format === "csv") exportSubmissionsCSV([sub]);
        else if (format === "json") exportOneSubmissionAsJSON(sub);
        else if (format === "pdf") exportOneSubmissionPDF(sub);
        else if (format === "svg") exportOneSubmissionSVG(sub);
        else if (format === "html") exportOneSubmissionHTML(sub);
        else exportSubmissionsXLSX([sub]);
      }

      function exportOneSubmissionAsJSON(sub) {
        const json = JSON.stringify(sub, null, 2);
        const stamp = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
        const protocolSlug = (sub.protocol || sub.id)
          .toString()
          .replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9_\-]/g, "_");
        downloadBlob(
          json,
          `orcamento_${protocolSlug}_${stamp}.json`,
          "application/json;charset=utf-8",
        );
      }

      // ============================================================
      // EXPORT — Printable PDF / standalone HTML / SVG drawings
      // Compact section builder reused by the printable layout. Mirrors the
      // main groups produced by renderSubmissionDetail without the in-app
      // styling — keeps the PDF stable even if the live detail view changes.
      // ============================================================
      function buildSubmissionSections(sub) {
        const fd = sub.form_data || {};
        const s1 = fd.step1 || {};
        const s2 = fd.step2 || {};
        const s3 = fd.step3 || {};
        const s4 = fd.step4 || {};
        const s5 = fd.step5 || {};
        const s6 = fd.step6 || {};
        const compartimentos = s6.compartimentos || [];
        const sections = [];
        const add = (arr, label, val, suffix) => {
          if (val !== undefined && val !== null && val !== "")
            arr.push([label, suffix ? val + suffix : val]);
        };

        const comercial = [];
        add(comercial, "Representante", s1.representante);
        add(comercial, "Tipo Produto", s1.tipo_produto);
        add(comercial, "Origem Contato", s1.origem_contato);
        add(comercial, "Comissão Rep.", s1.comissao_representante, "%");
        add(comercial, "Comissão Vend.", s1.comissao_vendedor, "%");
        if (comercial.length)
          sections.push({
            title: "Dados Comerciais",
            icon: "💼",
            items: comercial,
          });

        const cad = [];
        add(cad, "Razão Social", s2.razao_social);
        add(cad, "CNPJ/CPF", s2.cnpj_cpf);
        add(cad, "Inscrição Estadual", s2.inscricao_estadual);
        add(cad, "Endereço Entrega", s2.endereco_entrega);
        add(cad, "Cidade", s2.cidade);
        add(cad, "Estado", s2.estado);
        add(cad, "CEP", s2.cep);
        add(cad, "Local Instalação", s2.local_instalacao_municipio);
        add(cad, "Contato", s2.contato_nome);
        add(cad, "Telefone", s2.contato_telefone);
        add(cad, "E-mail", s2.contato_email);
        add(cad, "Resumo Técnico", s2.dados_tecnicos_resumo);
        add(cad, "Prazo Pagamento", s2.prazo_pagamento);
        if (cad.length)
          sections.push({
            title: "Cadastro & Logística",
            icon: "👤",
            items: cad,
          });

        const espec = [];
        add(espec, "Comprimento", s3.comprimento, "m");
        add(espec, "Largura", s3.largura, "m");
        add(espec, "Altura", s3.altura, "m");
        if (s3.comprimento && s3.largura) {
          const c = parseFloat(s3.comprimento);
          const l = parseFloat(s3.largura);
          const a = parseFloat(s3.altura);
          if (isFinite(c) && isFinite(l)) {
            espec.push(["Área", (c * l).toFixed(2) + " m²"]);
            if (isFinite(a))
              espec.push(["Volume", (c * l * a).toFixed(2) + " m³"]);
          }
        }
        add(espec, "Tipo Isolamento", s3.tipo_isolamento);
        add(espec, "Espessura Painel", s3.espessura_painel, "mm");
        add(espec, "Revest. Interno", s3.revestimento_interno);
        add(espec, "Revest. Externo", s3.revestimento_externo);
        add(espec, "Cor Revestimento", s3.cor_revestimento);
        add(espec, "Piso", s3.piso);
        add(espec, "Iluminação", s3.iluminacao);
        add(espec, "Qtd Luminárias", s3.qtd_luminarias);
        if (espec.length)
          sections.push({
            title: "Especificações Construtivas",
            icon: "📐",
            items: espec,
          });

        const acc = [];
        const portasArr = Array.isArray(s4.portas) ? s4.portas : [];
        if (portasArr.length > 0) {
          portasArr.forEach((p, i) => {
            const tag = p.compartimento_id || `Porta ${i + 1}`;
            if (p.tipo) acc.push([`${tag} · Tipo`, p.tipo]);
            if (p.largura) acc.push([`${tag} · Largura`, p.largura + "mm"]);
            if (p.altura) acc.push([`${tag} · Altura`, p.altura + "mm"]);
            if (p.parede) acc.push([`${tag} · Parede`, p.parede]);
            if (p.sentido_abertura)
              acc.push([`${tag} · Sentido`, p.sentido_abertura]);
            if (p.acessorios) acc.push([`${tag} · Acessórios`, p.acessorios]);
          });
        } else {
          add(acc, "Tipo Porta", s4.porta_tipo);
          add(acc, "Largura Porta", s4.porta_largura, "mm");
          add(acc, "Altura Porta", s4.porta_altura, "mm");
        }
        const estPC =
          s4.estantes_por_comp && typeof s4.estantes_por_comp === "object"
            ? s4.estantes_por_comp
            : {};
        Object.entries(estPC).forEach(([compName, e]) => {
          if (!e) return;
          const hasGrupos = Array.isArray(e.grupos) && e.grupos.length > 0;
          const totQtd = hasGrupos
            ? e.grupos.reduce((s, g) => s + (parseInt(g.qtd) || 0), 0)
            : parseInt(e.quantidade) || 0;
          if (!e.tipo && !totQtd && !e.niveis) return;
          if (e.tipo) acc.push([`${compName} · Estante`, e.tipo]);
          if (totQtd) acc.push([`${compName} · Qtd`, totQtd]);
          if (e.niveis) acc.push([`${compName} · Níveis`, e.niveis]);
        });
        if (Object.keys(estPC).length === 0) {
          add(acc, "Estante", s4.estante_tipo);
          add(acc, "Qtd Estantes", s4.estante_quantidade);
          add(acc, "Níveis/Estante", s4.estante_niveis);
        }
        add(acc, "Cortina PVC", s4.cortina_pvc);
        add(acc, "Alarme Temp.", s4.alarme);
        add(acc, "Estrutura Condensadora", s4.estrutura_unidade_condensadora);
        if (acc.length)
          sections.push({
            title: "Acessórios & Fechamentos",
            icon: "🚪",
            items: acc,
          });

        const inst = [];
        add(inst, "Tipo Frete", s5.tipo_frete);
        add(inst, "Distância", s5.distancia_km, " km");
        add(inst, "Horário Entrega", s5.horario_entrega);
        add(inst, "Horário Instalação", s5.horario_instalacao);
        add(inst, "Andar", s5.andar);
        add(inst, "Transporte Vertical", s5.transporte_vertical);
        add(inst, "Fatur. Mão de Obra", s5.faturamento_mao_obra);
        add(inst, "Exigências Local", s5.exigencias_local);
        if (inst.length)
          sections.push({
            title: "Instalação & Frete",
            icon: "🚚",
            items: inst,
          });

        compartimentos.forEach((comp, idx) => {
          const c = [];
          const compId =
            comp.compartimento_id || comp.nome_compartimento || `#${idx + 1}`;
          if (
            comp.temperatura_setpoint !== "" &&
            comp.temperatura_setpoint != null
          )
            c.push(["Set Point", comp.temperatura_setpoint + "°C"]);
          if (comp.produto_armazenado)
            c.push(["Produto", comp.produto_armazenado]);
          if (comp._inherited_dim) c.push(["Dimensões", comp._inherited_dim]);
          if (comp._inherited_volume_m3)
            c.push(["Volume", comp._inherited_volume_m3 + " m³"]);
          add(c, "Compressor", comp.tipo_compressor);
          add(c, "Marca", comp.marca_preferencia);
          add(c, "Evaporador", comp.tipo_evaporador);
          add(c, "Condensador", comp.tipo_condensador);
          add(c, "Tensão", comp.tensao);
          add(c, "Degelo", comp.degelo);
          add(c, "Fluido", comp.fluido_refrigerante);
          if (comp.carga_termica_kcal)
            c.push([
              "Carga Térmica (informada)",
              comp.carga_termica_kcal + " Kcal/h",
            ]);
          else if (comp._inherited_carga_kcal_calc)
            c.push([
              "Carga Térmica (calc.)",
              comp._inherited_carga_kcal_calc + " Kcal/h",
            ]);
          if (c.length) sections.push({ title: compId, icon: "❄️", items: c });
        });

        const obs = [];
        if (s1.observacoes_comerciais)
          obs.push(["Obs. Comerciais", s1.observacoes_comerciais]);
        if (s5.observacoes_instalacao)
          obs.push(["Obs. Instalação", s5.observacoes_instalacao]);
        if (sub.notes) obs.push(["Notas do Sistema", sub.notes]);
        if (obs.length)
          sections.push({ title: "Observações", icon: "📝", items: obs });

        return { sections, fd, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6, compartimentos };
      }

      // Build the complete printable HTML document for a submission. Embeds
      // SVGs (planta + corte), uses A4 page CSS and a print toolbar that
      // disappears in print/PDF mode.
      function buildPrintableSubmissionHTML(sub) {
        const ctx = buildSubmissionSections(sub);
        const { sections, fd, s2 } = ctx;
        const proto = sub.protocol || "#" + sub.id;
        const sentAt = sub.submitted_at
          ? new Date(sub.submitted_at).toLocaleString("pt-BR")
          : "—";
        const status = sub.status || "submitted";
        const cliente = s2.razao_social || "—";
        const cidade = [s2.cidade, s2.estado].filter(Boolean).join("/") || "—";

        // Render the SVG drawings at print-friendly resolution
        var drawings = "";
        try {
          var svgs = buildSubmissionSVGs(fd, {
            width: 520,
            height: 360,
            showDoor: true,
          });
          if (svgs.planta || svgs.corte) {
            drawings =
              '<section class="page-break drawings">' +
              '<h2><span class="ico">📐<\/span> Plantas Técnicas<\/h2>' +
              '<div class="drawings-grid">' +
              "<figure>" +
              (svgs.planta || "") +
              "<figcaption>Planta Baixa (vista superior)<\/figcaption>" +
              "<\/figure>" +
              "<figure>" +
              (svgs.corte || "") +
              "<figcaption>Corte Lateral (vista frontal)<\/figcaption>" +
              "<\/figure>" +
              "<\/div>" +
              "<\/section>";
          }
        } catch (e) {}

        var escAll = function (s) {
          return String(s == null ? "" : s)
            .replace(/&/g, "&")
            .replace(/</g, "<")
            .replace(/>/g, ">");
        };

        var sectionsHtml = sections
          .map(function (sec) {
            var rows = sec.items
              .map(function (pair) {
                var label = pair[0];
                var val = pair[1];
                var isLong = String(val).length > 60;
                return (
                  '<div class="row' +
                  (isLong ? " long" : "") +
                  '"><dt>' +
                  escAll(label) +
                  "<\/dt><dd>" +
                  escAll(val == null || val === "" ? "—" : val) +
                  "<\/dd><\/div>"
                );
              })
              .join("");
            return (
              '<section class="info-card"><h3><span class="ico">' +
              escAll(sec.icon || "•") +
              "<\/span> " +
              escAll(sec.title) +
              "<\/h3><dl>" +
              rows +
              "<\/dl><\/section>"
            );
          })
          .join("");

        var statusClr =
          status === "completed"
            ? "#10b981"
            : status === "cancelled"
              ? "#ef4444"
              : status === "processing"
                ? "#f59e0b"
                : "#0ea5e9";

        // Build summary stats
        var s3 = fd.step3 || {};
        var s1 = fd.step1 || {};
        var c = parseFloat(s3.comprimento) || 0;
        var l = parseFloat(s3.largura) || 0;
        var a = parseFloat(s3.altura) || 0;
        var esp = s3.espessura_painel || "—";
        var tipo = s1.tipo_produto || "—";
        var dim =
          c && l && a
            ? c.toFixed(2) + " × " + l.toFixed(2) + " × " + a.toFixed(2) + " m"
            : "—";
        var vol = c && l && a ? (c * l * a).toFixed(2) + " m³" : "—";
        var statsArr = [
          ["Tipo", tipo],
          ["Dimensões", dim],
          ["Volume", vol],
          ["Painel", esp + " mm"],
        ];
        var summaryHtml = statsArr
          .map(function (s) {
            return (
              '<div class="stat"><div class="lbl">' +
              escAll(s[0]) +
              '<\/div><div class="val">' +
              escAll(s[1]) +
              "<\/div><\/div>"
            );
          })
          .join("");

        // Build the full document using concatenation to avoid </tag>
        // sequences inside template literals (which can confuse HTML parsers
        // into closing the <script> element prematurely).
        var h = [];
        h.push("<!DOCTYPE html>");
        h.push('<html lang="pt-BR">');
        h.push("<head>");
        h.push('<meta charset="utf-8">');
        h.push("<title>Orçamento " + escAll(proto) + " — São Rafael<\/title>");
        h.push("<style>");
        h.push("*{box-sizing:border-box;}");
        h.push(
          "html,body{margin:0;padding:0;background:#f1f5f9;color:#0f172a;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".toolbar{position:sticky;top:0;background:#0f172a;color:#fff;padding:10px 18px;display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;z-index:100;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15);}",
        );
        h.push(".toolbar .left{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;}");
        h.push(".toolbar .actions{display:flex;gap:8px;}");
        h.push(
          ".toolbar button{padding:7px 14px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;background:#2563eb;color:#fff;}",
        );
        h.push(".toolbar button.secondary{background:#475569;}");
        h.push(".toolbar button:hover{filter:brightness(1.12);}");
        h.push(
          ".doc{max-width:820px;margin:18px auto;padding:30px 38px 50px;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(15,23,42,0.08);border-radius:6px;}",
        );
        h.push(
          "header.cover{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;border-bottom:3px solid #0f172a;padding-bottom:14px;margin-bottom:18px;}",
        );
        h.push(
          "header.cover .brand{font-size:22px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:#0f172a;}",
        );
        h.push(
          "header.cover .brand small{display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:0.3px;color:#64748b;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:2px;}",
        );
        h.push(
          "header.cover .meta{text-align:right;font-size:12px;color:#475569;line-height:1.6;}",
        );
        h.push(
          "header.cover .meta .protocol{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#0f172a;letter-spacing:0.5px;}",
        );
        h.push(
          "header.cover .meta .status{display:inline-block;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:99px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;background:" +
            statusClr +
            ";text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;margin-top:4px;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:20px;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".summary .stat{padding:10px;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:6px;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".summary .stat .lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:#64748b;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".summary .stat .val{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;margin-top:3px;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".info-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".info-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;break-inside:avoid;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".info-card h3{margin:0 0 10px 0;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;padding-bottom:6px;}",
        );
        h.push(".info-card .ico{margin-right:4px;}");
        h.push(
          ".info-card dl{margin:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".info-card .row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;font-size:11.5px;line-height:1.4;}",
        );
        h.push(".info-card .row dt{color:#64748b;font-weight:500;}");
        h.push(
          ".info-card .row dd{margin:0;color:#0f172a;font-weight:600;text-align:right;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".info-card .row.long{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;}",
        );
        h.push(
          ".info-card .row.long dd{text-align:left;font-weight:500;word-break:break-word;}",
        );
        h.push("section.drawings{margin-top:24px;}");
        h.push(

      function exportOneSubmissionPDF(sub) {
        let html;
        try {
          html = buildPrintableSubmissionHTML(sub);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("[PDF] Falha ao montar HTML:", e);
          uiAlert(
            "Não foi possível gerar o PDF: " + (e && e.message ? e.message : e),
            { variant: "error" },
          );
          return;
        }
        if (!html || html.length < 200) {
          uiAlert("Não foi possível gerar o PDF: documento vazio.", {
            variant: "error",
          });
          return;
        }

        // Strategy 1: open the HTML through a Blob URL. This is the most
        // reliable cross-browser way to render a full document in a new tab.
        // window.open("", "_blank") + document.write frequently renders as a
        // blank about:blank page in modern Chrome/Edge (especially under Live
        // Server) because the synthetic about:blank document is replaced
        // asynchronously and the write is discarded. A real blob: URL is
        // loaded by the browser's normal navigation pipeline, so it always
        // paints.
        let blobUrl = null;
        try {
          const blob = new Blob([html], { type: "text/html;charset=utf-8" });
          blobUrl = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        } catch (e) {
          blobUrl = null;
        }
        if (blobUrl) {
          let popup = null;
          try {
            popup = window.open(blobUrl, "_blank");
          } catch (e) {
            popup = null;
          }
          if (popup) {
            try { popup.focus(); } catch (e) {}
            // Revoke the URL after the new tab has had time to load it.
            setTimeout(() => {
              try { URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl); } catch (e) {}
            }, 60000);
            addChatMessage(
              `📄 Versão para impressão/PDF aberta em nova aba. Use o botão "🖨️ Imprimir / Salvar como PDF" no topo ou Ctrl+P.`,
              "system",
            );
            return;
          }
          // Popup was blocked — revoke and fall through to the inline overlay.
          try { URL.revokeObjectURL(blobUrl); } catch (e) {}
        }

        // Strategy 2: fallback — render inline in an overlay so print works
        // even when popups are blocked. We use contentDocument.write instead
        // of srcdoc because srcdoc can silently truncate or fail for large
        // HTML payloads (a full submission with embedded SVGs).
        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "pdf-print-overlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;z-index:999999;background:#fff;overflow:auto;";
        const iframe = document.createElement("iframe");
        iframe.setAttribute("title", "Visualização para PDF");
        iframe.style.cssText = "width:100%;height:100%;border:none;display:block;";
        overlay.appendChild(iframe);

        const closeBtn = document.createElement("button");
        closeBtn.textContent = "✕ Fechar Visualização";
        closeBtn.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;top:10px;right:18px;z-index:1000000;padding:8px 18px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;background:#0f172a;color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);";
        closeBtn.onclick = () => overlay.remove();
        overlay.appendChild(closeBtn);

        document.body.appendChild(overlay);

        try {
          const doc =
            iframe.contentDocument ||
            (iframe.contentWindow && iframe.contentWindow.document);
          if (!doc) throw new Error("iframe document indisponível");
          doc.open();
          doc.write(html);
          doc.close();
        } catch (e) {
          console.error("[PDF] Falha ao escrever no iframe:", e);
          overlay.remove();
          uiAlert(
            "Não foi possível abrir a visualização do PDF. Verifique se o bloqueador de popups está ativo.",
            { variant: "error" },
          );
          return;
        }

        addChatMessage(
          `📄 Visualização aberta. Use Ctrl+P ou o botão "🖨️ Imprimir / Salvar como PDF" para gerar o PDF. Clique "✕ Fechar Visualização" quando terminar.`,
          "system",
        );
      }

      function exportOneSubmissionHTML(sub) {
        const html = buildPrintableSubmissionHTML(sub);
        const stamp = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
        const slug = (sub.protocol || sub.id)
          .toString()
          .replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9_\-]/g, "_");
        downloadBlob(
          html,
          `orcamento_${slug}_${stamp}.html`,
          "text/html;charset=utf-8",
        );
        addChatMessage(
          `💾 Orçamento ${sub.protocol || ""} salvo como HTML. Abra o arquivo e use Ctrl+P para gerar o PDF.`,
          "system",
        );
      }

      function exportOneSubmissionSVG(sub) {
        const fd = sub.form_data || {};
        const svgs = buildSubmissionSVGs(fd, {
          width: 720,
          height: 520,
          showDoor: true,
        });
        if (!svgs.planta && !svgs.corte) {
          uiAlert(
            "Não há dimensões suficientes neste orçamento para gerar as plantas.",
            { variant: "warning" },
          );
