          return;
        }
        const stamp = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
        const slug = (sub.protocol || sub.id)
          .toString()
          .replace(/[^A-Za-z0-9_\-]/g, "_");
        // Save each SVG as a separate file (most useful for engineering use).
        if (svgs.planta) {
          downloadBlob(
            svgs.planta,
            `planta_${slug}_${stamp}.svg`,
            "image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8",
          );
        }
        if (svgs.corte) {
          // Slight delay so the second download isn't suppressed by the browser.
          setTimeout(() => {
            downloadBlob(
              svgs.corte,
              `corte_${slug}_${stamp}.svg`,
              "image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8",
            );
          }, 250);
        }
        addChatMessage(
          `🖼️ Plantas (SVG) baixadas para o orçamento ${sub.protocol || ""}.`,
          "system",
        );
      }

      function buildSubmissionRows(submissions) {
        const headers = [
          "Protocolo",
          "Status",
          "Data Envio",
          "Cliente",
          "CNPJ/CPF",
          "Cidade",
          "UF",
          "Tipo Produto",
          "Comp.(m)",
          "Larg.(m)",
          "Alt.(m)",
          "Espessura(mm)",
          "Volume(m³)",
          "Temperatura(°C)",
          "Representante",
          "Comissão Rep.(%)",
          "Porta Tipo",
          "Porta Largura(mm)",
          "Porta Altura(mm)",
          "Qtd Portas",
          "Sentido Abertura",
          "Parede Porta",
          "Posição (%)",
          "Frete",
          "Distância(km)",
          "Observações",
        ];
        const rows = submissions.map((s) => {
          const fd = s.form_data || {};
          const s1 = fd.step1 || {},
            s2 = fd.step2 || {},
            s3 = fd.step3 || {};
          const s4 = fd.step4 || {},
            s5 = fd.step5 || {},
            s6 = fd.step6 || {};
          const comp = (s6.compartimentos || [])[0] || {};
          const c = parseFloat(s3.comprimento || 0);
          const l = parseFloat(s3.largura || 0);
          const a = parseFloat(s3.altura || 0);
          const vol = c && l && a ? (c * l * a).toFixed(2) : "";
          // Portas: aggregate from portas[] (preferred) or legacy porta_*
          const portasArr = Array.isArray(s4.portas) ? s4.portas : [];
          const p0 = portasArr[0] || null;
          const portaTipo = p0 ? p0.tipo || "" : s4.porta_tipo || "";
          const portaLarg = p0 ? p0.largura || "" : s4.porta_largura || "";
          const portaAlt = p0 ? p0.altura || "" : s4.porta_altura || "";
          const portaQtd =
            portasArr.length > 0 ? portasArr.length : s4.porta_quantidade || "";
          const portaSent = p0
            ? p0.sentido_abertura || ""
            : s4.porta_sentido_abertura || "";
          const portaParede = p0 ? p0.parede || "" : s4.porta_parede || "";
          const portaPos = p0
            ? p0.posicao_pct != null
              ? p0.posicao_pct
              : ""
            : s4.porta_posicao_pct || "";
          return [
            s.protocol || "",
            s.status || "",
            s.submitted_at
              ? new Date(s.submitted_at).toLocaleString("pt-BR")
              : "",
            s2.razao_social || "",
            s2.cnpj_cpf || "",
            s2.cidade || "",
            s2.estado || "",
            s1.tipo_produto || "",
            s3.comprimento || "",
            s3.largura || "",
            s3.altura || "",
            s3.espessura_painel || "",
            vol,
            comp.temperatura_setpoint || "",
            s1.representante || "",
            s1.comissao_representante || "",
            portaTipo,
            portaLarg,
            portaAlt,
            portaQtd,
            portaSent,
            portaParede,
            portaPos,
            s5.tipo_frete || "",
            s5.distancia_km || "",
            (s.notes || s5.observacoes_instalacao || "")
              .toString()
              .slice(0, 500),
          ];
        });
        return { headers, rows };
      }

      function exportSubmissionsCSV(submissions) {
        if (!submissions || submissions.length === 0) {
          uiAlert("Nenhum orçamento para exportar.", { variant: "warning" });
          return;
        }
        const { headers, rows } = buildSubmissionRows(submissions);
        const BOM = "\uFEFF";
        const escape = (v) => {
          const str = (v ?? "").toString();
          return /[";\n\r]/.test(str)
            ? '"' + str.replace(/"/g, '""') + '"'
            : str;
        };
        const csv =
          BOM +
          headers.map(escape).join(";") +
          "\n" +
          rows.map((r) => r.map(escape).join(";")).join("\n");
        const stamp = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
        downloadBlob(
          csv,
          `orcamentos_saorafael_${stamp}.csv`,
          "text/csv;charset=utf-8",
        );
        addChatMessage(
          `📥 Exportado: ${submissions.length} orçamento(s) em CSV.`,
          "system",
        );
      }

      function exportSubmissionsXLSX(submissions) {
        if (!submissions || submissions.length === 0) {
          uiAlert("Nenhum orçamento para exportar.", { variant: "warning" });
          return;
        }
        if (typeof XLSX === "undefined") {
          uiAlert("Biblioteca XLSX não carregada. Verifique a conexão.", {
            variant: "error",
          });
          return;
        }
        const { headers, rows } = buildSubmissionRows(submissions);
        const wb = XLSX.utils.book_new();
        const aoa = [headers, ...rows];
        const ws = XLSX.utils.aoa_to_sheet(aoa);
        // Auto width
        const colWidths = headers.map((h, i) => {
          const maxLen = Math.max(
            h.length,
            ...rows.map((r) => (r[i] ?? "").toString().length),
          );
          return { wch: Math.min(maxLen + 2, 50) };
        });
        ws["!cols"] = colWidths;
        XLSX.utils.book_append_sheet(wb, ws, "Orçamentos");
        const stamp = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
        XLSX.writeFile(wb, `orcamentos_saorafael_${stamp}.xlsx`);
        addChatMessage(
          `📊 Exportado: ${submissions.length} orçamento(s) em Excel.`,
          "system",
        );
      }

      function downloadBlob(content, filename, mimeType) {
        const blob = new Blob([content], { type: mimeType });
        const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        const a = document.createElement("a");
        a.href = url;
        a.download = filename;
        document.body.appendChild(a);
        a.click();
        document.body.removeChild(a);
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      }

      function exportSelectedSubmissions(format) {
        const selected = allSubmissions.filter((s) =>
          selectedSubmissionIds.has(s.id),
        );
        if (format === "xlsx") exportSubmissionsXLSX(selected);
        else exportSubmissionsCSV(selected);
      }

      function exportAllSubmissions(format) {
        // Use currently filtered view if any; fallback to allSubmissions
        const status = document.getElementById("filterStatus")?.value || "";
        const search = (
          document.getElementById("filterSearch")?.value || ""
        ).toLowerCase();
        const dateFrom = document.getElementById("filterDateFrom")?.value || "";
        const dateTo = document.getElementById("filterDateTo")?.value || "";
        let list = [...allSubmissions];
        if (status) list = list.filter((s) => s.status === status);
        if (search)
          list = list.filter((s) => {
            const fd = s.form_data || {};
            return [
              s.protocol,
              fd.step2?.razao_social,
              fd.step1?.representante,
              fd.step1?.tipo_produto,
              fd.step2?.cidade,
            ]
              .join(" ")
              .toLowerCase()
              .includes(search);
          });
        if (dateFrom)
          list = list.filter(
            (s) => s.submitted_at && s.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) >= dateFrom,
          );
        if (dateTo)
          list = list.filter(
            (s) => s.submitted_at && s.submitted_at.slice(0, 10) <= dateTo,
          );
        if (format === "xlsx") exportSubmissionsXLSX(list);
        else exportSubmissionsCSV(list);
      }

      // ============================================================
      // DUPLICAR COMO BASE  (carrega form_data anterior no wizard)
      // ============================================================
      async function duplicateSubmissionAsBase(submissionId) {
        const sub = allSubmissions.find((s) => s.id === submissionId);
        if (!sub) {
          uiAlert("Orçamento não encontrado.", { variant: "error" });
          return;
        }
        const proto = sub.protocol || "#" + sub.id;
        if (
          !(await uiConfirm(
            `Duplicar "${proto}" como base?\n\n` +
              `Os dados deste orçamento serão carregados no wizard atual ` +
              `(qualquer formulário em andamento será sobrescrito).\n\n` +
              `Você poderá editar tudo antes de enviar.`,
            { variant: "warning", confirmText: "Duplicar" },
          ))
        )
          return;
        try {
          const fd = sub.form_data || {};
          // Reset wizard formData with copy
          for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
            const k = `step${i}`;
            if (fd[k]) {
              formData[k] = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(fd[k]));
            } else {
              const schema = SCHEMA[k];
              if (schema?.isDynamic) {
                formData[k] = {};
                formData[k][schema.arrayField] = [{}];
              } else {
                formData[k] = {};
              }
            }
          }
          // Track origin (not submitted again unless user re-submits)
          formData._duplicated_from = sub.protocol || "id:" + sub.id;
          if (sub.client_id) formData._client_id = sub.client_id;
          // Reset validation flags so user re-validates each step
          for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
            stepValidated[`step${i}`] = false;
            validationErrors[`step${i}`] = {};
          }
          currentStep = 1;
          saveToStorage();
          renderCurrentStep();
          closeSubmissionsPanel();
          // Close client history modal if open
          const hist = document.getElementById("clientHistoryOverlay");
          if (hist) hist.remove();
          addChatMessage(
            `📋 Orçamento **${proto}** carregado como base. Revise os dados em cada etapa antes de enviar.`,
            "system",
          );
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Duplicar:", err);
          uiAlert("Erro ao duplicar: " + err.message, { variant: "error" });
        }
      }

      // ============================================================
      // EDITAR orçamento existente — carrega no wizard preservando o
      // protocolo original. Diferente de "Duplicar" (que cria um novo),
      // o modo edição mantém o id/protocolo e, ao re-submeter, indica
      // ao backend o id do orçamento sendo editado.
      // ============================================================
      async function editSubmission(submissionId) {
        const sub = allSubmissions.find((s) => s.id === submissionId);
        if (!sub) {
          uiAlert("Orçamento não encontrado.", { variant: "error" });
          return;
        }
        const proto = sub.protocol || "#" + sub.id;
        // Aviso se já existe um rascunho/edição em andamento
        const hasDraft = Object.keys(formData || {}).some(
          (k) => /^step\d+$/.test(k) && formData[k] && Object.keys(formData[k]).length > 0,
        );
        const isAlreadyEditing = !!formData._editing_submission_id;
        let warn =
          `Editar "${proto}"?\n\n` +
          `Os dados deste orçamento serão carregados no wizard e você poderá ` +
          `revisar cada etapa antes de re-submeter. As análises da IA serão ` +
          `regeradas conforme você avança pelos steps.`;
        if (isAlreadyEditing) {
          warn +=
            `\n\n⚠️ Você já está editando outro orçamento ` +
            `(${formData._editing_protocol || "#" + formData._editing_submission_id}). ` +
            `Esta ação substituirá os dados atuais.`;
        } else if (hasDraft) {
          warn +=
            `\n\n⚠️ Há um formulário em andamento que será sobrescrito.`;
        }
        if (
          !(await uiConfirm(warn, {
            variant: "warning",
            confirmText: "Editar",
          }))
        )
          return;
        try {
          const fd = sub.form_data || {};
          for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
            const k = `step${i}`;
            if (fd[k]) {
              formData[k] = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(fd[k]));
            } else {
              const schema = SCHEMA[k];
              if (schema?.isDynamic) {
                formData[k] = {};
                formData[k][schema.arrayField] = [{}];
              } else {
                formData[k] = {};
              }
            }
          }
          // Marca contexto de edição — usado pelo banner e pelo payload do submit
          formData._editing_submission_id = sub.id;
          formData._editing_protocol = sub.protocol || null;
          formData._editing_original_status = sub.status || null;
          formData._editing_started_at = new Date().toISOString();
          if (sub.client_id) formData._client_id = sub.client_id;
          // Limpa flags de validação para que a IA reanalise cada etapa
          for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
            stepValidated[`step${i}`] = false;
            validationErrors[`step${i}`] = {};
          }
          aiValidationResults = {};
          warningsConfirmedHash = {};
          // EDIT MODE — Semeia appliedSuggestionsMemory com os valores
          // carregados do orçamento. O vendedor já submeteu esses valores
          // originalmente, então a IA deve tratá-los como "baseline aprovada"
          // e só re-recomendar se houver erro REAL (Reality Check vermelho).
          // Sem este seed, ao editar sem mudar nada a IA gera sugestões
          // diferentes a cada execução (não-determinismo do LLM), parecendo
          // se contradizer.
          appliedSuggestionsMemory = {};
          try {
            for (let i = 1; i <= totalSteps; i++) {
              const k = `step${i}`;
              const stepData = formData[k];
              if (!stepData || typeof stepData !== "object") continue;
              const mem = {};
              Object.entries(stepData).forEach(([fname, fval]) => {
                if (fname.startsWith("_")) return;
                if (Array.isArray(fval)) {
                  // Campos dinâmicos: compartimentos[i].x, portas[i].x
                  fval.forEach((item, idx) => {
                    if (!item || typeof item !== "object") return;
                    Object.entries(item).forEach(([sub, subVal]) => {
                      if (sub.startsWith("_")) return;
                      if (subVal == null || subVal === "") return;
                      mem[`${fname}[${idx}].${sub}`] = String(subVal);
                    });
                  });
                } else if (fval != null && fval !== "" && typeof fval !== "object") {
                  mem[fname] = String(fval);
                }
              });
              if (Object.keys(mem).length > 0) {
                appliedSuggestionsMemory[k] = mem;
              }
            }
            saveAppliedSuggestionsToStorage();
          } catch (e) {}
          lastStepEvaluated = false;
          lastStepEvaluating = false;
          try { localStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_VALIDATIONS_KEY); } catch (e) {}
          currentStep = 1;
          saveToStorage();
          renderCurrentStep();
          if (typeof renderValidationTracker === "function")
            renderValidationTracker();
          closeSubmissionsPanel();
          const hist = document.getElementById("clientHistoryOverlay");
          if (hist) hist.remove();
          addChatMessage(
            `✏️ **Modo edição ativado** — Orçamento **${proto}** carregado. ` +
              `Percorra as etapas e ajuste os dados; a IA reanalisará cada step. ` +
              `Ao enviar, o orçamento será atualizado.`,
            "system",
          );
          if (typeof scrollWizardTop === "function") scrollWizardTop();
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("Editar:", err);
          uiAlert("Erro ao carregar para edição: " + err.message, {
            variant: "error",
          });
        }
      }

      // Cancela o modo edição: limpa apenas os marcadores, mantém os dados
      // já preenchidos no formulário (o usuário pode então optar por descartar
      // manualmente via "Limpar etapa").
      async function cancelEditing() {
        if (!formData._editing_submission_id) return;
        const proto =
          formData._editing_protocol ||
          "#" + formData._editing_submission_id;
        if (
          !(await uiConfirm(
            `Cancelar edição de "${proto}"?\n\n` +
              `Os dados permanecerão no formulário, mas ao enviar será criado ` +
              `um novo orçamento (em vez de atualizar o existente).`,
            { variant: "warning", confirmText: "Cancelar edição" },
          ))
        )
          return;
        delete formData._editing_submission_id;
        delete formData._editing_protocol;
        delete formData._editing_original_status;
        delete formData._editing_started_at;
        saveToStorage();
        renderCurrentStep();
        addChatMessage(
          `↩️ Modo edição cancelado. O formulário será enviado como um novo orçamento.`,
          "system",
        );
      }

      // ============================================================
      // HISTÓRICO DO CLIENTE (Modal)
      // ============================================================
      async function showClientHistory(clientId, clientName) {
        // Close any existing
        const existing = document.getElementById("clientHistoryOverlay");
        if (existing) existing.remove();

        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "clientHistoryOverlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10100;";
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:16px;padding:24px;width:92%;max-width:720px;max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;">
              <div>
                <h2 style="font-size:17px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0;">📋 Histórico do Cliente</h2>
                <div style="font-size:13px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;">${escapeHtml(clientName || "")}</div>
              </div>
              <button onclick="document.getElementById('clientHistoryOverlay').remove()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:20px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div id="clientHistoryContent" style="font-size:13px;">Carregando...</div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove();
        });

        try {
          const { data, error } = await sbClient.rpc(
            "saorafael_client_submissions",
            { p_client_id: clientId },
          );
          if (error) throw error;
          const contentEl = document.getElementById("clientHistoryContent");
          if (!data || data.length === 0) {
            contentEl.innerHTML =
              '<p style="color:var(--text-secondary);text-align:center;padding:24px;">Este cliente ainda não possui orçamentos.</p>';
            return;
          }
          // Need full submissions for duplicar — fetch ids
          const ids = data.map((d) => d.id);
          let fullMap = {};
          try {
            const { data: full } = await sbClient
              .from("saorafael_wizard_submission")
              .select("*")
              .in("id", ids);
            (full || []).forEach((f) => {
              fullMap[f.id] = f;
            });
            // Add to allSubmissions cache so duplicateSubmissionAsBase works
            (full || []).forEach((f) => {
              if (!allSubmissions.find((s) => s.id === f.id))
                allSubmissions.push(f);
            });
          } catch (e) {
            console.warn("Fetch full subs:", e);
          }

          const statusBadge = (status) => {
            const map = {
              submitted: ["📝", "Submetido", "var(--color-info)"],
              processing: ["⏳", "Processando", "var(--color-warning)"],
              completed: ["✅", "Concluído", "var(--color-success)"],
              error: ["❌", "Erro", "var(--color-error)"],
            };
            const m = map[status] || [
              "❓",
              status || "-",
              "var(--text-secondary)",
            ];
            return `<span style="display:inline-block;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;background:${m[2]}15;color:${m[2]};">${m[0]} ${m[1]}</span>`;
          };

          contentEl.innerHTML = data
            .map(
              (sub) => `
            <div style="border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);">
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:6px;">
                <div>
                  <span style="font-family:monospace;font-weight:700;color:var(--color-primary);font-size:13px;">${escapeHtml(sub.protocol || "#" + sub.id)}</span>
                  <span style="margin-left:8px;">${statusBadge(sub.status)}</span>
                </div>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">
                  ${sub.submitted_at ? new Date(sub.submitted_at).toLocaleDateString("pt-BR") : "—"}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:8px;">
                <strong>${escapeHtml(sub.tipo_produto || "Câmara")}</strong> · ${escapeHtml(sub.dimensoes || "")}
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                <button onclick="editSubmission(${sub.id})" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-success, #10b981);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">✏️ Editar</button>
                <button onclick="duplicateSubmissionAsBase(${sub.id})" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-warning);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">📋 Duplicar como Base</button>
                <button onclick="document.getElementById('clientHistoryOverlay').remove(); showSubmissionsPanel(); setTimeout(()=>toggleSubmissionDetail(${sub.id}), 600);" style="padding:5px 10px;font-size:11px;background:var(--color-info);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:600;">👁 Ver Detalhes</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          `,
            )
            .join("");
        } catch (err) {
          const contentEl = document.getElementById("clientHistoryContent");
          if (contentEl)
            contentEl.innerHTML =
              '<p style="color:var(--color-error);">Erro: ' +
              escapeHtml(err.message) +
              "</p>";
        }
      }

      // ============================================================
      // CLIENT INTEGRITY LOCK (Anti-Mistura)
      // ============================================================
      const CLIENT_LOCKED_FIELDS = [
        "razao_social",
        "cnpj_cpf",
        "inscricao_estadual",
        "contato_nome",
        "contato_telefone",
        "contato_email",
        "endereco_entrega",
        "cidade",
        "estado",
        "cep",
      ];
      const CLIENT_IDENTITY_FIELDS = [
        "razao_social",
        "cnpj_cpf",
        "inscricao_estadual",
      ];

      function lockClientFields(panel, clientName) {
        if (!panel) return;
        CLIENT_LOCKED_FIELDS.forEach((f) => {
          const el = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${f}"]`);
          if (!el) return;
          // For input/select: mark and store original value
          let target = el;
          if (el.classList && el.classList.contains("creatable-container")) {
            target = el.querySelector(".creatable-input") || el;
          }
          if (target.value) {
            target.classList.add("client-locked");
            target.dataset.clientLocked = "1";
            target.dataset.originalValue = target.value;
            target.title = `🔒 Vinculado ao cliente: ${clientName || ""}. Editar exige confirmação.`;
          }
        });
        formData._client_locked = true;
        renderClientBanner(panel, clientName);
      }

      function renderClientBanner(panel, clientName) {
        if (!panel) return;
        // Remove existing banner
        const old = panel.querySelector(".client-banner");
        if (old) old.remove();
        if (!formData._client_id) return;
        const localMode = formData._client_edit_mode === "local_only";
        const banner = document.createElement("div");
        banner.className = "client-banner";
        banner.innerHTML = `
          <div class="info">
            🏢 Cliente vinculado: <strong>${escapeHtml(clientName || "Cliente")}</strong>
            <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);display:block;margin-top:2px;">
              ${
                localMode
                  ? '📝 <strong>Modo "apenas neste orçamento":</strong> edições NÃO atualizarão o cadastro do cliente.'
                  : "Campos protegidos contra mistura de dados. Editar exigirá confirmação."
              }
            </span>
          </div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <button type="button" data-action="history">📋 Histórico</button>
            <button type="button" data-action="toggle-mode">${localMode ? "🔒 Voltar a proteger" : "✏️ Editar sem alterar cadastro"}</button>
            <button type="button" data-action="unlock">🔄 Trocar Cliente</button>
          </div>
        `;
        // Insert at top of step panel form-grid
        const formGrid = panel.querySelector(".form-grid");
        if (formGrid) {
          formGrid.parentElement.insertBefore(banner, formGrid);
        } else {
          panel.insertBefore(banner, panel.firstChild);
        }
        banner
          .querySelector('[data-action="history"]')
          .addEventListener("click", () => {
            if (formData._client_id)
              showClientHistory(formData._client_id, clientName);
          });
        banner
          .querySelector('[data-action="toggle-mode"]')
          .addEventListener("click", () => {
            if (formData._client_edit_mode === "local_only") {
              delete formData._client_edit_mode;
              addChatMessage(
                "🔒 Proteção restaurada. Edições voltarão a perguntar como aplicar.",
                "system",
              );
            } else {
              formData._client_edit_mode = "local_only";
              addChatMessage(
                '📝 Modo "apenas neste orçamento" ativado. Edite à vontade — o cadastro do cliente não será alterado.',
                "system",
              );
            }
            saveToStorage();
            renderClientBanner(panel, clientName);
          });
        banner
          .querySelector('[data-action="unlock"]')
          .addEventListener("click", async () => {
            if (
              await uiConfirm(
                "Todos os dados de identificação, contato e endereço do cliente atual serão limpos.\nDados técnicos da câmara permanecem.",
                {
                  variant: "warning",
                  title: "Trocar de cliente?",
                  confirmText: "Trocar",
                },
              )
            ) {
              unlockAndClearClient(panel);
            }
          });
      }

      function unlockAndClearClient(panel) {
        // Clear client fields
        const stepKey = "step2";
        if (!formData[stepKey]) formData[stepKey] = {};
        CLIENT_LOCKED_FIELDS.forEach((f) => {
          formData[stepKey][f] = "";
          if (panel) {
            const el = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${f}"]`);
            if (el) {
              if (el.classList.contains("creatable-container")) {
                const inp = el.querySelector(".creatable-input");
                if (inp) inp.value = "";
              } else {
                el.value = "";
              }
              el.classList.remove("client-locked");
              delete el.dataset.clientLocked;
              delete el.dataset.originalValue;
              el.removeAttribute("title");
            }
          }
        });
        delete formData._client_id;
        delete formData._client_locked;
        delete formData._client_edit_mode;
        delete formData._client_field_overrides;
        delete formData._client_dirty;
        // Remove banner
        if (panel) {
          const banner = panel.querySelector(".client-banner");
          if (banner) banner.remove();
        }
        saveToStorage();
        addChatMessage(
          "🔄 Vínculo de cliente removido. Você pode buscar outro ou cadastrar do zero.",
          "system",
        );
      }

      function bindClientLockedFieldHandlers(panel) {
        if (!panel) return;
        CLIENT_LOCKED_FIELDS.forEach((f) => {
          const el = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${f}"]`);
          if (!el) return;
          let target = el;
          if (el.classList && el.classList.contains("creatable-container")) {
            target = el.querySelector(".creatable-input") || el;
          }
          if (!target.dataset.clientLockBound) {
            target.dataset.clientLockBound = "1";
            target.addEventListener("change", () =>
              handleLockedFieldChange(target, panel),
            );
            target.addEventListener("blur", () =>
              handleLockedFieldChange(target, panel),
            );
          }
        });
      }

      async function handleLockedFieldChange(target, panel) {
        if (!formData._client_locked) return;
        if (target.dataset.clientLocked !== "1") return;
        const newVal = target.value || "";
        const oldVal = target.dataset.originalValue || "";
        if (newVal === oldVal) return;
        const fieldName = target.dataset.fieldName;
        const isIdentity = CLIENT_IDENTITY_FIELDS.includes(fieldName);
        const label = SCHEMA.step2?.fields?.[fieldName]?.label || fieldName;

        // Sticky preference per submission: "always edit only locally"
        if (formData._client_edit_mode === "local_only" && !isIdentity) {
          target.dataset.originalValue = newVal;
          formData.step2[fieldName] = newVal;
          if (!formData._client_field_overrides)
            formData._client_field_overrides = {};
          formData._client_field_overrides[fieldName] = newVal;
          saveToStorage();
          return;
        }

        const choices = [
          {
            value: "update",
            label: "💾 Atualizar cadastro",
            variant: "success",
          },
          {
            value: "local",
            label: "📝 Apenas neste orçamento",
            variant: "warning",
          },
        ];
        if (isIdentity) {
          choices.push({
            value: "newclient",
            label: "🆕 Criar novo cliente",
            variant: "danger",
          });
        }
        choices.push({
          value: "revert",
          label: "Reverter",
          variant: "neutral",
        });

        const msg =
          `Você alterou o campo "${label}" de um cliente vinculado.\n\n` +
          `Original: ${oldVal || "(vazio)"}\n` +
          `Novo: ${newVal || "(vazio)"}` +
          (isIdentity
            ? `\n\n⚠️ Este é um campo de IDENTIDADE (CNPJ/Razão Social). Mudar pode caracterizar outro cliente.`
            : "");

        const result = await uiChoice(msg, {
          title: "Cliente vinculado — como aplicar a alteração?",
          variant: isIdentity ? "warning" : "question",
          choices,
          rememberLabel: isIdentity
            ? null
            : "Não perguntar mais (apenas neste orçamento)",
        });
        const choice = result && result.value;

        if (choice === "update") {
          target.dataset.originalValue = newVal;
          formData.step2[fieldName] = newVal;
          formData._client_dirty = true;
          if (formData._client_field_overrides)
            delete formData._client_field_overrides[fieldName];
          saveToStorage();
          addChatMessage(
            `✏️ Campo "${label}" será atualizado no cadastro do cliente ao enviar.`,
            "system",
          );
        } else if (choice === "local") {
          target.dataset.originalValue = newVal;
          formData.step2[fieldName] = newVal;
          if (!formData._client_field_overrides)
            formData._client_field_overrides = {};
          formData._client_field_overrides[fieldName] = newVal;
          if (result.remember) formData._client_edit_mode = "local_only";
          saveToStorage();
          addChatMessage(
            `📝 Campo "${label}" usado apenas neste orçamento. Cadastro do cliente NÃO será alterado.`,
            "system",
          );
        } else if (choice === "newclient") {
          delete formData._client_id;
          delete formData._client_locked;
          delete formData._client_dirty;
          delete formData._client_edit_mode;
          delete formData._client_field_overrides;
          CLIENT_LOCKED_FIELDS.forEach((f) => {
            const el2 = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${f}"]`);
            if (!el2) return;
            const t2 = el2.classList.contains("creatable-container")
              ? el2.querySelector(".creatable-input") || el2
              : el2;
            t2.classList.remove("client-locked");
            delete t2.dataset.clientLocked;
            delete t2.dataset.originalValue;
            t2.removeAttribute("title");
          });
          const banner = panel.querySelector(".client-banner");
          if (banner) banner.remove();
          saveToStorage();
          addChatMessage(
            "🆕 Vínculo removido. Os dados atuais serão tratados como NOVO cliente.",
            "system",
          );
        } else {
          // revert or dismissed
          target.value = oldVal;
          formData.step2[fieldName] = oldVal;
          saveToStorage();
        }
      }

      // ============================================================
      // CHAMBER VISUALIZER (SVG) — Wave 2 Visual Components
      //   #11 Corte lateral em Dimensões
      //   #8  Divisórias visual (planta com linhas de divisão)
      //   #9  Prateleiras visual (corte lateral com níveis)
      //   #10 Mini-SVG no Review/Detail
      // ============================================================

      function svgEsc(t) {
        return String(t || "").replace(
          /[&<>"]/g,
          (c) => ({ "&": "&", "<": "<", ">": ">", '"': """ })[c],
        );
      }

      function getChamberSnapshot() {
        const s3 = formData.step3 || {};
        const s4 = formData.step4 || {};
        const comp = parseFloat(s3.comprimento) || 0;
        const larg = parseFloat(s3.largura) || 0;
        const alt = parseFloat(s3.altura) || 0;
        const espMm = parseFloat(s3.espessura_painel) || 100;
        const espM = espMm / 1000;
        const compInt = comp > 0 ? Math.max(0, comp - 2 * espM) : 0;
        const largInt = larg > 0 ? Math.max(0, larg - 2 * espM) : 0;
        const altInt = alt > 0 ? Math.max(0, alt - espM) : 0;
        const area = compInt * largInt;
        const volume = area * altInt;
        let divisorias = [];
        try {
          if (typeof s3.divisorias === "string" && s3.divisorias)
            divisorias = JSON.parse(s3.divisorias);
          else if (Array.isArray(s3.divisorias)) divisorias = s3.divisorias;
        } catch (e) {
          divisorias = [];
        }

        // Build portas[] (preferred) with legacy fallback to porta_*
        let portas = [];
        if (Array.isArray(s4.portas) && s4.portas.length > 0) {
          portas = s4.portas.map((p) => ({
            compartimento_id: p.compartimento_id || "",
            tipo: p.tipo || "",
            largMm: parseFloat(p.largura) || 0,
            altMm: parseFloat(p.altura) || 0,
            parede: p.parede || "",
            posPct: parseFloat(p.posicao_pct) || 50,
            sentido: p.sentido_abertura || "",
            acessorios: p.acessorios || "",
          }));
        } else if (s4.porta_tipo || s4.porta_largura) {
          portas = [
            {
              compartimento_id: "C1",
              tipo: s4.porta_tipo || "",
              largMm: parseFloat(s4.porta_largura) || 0,
              altMm: parseFloat(s4.porta_altura) || 0,
              parede: s4.porta_parede || "",
              posPct: parseFloat(s4.porta_posicao_pct) || 50,
              sentido: s4.porta_sentido_abertura || "",
              acessorios: s4.porta_acessorios || "",
            },
          ];
        }

        return {
          comp,
          larg,
          alt,
          espMm,
          espM,
          compInt,
          largInt,
          altInt,
          area,
          volume,
          divisorias,
          portas,
          // Legacy alias for backwards compat
          porta: Object.assign(
            { qtd: portas.length },
            portas[0] || {
              tipo: "",
              largMm: 0,
              altMm: 0,
              parede: "",
              posPct: 50,
              sentido: "",
            },
          ),
          estante: (function () {
            const pc =
              s4.estantes_por_comp && typeof s4.estantes_por_comp === "object"
                ? s4.estantes_por_comp
                : {};
            let totalQtd = 0,
              niveisMax = 0,
              primaryTipo = "";
            Object.values(pc).forEach((e) => {
              const q = parseInt(e.quantidade) || 0;
              if (q > 0) totalQtd += q;
              const n = parseInt(e.niveis) || 0;
              if (n > niveisMax) niveisMax = n;
              if (!primaryTipo && e.tipo) primaryTipo = e.tipo;
            });
            if (
              totalQtd === 0 &&
              (s4.estante_tipo || s4.estante_quantidade || s4.estante_niveis)
            ) {
              return {
                tipo: s4.estante_tipo || "",
                qtd: parseInt(s4.estante_quantidade) || 0,
                niveis: parseInt(s4.estante_niveis) || 0,
              };
            }
            return { tipo: primaryTipo, qtd: totalQtd, niveis: niveisMax };
          })(),
        };
      }

      function buildChamberPlantaSVG(snap, opts) {
        opts = opts || {};
        const W = opts.width || 320;
        const H = opts.height || 240;
        const margin = 30;
        const comp = snap.comp || 4;
        const larg = snap.larg || 3;
        const espM = snap.espM || 0.1;
        const scale = Math.min(
          (W - 2 * margin) / comp,
          (H - 2 * margin) / larg,
        );
        const rW = comp * scale;
        const rH = larg * scale;
        const oX = (W - rW) / 2;
        const oY = (H - rH) / 2;
        const wallPx = Math.max(3, espM * scale);

        let svg = `<svg viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="Planta baixa">`;
        svg += `<rect x="0" y="0" width="${W}" height="${H}" fill="#f8fafc"/>`;
        svg += `<rect x="${oX}" y="${oY}" width="${rW}" height="${rH}" fill="#cbd5e1" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>`;
        svg += `<rect x="${oX + wallPx}" y="${oY + wallPx}" width="${Math.max(0, rW - 2 * wallPx)}" height="${Math.max(0, rH - 2 * wallPx)}" fill="#e0f2fe" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="2,2" rx="1"/>`;
        if (snap.comp > 0)
          svg += `<text x="${W / 2}" y="${oY - 8}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#475569" font-weight="600">◄── ${snap.comp.toFixed(2)}m ──►</text>`;
        if (snap.larg > 0)
          svg += `<text x="${oX - 10}" y="${H / 2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#475569" font-weight="600" transform="rotate(-90, ${oX - 10}, ${H / 2})">${snap.larg.toFixed(2)}m</text>`;
        svg += `<text x="${W / 2}" y="${oY + 12}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#94a3b8">N</text>`;
        svg += `<text x="${W / 2}" y="${oY + rH - 4}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#94a3b8">S</text>`;
        svg += `<text x="${oX + 6}" y="${H / 2 + 3}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#94a3b8">O</text>`;
        svg += `<text x="${oX + rW - 6}" y="${H / 2 + 3}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#94a3b8">L</text>`;

        if (snap.divisorias && snap.divisorias.length) {
          snap.divisorias.forEach((d, idx) => {
            const eixo = d.eixo || "vertical";
            const posM = parseFloat(d.posicao_m) || 0;
            const espMm2 = (parseFloat(d.espessura_mm) || 50) / 1000;
            const espPx = Math.max(2, espMm2 * scale);
            const bounds = d.bounds || null;
            if (eixo === "vertical") {
              const x = oX + wallPx + Math.min(rW - 2 * wallPx, posM * scale);
              const yStart = bounds
                ? oY + wallPx + parseFloat(bounds.from_m) * scale
                : oY + wallPx;
              const yEnd = bounds
                ? oY + wallPx + parseFloat(bounds.to_m) * scale
                : oY + rH - wallPx;
              const yLen = Math.max(0, yEnd - yStart);
              svg += `<rect x="${x - espPx / 2}" y="${yStart}" width="${espPx}" height="${yLen}" fill="#94a3b8" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="0.5"/>`;
              svg += `<text x="${x}" y="${yStart + 12}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b" font-weight="600">${svgEsc(d.nome || "D" + (idx + 1))}</text>`;
            } else {
              const y = oY + wallPx + Math.min(rH - 2 * wallPx, posM * scale);
              const xStart = bounds
                ? oX + wallPx + parseFloat(bounds.from_m) * scale
                : oX + wallPx;
              const xEnd = bounds
                ? oX + wallPx + parseFloat(bounds.to_m) * scale
                : oX + rW - wallPx;
              const xLen = Math.max(0, xEnd - xStart);
              svg += `<rect x="${xStart}" y="${y - espPx / 2}" width="${xLen}" height="${espPx}" fill="#94a3b8" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="0.5"/>`;
              svg += `<text x="${xStart + 4}" y="${y - 3}" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b" font-weight="600">${svgEsc(d.nome || "D" + (idx + 1))}</text>`;
            }
          });
        }

        // Compartment labels (only when not showDoor for clarity)
        if (!opts.hideCompartments && snap.compInt > 0 && snap.largInt > 0) {
          const comps =
            typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function"
              ? rcComputeCompartments(snap)
              : [];
          const isSingle = comps.length === 1;
          if (comps.length >= 1) {
            comps.forEach((c) => {
              const cx = oX + wallPx + ((c.x0 + c.x1) / 2) * scale;
              const cy = oY + wallPx + ((c.y0 + c.y1) / 2) * scale;
              const t = c.config?.temperatura_setpoint;
              const color = rcColorForTemp(t);
              const cxPx = oX + wallPx + c.x0 * scale;
              const cyPx = oY + wallPx + c.y0 * scale;
              const cwPx = (c.x1 - c.x0) * scale;
              const chPx = (c.y1 - c.y0) * scale;
              // Single chamber: lighter overlay (don't dominate the planta)
              const opacity = isSingle ? 0.35 : 0.55;
              svg += `<rect x="${cxPx}" y="${cyPx}" width="${cwPx}" height="${chPx}" fill="${color}" fill-opacity="${opacity}" stroke="none" pointer-events="none"/>`;
              const compLabel = isSingle ? "🏠 Câmara inteira" : c.name;
              const labelSize = isSingle ? 13 : 11;
              svg += `<text x="${cx}" y="${cy - 8}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="${labelSize}" font-weight="700" fill="#1e293b" pointer-events="none">${compLabel}</text>`;
              const tempLabel = t != null ? `${t}°C` : "— °C";
              svg += `<text x="${cx}" y="${cy + 4}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b" pointer-events="none" font-weight="600">${tempLabel}</text>`;
              svg += `<text x="${cx}" y="${cy + 16}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#475569" pointer-events="none">${c.w}×${c.h}m</text>`;

              // Luminárias: symbolic dots distributed in grid pattern
              if (!opts.hideLuminarias) {
                const cf = c.config || {};
                const rec = rcRecommendLuminarias(
                  c,
                  cf.categoria_produto,
                  cf.temperatura_setpoint,
                );
                const lumQtd =
                  cf.qtd_luminarias != null ? cf.qtd_luminarias : null;
                const showQtd = lumQtd != null ? lumQtd : rec.recommended;
                const isPlaceholder = lumQtd == null;
                const eval_ = rcEvaluateLuminarias(lumQtd, rec);
                const lumColor = isPlaceholder
                  ? "#cbd5e1"
                  : eval_.icon === "🔴"
                    ? "#ef4444"
                    : eval_.icon === "⚠️"
                      ? "#f97316"
                      : "#fbbf24";
                if (showQtd > 0 && showQtd <= 20) {
                  // Best-fit grid for showQtd dots inside compartment, avoid label center
                  const aspect = (c.x1 - c.x0) / Math.max(0.1, c.y1 - c.y0);
                  let cols = Math.max(
                    1,
                    Math.round(Math.sqrt(showQtd * aspect)),
                  );
                  let rows = Math.ceil(showQtd / cols);
                  while (cols * rows < showQtd) cols++;
                  const stepX = (c.x1 - c.x0) / (cols + 1);
                  const stepY = (c.y1 - c.y0) / (rows + 1);
                  let placed = 0;
                  for (let ry = 1; ry <= rows && placed < showQtd; ry++) {
                    for (let rx = 1; rx <= cols && placed < showQtd; rx++) {
                      const px = oX + wallPx + (c.x0 + rx * stepX) * scale;
                      const py = oY + wallPx + (c.y0 + ry * stepY) * scale;
                      const r = Math.min(7, Math.max(3, scale * 0.06));
                      svg += `<g pointer-events="none" opacity="${isPlaceholder ? 0.55 : 0.95}">
                        <circle cx="${px}" cy="${py}" r="${r}" fill="${lumColor}" stroke="#92400e" stroke-width="0.8"/>
                        <line x1="${px}" y1="${py - r}" x2="${px}" y2="${py + r}" stroke="#92400e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
                        <line x1="${px - r}" y1="${py}" x2="${px + r}" y2="${py}" stroke="#92400e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
                      </g>`;
                      placed++;
                    }
                  }
                  // Count badge
                  const bx = oX + wallPx + c.x1 * scale - 14;
                  const by = oY + wallPx + c.y0 * scale + 14;
                  svg += `<g pointer-events="none">
                    <rect x="${bx - 10}" y="${by - 8}" width="22" height="14" rx="3" fill="${lumColor}" stroke="#92400e" stroke-width="0.5"/>
                    <text x="${bx + 1}" y="${by + 2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="#1f2937">💡${showQtd}</text>
                  </g>`;
                }
              }
            });
          }
        }

        // ---- Estantes na planta baixa (sutil, por compartimento) ----
        // Cada estante é mostrada como um retângulo delgado encostado nas paredes
        // escolhidas pelo usuário (campo `encosto` — multi-seleção + ilha v/h).
        // Sem estantes (qtd<=0 ou tipo vazio) ⇒ nada é desenhado.
        const _estComps =
          typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function"
            ? rcComputeCompartments(snap)
            : [];
        if (Array.isArray(_estComps) && _estComps.length > 0) {
          const s4 = (formData && formData.step4) || {};
          const estPC =
            s4.estantes_por_comp && typeof s4.estantes_por_comp === "object"
              ? s4.estantes_por_comp
              : {};
          // Prefer snapshot portas (already in {largMm, posPct} format and may include
          // a draft porta from a modal preview); fallback to form data.
          const allPortas = Array.isArray(snap.portas)
            ? snap.portas
            : s4.portas || [];
          _estComps.forEach((c) => {
            const est = estPC[c.name] || {};
            const grupos = Array.isArray(est.grupos) ? est.grupos : [];
            const totalQtd =
              grupos.length > 0
                ? _grupoTotalQtd(est)
                : parseInt(est.quantidade) || 0;
            if (!est.tipo) return;
            const layout = parseEncostoLayout(est.encosto);
            const sides = layout.sides || [];
            if (grupos.length === 0) {
              if (totalQtd <= 0) return;
              if (sides.length === 0 && !layout.ilha) return; // sem layout
            } else if (totalQtd <= 0) {
              return;
            }
            // Profundidade da estante (mm) extraída do tipo (ex.: "P: 500")
            let profMm = 500;
            const m = String(est.tipo).match(/P:\s*(\d+)/i);
            if (m) profMm = parseInt(m[1]) || 500;
            const profM = profMm / 1000;
            const fill = "#a16207",
              stroke = "#78350f";
            const compPx = {
              x: oX + wallPx + c.x0 * scale,
              y: oY + wallPx + c.y0 * scale,
              w: c.w * scale,
              h: c.h * scale,
            };
            const profPx = profM * scale;

            // Calcular ranges de portas (em coordenadas locais do compartimento, em metros)
            // por cada parede — para evitar sobreposição
            const compPortas = allPortas.filter(
              (p) => p.compartimento_id === c.name,
            );
            const doorRanges = { top: [], bottom: [], left: [], right: [] };
            compPortas.forEach((p) => {
              const w = String(p.parede || "").toLowerCase();
              // Aceita formato snapshot (largMm/posPct) ou form (largura/posicao_pct)
              const largMmRaw = p.largMm != null ? p.largMm : p.largura;
              const pctRaw = p.posPct != null ? p.posPct : p.posicao_pct;
              const largM = (parseFloat(largMmRaw) || 0) / 1000;
              if (largM <= 0) return;
              const pct =
                Math.max(0, Math.min(100, parseFloat(pctRaw) || 50)) / 100;
              let side = null;
              if (w.includes("frontal") || w.includes("norte")) side = "top";
              else if (w.includes("posterior") || w.includes("sul"))
                side = "bottom";
              else if (w.includes("esquerda") || w.includes("oeste"))
                side = "left";
              else if (w.includes("direita") || w.includes("leste"))
                side = "right";
              if (!side) return;
              const segLen = side === "top" || side === "bottom" ? c.w : c.h;
              const center = pct * segLen;
              const half = largM / 2;
              const margin = 0.1; // 10cm de folga ao redor da porta
              const lo = Math.max(0, center - half - margin);
              const hi = Math.min(segLen, center + half + margin);
              doorRanges[side].push([lo, hi]);
            });

            // Helper: gera segmentos livres (sem sobreposição com portas) no eixo escolhido
            const buildSegments = (totalLen, doors) => {
              const sorted = (doors || []).slice().sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);
              const segs = [];
              let cur = 0;
              sorted.forEach(([lo, hi]) => {
                if (lo > cur + 0.05) segs.push([cur, lo]);
                cur = Math.max(cur, hi);
              });
              if (totalLen - cur > 0.05) segs.push([cur, totalLen]);
              return segs;
            };
            const drawShelvesAlongWall = (side, count, subRangeM) => {
              if (count <= 0) return;
              const isHor = side === "top" || side === "bottom";
              const totalLen = isHor ? c.w : c.h;
              // Sub-range (em metros) onde as estantes devem ser desenhadas (fração+alinhamento)
              const sr =
                Array.isArray(subRangeM) && subRangeM.length === 2
                  ? [
                      Math.max(0, subRangeM[0]),
                      Math.min(totalLen, subRangeM[1]),
                    ]
                  : [0, totalLen];
              if (sr[1] - sr[0] <= 0.05) return;
              // Clipa segmentos livres ao sub-range
              const segsAll = buildSegments(totalLen, doorRanges[side]);
              const segs = segsAll
                .map(([a, b]) => [Math.max(a, sr[0]), Math.min(b, sr[1])])
                .filter(([a, b]) => b - a > 0.05);
              if (segs.length === 0) return;
              // Distribuir 'count' estantes nos segmentos proporcionalmente ao comprimento livre
              const totalFree = segs.reduce((s, [a, b]) => s + (b - a), 0);
              if (totalFree <= 0.05) return;
              segs.forEach(([a, b]) => {
                const segLen = b - a;
                const segCount = Math.round((segLen / totalFree) * count);
                if (segCount <= 0) return;
                const each = segLen / segCount;
                for (let i = 0; i < segCount; i++) {
                  const localCenter = a + each * (i + 0.5);
                  let rx, ry, rw, rh;
                  if (isHor) {
                    const sx = compPx.x + (localCenter - each / 2) * scale + 1;
                    const sw = Math.max(4, each * scale - 2);
                    if (side === "top") {
                      rx = sx;
                      ry = compPx.y + 1;
                      rw = sw;
                      rh = profPx;
                    } else {
                      rx = sx;
                      ry = compPx.y + compPx.h - profPx - 1;
                      rw = sw;
                      rh = profPx;
                    }
                  } else {
                    const sy = compPx.y + (localCenter - each / 2) * scale + 1;
                    const sh = Math.max(4, each * scale - 2);
                    if (side === "left") {
                      rx = compPx.x + 1;
                      ry = sy;
                      rw = profPx;
                      rh = sh;
                    } else {
                      rx = compPx.x + compPx.w - profPx - 1;
                      ry = sy;
                      rw = profPx;
                      rh = sh;
                    }
                  }
                  if (rw > 1 && rh > 1) {
                    svg += `<rect x="${rx.toFixed(2)}" y="${ry.toFixed(2)}" width="${rw.toFixed(2)}" height="${rh.toFixed(2)}" fill="${fill}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.45" rx="0.5"><title>${svgEsc(c.name)} · ${count} estante(s) — ${svgEsc(encostoLabelPt(layout))}</title></rect>`;
                  }
                }
              });
            };

            // Helper para ilha (range em metros sobre o eixo da ilha)
            const drawIlha = (orient, count, subRangeM) => {
              if (count <= 0) return;
              const isV = orient === "v";
              const totalLen = isV ? c.h : c.w;
              const sr =
                Array.isArray(subRangeM) && subRangeM.length === 2
                  ? [
                      Math.max(0, subRangeM[0]),
                      Math.min(totalLen, subRangeM[1]),
                    ]
                  : [0, totalLen];
              const segLen = sr[1] - sr[0];
              if (segLen <= 0.05) return;
              const each = segLen / count;
              for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                if (isV) {
                  const cx = compPx.x + compPx.w / 2;
                  const ry = compPx.y + (sr[0] + each * i) * scale + 1;
                  const rh = Math.max(4, each * scale - 2);
                  svg += `<rect x="${(cx - profPx / 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${ry.toFixed(2)}" width="${profPx.toFixed(2)}" height="${rh.toFixed(2)}" fill="${fill}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.45" rx="0.5"><title>${svgEsc(c.name)} · Ilha vertical — ${svgEsc(encostoLabelPt(layout))}</title></rect>`;
                } else {
                  const cy = compPx.y + compPx.h / 2;
                  const rx = compPx.x + (sr[0] + each * i) * scale + 1;
                  const rw = Math.max(4, each * scale - 2);
                  svg += `<rect x="${rx.toFixed(2)}" y="${(cy - profPx / 2).toFixed(2)}" width="${rw.toFixed(2)}" height="${profPx.toFixed(2)}" fill="${fill}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.45" rx="0.5"><title>${svgEsc(c.name)} · Ilha horizontal — ${svgEsc(encostoLabelPt(layout))}</title></rect>`;
                }
              }
            };

            if (grupos.length > 0) {
              // Modo novo: cada grupo tem sua parede + fração + alinhamento + qtd
              grupos.forEach((g) => {
                const cnt = parseInt(g.qtd) || 0;
                if (cnt <= 0) return;
                const range = _grupoSegmentRange(c, g);
                if (g.parede === "ilhaV") drawIlha("v", cnt, range);
                else if (g.parede === "ilhaH") drawIlha("h", cnt, range);
                else drawShelvesAlongWall(g.parede, cnt, range);
              });
            } else {
              // Modo legacy (sem grupos): distribui qtd total entre lados/ilha do `encosto`
              const qtd = totalQtd;
              if (sides.length > 0) {
                const n = sides.length + (layout.ilha ? 1 : 0);
                const base = Math.floor(qtd / n);
                const extra = qtd % n;
                sides.forEach((s, idx) => {
                  const cnt = base + (idx < extra ? 1 : 0);
                  drawShelvesAlongWall(s, cnt);
                });
              }
              if (layout.ilha) {
                const cntIlha =
                  sides.length > 0
                    ? Math.floor(qtd / (sides.length + 1)) +
                      (qtd % (sides.length + 1) > sides.length ? 1 : 0)
                    : qtd;
                drawIlha(layout.ilha, cntIlha);
              }
            }
          });
        }

        if (
          opts.showDoor &&
          Array.isArray(snap.portas) &&
          snap.portas.length > 0 &&
          snap.comp > 0
        ) {
          // Resolve compartments once for per-compartment positioning
          const allComps =
            typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function"
              ? rcComputeCompartments(snap)
              : [];
          snap.portas.forEach((porta) => {
            if (!porta.parede || !(porta.largMm > 0)) return;
            const doorWPx = Math.max(8, (porta.largMm / 1000) * scale);
            const pct = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, porta.posPct)) / 100;
            const style =
              typeof _doorStyleFor === "function"
                ? _doorStyleFor(porta.tipo)
                : { color: "#dc2626", icon: "🚪", label: "Porta" };
            const wallId = porta.parede.toLowerCase();
            // Compartment that owns this door (if any) — clamps door to its perimeter segment
            const ownComp = porta.compartimento_id
              ? allComps.find((c) => c.name === porta.compartimento_id)
              : null;
            // Determine the wall's spatial segment in interior coords (m)
            // Horizontal walls (Norte/Sul): segment is along X (compInt)
            // Vertical   walls (Leste/Oeste): segment is along Y (largInt)
            let segMin, segMax, segAxis;
            if (
              wallId.includes("norte") ||
              wallId.includes("frontal") ||
              wallId.includes("sul") ||
              wallId.includes("posterior")
            ) {
              segAxis = "x";
              segMin = ownComp ? ownComp.x0 : 0;
              segMax = ownComp ? ownComp.x1 : snap.compInt || snap.comp || 0;
            } else {
              segAxis = "y";
              segMin = ownComp ? ownComp.y0 : 0;
              segMax = ownComp ? ownComp.y1 : snap.largInt || snap.larg || 0;
            }
            const segLenM = Math.max(0, segMax - segMin);
            // Compute center (in meters) along the segment, clamped so the door fits inside.
            const halfDoorM = porta.largMm / 1000 / 2;
            const centerLocal = pct * segLenM;
            const minCenter = halfDoorM;
            const maxCenter = Math.max(halfDoorM, segLenM - halfDoorM);
            const centerClamped = Math.min(
              maxCenter,
              Math.max(minCenter, centerLocal),
            );
            const centerM = segMin + centerClamped;

            let dx, dy, dw, dh, orient;
            if (wallId.includes("norte") || wallId.includes("frontal")) {
              const cxPx = oX + wallPx + centerM * scale;
              dx = cxPx - doorWPx / 2;
              dy = oY - 2;
              dw = doorWPx;
              dh = wallPx + 4;
              orient = "h";
            } else if (wallId.includes("sul") || wallId.includes("posterior")) {
              const cxPx = oX + wallPx + centerM * scale;
              dx = cxPx - doorWPx / 2;
              dy = oY + rH - wallPx - 2;
              dw = doorWPx;
              dh = wallPx + 4;
              orient = "h";
            } else if (wallId.includes("leste") || wallId.includes("direita")) {
              const cyPx = oY + wallPx + centerM * scale;
              dx = oX + rW - wallPx - 2;
              dy = cyPx - doorWPx / 2;
              dw = wallPx + 4;
              dh = doorWPx;
              orient = "v";
            } else {
              const cyPx = oY + wallPx + centerM * scale;
              dx = oX - 2;
              dy = cyPx - doorWPx / 2;
              dw = wallPx + 4;
              dh = doorWPx;
              orient = "v";
            }
            dx = Math.max(0, dx);
            dy = Math.max(0, dy);
            const compTag = porta.compartimento_id
              ? ` (${svgEsc(porta.compartimento_id)})`
              : "";
            const darken = (hex) => {
              try {
                const m = hex.replace("#", "").match(/.{2}/g);
                if (!m) return hex;
                return (
                  "#" +
                  m
                    .map((h) =>
                      Math.max(0, parseInt(h, 16) - 40)
                        .toString(16)
                        .padStart(2, "0"),
                    )
                    .join("")
                );
              } catch (e) {
                return hex;
              }
            };
            const stroke = darken(style.color);
            const tLower = String(porta.tipo || "").toLowerCase();
            const _isGiraSkipRect = /giratória|giratoria|expositora/.test(
              tLower,
            );
            // Base door rect with type-specific color (omitido para giratória — o tambor já marca o vão)
            if (!_isGiraSkipRect) {
              svg += `<rect x="${dx}" y="${dy}" width="${dw}" height="${dh}" fill="${style.color}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.8" rx="1"><title>${svgEsc(style.label)}${compTag} ${svgEsc(porta.tipo)} ${porta.largMm}×${porta.altMm}mm @ ${porta.posPct}%</title></rect>`;
            }
            // Type-specific decoration
            const t = String(porta.tipo || "").toLowerCase();
            if (t.includes("correr")) {
              // Sliding door: draw arrow indicating slide direction
              if (orient === "h") {
                svg += `<line x1="${dx + 2}" y1="${dy + dh / 2}" x2="${dx + dw - 2}" y2="${dy + dh / 2}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="2,1"/>`;
                svg += `<polygon points="${dx + dw - 4},${dy + dh / 2 - 2} ${dx + dw - 1},${dy + dh / 2} ${dx + dw - 4},${dy + dh / 2 + 2}" fill="#fff"/>`;
              } else {
                svg += `<line x1="${dx + dw / 2}" y1="${dy + 2}" x2="${dx + dw / 2}" y2="${dy + dh - 2}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="2,1"/>`;
              }
            } else if (t.includes("vai e vem") || t.includes("vai-e-vem")) {
              // Bidirectional: dashed border
              svg += `<rect x="${dx}" y="${dy}" width="${dw}" height="${dh}" fill="none" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="3,2" rx="1"/>`;
            } else if (t.includes("expositora")) {
              // Glass: cross hatching
              svg += `<line x1="${dx}" y1="${dy}" x2="${dx + dw}" y2="${dy + dh}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.7"/>`;
              svg += `<line x1="${dx + dw}" y1="${dy}" x2="${dx}" y2="${dy + dh}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.7"/>`;
            } else if (
              t.includes("rápida") ||
              t.includes("rapida") ||
              t.includes("roll")
            ) {
              // Roll-up: horizontal stripes
              const stripes = orient === "h" ? 3 : 4;
              for (let s = 1; s < stripes; s++) {
                const py = dy + (dh / stripes) * s;
                svg += `<line x1="${dx}" y1="${py}" x2="${dx + dw}" y2="${py}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="0.4" opacity="0.6"/>`;
              }
            }
            // Compartment tag near door
            if (porta.compartimento_id) {
              const tx = dx + dw / 2;
              const ty =
                wallId.includes("norte") || wallId.includes("frontal")
                  ? dy - 4
                  : dy + dh + 9;
              svg += `<text x="${tx}" y="${ty}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="${stroke}" font-weight="700">${svgEsc(porta.compartimento_id)}</text>`;
            }

            // ---- Swing/opening area (área de abertura) ----
            // Para portas giratórias/expositoras: arco de 90° (quarto de círculo)
            // Para portas de correr: seta de deslize ao lado mostrando posição aberta
            // Para vai-e-vem: arcos pontilhados nos dois lados
            try {
              const sentido = String(porta.sentido || "").toLowerCase();
              const arcColor = style.color;
              const arcFill = arcColor + "40"; // ~25% opacity (mais visível)
              const arcStroke = stroke;
              const isGira =
                t.includes("giratória") ||
                t.includes("giratoria") ||
                t.includes("expositora");
              const isCorrer = t.includes("correr");
              const isVaiVem =
                t.includes("vai e vem") || t.includes("vai-e-vem");
              if (isGira) {
                // Porta giratória de tambor (revolving door):
                // o centro do tambor fica exatamente no MEIO DA ESPESSURA DA PAREDE,
                // alinhado horizontalmente com o centro do vão.
                // Diâmetro = largura do vão (raio = doorWPx / 2).
                let cx, cy;
                const r = doorWPx / 2;
                if (orient === "h") {
                  // Parede horizontal (Norte/Sul): linha-do-meio é vertical (eixo Y)
                  const wallMidY =
                    wallId.includes("norte") || wallId.includes("frontal")
                      ? oY + wallPx / 2
                      : oY + rH - wallPx / 2;
                  cx = dx + dw / 2; // meio do vão (horizontal)
                  cy = wallMidY; // meio exato da espessura da parede
                } else {
                  // Parede vertical (Leste/Oeste): linha-do-meio é horizontal (eixo X)
                  const wallMidX =
                    wallId.includes("leste") || wallId.includes("direita")
                      ? oX + rW - wallPx / 2
                      : oX + wallPx / 2;
                  cx = wallMidX; // meio exato da espessura da parede
                  cy = dy + dh / 2; // meio do vão (vertical)
                }
                // Vão na parede (limitado à espessura) — destaca o alinhamento com a parede
                if (orient === "h") {
                  const voX = (cx - r).toFixed(2);
                  const voY = (cy - wallPx / 2).toFixed(2);
                  svg += `<rect x="${voX}" y="${voY}" width="${(r * 2).toFixed(2)}" height="${wallPx.toFixed(2)}" fill="${arcFill}" stroke="${arcStroke}" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.55"/>`;
                } else {
                  const voX = (cx - wallPx / 2).toFixed(2);
                  const voY = (cy - r).toFixed(2);
                  svg += `<rect x="${voX}" y="${voY}" width="${wallPx.toFixed(2)}" height="${(r * 2).toFixed(2)}" fill="${arcFill}" stroke="${arcStroke}" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="0.55"/>`;
                }
                // Círculo do tambor (raio = metade da largura, centrado na linha-do-meio da parede)
                svg += `<circle cx="${cx.toFixed(2)}" cy="${cy.toFixed(2)}" r="${r.toFixed(2)}" fill="${arcFill}" stroke="${arcStroke}" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.85"><title>${svgEsc(style.label)}${compTag} ${svgEsc(porta.tipo)} ${porta.largMm}×${porta.altMm}mm @ ${porta.posPct}%</title></circle>`;
                // 3 painéis rotativos a 0°, 120°, 240° (eixo inicial alinhado à parede)
                const angBase = orient === "h" ? 0 : Math.PI / 2;
                for (let k = 0; k < 3; k++) {
                  const a = angBase + (k * 2 * Math.PI) / 3;
                  const ex = cx + r * Math.cos(a);
                  const ey = cy + r * Math.sin(a);
                  svg += `<line x1="${cx.toFixed(2)}" y1="${cy.toFixed(2)}" x2="${ex.toFixed(2)}" y2="${ey.toFixed(2)}" stroke="${arcStroke}" stroke-width="1.6"/>`;
                }
                // Hub central (eixo de rotação)
                svg += `<circle cx="${cx.toFixed(2)}" cy="${cy.toFixed(2)}" r="2.4" fill="#fff" stroke="${arcStroke}" stroke-width="1.4"/>`;
              } else if (isCorrer) {
                // Slide direction: shadow rectangle next to door showing open position
                const slideEsq = /esquerda/.test(sentido);
                const slideDir = /direita/.test(sentido);
                if (orient === "h") {
                  const ox = slideDir ? dx + dw : dx - dw;
                  svg += `<rect x="${ox.toFixed(2)}" y="${dy.toFixed(2)}" width="${dw.toFixed(2)}" height="${dh.toFixed(2)}" fill="${arcFill}" stroke="${arcStroke}" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2" opacity="0.7"/>`;
                  // Arrow indicating direction
                  const arrowY = dy + dh / 2;
                  const arrowX1 = slideDir ? dx + dw + 2 : dx - 2;
                  const arrowX2 = slideDir ? ox + dw - 2 : ox + 2;
                  svg += `<line x1="${arrowX1.toFixed(2)}" y1="${arrowY.toFixed(2)}" x2="${arrowX2.toFixed(2)}" y2="${arrowY.toFixed(2)}" stroke="${arcStroke}" stroke-width="1"/>`;
                } else if (orient === "v") {
                  const oy = slideDir ? dy + dh : dy - dh;
                  svg += `<rect x="${dx.toFixed(2)}" y="${oy.toFixed(2)}" width="${dw.toFixed(2)}" height="${dh.toFixed(2)}" fill="${arcFill}" stroke="${arcStroke}" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2" opacity="0.7"/>`;
                }
              } else if (isVaiVem) {
                // Both sides: dashed arcs on both inner and outer wall faces
                const r = doorWPx;
                if (orient === "h") {
                  const cx = dx + dw / 2;
                  const isNorte =
                    wallId.includes("norte") || wallId.includes("frontal");
                  const outerY = isNorte ? dy : dy + dh;
                  const innerY = isNorte ? dy + dh : dy;
                  const outerDir = isNorte ? -1 : 1;
                  // Outer half-arc
                  svg += `<path d="M ${(cx - dw / 2).toFixed(2)} ${outerY.toFixed(2)} A ${(r / 2).toFixed(2)} ${(r / 2).toFixed(2)} 0 0 ${isNorte ? 1 : 0} ${(cx + dw / 2).toFixed(2)} ${outerY.toFixed(2)}" fill="none" stroke="${arcStroke}" stroke-width="0.6" stroke-dasharray="2,2" opacity="0.7"/>`;
                  svg += `<path d="M ${(cx - dw / 2).toFixed(2)} ${innerY.toFixed(2)} A ${(r / 2).toFixed(2)} ${(r / 2).toFixed(2)} 0 0 ${isNorte ? 0 : 1} ${(cx + dw / 2).toFixed(2)} ${innerY.toFixed(2)}" fill="none" stroke="${arcStroke}" stroke-width="0.6" stroke-dasharray="2,2" opacity="0.7"/>`;
                }
              }
            } catch (e) {
              /* skip swing arc on geometry errors */
            }
          });
        }

        if (snap.comp <= 0 || snap.larg <= 0) {
          svg += `<text x="${W / 2}" y="${H / 2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8" font-style="italic">Preencha comprimento e largura</text>`;
        }
        svg += `</svg>`;
        return svg;
      }

      function buildChamberCorteSVG(snap, opts) {
        opts = opts || {};
        const W = opts.width || 320;
        const H = opts.height || 240;
        const margin = 30;
        const comp = snap.comp || 4;
        const alt = snap.alt || 3;
        const espM = snap.espM || 0.1;
        const scale = Math.min((W - 2 * margin) / comp, (H - 2 * margin) / alt);
        const rW = comp * scale;
        const rH = alt * scale;
        const oX = (W - rW) / 2;
        const oY = (H - rH) / 2;
        const wallPx = Math.max(3, espM * scale);

        let svg = `<svg viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="img" aria-label="Corte lateral">`;
        svg += `<rect x="0" y="0" width="${W}" height="${H}" fill="#f8fafc"/>`;
        svg += `<line x1="${oX - 12}" y1="${oY + rH}" x2="${oX + rW + 12}" y2="${oY + rH}" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="1.5"/>`;
        svg += `<line x1="${oX - 12}" y1="${oY + rH + 3}" x2="${oX + rW + 12}" y2="${oY + rH + 3}" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="0.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>`;
        svg += `<rect x="${oX}" y="${oY}" width="${rW}" height="${rH}" fill="#cbd5e1" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="1.5" rx="2"/>`;
        svg += `<rect x="${oX + wallPx}" y="${oY + wallPx}" width="${Math.max(0, rW - 2 * wallPx)}" height="${Math.max(0, rH - wallPx)}" fill="#e0f2fe" stroke="#0ea5e9" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="2,2"/>`;

        // ---- Divisórias no corte lateral ----
        // Eixo "vertical" (corta o comprimento) → aparece como parede vertical de chão ao teto.
        // Eixo "horizontal" (corta a largura, perpendicular ao plano de visão) → renderizada como
        //   marca leve de chão ao teto + etiqueta "atrás" (a divisória está em outra profundidade).
        if (snap.divisorias && snap.divisorias.length && snap.compInt > 0) {
          const interiorX0 = oX + wallPx;
          const interiorY0 = oY + wallPx;
          const interiorH = rH - wallPx;
          snap.divisorias.forEach((d, idx) => {
            const eixo = d.eixo || "vertical";
            const espMm2 = (parseFloat(d.espessura_mm) || 50) / 1000;
            const espPx = Math.max(2, espMm2 * scale);
            const nome = svgEsc(d.nome || "D" + (idx + 1));
            const tempLabel =
              d.temperatura !== undefined &&
              d.temperatura !== "" &&
              !isNaN(d.temperatura)
                ? `${d.temperatura}°C`
                : "";
            if (eixo === "vertical") {
              const posM = parseFloat(d.posicao_m) || 0;
              const x = interiorX0 + Math.min(rW - 2 * wallPx, posM * scale);
              svg += `<rect x="${x - espPx / 2}" y="${interiorY0}" width="${espPx}" height="${interiorH}" fill="#94a3b8" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="0.5"><title>${nome} · vertical · ${posM.toFixed(2)}m</title></rect>`;
              // Top label
              svg += `<text x="${x}" y="${interiorY0 + 11}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#1e293b" font-weight="700">${nome}</text>`;
              if (tempLabel)
                svg += `<text x="${x}" y="${interiorY0 + 22}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#475569" font-weight="600">${tempLabel}</text>`;
            } else {
              // Horizontal divisória: perpendicular à vista — desenhar marca leve cobrindo toda a largura
              // com hachuras diagonais para indicar "passa atrás".
              const stripeId = `divHHatch_${idx}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)}`;
              svg += `<defs><pattern id="${stripeId}" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse" width="6" height="6" patternTransform="rotate(45)"><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="6" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.2"/></pattern></defs>`;
              svg += `<rect x="${interiorX0}" y="${interiorY0}" width="${Math.max(0, rW - 2 * wallPx)}" height="${interiorH}" fill="url(#${stripeId})" opacity="0.25" pointer-events="none"/>`;
              svg += `<g pointer-events="none">
                <rect x="${interiorX0 + 4}" y="${interiorY0 + 4}" width="80" height="14" rx="3" fill="#fff" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.95"/>
                <text x="${interiorX0 + 8}" y="${interiorY0 + 14}" font-size="8" fill="#475569" font-weight="600">⤴ ${nome} (atrás)</text>
              </g>`;
            }
          });
        }

        // ---- Estantes por compartimento (corte lateral) ----
        // Cada compartimento desenha apenas as suas estantes, dentro do seu trecho
        // do eixo comprimento (x). Compartimentos perpendiculares (eixo y, "atrás")
        // não aparecem aqui — renderizamos somente os que tocam a faixa x.
        if (snap.altInt > 0 && snap.compInt > 0) {
          const s4 = (formData && formData.step4) || {};
          const estPC =
            s4.estantes_por_comp && typeof s4.estantes_por_comp === "object"
              ? s4.estantes_por_comp
              : {};
          let comps = [];
          try {
            comps =
              typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function"
                ? rcComputeCompartments(snap)
                : [];
          } catch (e) {
            comps = [];
          }
          if (comps.length === 0)
            comps = [
              {
                name: "C1",
                x0: 0,
                x1: snap.compInt,
                y0: 0,
                y1: snap.largInt,
                w: snap.compInt,
                h: snap.largInt,
              },
            ];
          const interiorX0 = oX + wallPx;
          const interiorY0 = oY + wallPx;
          const interiorH = rH - wallPx;
          // Group compartments by their x-range so multiple comps stacked along Y still render
          const seenRanges = [];
          comps.forEach((c) => {
            const est = estPC[c.name] || {};
            // Support new grupos[] format AND legacy quantidade/encosto.
            // When the user used grupos, est.quantidade may be 0 even though
            // there are shelves — sum the group totals so the corte view
            // still draws something.
            const grupos = Array.isArray(est.grupos) ? est.grupos : [];
            const qtdLegacy = parseInt(est.quantidade) || 0;
            const qtdGroups = grupos.reduce(
              (s, g) => s + (parseInt(g.qtd) || 0),
              0,
            );
