            const qtd = qtdGroups > 0 ? qtdGroups : qtdLegacy;
            // niveis may not be set when only grupos[] is filled — default to
            // 4 (typical commercial estante) so the cross-section still
            // illustrates the shelf footprint instead of showing nothing.
            const niveis = parseInt(est.niveis) || (qtd > 0 ? 4 : 0);
            if (qtd <= 0 || niveis <= 0 || !est.tipo) return;
            // Build effective layout from grupos[] when present (union of
            // walls used across groups), falling back to the legacy
            // `encosto` string when there are no groups.
            let layout;
            if (grupos.length > 0) {
              const sidesSet = new Set();
              let ilha = null;
              grupos.forEach((g) => {
                if (g.parede === "ilhaV") ilha = "v";
                else if (g.parede === "ilhaH") ilha = "h";
                else if (g.parede) sidesSet.add(g.parede);
              });
              layout = { sides: Array.from(sidesSet), ilha };
            } else {
              layout = parseEncostoLayout(est.encosto);
            }
            const sides = layout.sides || [];
            if (sides.length === 0 && !layout.ilha) return;
            const rangeKey = `${c.x0.toFixed(2)}_${c.x1.toFixed(2)}`;
            // For corte lateral: when two comps share x-range (divided by horizontal divisória),
            // render them slightly offset; otherwise stack within their x-range.
            const seenIdx = seenRanges.findIndex((r) => r.key === rangeKey);
            const offset = seenIdx >= 0 ? seenRanges[seenIdx].count : 0;
            if (seenIdx >= 0) seenRanges[seenIdx].count++;
            else seenRanges.push({ key: rangeKey, count: 1 });

            const compXStart = interiorX0 + Math.max(0, c.x0) * scale;
            const compXEnd = interiorX0 + Math.min(snap.compInt, c.x1) * scale;
            const compW = Math.max(0, compXEnd - compXStart);
            if (compW <= 0) return;

            const shelfHm = snap.altInt / (niveis + 1);
            const shelfHpx = shelfHm * scale;
            const stackQtd = Math.min(qtd, 6);
            // Color hint per compartment temperature
            const t = c.config?.temperatura_setpoint;
            const compColor =
              typeof rcColorForTemp === "function"
                ? rcColorForTemp(t)
                : "#a16207";
            const woodColor = "#a16207",
              woodStroke = "#78350f";

            // Posições no corte:
            //   top/bottom (paredes frontal/posterior) → dispersam ao longo de x
            //   left/right (laterais) → colunas nas bordas com badge ×N
            //   ilha 'h' → linha horizontal (dispersa em x)
            //   ilha 'v' → 1 coluna central com badge
            const positions = []; // [{xCenter, w, sideTag, badge?}]
            const colW = Math.max(14, Math.min(50, compW * 0.18));
            const totalSlots = sides.length + (layout.ilha ? 1 : 0);
            const baseQ = Math.floor(qtd / totalSlots);
            const extraQ = qtd % totalSlots;
            const cntForSlot = (idx) => baseQ + (idx < extraQ ? 1 : 0);

            // Laterais
            const lateralSides = sides.filter(
              (s) => s === "left" || s === "right",
            );
            lateralSides.forEach((s) => {
              const idx = sides.indexOf(s);
              const cnt = cntForSlot(idx);
              if (cnt <= 0) return;
              const x =
                s === "left"
                  ? compXStart + colW / 2 + 2
                  : compXEnd - colW / 2 - 2;
              positions.push({ xCenter: x, w: colW, sideTag: s, badge: cnt });
            });
            // Top/Bottom dispersos
            const dispersedSides = sides.filter(
              (s) => s === "top" || s === "bottom",
            );
            dispersedSides.forEach((s) => {
              const idx = sides.indexOf(s);
              const cnt = Math.min(cntForSlot(idx), stackQtd);
              if (cnt <= 0) return;
              const stackW = Math.max(14, Math.min(60, compW / (cnt + 1)));
              for (let k = 0; k < cnt; k++) {
                positions.push({
                  xCenter: compXStart + (compW / (cnt + 1)) * (k + 1),
                  w: stackW,
                  sideTag: s,
                });
              }
            });
            // Ilha
            if (layout.ilha) {
              const idx = sides.length;
              const cntIlha = cntForSlot(idx);
              if (cntIlha > 0) {
                if (layout.ilha === "v") {
                  positions.push({
                    xCenter: (compXStart + compXEnd) / 2,
                    w: colW,
                    sideTag: "ilhaV",
                    badge: cntIlha,
                  });
                } else {
                  // ilha horizontal — dispersa em x
                  const cnt = Math.min(cntIlha, stackQtd);
                  const stackW = Math.max(14, Math.min(60, compW / (cnt + 1)));
                  for (let k = 0; k < cnt; k++) {
                    positions.push({
                      xCenter: compXStart + (compW / (cnt + 1)) * (k + 1),
                      w: stackW,
                      sideTag: "ilhaH",
                    });
                  }
                }
              }
            }

            const encLabel = encostoLabelPt(layout);
            positions.forEach((pos) => {
              const sx = pos.xCenter - pos.w / 2;
              const sw = pos.w;
              for (let n = 0; n < niveis; n++) {
                const sy = interiorY0 + interiorH - shelfHpx * (n + 1);
                svg += `<rect x="${sx}" y="${sy}" width="${sw}" height="2.5" fill="${woodColor}" stroke="${woodStroke}" stroke-width="0.3"><title>${svgEsc(c.name)} · ${niveis} níveis × ${qtd} estante(s) — ${svgEsc(encLabel)}</title></rect>`;
              }
              svg += `<line x1="${sx}" y1="${interiorY0 + interiorH}" x2="${sx}" y2="${interiorY0 + interiorH - shelfHpx * niveis}" stroke="${woodStroke}" stroke-width="0.6"/>`;
              svg += `<line x1="${sx + sw}" y1="${interiorY0 + interiorH}" x2="${sx + sw}" y2="${interiorY0 + interiorH - shelfHpx * niveis}" stroke="${woodStroke}" stroke-width="0.6"/>`;
              // Badge ×N para colunas laterais/ilha que representam várias estantes empilhadas
              if (pos.badge && pos.badge > 1) {
                const tagX = pos.xCenter;
                const tagY = interiorY0 + interiorH - shelfHpx * niveis - 6;
                svg += `<g pointer-events="none">
                  <rect x="${tagX - 9}" y="${tagY - 7}" width="18" height="11" rx="2" fill="${woodColor}" opacity="0.9"/>
                  <text x="${tagX}" y="${tagY + 1}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" font-weight="700" fill="#fff">×${pos.badge}</text>
                </g>`;
              }
            });
            // Compartment label above shelves
            const isSingle = comps.length === 1;
            if (!isSingle) {
              const lblX = (compXStart + compXEnd) / 2;
              const lblY = interiorY0 + 12;
              svg += `<g pointer-events="none">
                <rect x="${lblX - 18}" y="${lblY - 9}" width="36" height="13" rx="3" fill="${compColor}" opacity="0.9"/>
                <text x="${lblX}" y="${lblY + 1}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="#1f2937">${svgEsc(c.name)}</text>
              </g>`;
            }
          });
        }

        if (snap.alt > 0)
          svg += `<text x="${oX - 14}" y="${H / 2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#475569" font-weight="600" transform="rotate(-90, ${oX - 14}, ${H / 2})">↕ ${snap.alt.toFixed(2)}m</text>`;
        if (snap.comp > 0)
          svg += `<text x="${W / 2}" y="${oY + rH + 18}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#475569" font-weight="600">${snap.comp.toFixed(2)}m</text>`;

        if (opts.showDoor && snap.alt > 0 && snap.compInt > 0) {
          // Render every door from the multi-door array. The corte is a
          // side view along the comprimento axis, so:
          //  - Doors on Frontal/Posterior (Norte/Sul) walls are positioned
          //    along the comprimento (X) and shown as the actual opening.
          //  - Doors on Esquerda/Direita walls are perpendicular to the
          //    view; we still draw a subtle marker on the corresponding
          //    edge (left/right) so the user knows there's a door there.
          let portasArr =
            Array.isArray(snap.portas) && snap.portas.length > 0
              ? snap.portas
              : snap.porta && snap.porta.altMm > 0
                ? [snap.porta]
                : [];
          // Resolve compartments for clamping door X position to its
          // owning compartment segment (avoids rendering a door over a
          // divisória wall).
          let comps = [];
          try {
            comps =
              typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function"
                ? rcComputeCompartments(snap)
                : [];
          } catch (e) {
            comps = [];
          }
          portasArr.forEach((p) => {
            const altMm = parseFloat(p.altMm) || 0;
            const largMm = parseFloat(p.largMm) || 0;
            if (!(altMm > 0)) return;
            const wallId = String(p.parede || "").toLowerCase();
            const ownComp = p.compartimento_id
              ? comps.find((cp) => cp.name === p.compartimento_id)
              : null;
            const doorHpx = (altMm / 1000) * scale;
            const doorWpx = Math.max(8, (largMm / 1000) * scale || 20);
            // FRONTAL / POSTERIOR — visible along the X axis
            if (
              wallId.includes("frontal") ||
              wallId.includes("norte") ||
              wallId.includes("posterior") ||
              wallId.includes("sul") ||
              !wallId
            ) {
              const segMin = ownComp ? ownComp.x0 : 0;
              const segMax = ownComp ? ownComp.x1 : snap.compInt;
              const segLen = Math.max(0, segMax - segMin);
              const pct =
                Math.max(0, Math.min(100, parseFloat(p.posPct) || 50)) / 100;
              const half = largMm / 1000 / 2;
              const centerLocal = Math.min(
                Math.max(half, pct * segLen),
                Math.max(half, segLen - half),
              );
              const cxPx = oX + wallPx + (segMin + centerLocal) * scale;
              const dx = cxPx - doorWpx / 2;
              const dy = oY + rH - doorHpx;
              svg += `<rect x="${dx.toFixed(2)}" y="${dy.toFixed(2)}" width="${doorWpx.toFixed(2)}" height="${doorHpx.toFixed(2)}" fill="rgba(220,38,38,0.06)" stroke="#dc2626" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-dasharray="3,2"><title>${svgEsc(p.tipo || "Porta")} ${largMm}×${altMm}mm</title></rect>`;
              svg += `<text x="${(dx + doorWpx / 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${(dy - 3).toFixed(2)}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#dc2626" font-weight="600">${altMm}mm</text>`;
            } else if (
              wallId.includes("esquerda") ||
              wallId.includes("oeste") ||
              wallId.includes("direita") ||
              wallId.includes("leste")
            ) {
              // Perpendicular wall — small marker on the corresponding edge
              const onLeft =
                wallId.includes("esquerda") || wallId.includes("oeste");
              const dx = onLeft ? oX + 1 : oX + rW - 5;
              const dy = oY + rH - doorHpx;
              svg += `<rect x="${dx.toFixed(2)}" y="${dy.toFixed(2)}" width="4" height="${doorHpx.toFixed(2)}" fill="#dc2626" opacity="0.55"><title>${svgEsc(p.tipo || "Porta")} (parede ${onLeft ? "esquerda" : "direita"}) ${largMm}×${altMm}mm</title></rect>`;
            }
          });
        }
        if (snap.comp <= 0 || snap.alt <= 0) {
          svg += `<text x="${W / 2}" y="${H / 2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8" font-style="italic">Preencha comprimento e altura</text>`;
        }
        svg += `</svg>`;
        return svg;
      }

      // Build raw SVG strings for planta and corte from a form_data object.
      // Used by the live mini-review, the printable export and any future
      // viewer that needs both drawings without the wrapper markup.
      function buildSubmissionSVGs(fd, opts) {
        opts = opts || {};
        fd = fd || formData;
        const s3 = fd.step3 || {};
        const s4 = fd.step4 || {};
        const comp = parseFloat(s3.comprimento) || 0;
        const larg = parseFloat(s3.largura) || 0;
        const alt = parseFloat(s3.altura) || 0;
        const espMm = parseFloat(s3.espessura_painel) || 100;
        if (!comp || !larg) return { planta: "", corte: "" };
        let divisorias = [];
        try {
          if (typeof s3.divisorias === "string")
            divisorias = JSON.parse(s3.divisorias || "[]");
          else if (Array.isArray(s3.divisorias)) divisorias = s3.divisorias;
        } catch (e) {
          divisorias = [];
        }
        let portas = [];
        if (Array.isArray(s4.portas) && s4.portas.length > 0) {
          portas = s4.portas.map((p) => ({
            compartimento_id: p.compartimento_id || "",
            tipo: p.tipo || "",
            largMm: parseFloat(p.largura) || 0,
            altMm: parseFloat(p.altura) || 0,
            parede: p.parede || "",
            posPct: parseFloat(p.posicao_pct) || 50,
            sentido: p.sentido_abertura || "",
            acessorios: p.acessorios || "",
          }));
        } else if (s4.porta_tipo || s4.porta_largura) {
          portas = [
            {
              compartimento_id: "C1",
              tipo: s4.porta_tipo || "",
              largMm: parseFloat(s4.porta_largura) || 0,
              altMm: parseFloat(s4.porta_altura) || 0,
              parede: s4.porta_parede || "",
              posPct: parseFloat(s4.porta_posicao_pct) || 50,
            },
          ];
        }
        const _origStep4 = formData.step4;
        const isActive = fd === formData;
        if (!isActive) {
          formData.step4 = Object.assign({}, _origStep4 || {}, {
            estantes_por_comp:
              s4.estantes_por_comp && typeof s4.estantes_por_comp === "object"
                ? s4.estantes_por_comp
                : {},
            portas: s4.portas || [],
          });
        }
        const tempSnap = {
          comp,
          larg,
          alt,
          espMm,
          espM: espMm / 1000,
          compInt: Math.max(0, comp - (2 * espMm) / 1000),
          largInt: Math.max(0, larg - (2 * espMm) / 1000),
          altInt: Math.max(0, alt - espMm / 1000),
          divisorias,
          portas,
          porta: Object.assign(
            { qtd: portas.length },
            portas[0] || {
              tipo: "",
              largMm: 0,
              altMm: 0,
              parede: "",
              posPct: 50,
              sentido: "",
            },
          ),
          estante: {
            qtd: parseInt(s4.estante_quantidade) || 0,
            niveis: parseInt(s4.estante_niveis) || 0,
            tipo: s4.estante_tipo || "",
          },
        };
        let planta = "",
          corte = "";
        try {
          planta = buildChamberPlantaSVG(tempSnap, {
            width: opts.width || 240,
            height: opts.height || 180,
            showDoor: opts.showDoor !== false,
          });
          corte = buildChamberCorteSVG(tempSnap, {
            width: opts.width || 240,
            height: opts.height || 180,
            showDoor: opts.showDoor !== false,
          });
        } finally {
          if (!isActive) formData.step4 = _origStep4;
        }
        return { planta, corte, portasCount: portas.length, divisorias };
      }

      function buildMiniReviewSVG(fd) {
        fd = fd || formData;
        const s3 = fd.step3 || {};
        const s4 = fd.step4 || {};
        const comp = parseFloat(s3.comprimento) || 0;
        const larg = parseFloat(s3.largura) || 0;
        const alt = parseFloat(s3.altura) || 0;
        const espMm = parseFloat(s3.espessura_painel) || 100;
        if (!comp || !larg) return "";
        const { planta, corte, portasCount, divisorias } = buildSubmissionSVGs(
          fd,
          { width: 240, height: 180, showDoor: true },
        );
        const doorCount = portasCount || 0;
        // Total shelf count across compartments (new grupos[] aware)
        let shelfCount = 0;
        const estPC =
          s4.estantes_por_comp && typeof s4.estantes_por_comp === "object"
            ? s4.estantes_por_comp
            : {};
        Object.values(estPC).forEach((e) => {
          if (Array.isArray(e?.grupos) && e.grupos.length) {
            e.grupos.forEach((g) => {
              shelfCount += parseInt(g.qtd) || 0;
            });
          } else {
            shelfCount += parseInt(e?.quantidade) || 0;
          }
        });
        if (shelfCount === 0) shelfCount = parseInt(s4.estante_quantidade) || 0;
        return `
          <div class="mini-review-svg">
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;align-items:start;">
              <div>${planta}<div class="svg-caption">Planta Baixa</div></div>
              <div>${corte}<div class="svg-caption">Corte Lateral</div></div>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:6px;">
              ${comp.toFixed(2)}×${larg.toFixed(2)}×${alt.toFixed(2)}m · Painel ${espMm}mm
              ${(divisorias || []).length ? " · " + divisorias.length + " divisória(s)" : ""}
              ${doorCount ? " · " + doorCount + " porta(s)" : ""}
              ${shelfCount ? " · " + shelfCount + " estante(s)" : ""}
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      }

      function renderChamberVisualizer(stepKey) {
        const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
        const showDoor = stepKey === "step4";
        const showDivisorias = stepKey === "step3";
        const planta = buildChamberPlantaSVG(snap, {
          width: 320,
          height: 240,
          showDoor,
        });
        const corte = buildChamberCorteSVG(snap, {
          width: 320,
          height: 240,
          showDoor,
        });

        const stats = `
          <div class="chamber-stats">
            <div class="chamber-stat"><span class="label">Volume Int.</span><span class="value">${snap.volume > 0 ? snap.volume.toFixed(2) : "—"} m³</span></div>
            <div class="chamber-stat"><span class="label">Área Piso Int.</span><span class="value">${snap.area > 0 ? snap.area.toFixed(2) : "—"} m²</span></div>
            <div class="chamber-stat"><span class="label">Comp. Int.</span><span class="value">${snap.compInt > 0 ? snap.compInt.toFixed(2) : "—"} m</span></div>
            <div class="chamber-stat"><span class="label">Larg. Int.</span><span class="value">${snap.largInt > 0 ? snap.largInt.toFixed(2) : "—"} m</span></div>
            <div class="chamber-stat"><span class="label">Altura Int.</span><span class="value">${snap.altInt > 0 ? snap.altInt.toFixed(2) : "—"} m</span></div>
          </div>`;

        let divisoriasUI = "";
        if (showDivisorias) {
          const list = snap.divisorias
            .map((d, idx) => {
              const boundsTxt = d.bounds
                ? ` · parcial [${(+d.bounds.from_m).toFixed(2)}–${(+d.bounds.to_m).toFixed(2)}m]`
                : "";
              return `
            <div class="divisoria-item">
              <span><strong>${svgEsc(d.nome || "Divisória " + (idx + 1))}</strong> · ${svgEsc(d.eixo || "vertical")} · ${svgEsc(d.posicao_m || 0)}m · ${svgEsc(d.espessura_mm || 50)}mm${d.temperatura !== undefined ? " · " + d.temperatura + "°C" : ""}${boundsTxt}</span>
              <span style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
                <button type="button" onclick="openDivisoriaModal(${idx})" style="background:var(--bg-tertiary);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border-color);">Editar</button>
                <button type="button" onclick="removeDivisoria(${idx})">Remover</button>
              </span>
            </div>`;
            })
            .join("");

          // Compartments computed from divisórias
          const comps =
            typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function"
              ? rcComputeCompartments(snap)
              : [];
          let compartmentsUI = "";
          if (comps.length > 0) {
            const isSingle = comps.length === 1;
            const compsList = comps
              .map((c) => {
                const t = c.config?.temperatura_setpoint;
                const color = rcColorForTemp(t);
                const tempLabel = rcLabelForTemp(t);
                const catKey = c.config?.categoria_produto;
                const catLabel = catKey
                  ? RC_USO_LABELS[catKey] || catKey
                  : c.config?.finalidade || "";
                const tempBadge =
                  t != null && !isNaN(t)
                    ? `<span style="display:inline-block;background:${color};color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;margin-left:6px;">${t}°C</span>`
                    : `<span style="display:inline-block;background:var(--color-error);color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;margin-left:6px;">SEM TEMP</span>`;
                const catBadge = catLabel
                  ? `<span style="display:inline-block;background:var(--bg-tertiary);color:var(--text-primary);font-weight:600;font-size:11px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;margin-left:6px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);">📦 ${escapeHtml(catLabel)}</span>`
                  : `<span style="display:inline-block;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:var(--color-error);font-weight:600;font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;margin-left:6px;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.4);">📦 sem finalidade</span>`;
                const tempSubLabel =
                  t != null && !isNaN(t)
                    ? `<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-left:4px;">${tempLabel.split("·")[1]?.trim() || ""}</span>`
                    : "";
                const kgTxt = c.config?.kg_estoque_alvo
                  ? ` · ${c.config.kg_estoque_alvo}kg-alvo`
                  : "";
                const lumQtd = c.config?.qtd_luminarias;
                const lumRec = rcRecommendLuminarias(
                  c,
                  c.config?.categoria_produto,
                  c.config?.temperatura_setpoint,
                );
                const lumEval = rcEvaluateLuminarias(lumQtd, lumRec);
                const lumTxt =
                  lumQtd != null
                    ? ` · 💡${lumQtd} <span style="color:${lumEval.color};font-weight:600;font-size:10px;">${lumEval.icon} ${lumEval.label}</span>`
                    : ` · 💡? <span style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:10px;">(sug: ${lumRec.recommended})</span>`;
                const incomplete = t == null || !catKey;
                const displayName = isSingle ? "🏠 Câmara inteira" : c.name;
                return `
              <div class="divisoria-item" style="border-left:6px solid ${color};${incomplete ? "background:rgba(239,68,68,0.05);" : ""}">
                <span>
                  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:0;">
                    <strong style="font-size:13px;">${displayName}</strong>
                    ${tempBadge}
                    ${catBadge}
                  </div>
                  <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:3px;">
                    ${c.w}×${c.h}m · ${c.area}m²${tempSubLabel ? " · " + tempSubLabel : ""}${kgTxt}${lumTxt}
                  </div>
                  ${incomplete ? '<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--color-error);font-weight:600;display:block;margin-top:3px;">⚠️ ' + (t == null && !catKey ? "Configure temperatura e finalidade" : t == null ? "Configure a temperatura" : "Configure a finalidade") + "</span>" : ""}
                </span>
                <span style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                  <button type="button" onclick="openCompartmentConfig('${c.name}')" style="background:${incomplete ? "var(--color-primary)" : "var(--bg-tertiary)"};color:${incomplete ? "#fff" : "var(--text-primary)"};border:1px solid ${incomplete ? "var(--color-primary)" : "var(--border-color)"};">${incomplete ? "⚙️ Configurar" : "✏️ Editar"}</button>
                  <button type="button" onclick='openDivisoriaModal(-1, ${JSON.stringify(c).replace(/'/g, "'")})' style="background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-primary);border:1px solid var(--border-color);">+ ${isSingle ? "Dividir câmara" : "Subdividir"}</button>
                </span>
              </div>`;
              })
              .join("");
            const headerLabel = isSingle
              ? `Câmara sem divisórias <span style="font-weight:400;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:11px;">— configure abaixo ou divida em compartimentos</span>`
              : `Compartimentos resultantes (${comps.length})`;
            const subhint = isSingle
              ? '🏠 Toda a câmara funcionará como 1 só ambiente · clique em "+ Dividir câmara" para criar zonas com temperaturas diferentes'
              : "Cor = faixa de temperatura · Cinza = não configurado";
            compartmentsUI = `
              <div class="divisoria-list" style="margin-top:8px;">
                <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;">
                  <strong style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-primary);">${headerLabel}</strong>
                  <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${subhint}</span>
                </div>
                ${compsList}
              </div>`;
          }

          divisoriasUI = `
            <div class="divisoria-list">
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;">
                <strong style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-primary);">Divisórias internas (${snap.divisorias.length})</strong>
                <button type="button" class="btn-add-divisoria" onclick="openDivisoriaModal()">+ Adicionar Divisória</button>
              </div>
              ${list || '<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;padding:6px;">Nenhuma divisória. Clique em "Adicionar Divisória" para criar compartimentos.</div>'}
            </div>
            ${compartmentsUI}
          `;
        }

        return `
          <div class="chamber-visual" id="chamberVisual_${stepKey}">
            <div class="chamber-visual-header">
              <h4>📐 Pré-visualização da Câmara${showDoor ? " (com porta)" : ""}</h4>
              <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Atualiza ao preencher os campos</span>
            </div>
            <div class="chamber-visual-grid">
              <div class="chamber-svg-box">${planta}<div class="svg-caption">Planta Baixa (vista de cima)</div></div>
              <div class="chamber-svg-box">${corte}<div class="svg-caption">Corte Lateral (vista de perfil)</div></div>
            </div>
            ${stats}
            ${divisoriasUI}
          </div>
        `;
      }

      function refreshChamberVisualizer() {
        ["step3", "step4"].forEach((sk) => {
          const existing = document.getElementById("chamberVisual_" + sk);
          if (existing) {
            const wrap = document.createElement("div");
            wrap.innerHTML = renderChamberVisualizer(sk);
            const newEl = wrap.firstElementChild;
            if (newEl) existing.replaceWith(newEl);
          }
        });
      }

      function openDivisoriaModal(editIdx, parentComp) {
        const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
        if (!(snap.compInt > 0) || !(snap.largInt > 0)) {
          uiAlert(
            "Preencha Comprimento, Largura e Espessura do Painel antes de criar divisórias.",
            { variant: "warning" },
          );
          return;
        }
        const isEdit = typeof editIdx === "number" && editIdx >= 0;
        const existing = isEdit ? snap.divisorias[editIdx] : null;
        // parentComp = compartment to subdivide (when "+ Dividir" was clicked)
        const isSubdivide =
          !isEdit && parentComp && typeof parentComp === "object";
        // Determine eixo defaults
        let defaultEixo = existing?.eixo || "vertical";
        if (isSubdivide) {
          // Choose eixo perpendicular to compartment's longer side
          defaultEixo =
            parentComp.w >= parentComp.h ? "vertical" : "horizontal";
        }
        // Range limits
        const rangeFor = (eixo) => {
          if (isSubdivide) {
            // Position is in chamber coords but limited to this compartment's range
            return eixo === "vertical"
              ? { min: parentComp.x0, max: parentComp.x1 }
              : { min: parentComp.y0, max: parentComp.y1 };
          }
          return eixo === "vertical"
            ? { min: 0, max: snap.compInt }
            : { min: 0, max: snap.largInt };
        };
        const rng0 = rangeFor(defaultEixo);
        const defaultPos =
          existing?.posicao_m != null
            ? parseFloat(existing.posicao_m)
            : +((rng0.min + rng0.max) / 2).toFixed(2);
        // Bounds: only auto-applied when subdividing
        const initialBounds = isSubdivide
          ? defaultEixo === "vertical"
            ? { from_m: parentComp.y0, to_m: parentComp.y1 }
            : { from_m: parentComp.x0, to_m: parentComp.x1 }
          : existing?.bounds || null;

        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "divisoriaModalOverlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10200;";
        const titleTxt = isEdit
          ? "Editar Divisória"
          : isSubdivide
            ? `Subdividir compartimento ${parentComp.name} (${parentComp.w}×${parentComp.h}m)`
            : "Nova Divisória";
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;width:92%;max-width:520px;max-height:92vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:14px;">
              <h3 style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0;">${titleTxt}</h3>
              <button onclick="document.getElementById('divisoriaModalOverlay').remove()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:18px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div id="divPreviewBox" style="background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;justify-content:center;"></div>
            <div style="display:grid;gap:10px;">
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Nome / Identificação
                <input type="text" id="divNome" value="${escapeAttr(existing?.nome || (isSubdivide ? `${parentComp.name}-div` : "Divisória " + (snap.divisorias.length + 1)))}" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;"/>
              </label>
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Eixo
                <select id="divEixo" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;">
                  <option value="vertical" ${defaultEixo === "vertical" ? "selected" : ""}>Vertical (corta o comprimento)</option>
                  <option value="horizontal" ${defaultEixo === "horizontal" ? "selected" : ""}>Horizontal (corta a largura)</option>
                </select>
              </label>
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">
                Posição (m a partir do canto NO) <span id="divPosMaxHint" style="color:var(--text-secondary);font-weight:400;"></span>
                <input type="range" id="divPosRange" min="0.1" step="0.05" value="${defaultPos}" style="width:100%;margin-top:6px;accent-color:var(--color-primary);"/>
                <input type="number" id="divPos" min="0.1" step="0.05" value="${defaultPos}" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;"/>
                <span id="divPosError" style="display:none;color:var(--color-error);font-size:11px;margin-top:4px;"></span>
              </label>
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Espessura (mm)
                <select id="divEsp" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;">
                  ${[50, 75, 100, 125, 150, 175, 200].map((v) => `<option value="${v}" ${+(existing?.espessura_mm || 50) === v ? "selected" : ""}>${v} mm</option>`).join("")}
                </select>
              </label>
              ${
                isSubdivide
                  ? `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--color-primary);background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;">
                  ℹ️ Modo subdivisão: a divisória ficará <strong>contida em ${parentComp.name}</strong> (parcial, não atravessa toda a câmara).
                </div>`
                  : ""
              }
              <div id="divPartsHint" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;"></div>
              <div id="divCompartmentsConfig" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:14px;">
              <button onclick="document.getElementById('divisoriaModalOverlay').remove()" style="padding:8px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>
              <button id="divSaveBtn" data-parent-bounds='${initialBounds ? JSON.stringify(initialBounds) : ""}' onclick="saveDivisoria(${isEdit ? editIdx : -1})" style="padding:8px 14px;background:var(--color-primary);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">${isEdit ? "Salvar" : isSubdivide ? "Subdividir" : "Adicionar"}</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove();
        });

        // Live update: preview + validation
        const eixoEl = overlay.querySelector("#divEixo");
        const posEl = overlay.querySelector("#divPos");
        const posRangeEl = overlay.querySelector("#divPosRange");
        const posHint = overlay.querySelector("#divPosMaxHint");
        const posErr = overlay.querySelector("#divPosError");
        const partsHint = overlay.querySelector("#divPartsHint");
        const saveBtn = overlay.querySelector("#divSaveBtn");
        const previewBox = overlay.querySelector("#divPreviewBox");

        function currentBounds(eixo) {
          if (!isSubdivide) return null;
          return eixo === "vertical"
            ? { from_m: parentComp.y0, to_m: parentComp.y1 }
            : { from_m: parentComp.x0, to_m: parentComp.x1 };
        }

        function updatePreview() {
          const eixo = eixoEl.value;
          const rng = rangeFor(eixo);
          const pos = parseFloat(posEl.value);
          posRangeEl.min = (rng.min + 0.1).toFixed(2);
          posRangeEl.max = (rng.max - 0.1).toFixed(2);
          if (
            parseFloat(posRangeEl.value) > rng.max - 0.1 ||
            parseFloat(posRangeEl.value) < rng.min + 0.1
          ) {
            posRangeEl.value = ((rng.min + rng.max) / 2).toFixed(2);
          }
          posHint.textContent = `· entre ${(rng.min + 0.1).toFixed(2)} e ${(rng.max - 0.1).toFixed(2)} m`;

          let invalid = false;
          let errMsg = "";
          if (!isFinite(pos) || pos <= 0) {
            invalid = true;
            errMsg = "Posição deve ser maior que zero.";
          } else if (pos < rng.min + 0.1) {
            invalid = true;
            errMsg = `Mínimo recomendado: ${(rng.min + 0.1).toFixed(2)} m.`;
          } else if (pos >= rng.max) {
            invalid = true;
            errMsg = `Posição (${pos.toFixed(2)}m) fora do ${isSubdivide ? "compartimento " + parentComp.name : eixo === "vertical" ? "comprimento" : "largura"} (${rng.max.toFixed(2)}m).`;
          } else if (rng.max - pos < 0.1) {
            invalid = true;
            errMsg = `Posição muito perto do limite (sobra ${(rng.max - pos).toFixed(2)}m). Mínimo 0,10 m.`;
          }
          // Conflict with existing on same eixo (only relevant in non-subdivide / no overlap of bounds)
          if (!isSubdivide) {
            const others = (snap.divisorias || []).filter(
              (d, i) => (d.eixo || "vertical") === eixo && i !== editIdx,
            );
            for (const o of others) {
              const op = parseFloat(o.posicao_m) || 0;
              if (Math.abs(op - pos) < 0.1) {
                invalid = true;
                errMsg = `Outra divisória "${o.nome}" no mesmo eixo está em ${op.toFixed(2)}m. Distância mínima 0,10 m.`;
                break;
              }
            }
          }
          if (invalid) {
            posErr.textContent = errMsg;
            posErr.style.display = "block";
            saveBtn.disabled = true;
            saveBtn.style.opacity = "0.5";
            saveBtn.style.cursor = "not-allowed";
          } else {
            posErr.style.display = "none";
            saveBtn.disabled = false;
            saveBtn.style.opacity = "1";
            saveBtn.style.cursor = "pointer";
          }

          // Parts hint
          if (!invalid) {
            if (isSubdivide) {
              const part1 = (pos - rng.min).toFixed(2);
              const part2 = (rng.max - pos).toFixed(2);
              partsHint.innerHTML = `📦 Resultado: <strong>${parentComp.name}</strong> dividido em <strong>${part1}m</strong> + <strong>${part2}m</strong> (${eixo}).`;
            } else {
              const part1 = pos.toFixed(2);
              const part2 = (rng.max - pos).toFixed(2);
              const dim =
                eixo === "vertical"
                  ? `comprimento (${snap.compInt.toFixed(2)}m)`
                  : `largura (${snap.largInt.toFixed(2)}m)`;
              partsHint.innerHTML = `📦 Resultado: divisão do ${dim} em <strong>${part1}m</strong> + <strong>${part2}m</strong>.`;
            }
          } else {
            partsHint.innerHTML = `<span style="color:var(--color-error);">⚠️ Configuração inválida — corrija antes de salvar.</span>`;
          }

          // Build temp preview snapshot with this divisória applied
          const tempDivs = (snap.divisorias || []).slice();
          const previewObj = {
            nome: overlay.querySelector("#divNome").value || "Nova",
            eixo: eixo,
            posicao_m: isFinite(pos) ? pos : 0,
            espessura_mm:
              parseFloat(overlay.querySelector("#divEsp").value) || 50,
          };
          const b = currentBounds(eixo);
          if (b) previewObj.bounds = b;
          if (editIdx >= 0) tempDivs[editIdx] = previewObj;
          else tempDivs.push(previewObj);
          const previewSnap = Object.assign({}, snap, { divisorias: tempDivs });
          previewBox.innerHTML = buildChamberPlantaSVG(previewSnap, {
            width: 360,
            height: 200,
            showDoor: false,
          });

          // Per-compartment quick-config (live viability)
          const compsBox = overlay.querySelector("#divCompartmentsConfig");
          if (compsBox) {
            const previewComps = rcComputeCompartments(previewSnap);
            if (invalid || previewComps.length < 2) {
              compsBox.innerHTML = "";
            } else {
              const altInt = Math.max(0, snap.altInt || 0);
              const draftKey = "__divDraftCfg";
              if (!overlay[draftKey]) {
                overlay[draftKey] = {};
                // Pre-seed with existing compartments_config (so user doesn't lose work)
                const existingCfg = rcGetCompartmentsConfig();
                Object.keys(existingCfg).forEach((k) => {
                  overlay[draftKey][k] = Object.assign({}, existingCfg[k]);
                });
              }
              const draft = overlay[draftKey];
              const catOpts = Object.entries(RC_USO_LABELS)
                .map(([k, l]) => `<option value="${k}">${l}</option>`)
                .join("");
              compsBox.innerHTML = `
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:4px;">
                  <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">Configure os ${previewComps.length} compartimentos resultantes:</strong>
                  Defina temperatura + finalidade agora para já ver se cabe e se faz sentido.
                  <span style="display:block;margin-top:3px;color:var(--text-tertiary,var(--text-secondary));font-size:10.5px;">💡 Clique nos chips para escolher uma temperatura comum. Detalhes finos (luminárias, frequência) só no botão "Configurar" depois.</span>
                </div>
                ${previewComps
                  .map((c, idx) => {
                    const draftCfg = draft[c.name] || {};
                    const t =
                      draftCfg.temperatura_setpoint != null
                        ? draftCfg.temperatura_setpoint
                        : "";
                    const cat = draftCfg.categoria_produto || "";
                    const kg = draftCfg.kg_estoque_alvo || "";
                    const TEMP_PRESETS = [-25, -18, -10, 0, 2, 4, 6, 8, 12];
                    const chipsHtml = TEMP_PRESETS.map(
                      (v) =>
                        `<button type="button" class="dvp-chip" data-temp="${v}" style="padding:3px 7px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:12px;background:${String(t) === String(v) ? "var(--color-primary)" : "var(--bg-input)"};color:${String(t) === String(v) ? "#fff" : "var(--text-secondary)"};font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;line-height:1.2;">${v > 0 ? "+" : ""}${v}°</button>`,
                    ).join("");
                    const copyBtn =
                      idx > 0
                        ? `<button type="button" class="dvp-copy" title="Copiar configuração do primeiro compartimento" style="padding:3px 8px;border:1px dashed var(--color-primary);border-radius:12px;background:transparent;color:var(--color-primary);font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;line-height:1.2;">📋 copiar de ${previewComps[0].name}</button>`
                        : "";
                    return `
                  <div data-comp="${c.name}" style="border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;background:var(--bg-secondary,rgba(0,0,0,0.04));">
                    <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;">
                      <span>${c.name} · ${c.w}×${c.h}m · ${c.area}m² · ${(c.area * altInt).toFixed(1)}m³</span>
                      <span class="dvp-status" style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);">— configure abaixo —</span>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-top:8px;align-items:center;">
                      ${chipsHtml}
                      ${copyBtn}
                    </div>
                    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;">
                      <input type="number" class="dvp-temp" min="-40" max="15" step="1" value="${t}" placeholder="Temp °C *" title="Faixa de refrigeração: -40°C a +15°C" style="padding:6px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:5px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:12px;"/>
                      <select class="dvp-cat" style="padding:6px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:5px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:12px;">
                        <option value="">— Finalidade —</option>
                        ${catOpts.replace(`value="${cat}"`, `value="${cat}" selected`)}
                      </select>
                      <input type="number" class="dvp-kg" min="0" step="50" value="${kg}" placeholder="Estoque kg" style="padding:6px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:5px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:12px;"/>
                    </div>
                    <div class="dvp-analysis" style="font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:6px;line-height:1.5;"></div>
                  </div>`;
                  })
                  .join("")}`;

              // Wire listeners + analysis
              const recompute = () => {
                compsBox.querySelectorAll("[data-comp]").forEach((card) => {
                  const name = card.dataset.comp;
                  const c = previewComps.find((x) => x.name === name);
                  if (!c) return;
                  const tEl = card.querySelector(".dvp-temp");
                  const catEl = card.querySelector(".dvp-cat");
                  const kgEl = card.querySelector(".dvp-kg");
                  const status = card.querySelector(".dvp-status");
                  const analysis = card.querySelector(".dvp-analysis");
                  const t = parseFloat(tEl.value);
                  const cat = catEl.value;
                  const kg = parseFloat(kgEl.value) || 0;
                  // Persist draft
                  draft[name] = Object.assign(draft[name] || {}, {
                    temperatura_setpoint: isFinite(t) ? t : null,
                    categoria_produto: cat || "",
                    kg_estoque_alvo: kg || null,
                  });

                  if (!isFinite(t)) {
                    status.textContent = "⚠️ sem temperatura";
                    status.style.color = "var(--color-error)";
                    analysis.innerHTML = "";
                    card.style.borderColor = "#ef4444";
                    return;
                  }
                  card.style.borderColor = rcColorForTemp(t);
                  status.textContent = rcLabelForTemp(t);
                  status.style.color = rcColorForTemp(t);

                  // Build analysis line
                  const volComp = c.area * altInt;
                  const row = rcFindRange(RC_THERMAL_FACTOR_TABLE, t);
                  const carga = Math.round(volComp * row.factor * 1.1);
                  const minMm = rcFindRange(RC_MIN_THICKNESS_PU, t).mm;
                  let lines = [
                    `Vol ${volComp.toFixed(1)}m³ · ~${carga} Kcal/h · painel ≥${minMm}mm`,
                  ];
                  const warns = [];
                  if (cat) {
                    const dens = RC_STORAGE_DENSITY[cat] || 250;
                    const fatorUtil = 0.65;
                    const capKg = Math.round(volComp * fatorUtil * dens);
                    if (kg > 0) {
                      const ratio = kg / capKg;
                      const cor =
                        ratio > 1.1
                          ? "#ef4444"
                          : ratio < 0.4
                            ? "#f97316"
                            : "#22c55e";
                      lines.push(
                        `Cap ~${capKg}kg de ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]} · alvo ${kg}kg = <span style="color:${cor};font-weight:700;">${Math.round(ratio * 100)}%</span>`,
                      );
                      if (ratio > 1.1)
                        warns.push(
                          `<span style="color:#ef4444;">🔴 não cabe ${kg}kg (capacidade ~${capKg})</span>`,
                        );
                      else if (ratio < 0.4)
                        warns.push(
                          `<span style="color:#f97316;">⚠️ superdimensionado para ${kg}kg</span>`,
                        );
                    } else {
                      lines.push(
                        `Cap ~${capKg}kg de ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]} (vol×dens×0,65)`,
                      );
                    }
                    if (
                      t < -10 &&
                      /hortifruti|flores|bebidas|farmaceutico/.test(cat)
                    )
                      warns.push(
                        `<span style="color:#ef4444;">🔴 ${t}°C inadequado para ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]}</span>`,
                      );
                    if (
                      t > 8 &&
                      /sorvete|congelados|carne_congelada|carne_resfriada|laticinios/.test(
                        cat,
                      )
                    )
                      warns.push(
                        `<span style="color:#ef4444;">🔴 ${t}°C alto demais para ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]}</span>`,
                      );
                  }
                  if (c.w < 1.0 || c.h < 1.0)
                    warns.push(
                      `<span style="color:#f97316;">⚠️ dimensão pequena (${c.w}×${c.h}m)</span>`,
                    );
                  analysis.innerHTML = lines.concat(warns).join("<br>");
                });
              };
              compsBox
                .querySelectorAll("input,select")
                .forEach((el) => el.addEventListener("input", recompute));
              // Chips de presets de temperatura
              compsBox.querySelectorAll(".dvp-chip").forEach((chip) => {
                chip.addEventListener("click", () => {
                  const card = chip.closest("[data-comp]");
                  if (!card) return;
                  const tEl = card.querySelector(".dvp-temp");
                  tEl.value = chip.dataset.temp;
                  // Visual feedback: marca o chip ativo do card
                  card.querySelectorAll(".dvp-chip").forEach((c) => {
                    c.style.background = "var(--bg-input)";
                    c.style.color = "var(--text-secondary)";
                  });
                  chip.style.background = "var(--color-primary)";
                  chip.style.color = "#fff";
                  recompute();
                });
              });
              // Botão "copiar de C1" — replica temp/finalidade/kg do primeiro card
              compsBox.querySelectorAll(".dvp-copy").forEach((btn) => {
                btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
                  const target = btn.closest("[data-comp]");
                  const first = compsBox.querySelector("[data-comp]");
                  if (!target || !first || target === first) return;
                  target.querySelector(".dvp-temp").value =
                    first.querySelector(".dvp-temp").value;
                  target.querySelector(".dvp-cat").value =
                    first.querySelector(".dvp-cat").value;
                  target.querySelector(".dvp-kg").value =
                    first.querySelector(".dvp-kg").value;
                  // Sincroniza visual dos chips do card de destino
                  const tv = target.querySelector(".dvp-temp").value;
                  target.querySelectorAll(".dvp-chip").forEach((c) => {
                    const on = String(c.dataset.temp) === String(tv);
                    c.style.background = on
                      ? "var(--color-primary)"
                      : "var(--bg-input)";
                    c.style.color = on ? "#fff" : "var(--text-secondary)";
                  });
                  recompute();
                });
              });
              recompute();
            }
          }
        }

        eixoEl.addEventListener("change", () => {
          const rng = rangeFor(eixoEl.value);
          posEl.value = ((rng.min + rng.max) / 2).toFixed(2);
          posRangeEl.value = posEl.value;
          updatePreview();
        });
        posEl.addEventListener("input", () => {
          posRangeEl.value = posEl.value;
          updatePreview();
        });
        posRangeEl.addEventListener("input", () => {
          posEl.value = posRangeEl.value;
          updatePreview();
        });
        overlay
          .querySelector("#divEsp")
          .addEventListener("input", updatePreview);
        overlay
          .querySelector("#divNome")
          .addEventListener("input", updatePreview);
        updatePreview();
      }

      async function saveDivisoria(editIdx) {
        const overlay = document.getElementById("divisoriaModalOverlay");
        const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
        const nome = document.getElementById("divNome").value.trim();
        const eixo = document.getElementById("divEixo").value;
        const pos = parseFloat(document.getElementById("divPos").value);
        const esp = parseFloat(document.getElementById("divEsp").value);
        const saveBtn = document.getElementById("divSaveBtn");
        let bounds = null;
        try {
          const raw = saveBtn?.dataset?.parentBounds;
          if (raw) bounds = JSON.parse(raw);
        } catch (e) {
          bounds = null;
        }
        const max = bounds
          ? eixo === "vertical"
            ? snap.compInt
            : snap.largInt
          : eixo === "vertical"
            ? snap.compInt
            : snap.largInt;
        if (!nome) {
          uiAlert("Nome é obrigatório.", { variant: "error" });
          return;
        }
        if (!(pos > 0)) {
          uiAlert("Posição inválida.", { variant: "error" });
          return;
        }
        if (pos >= max) {
          uiAlert(
            `Posição ${pos.toFixed(2)}m fora da câmara (máx ${max.toFixed(2)}m no eixo ${eixo}).`,
            { variant: "error" },
          );
          return;
        }
        if (max - pos < 0.1) {
          uiAlert(
            `Posição muito perto da parede (sobra ${(max - pos).toFixed(2)}m, mínimo 0,10m).`,
            { variant: "error" },
          );
          return;
        }
        if (!(esp >= 20 && esp <= 300)) {
          uiAlert("Espessura deve estar entre 20 e 300 mm.", {
            variant: "error",
          });
          return;
        }
        if (!formData.step3) formData.step3 = {};
        let arr = [];
        try {
          if (typeof formData.step3.divisorias === "string")
            arr = JSON.parse(formData.step3.divisorias);
          else if (Array.isArray(formData.step3.divisorias))
            arr = formData.step3.divisorias;
        } catch (e) {
          arr = [];
        }
        const obj = { nome, eixo, posicao_m: pos, espessura_mm: esp };
        if (
          bounds &&
          isFinite(parseFloat(bounds.from_m)) &&
          isFinite(parseFloat(bounds.to_m))
        ) {
          obj.bounds = { from_m: +bounds.from_m, to_m: +bounds.to_m };
        }
        if (editIdx >= 0) arr[editIdx] = obj;
        else arr.push(obj);
        formData.step3.divisorias = JSON.stringify(arr);

        // Persist any inline compartment configs the user filled in the modal
        const draft = overlay && overlay.__divDraftCfg;
        if (draft && Object.keys(draft).length) {
          const cfg = rcGetCompartmentsConfig();
          // Recompute compartments after the new divisória to confirm names exist
          const newSnap = getChamberSnapshot();
          const newComps = rcComputeCompartments(newSnap);
          const validNames = new Set(newComps.map((c) => c.name));
          Object.keys(draft).forEach((k) => {
            const d = draft[k];
            if (!validNames.has(k)) return; // stale name (post-rename), skip
            // Skip if the user didn't actually configure (no temp & no cat)
            if (d.temperatura_setpoint == null && !d.categoria_produto) return;
            cfg[k] = Object.assign({}, cfg[k] || {}, d);
          });
          // Drop config entries for compartments that no longer exist
          Object.keys(cfg).forEach((k) => {
            if (!validNames.has(k)) delete cfg[k];
          });
          rcSaveCompartmentsConfig(cfg);
        }

        saveToStorage();
        if (overlay) overlay.remove();
        refreshChamberVisualizer();
        if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function") refreshRcSidebar();
        addChatMessage(
          `📐 Divisória **${nome}** ${editIdx >= 0 ? "atualizada" : "salva"}${bounds ? " (subdivisão)" : ""}.`,
          "system",
        );
      }

      async function removeDivisoria(idx) {
        if (
          !(await uiConfirm("Remover esta divisória?", {
            danger: true,
            confirmText: "Remover",
          }))
        )
          return;
        let arr = [];
        try {
          if (typeof formData.step3?.divisorias === "string")
            arr = JSON.parse(formData.step3.divisorias);
          else if (Array.isArray(formData.step3?.divisorias))
            arr = formData.step3.divisorias;
        } catch (e) {
          arr = [];
        }
        arr.splice(idx, 1);
        formData.step3.divisorias = JSON.stringify(arr);
        saveToStorage();
        refreshChamberVisualizer();
        if (typeof refreshRcSidebar === "function") refreshRcSidebar();
      }

      // ============================================================
      // PORTA WIZARD MODAL — multi-step assistant
      //   Steps: 1) Parede  2) Tipo + Dimensões  3) Sentido  4) Acessórios  5) Posição
      // ============================================================
      function openPortaModal(opts) {
        opts = opts || {};
        const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
        if (!(snap.compInt > 0) || !(snap.largInt > 0)) {
          uiAlert(
            "Preencha as dimensões da câmara (Etapa 3) antes de adicionar portas.",
            { variant: "warning" },
          );
          return;
        }
        const comps =
          typeof rcComputeCompartments === "function"
            ? rcComputeCompartments(snap)
            : [];
        if (comps.length === 0) {
          uiAlert("Configure pelo menos um compartimento.", {
            variant: "warning",
          });
          return;
        }

        const isEdit = typeof opts.editIdx === "number" && opts.editIdx >= 0;
        if (!Array.isArray(formData.step4?.portas)) {
          if (!formData.step4) formData.step4 = {};
          formData.step4.portas = [];
        }
        const existing = isEdit
          ? Object.assign({}, formData.step4.portas[opts.editIdx])
          : null;
        const compName =
          existing?.compartimento_id || opts.compName || comps[0].name;
        const comp = comps.find((c) => c.name === compName) || comps[0];
        const equip = _getCompartmentEquipment(comp.name);
        const t = equip.temp;
        const allowedWalls = _perimeterWallsForCompartment(comp, snap);
        const preset = opts.presetKey ? PORTA_PRESETS[opts.presetKey] : null;

        // Seed state
        const state = {
          step: 1,
          totalSteps: 5,
          compartimento_id: comp.name,
          parede:
            existing?.parede && allowedWalls.includes(existing.parede)
              ? existing.parede
              : "",
          tipo: existing?.tipo || preset?.tipo || "",
          largura: existing?.largura || preset?.largura || "",
          altura: existing?.altura || preset?.altura || "",
          sentido_abertura: existing?.sentido_abertura || "",
          posicao_pct:
            existing?.posicao_pct != null && existing?.posicao_pct !== ""
              ? +existing.posicao_pct
              : 50,
          acessorios: existing?.acessorios
            ? String(existing.acessorios)
                .split(",")
                .map((s) => s.trim())
                .filter(Boolean)
            : [],
        };
        if (preset && !isEdit) {
          if (opts.presetKey === "empilhadeira")
            state.acessorios.push(
              "Abertura para Empilhadeira",
              "Resistência no Batente",
            );
          if (opts.presetKey === "rapida")
            state.acessorios.push("Cortina de PVC na Porta");
          if (
            t != null &&
            t < 0 &&
            !["expositora", "emergencia"].includes(opts.presetKey)
          )
            state.acessorios.push("Anti-Gelo Eletrônico");
          // Auto-pick wall if only one option
          if (allowedWalls.length === 1) state.parede = allowedWalls[0];
        }

        // Door type catalog with metadata
        const TIPO_CATALOG = [
          {
            key: "Giratória Isotérmica",
            icon: "🚪",
            desc: "Acesso comum (pessoas) — uso geral",
            larguras: ["600", "700", "800", "900", "1000", "1200"],
            alturas: ["1800", "1900", "2000", "2100", "2200"],
          },
          {
            key: "Correr Isotérmica",
            icon: "↔️",
            desc: "Cargas largas, expedição — abre lateral",
            larguras: ["1200", "1400", "1600", "1800", "2000", "2400"],
            alturas: ["2000", "2200", "2400", "2600", "3000"],
          },
          {
            key: "Vai e Vem",
            icon: "🔁",
            desc: "Bidirecional, alta circulação · T ≥ -10°C",
            larguras: ["700", "800", "900", "1000", "1200"],
            alturas: ["1800", "1900", "2000", "2100"],
            minTemp: -10,
          },
          {
            key: "Expositora de Vidro",
            icon: "👁️",
            desc: "Visualizar produto · T ≥ -10°C",
            larguras: ["600", "700", "800", "900"],
            alturas: ["1800", "1900", "2000"],
            minTemp: -10,
          },
          {
            key: "Guilhotina",
            icon: "⬆️",
            desc: "Espaço lateral limitado — sobe/desce",
            larguras: ["800", "900", "1000", "1200", "1400", "1600"],
            alturas: ["1800", "2000", "2200", "2400"],
          },
          {
            key: "Porta Rápida (Roll-up)",
            icon: "⚡",
            desc: "Alta freq. de aberturas — reduz perda térmica",
            larguras: ["1500", "1800", "2000", "2400"],
            alturas: ["2200", "2400", "2600", "3000"],
          },
        ];

        // Direction catalog — depende do tipo de porta
        function _sentidosForTipo(tipo) {
          const t = (tipo || "").toLowerCase();
          if (t.includes("correr")) {
            return [
              {
                key: "Correr para Esquerda",
                icon: "⬅️",
                short: "Desliza p/ Esquerda",
                hint: "Folha desliza para a esquerda ao abrir",
              },
              {
                key: "Correr para Direita",
                icon: "➡️",
                short: "Desliza p/ Direita",
                hint: "Folha desliza para a direita ao abrir",
              },
            ];
          }
          if (t.includes("vai e vem") || t.includes("vai-e-vem")) {
            return [
              {
                key: "Bidirecional (Vai-e-Vem)",
                icon: "🔁",
                short: "Vai-e-Vem",
                hint: "Abre nos dois sentidos — empurrar de qualquer lado",
              },
            ];
          }
          if (
            t.includes("guilhotina") ||
            t.includes("rápida") ||
            t.includes("rapida") ||
            t.includes("roll")
          ) {
            return [
              {
                key: "Vertical (sobe/desce)",
                icon: "⬆️",
                short: "Sobe/Desce",
                hint: "Folha sobe ao abrir e desce ao fechar",
              },
            ];
          }
          // Giratórias e Expositoras: 4 combinações de dobradiça × sentido
          return [
            {
              key: "Giro à Esquerda - Abre p/ Fora",
              icon: "↖️",
              short: "Esq. p/ Fora",
              hint: "Dobradiça à esquerda · folha sai para fora (preferencial em emergências)",
            },
            {
              key: "Giro à Direita - Abre p/ Fora",
              icon: "↗️",
              short: "Dir. p/ Fora",
              hint: "Dobradiça à direita · folha sai para fora",
            },
            {
              key: "Giro à Esquerda - Abre p/ Dentro",
              icon: "↙️",
              short: "Esq. p/ Dentro",
              hint: "Dobradiça à esquerda · folha entra na câmara",
            },
            {
              key: "Giro à Direita - Abre p/ Dentro",
              icon: "↘️",
              short: "Dir. p/ Dentro",
              hint: "Dobradiça à direita · folha entra na câmara",
            },
          ];
        }
        const SENTIDOS = _sentidosForTipo(state.tipo);

        // Accessories catalog with grouping + product/temp applicability
        const ACESSORIOS_CAT = [
          {
            key: "Resistência no Batente",
            group: "Anti-condensação",
            icon: "🔥",
            smart: () => t != null && t < 0,
            applies: () => t == null || t < 5,
          },
          {
            key: "Resistência na Soleira",
            group: "Anti-condensação",
            icon: "🔥",
            smart: () => t != null && t < -10,
            applies: () => t == null || t < 0,
          },
          {
            key: "Anti-Gelo Eletrônico",
            group: "Anti-condensação",
            icon: "❄️",
            smart: () => t != null && t < 0,
            applies: () => t == null || t < 5,
          },
          {
            key: "Cortina de PVC na Porta",
            group: "Vedação",
            icon: "🪟",
            smart: () => equip.frequenciaAlta,
          },
          { key: "Mola Aérea", group: "Vedação", icon: "🌀" },
          {
            key: "Trinco de Segurança Interno",
            group: "Segurança",
            icon: "🔒",
          },
          { key: "Visor (300x300mm)", group: "Visibilidade", icon: "👁️" },
          { key: "Visor (500x500mm)", group: "Visibilidade", icon: "👁️" },
          {
            key: "Abertura para Empilhadeira",
            group: "Logística",
            icon: "🏗️",
            smart: () => equip.empilhadeira,
            applies: () => equip.empilhadeira || equip.paleteira,
          },
        ];

        // Build overlay
        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "portaModalOverlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10250;padding:12px;";
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:14px;width:100%;max-width:680px;max-height:94vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);overflow:hidden;">
            <div style="padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;">
              <div>
                <h3 style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0;">${isEdit ? "✏️ Editar Porta" : "🚪 Adicionar Porta"} — ${escapeHtml(comp.name)}</h3>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;" id="pwSubtitle"></div>
              </div>
              <button onclick="document.getElementById('portaModalOverlay').remove()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:18px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div id="pwStepperBar" style="padding:8px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;background:var(--bg-tertiary);"></div>
            <div id="pwBody" style="padding:18px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1;"></div>
            <div style="padding:12px 18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <button id="pwBack" type="button" style="padding:8px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">← Voltar</button>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
                <button onclick="document.getElementById('portaModalOverlay').remove()" type="button" style="padding:8px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>
                ${isEdit ? `<button id="pwSaveEdit" type="button" style="padding:8px 14px;background:var(--color-success,#10b981);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">💾 Salvar alterações</button>` : ""}
                <button id="pwNext" type="button" style="padding:8px 16px;background:var(--color-primary);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Próximo →</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove();
        });

        const PW_STEPS = [
          { n: 1, title: "Parede", icon: "square" },
          { n: 2, title: "Tipo & Dim.", icon: "door-open" },
          { n: 3, title: "Sentido", icon: "move" },
          { n: 4, title: "Acessórios", icon: "sparkles" },
          { n: 5, title: "Posição", icon: "crosshair" },
        ];

        function renderStepper() {
          const bar = overlay.querySelector("#pwStepperBar");
          bar.innerHTML = PW_STEPS.map((s, i) => {
            const active = s.n === state.step;
            const done = s.n < state.step;
            // No modo edição, todos os steps são clicáveis (já há dados salvos).
            const clickable = isEdit || done;
            const color = active
              ? "var(--color-primary)"
              : done
                ? "var(--color-success)"
                : isEdit
                  ? "var(--text-primary)"
                  : "var(--text-secondary)";
            const bg = active
              ? "var(--color-primary)"
              : done
                ? "var(--color-success)"
                : "var(--bg-card)";
            const txt =
              active || done
                ? "#fff"
                : isEdit
                  ? "var(--text-primary)"
                  : "var(--text-secondary)";
            return `${i > 0 ? `<div style="flex:0 0 auto;width:14px;height:2px;background:${done ? "var(--color-success)" : "var(--border-color)"};"></div>` : ""}
              <div data-pw-step="${s.n}" data-pw-clickable="${clickable ? "1" : "0"}" style="cursor:${clickable ? "pointer" : "default"};display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:${color};">
                <span style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:${bg};color:${txt};display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:11px;border:1px solid ${color};">${done ? "✓" : s.n}</span>
                <span class="pw-step-label">${s.title}</span>
              </div>`;
          }).join("");
          bar.querySelectorAll("[data-pw-step]").forEach((el) => {
            el.addEventListener("click", () => {
              if (el.getAttribute("data-pw-clickable") !== "1") return;
              const n = parseInt(el.getAttribute("data-pw-step"));
              if (n === state.step) return;
              state.step = n;
              renderAll();
            });
          });
        }

        function buildPreviewSVG() {
          // Build a snapshot with current state's draft porta on top, focusing on the compartment
          const draftPorta = {
            compartimento_id: comp.name,
            tipo: state.tipo,
            largura: state.largura,
            altura: state.altura,
            parede: state.parede,
            posicao_pct: state.posicao_pct,
            sentido_abertura: state.sentido_abertura,
            acessorios: state.acessorios.join(", "),
          };
          // Replace edited porta or append draft
          const portasArr = (formData.step4.portas || []).slice();
          if (isEdit) portasArr[opts.editIdx] = draftPorta;
          else portasArr.push(draftPorta);
          // Convert to snapshot format
          const portasSnap = portasArr.map((p) => ({
            compartimento_id: p.compartimento_id || "",
            tipo: p.tipo || "",
            largMm: parseFloat(p.largura) || 0,
            altMm: parseFloat(p.altura) || 0,
            parede: p.parede || "",
            posPct: parseFloat(p.posicao_pct) || 50,
            sentido: p.sentido_abertura || "",
          }));
          const previewSnap = Object.assign({}, snap, { portas: portasSnap });
          return buildChamberPlantaSVG(previewSnap, {
            width: 420,
            height: 240,
            showDoor: true,
          });
        }

        function previewBox() {
          // Resumo de estantes do compartimento atual (informativo)
          let estanteResumo = "";
          try {
            const est =
              (formData.step4 &&
                formData.step4.estantes_por_comp &&
                formData.step4.estantes_por_comp[comp.name]) ||
              null;
            if (est && est.tipo) {
              const grupos = Array.isArray(est.grupos) ? est.grupos : [];
              const tot =
                grupos.length > 0
                  ? grupos.reduce((s, g) => s + (parseInt(g.qtd) || 0), 0)
                  : parseInt(est.quantidade) || 0;
              if (tot > 0) {
                const niveisTxt = est.niveis ? ` · ${est.niveis} níveis` : "";
                const grupoChips = (grupos || [])
                  .map((g) => {
                    const lbl =
                      (typeof PAREDE_LABELS_PT === "object" &&
                        PAREDE_LABELS_PT[g.parede]) ||
                      g.parede;
                    const pct = Math.round((parseFloat(g.fracao) || 1) * 100);
                    return `<span style="display:inline-block;background:rgba(161,98,7,0.12);border:1px solid #a16207;border-radius:10px;padding:1px 6px;font-size:9.5px;color:#78350f;font-weight:600;">${escapeHtml(lbl)} ${pct}%·${parseInt(g.qtd) || 0}</span>`;
                  })
                  .join(" ");
                estanteResumo = `<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;">
                  📚 <strong>${tot}</strong> estante(s)${niveisTxt} ${grupoChips}
                </div>`;
              }
            }
          } catch (e) {
            /* skip */
          }
          return `<div style="background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:10px;padding:8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:14px;">
            ${buildPreviewSVG()}
            <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Pré-visualização — porta destacada na ${state.parede || "parede a definir"} · estantes em laranja${estanteResumo ? "" : " (nenhuma configurada)"}</div>
            ${estanteResumo}
          </div>`;
        }

        // ----- Step 1: Parede -----
        function renderStep1() {
          // Visual: planta with clickable wall hotspots highlighting only allowed walls
          const W = 420,
            H = 260,
            pad = 50;
          const compW = snap.compInt,
            largW = snap.largInt;
          const scale = Math.min((W - 2 * pad) / compW, (H - 2 * pad) / largW);
          const rW = compW * scale,
            rH = largW * scale;
          const oX = (W - rW) / 2,
            oY = (H - rH) / 2;
          // Compartment rect inside chamber
          const cx0 = oX + comp.x0 * scale,
            cy0 = oY + comp.y0 * scale;
          const cx1 = oX + comp.x1 * scale,
            cy1 = oY + comp.y1 * scale;
          // Determine which sides of THIS compartment touch the chamber perimeter
          const wallSegs = [];
          const tol = 0.05;
          if (Math.abs(comp.y0) < tol)
            wallSegs.push({
              key: "Parede Frontal (Norte)",
              x1: cx0,
              y1: oY - 2,
              x2: cx1,
              y2: oY - 2,
              side: "top",
            });
          if (Math.abs(comp.y1 - largW) < tol)
            wallSegs.push({
              key: "Parede Posterior (Sul)",
              x1: cx0,
              y1: oY + rH + 2,
              x2: cx1,
              y2: oY + rH + 2,
              side: "bottom",
            });
          if (Math.abs(comp.x0) < tol)
            wallSegs.push({
              key: "Parede Lateral Esquerda (Oeste)",
              x1: oX - 2,
              y1: cy0,
              x2: oX - 2,
              y2: cy1,
              side: "left",
            });
          if (Math.abs(comp.x1 - compW) < tol)
            wallSegs.push({
              key: "Parede Lateral Direita (Leste)",
              x1: oX + rW + 2,
              y1: cy0,
              x2: oX + rW + 2,
              y2: cy1,
              side: "right",
            });

          let svg = `<svg viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:100%;max-width:520px;height:auto;">`;
          svg += `<rect x="0" y="0" width="${W}" height="${H}" fill="var(--bg-card)"/>`;
          svg += `<rect x="${oX}" y="${oY}" width="${rW}" height="${rH}" fill="#cbd5e1" opacity="0.5" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="1"/>`;
          svg += `<rect x="${cx0}" y="${cy0}" width="${cx1 - cx0}" height="${cy1 - cy0}" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#1e40af" stroke-width="1.5"/>`;
          svg += `<text x="${(cx0 + cx1) / 2}" y="${(cy0 + cy1) / 2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#1e3a8a">${comp.name}</text>`;
          svg += `<text x="${(cx0 + cx1) / 2}" y="${(cy0 + cy1) / 2 + 16}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#475569">${comp.w}×${comp.h}m</text>`;
          // Highlight clickable walls
          wallSegs.forEach((w) => {
            const isSelected = state.parede === w.key;
            const stroke = isSelected ? "#ef4444" : "#10b981";
            const sw = isSelected ? 8 : 6;
            svg += `<line data-pw-wall="${escapeAttr(w.key)}" x1="${w.x1}" y1="${w.y1}" x2="${w.x2}" y2="${w.y2}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round" style="cursor:pointer;" opacity="0.85"><title>Clique para selecionar: ${escapeHtml(w.key)}</title></line>`;
            // Pulsing dot at midpoint to indicate clickable
            const mx = (w.x1 + w.x2) / 2,
              my = (w.y1 + w.y2) / 2;
            svg += `<circle data-pw-wall="${escapeAttr(w.key)}" cx="${mx}" cy="${my}" r="${isSelected ? 9 : 7}" fill="${stroke}" style="cursor:pointer;"></circle>`;
            const label = w.key
              .replace(/^Parede\s+/i, "")
              .replace(/\s*\(.*\)$/, "");
            const lx =
              w.side === "left" ? mx - 4 : w.side === "right" ? mx + 4 : mx;
            const ly =
              w.side === "top"
                ? my - 8
                : w.side === "bottom"
                  ? my + 14
                  : my + 3;
            const anchor =
              w.side === "left"
                ? "end"
