        },
        // Ilha
        {
          id: "ilhaV",
          cat: "Ilha (centro)",
          label: "Ilha vertical",
          sides: [],
          ilha: "v",
        },
        {
          id: "ilhaH",
          cat: "Ilha (centro)",
          label: "Ilha horizontal",
          sides: [],
          ilha: "h",
        },
        // Ilha + laterais
        {
          id: "ilhaV+lr",
          cat: "Ilha + paredes",
          label: "Ilha vert + 2 laterais",
          sides: ["left", "right"],
          ilha: "v",
        },
        {
          id: "ilhaH+tb",
          cat: "Ilha + paredes",
          label: "Ilha horiz + Front + Post",
          sides: ["top", "bottom"],
          ilha: "h",
        },
        {
          id: "ilhaV+post",
          cat: "Ilha + paredes",
          label: "Ilha vert + Posterior",
          sides: ["bottom"],
          ilha: "v",
        },
        {
          id: "ilhaV+ufront",
          cat: "Ilha + paredes",
          label: "Ilha vert + U (sem frontal)",
          sides: ["bottom", "left", "right"],
          ilha: "v",
        },
        {
          id: "ilhaH+esq",
          cat: "Ilha + paredes",
          label: "Ilha horiz + Esquerda",
          sides: ["left"],
          ilha: "h",
        },
        {
          id: "ilhaH+dir",
          cat: "Ilha + paredes",
          label: "Ilha horiz + Direita",
          sides: ["right"],
          ilha: "h",
        },
      ];
      function findLayoutPreset(layout) {
        const code = encodeEncostoLayout(layout);
        return (
          ESTANTE_LAYOUTS.find((L) => encodeEncostoLayout(L) === code) || null
        );
      }

      // Mini-SVG de preview (usado no modal e no resumo inline). c=opcional (proporção real)
      function renderEncostoMiniPreviewSVG(layout, opts) {
        opts = opts || {};
        const W = opts.W || 92,
          H = opts.H || 64,
          pad = 6;
        const aspectW = opts.aspectW != null ? opts.aspectW : 1;
        const aspectH = opts.aspectH != null ? opts.aspectH : 0.75;
        const sc = Math.min((W - 2 * pad) / aspectW, (H - 2 * pad) / aspectH);
        const rW = aspectW * sc,
          rH = aspectH * sc;
        const oX = (W - rW) / 2,
          oY = (H - rH) / 2;
        const sides = (layout && layout.sides) || [];
        const ilha = (layout && layout.ilha) || null;
        const profPx = Math.max(4, Math.min(8, rW * 0.13, rH * 0.13));
        const fill = "#a16207",
          stroke = "#78350f";
        const portasSides = opts.portasSides || {}; // { top:true/false, ... } — opcional
        let svg = `<svg viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="display:block;">`;
        // Compartimento
        svg += `<rect x="${oX}" y="${oY}" width="${rW}" height="${rH}" fill="rgba(59,130,246,0.06)" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="0.6" rx="2"/>`;
        // Marcadores de porta (se opts.portasSides fornecido)
        const dlen = Math.min(rW, rH) * 0.35;
        if (portasSides.top)
          svg += `<rect x="${oX + rW / 2 - dlen / 2}" y="${oY - 1.5}" width="${dlen}" height="3" fill="#ef4444" rx="0.5"/>`;
        if (portasSides.bottom)
          svg += `<rect x="${oX + rW / 2 - dlen / 2}" y="${oY + rH - 1.5}" width="${dlen}" height="3" fill="#ef4444" rx="0.5"/>`;
        if (portasSides.left)
          svg += `<rect x="${oX - 1.5}" y="${oY + rH / 2 - dlen / 2}" width="3" height="${dlen}" fill="#ef4444" rx="0.5"/>`;
        if (portasSides.right)
          svg += `<rect x="${oX + rW - 1.5}" y="${oY + rH / 2 - dlen / 2}" width="3" height="${dlen}" fill="#ef4444" rx="0.5"/>`;
        // Estantes nas paredes
        const sh = (x, y, w, h) =>
          `<rect x="${x.toFixed(2)}" y="${y.toFixed(2)}" width="${w.toFixed(2)}" height="${h.toFixed(2)}" fill="${fill}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.3" opacity="0.75" rx="0.6"/>`;
        if (sides.includes("top"))
          svg += sh(oX + 1.5, oY + 1.5, rW - 3, profPx);
        if (sides.includes("bottom"))
          svg += sh(oX + 1.5, oY + rH - profPx - 1.5, rW - 3, profPx);
        if (sides.includes("left"))
          svg += sh(oX + 1.5, oY + 1.5, profPx, rH - 3);
        if (sides.includes("right"))
          svg += sh(oX + rW - profPx - 1.5, oY + 1.5, profPx, rH - 3);
        // Ilha
        if (ilha === "v")
          svg += sh(oX + rW / 2 - profPx / 2, oY + 4, profPx, rH - 8);
        else if (ilha === "h")
          svg += sh(oX + 4, oY + rH / 2 - profPx / 2, rW - 8, profPx);
        svg += `</svg>`;
        return svg;
      }

      // Detecta paredes com porta no compartimento
      function _portasPorParede(compName) {
        const portas = ((formData.step4 && formData.step4.portas) || []).filter(
          (p) => p.compartimento_id === compName,
        );
        const out = { top: false, bottom: false, left: false, right: false };
        portas.forEach((p) => {
          const w = String(p.parede || "").toLowerCase();
          if (w.includes("frontal") || w.includes("norte")) out.top = true;
          else if (w.includes("posterior") || w.includes("sul"))
            out.bottom = true;
          else if (w.includes("esquerda") || w.includes("oeste"))
            out.left = true;
          else if (w.includes("direita") || w.includes("leste"))
            out.right = true;
        });
        return out;
      }

      // Retorna ranges [a,b] em metros (ao longo da parede, do início) ocupados por portas naquela parede
      function _doorRangesPorParede(compName, comp, parede) {
        const portas = ((formData.step4 && formData.step4.portas) || []).filter(
          (p) => p.compartimento_id === compName,
        );
        const wallM = _wallLengthM(comp, parede);
        const out = [];
        portas.forEach((p) => {
          const w = String(p.parede || "").toLowerCase();
          let side = null;
          if (w.includes("frontal") || w.includes("norte")) side = "top";
          else if (w.includes("posterior") || w.includes("sul"))
            side = "bottom";
          else if (w.includes("esquerda") || w.includes("oeste")) side = "left";
          else if (w.includes("direita") || w.includes("leste")) side = "right";
          if (side !== parede) return;
          const largM = (parseFloat(p.largura) || 0) / 1000;
          if (largM <= 0 || wallM <= 0) return;
          const pct =
            Math.max(0, Math.min(100, parseFloat(p.posicao_pct) || 50)) / 100;
          const center = pct * wallM;
          // Folga lateral mínima da porta (5 cm de cada lado)
          const folga = 0.05;
          out.push([
            Math.max(0, center - largM / 2 - folga),
            Math.min(wallM, center + largM / 2 + folga),
          ]);
        });
        // Mescla overlapping
        out.sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);
        const merged = [];
        out.forEach(([a, b]) => {
          if (merged.length && a <= merged[merged.length - 1][1])
            merged[merged.length - 1][1] = Math.max(
              merged[merged.length - 1][1],
              b,
            );
          else merged.push([a, b]);
        });
        return merged;
      }
      // Subtrai doorRanges de [start,end] retornando segmentos livres
      function _subtractRanges(start, end, doors) {
        if (end <= start) return [];
        const segs = [[start, end]];
        (doors || []).forEach(([da, db]) => {
          for (let i = segs.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const [sa, sb] = segs[i];
            if (db <= sa || da >= sb) continue;
            segs.splice(i, 1);
            if (da > sa) segs.push([sa, Math.min(da, sb)]);
            if (db < sb) segs.push([Math.max(db, sa), sb]);
          }
        });
        return segs.filter(([a, b]) => b - a > 0.001);
      }

      // Modal: escolher layout das estantes — mostra todos os presets como cards
      function openEstanteLayoutModal(c) {
        const existing = document.getElementById("estanteLayoutOverlay");
        if (existing) existing.remove();
        const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
        const curLayout = parseEncostoLayout(est.encosto);
        const curCode = encodeEncostoLayout(curLayout);
        const portasSides = _portasPorParede(c.name);
        const aspectW = Math.max(0.1, c.x1 - c.x0);
        const aspectH = Math.max(0.1, c.y1 - c.y0);

        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "estanteLayoutOverlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10260;padding:12px;";

        // Agrupa por categoria
        const byCat = {};
        ESTANTE_LAYOUTS.forEach((L) => {
          (byCat[L.cat] = byCat[L.cat] || []).push(L);
        });
        const catOrder = [
          "Nenhum",
          "1 parede",
          "2 paredes",
          "L (canto)",
          "U (3 lados)",
          "Perímetro",
          "Ilha (centro)",
          "Ilha + paredes",
        ];

        const conflictSides = (L) => {
          if (!L) return [];
          return (L.sides || []).filter((s) => portasSides[s]);
        };

        let body = "";
        catOrder.forEach((cat) => {
          const list = byCat[cat];
          if (!list || !list.length) return;
          body += `<div style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:8px;">${escapeHtml(cat)}</div>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:8px;">`;
          list.forEach((L) => {
            const code = encodeEncostoLayout(L);
            const sel = code === curCode;
            const conflicts = conflictSides(L);
            const hasConflict = conflicts.length > 0;
            const accent = sel
              ? "#3b82f6"
              : hasConflict
                ? "#f59e0b"
                : "var(--border-color)";
            const bg = sel ? "rgba(59,130,246,0.08)" : "var(--bg-tertiary)";
            const previewSvg = renderEncostoMiniPreviewSVG(L, {
              aspectW,
              aspectH,
              portasSides,
            });
            body += `<button type="button" data-layout-id="${escapeAttr(L.id)}" data-layout-code="${escapeAttr(code)}" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch;gap:4px;padding:8px;border:2px solid ${accent};background:${bg};border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;text-align:left;position:relative;">
              ${hasConflict ? `<span style="position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;font-size:11px;" title="Conflito com porta em: ${conflicts.join(", ")}">⚠️</span>` : ""}
              ${sel ? `<span style="position:absolute;top:4px;left:4px;font-size:11px;color:#3b82f6;">✓</span>` : ""}
              <div style="background:#fff;border-radius:4px;padding:2px;">${previewSvg}</div>
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-primary);line-height:1.25;">${escapeHtml(L.label)}</div>
              ${hasConflict ? `<div style="font-size:9.5px;color:#f59e0b;line-height:1.2;">⚠️ porta em: ${conflicts.map((s) => ({ top: "frontal", bottom: "posterior", left: "esquerda", right: "direita" })[s]).join(", ")}</div>` : ""}
            </button>`;
          });
          body += `</div></div>`;
        });

        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:14px;width:100%;max-width:760px;max-height:92vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);overflow:hidden;">
            <div style="padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
              <div>
                <h3 style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;margin:0;">📐 Layout das Estantes — ${escapeHtml(c.name)}</h3>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;">Escolha como as estantes serão dispostas. Os ⚠️ indicam paredes que têm porta — possível conflito com área de abertura.</div>
              </div>
              <button id="elClose" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:18px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div style="padding:16px 18px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1;">${body}</div>
            <div style="padding:10px 18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
              <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Atual: <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(encostoLabelPt(curLayout))}</strong></div>
              <button id="elDone" style="padding:7px 14px;background:var(--color-primary);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Concluir</button>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove();
        });
        overlay
          .querySelector("#elClose")
          .addEventListener("click", () => overlay.remove());
        overlay
          .querySelector("#elDone")
          .addEventListener("click", () => overlay.remove());
        overlay.querySelectorAll("[data-layout-code]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const code = btn.getAttribute("data-layout-code") || "";
            est.encosto = code;
            try {
              saveToStorage();
            } catch (e) {}
            overlay.remove();
            renderCurrentStep();
          });
        });
      }
      // Expor para event listeners inline
      window.openEstanteLayoutModal = openEstanteLayoutModal;

      // ============================================================
      // Modal de Estantes (Tipo + Níveis + Grupos) — toda configuração
      // ============================================================
      // SVG INTERATIVO da planta do compartimento — paredes/ilhas clicáveis
      // + estantes existentes desenhadas. selectedGid recebe destaque.
      function _renderEstantePlantaPickerSVG(c, selectedGid) {
        const W = 460,
          H = 260,
          pad = 30;
        const aw = Math.max(0.1, c.x1 - c.x0),
          ah = Math.max(0.1, c.y1 - c.y0);
        const sc = Math.min((W - 2 * pad) / aw, (H - 2 * pad) / ah);
        const rW = aw * sc,
          rH = ah * sc;
        const oX = (W - rW) / 2,
          oY = (H - rH) / 2;
        const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
        const grupos = est.grupos || [];
        const portasSidesC = _portasPorParede(c.name);
        const profMm = _profEstanteMmFromTipo(est.tipo);
        const profPx = Math.max(5, Math.min(14, (profMm / 1000) * sc));
        const largEstM = _largEstanteMmFromTipo(est.tipo) / 1000;

        // Marcadores de porta (visual: barra vermelha curta na parede)
        const compPortas = (
          (formData.step4 && formData.step4.portas) ||
          []
        ).filter((p) => p.compartimento_id === c.name);
        const doorRanges = { top: [], bottom: [], left: [], right: [] };
        compPortas.forEach((p) => {
          const w = String(p.parede || "").toLowerCase();
          const largM = (parseFloat(p.largura) || 0) / 1000;
          if (largM <= 0) return;
          const pct =
            Math.max(0, Math.min(100, parseFloat(p.posicao_pct) || 50)) / 100;
          let side = null;
          if (w.includes("frontal") || w.includes("norte")) side = "top";
          else if (w.includes("posterior") || w.includes("sul"))
            side = "bottom";
          else if (w.includes("esquerda") || w.includes("oeste")) side = "left";
          else if (w.includes("direita") || w.includes("leste")) side = "right";
          if (!side) return;
          const segLen = side === "top" || side === "bottom" ? aw : ah;
          const center = pct * segLen;
          doorRanges[side].push([center - largM / 2, center + largM / 2]);
        });

        let svg = `<svg viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="display:block;width:100%;height:auto;background:#fff;border-radius:8px;user-select:none;">`;
        // Pattern hachurado para zonas de porta
        svg += `<defs><pattern id="doorHatch" width="6" height="6" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse" patternTransform="rotate(45)"><rect width="6" height="6" fill="rgba(239,68,68,0.18)"/><line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="6" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.2"/></pattern></defs>`;
        // Fundo do compartimento
        svg += `<rect x="${oX}" y="${oY}" width="${rW}" height="${rH}" fill="rgba(59,130,246,0.04)" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1.2" rx="2"/>`;
        // Cotas
        svg += `<text x="${oX + rW / 2}" y="${oY - 10}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#475569" font-weight="600">↔ ${aw.toFixed(2)}m</text>`;
        svg += `<text x="${oX - 10}" y="${oY + rH / 2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#475569" font-weight="600" transform="rotate(-90, ${oX - 10}, ${oY + rH / 2})">↕ ${ah.toFixed(2)}m</text>`;

        // Zonas de porta — faixa hachurada ao longo da parede com largura ~ profundidade da estante (mostra área bloqueada)
        const doorBandPx = Math.max(10, profPx + 4);
        const drawDoorZone = (side) => {
          (doorRanges[side] || []).forEach(([a, b]) => {
            const lenPx = (b - a) * sc;
            if (side === "top")
              svg += `<rect x="${(oX + a * sc).toFixed(2)}" y="${oY.toFixed(2)}" width="${lenPx.toFixed(2)}" height="${doorBandPx}" fill="url(#doorHatch)" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>`;
            else if (side === "bottom")
              svg += `<rect x="${(oX + a * sc).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + rH - doorBandPx).toFixed(2)}" width="${lenPx.toFixed(2)}" height="${doorBandPx}" fill="url(#doorHatch)" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>`;
            else if (side === "left")
              svg += `<rect x="${oX.toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + a * sc).toFixed(2)}" width="${doorBandPx}" height="${lenPx.toFixed(2)}" fill="url(#doorHatch)" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>`;
            else if (side === "right")
              svg += `<rect x="${(oX + rW - doorBandPx).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + a * sc).toFixed(2)}" width="${doorBandPx}" height="${lenPx.toFixed(2)}" fill="url(#doorHatch)" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>`;
          });
        };
        ["top", "bottom", "left", "right"].forEach(drawDoorZone);

        // Marca da porta na borda externa (linha vermelha)
        const drawDoorMark = (side) => {
          (doorRanges[side] || []).forEach(([a, b]) => {
            if (side === "top")
              svg += `<rect x="${(oX + a * sc).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY - 3).toFixed(2)}" width="${((b - a) * sc).toFixed(2)}" height="6" fill="#ef4444" rx="1"/>`;
            else if (side === "bottom")
              svg += `<rect x="${(oX + a * sc).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + rH - 3).toFixed(2)}" width="${((b - a) * sc).toFixed(2)}" height="6" fill="#ef4444" rx="1"/>`;
            else if (side === "left")
              svg += `<rect x="${(oX - 3).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + a * sc).toFixed(2)}" width="6" height="${((b - a) * sc).toFixed(2)}" fill="#ef4444" rx="1"/>`;
            else if (side === "right")
              svg += `<rect x="${(oX + rW - 3).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + a * sc).toFixed(2)}" width="6" height="${((b - a) * sc).toFixed(2)}" fill="#ef4444" rx="1"/>`;
          });
        };
        ["top", "bottom", "left", "right"].forEach(drawDoorMark);

        // Estantes existentes (mostradas em marrom, com destaque para o selecionado)
        const drawShelvesForGroup = (g) => {
          const isSel = g.id === selectedGid;
          const fill = isSel ? "#3b82f6" : "#a16207";
          const stroke = isSel ? "#1e40af" : "#78350f";
          const op = isSel ? 0.85 : 0.55;
          const wallM = _wallLengthM(c, g.parede);
          if (wallM <= 0) return;
          const range = _grupoSegmentRange(c, g);
          const cnt = parseInt(g.qtd) || 0;
          if (cnt <= 0) return;
          // Distribui cnt no sub-range, evitando portas (apenas para paredes)
          const buildSegs = (totalLen, doors) => {
            const sorted = (doors || []).slice().sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]);
            const segs = [];
            let cur = 0;
            sorted.forEach(([lo, hi]) => {
              if (lo > cur + 0.05) segs.push([cur, lo]);
              cur = Math.max(cur, hi);
            });
            if (totalLen - cur > 0.05) segs.push([cur, totalLen]);
            return segs;
          };
          if (g.parede === "ilhaV") {
            const cx = oX + rW / 2;
            const each = (range[1] - range[0]) / cnt;
            for (let i = 0; i < cnt; i++) {
              const ry = oY + (range[0] + each * i) * sc + 1;
              const rh = Math.max(4, each * sc - 2);
              svg += `<rect x="${(cx - profPx / 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${ry.toFixed(2)}" width="${profPx.toFixed(2)}" height="${rh.toFixed(2)}" fill="${fill}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="${op}" rx="0.6"/>`;
            }
          } else if (g.parede === "ilhaH") {
            const cy = oY + rH / 2;
            const each = (range[1] - range[0]) / cnt;
            for (let i = 0; i < cnt; i++) {
              const rx = oX + (range[0] + each * i) * sc + 1;
              const rw = Math.max(4, each * sc - 2);
              svg += `<rect x="${rx.toFixed(2)}" y="${(cy - profPx / 2).toFixed(2)}" width="${rw.toFixed(2)}" height="${profPx.toFixed(2)}" fill="${fill}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="${op}" rx="0.6"/>`;
            }
          } else {
            // Parede: clipa range × segs livres
            const isHor = g.parede === "top" || g.parede === "bottom";
            const totalLen = isHor ? aw : ah;
            const segsAll = buildSegs(totalLen, doorRanges[g.parede]);
            const segs = segsAll
              .map(([a, b]) => [Math.max(a, range[0]), Math.min(b, range[1])])
              .filter(([a, b]) => b - a > 0.05);
            const totalFree = segs.reduce((s, [a, b]) => s + (b - a), 0);
            if (totalFree <= 0.05) return;
            segs.forEach(([a, b]) => {
              const segLen = b - a;
              const segCount = Math.round((segLen / totalFree) * cnt);
              if (segCount <= 0) return;
              const each = segLen / segCount;
              for (let i = 0; i < segCount; i++) {
                const localCenter = a + each * (i + 0.5);
                if (isHor) {
                  const sx = oX + (localCenter - each / 2) * sc + 1;
                  const sw = Math.max(4, each * sc - 2);
                  if (g.parede === "top")
                    svg += `<rect x="${sx.toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + 1).toFixed(2)}" width="${sw.toFixed(2)}" height="${profPx}" fill="${fill}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="${op}" rx="0.6"/>`;
                  else
                    svg += `<rect x="${sx.toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + rH - profPx - 1).toFixed(2)}" width="${sw.toFixed(2)}" height="${profPx}" fill="${fill}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="${op}" rx="0.6"/>`;
                } else {
                  const sy = oY + (localCenter - each / 2) * sc + 1;
                  const sh = Math.max(4, each * sc - 2);
                  if (g.parede === "left")
                    svg += `<rect x="${(oX + 1).toFixed(2)}" y="${sy.toFixed(2)}" width="${profPx}" height="${sh.toFixed(2)}" fill="${fill}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="${op}" rx="0.6"/>`;
                  else
                    svg += `<rect x="${(oX + rW - profPx - 1).toFixed(2)}" y="${sy.toFixed(2)}" width="${profPx}" height="${sh.toFixed(2)}" fill="${fill}" stroke="${stroke}" stroke-width="0.6" opacity="${op}" rx="0.6"/>`;
                }
              }
            });
          }
        };
        grupos.forEach(drawShelvesForGroup);

        // Eixos clicáveis (ilhas, dashed)
        const ilhaVHasGroup = grupos.some((g) => g.parede === "ilhaV");
        const ilhaHHasGroup = grupos.some((g) => g.parede === "ilhaH");
        const ilhaVColor = ilhaVHasGroup ? "#a16207" : "#94a3b8";
        const ilhaHColor = ilhaHHasGroup ? "#a16207" : "#94a3b8";
        // Vertical (linha do meio em y, do topo ao fundo)
        svg += `<g style="cursor:pointer;" data-pick-parede="ilhaV">
          <line x1="${(oX + rW / 2).toFixed(2)}" y1="${(oY + 8).toFixed(2)}" x2="${(oX + rW / 2).toFixed(2)}" y2="${(oY + rH - 8).toFixed(2)}" stroke="${ilhaVColor}" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-dasharray="4,3" opacity="0.7"/>
          <rect x="${(oX + rW / 2 - 12).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + 8).toFixed(2)}" width="24" height="${(rH - 16).toFixed(2)}" fill="transparent"/>
          <text x="${(oX + rW / 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + rH / 2).toFixed(2)}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="${ilhaVColor}" font-weight="700" transform="rotate(-90, ${(oX + rW / 2).toFixed(2)}, ${(oY + rH / 2).toFixed(2)})">ILHA ↕</text>
        </g>`;
        svg += `<g style="cursor:pointer;" data-pick-parede="ilhaH">
          <line x1="${(oX + 8).toFixed(2)}" y1="${(oY + rH / 2).toFixed(2)}" x2="${(oX + rW - 8).toFixed(2)}" y2="${(oY + rH / 2).toFixed(2)}" stroke="${ilhaHColor}" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-dasharray="4,3" opacity="0.7"/>
          <rect x="${(oX + 8).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + rH / 2 - 12).toFixed(2)}" width="${(rW - 16).toFixed(2)}" height="24" fill="transparent"/>
          <text x="${(oX + rW / 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + rH / 2 - 6).toFixed(2)}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="${ilhaHColor}" font-weight="700">ILHA ↔</text>
        </g>`;

        // Paredes clicáveis (com hit-area larger)
        const wallStyle = (side) => {
          const has = grupos.some((g) => g.parede === side);
          const conf = portasSidesC[side];
          const color = has ? "#a16207" : conf ? "#f59e0b" : "#3b82f6";
          const lblColor = has ? "#78350f" : conf ? "#b45309" : "#1d4ed8";
          return { color, lblColor };
        };
        const wallHit = 16;
        const styT = wallStyle("top");
        const styB = wallStyle("bottom");
        const styL = wallStyle("left");
        const styR = wallStyle("right");
        // Top
        svg += `<g style="cursor:pointer;" data-pick-parede="top">
          <rect x="${(oX - 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY - wallHit / 2).toFixed(2)}" width="${(rW + 4).toFixed(2)}" height="${wallHit}" fill="transparent"/>
          <line x1="${oX.toFixed(2)}" y1="${oY.toFixed(2)}" x2="${(oX + rW).toFixed(2)}" y2="${oY.toFixed(2)}" stroke="${styT.color}" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.85"/>
          <text x="${(oX + rW / 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + 12).toFixed(2)}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="${styT.lblColor}" font-weight="700">FRONTAL</text>
        </g>`;
        // Bottom
        svg += `<g style="cursor:pointer;" data-pick-parede="bottom">
          <rect x="${(oX - 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + rH - wallHit / 2).toFixed(2)}" width="${(rW + 4).toFixed(2)}" height="${wallHit}" fill="transparent"/>
          <line x1="${oX.toFixed(2)}" y1="${(oY + rH).toFixed(2)}" x2="${(oX + rW).toFixed(2)}" y2="${(oY + rH).toFixed(2)}" stroke="${styB.color}" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.85"/>
          <text x="${(oX + rW / 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + rH - 5).toFixed(2)}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="${styB.lblColor}" font-weight="700">POSTERIOR</text>
        </g>`;
        // Left
        svg += `<g style="cursor:pointer;" data-pick-parede="left">
          <rect x="${(oX - wallHit / 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY - 2).toFixed(2)}" width="${wallHit}" height="${(rH + 4).toFixed(2)}" fill="transparent"/>
          <line x1="${oX.toFixed(2)}" y1="${oY.toFixed(2)}" x2="${oX.toFixed(2)}" y2="${(oY + rH).toFixed(2)}" stroke="${styL.color}" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.85"/>
          <text x="${(oX + 12).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + rH / 2).toFixed(2)}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="${styL.lblColor}" font-weight="700" transform="rotate(-90, ${(oX + 12).toFixed(2)}, ${(oY + rH / 2).toFixed(2)})">ESQUERDA</text>
        </g>`;
        // Right
        svg += `<g style="cursor:pointer;" data-pick-parede="right">
          <rect x="${(oX + rW - wallHit / 2).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY - 2).toFixed(2)}" width="${wallHit}" height="${(rH + 4).toFixed(2)}" fill="transparent"/>
          <line x1="${(oX + rW).toFixed(2)}" y1="${oY.toFixed(2)}" x2="${(oX + rW).toFixed(2)}" y2="${(oY + rH).toFixed(2)}" stroke="${styR.color}" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.85"/>
          <text x="${(oX + rW - 12).toFixed(2)}" y="${(oY + rH / 2).toFixed(2)}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="${styR.lblColor}" font-weight="700" transform="rotate(90, ${(oX + rW - 12).toFixed(2)}, ${(oY + rH / 2).toFixed(2)})">DIREITA</text>
        </g>`;

        svg += `</svg>`;
        return svg;
      }

      function _renderEstanteEditorBodyHTML(c, selectedGid) {
        const estante = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
        _refreshEstanteAutoQtd(c.name, c);
        const grupos = estante.grupos || [];
        const totalEst = _grupoTotalQtd(estante);
        const portasSidesC = _portasPorParede(c.name);
        const tiposEstante = [
          "Macom Inox (L: 1000 x P: 500)",
          "Macom Inox (L: 1200 x P: 500)",
          "Macom Inox (L: 1500 x P: 500)",
          "Pratecom Aramada (L: 900 x P: 450)",
          "Pratecom Aramada (L: 1200 x P: 450)",
          "Pratecom Aramada (L: 1200 x P: 600)",
        ];
        const largEstM = _largEstanteMmFromTipo(estante.tipo) / 1000;

        let html = `<div class="form-grid" style="grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;">
          <div class="form-field">
            <label style="font-size:11px;">Tipo (mesmo p/ todos os grupos)</label>
            <select data-estante-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" data-estante-field="tipo">
              <option value="">— sem estantes —</option>
              ${tiposEstante.map((o) => `<option value="${escapeHtml(o)}"${estante.tipo === o ? " selected" : ""}>${escapeHtml(o)}</option>`).join("")}
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="form-field">
            <label style="font-size:11px;">Níveis/estante</label>
            <select data-estante-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" data-estante-field="niveis">
              <option value="">—</option>
              ${["3", "4", "5", "6"].map((o) => `<option value="${o}"${String(estante.niveis) === o ? " selected" : ""}>${o}</option>`).join("")}
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>`;

        if (!estante.tipo) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:11.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;padding:14px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">⬆️ Selecione um tipo de estante para começar.</div>`;
          return html;
        }

        // Planta clicável
        html += `<div style="background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:10px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:10px;">
          <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:6px;">
            <span>👆 <strong>Clique</strong> em uma parede ou eixo de ilha para adicionar/selecionar. <em>Clique novamente</em> na parede selecionada para desmarcar.</span>
            <span>Total: <strong style="color:var(--text-primary);">${totalEst}</strong> estante(s)</span>
          </div>
          <div data-planta-host style="max-width:400px;margin:0 auto;">${_renderEstantePlantaPickerSVG(c, selectedGid)}</div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><span style="width:14px;height:3px;background:#3b82f6;border-radius:1px;"></span>livre</span>
            <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><span style="width:14px;height:3px;background:#a16207;border-radius:1px;"></span>tem grupo</span>
            <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><span style="width:14px;height:3px;background:#f59e0b;border-radius:1px;"></span>tem porta</span>
            <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><span style="width:12px;height:8px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.25);border:1px dashed #ef4444;"></span>área bloqueada (porta)</span>
            <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><span style="width:10px;height:10px;background:#a16207;border-radius:2px;opacity:0.6;"></span>estantes</span>
            <span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><span style="width:10px;height:10px;background:#3b82f6;border-radius:2px;"></span>selecionado</span>
          </div>
        </div>`;

        // Pills de grupos
        if (grupos.length > 0) {
          html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px;">`;
          grupos.forEach((g, gi) => {
            const isSel = g.id === selectedGid;
            const lbl = PAREDE_LABELS_PT[g.parede] || g.parede;
            const pct = Math.round((parseFloat(g.fracao) || 1) * 100);
            const conf =
              portasSidesC[g.parede] &&
              (g.parede === "top" ||
                g.parede === "bottom" ||
                g.parede === "left" ||
                g.parede === "right");
            const accent = isSel
              ? "#3b82f6"
              : conf
                ? "#f59e0b"
                : "var(--border-color)";
            const bg = isSel ? "rgba(59,130,246,0.10)" : "var(--bg-card)";
            html += `<div style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;border:1.5px solid ${accent};background:${bg};border-radius:14px;padding:3px 4px 3px 10px;">
              <button type="button" data-grupo-select="${escapeAttr(g.id)}" style="background:transparent;border:none;color:var(--text-primary);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;padding:0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">
                <strong style="color:${isSel ? "#3b82f6" : "#a16207"};">G${gi + 1}</strong>
                <span>${escapeHtml(lbl)} · ${pct}% · <strong>${parseInt(g.qtd) || 0}</strong></span>${conf ? " ⚠️" : ""}
              </button>
              <button type="button" data-grupo-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" data-grupo-id="${escapeAttr(g.id)}" data-grupo-remove="1" title="Remover grupo" style="background:transparent;border:none;color:#ef4444;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;line-height:1;padding:0 4px;">✕</button>
            </div>`;
          });
          html += `</div>`;
        }

        // Editor inline do grupo selecionado
        const sel = grupos.find((g) => g.id === selectedGid);
        if (sel) {
          const lblSel = PAREDE_LABELS_PT[sel.parede] || sel.parede;
          const wallM = _wallLengthM(c, sel.parede);
          const segLenM = wallM * (parseFloat(sel.fracao) || 1);
          const sliderPct = Math.round((parseFloat(sel.fracao) || 1) * 100);
          const isWallSel =
            sel.parede === "top" ||
            sel.parede === "bottom" ||
            sel.parede === "left" ||
            sel.parede === "right";
          const conf = portasSidesC[sel.parede] && isWallSel;
          // Comprimento livre dentro do range, descontando portas
          let freeM = segLenM;
          let blockedM = 0;
          if (isWallSel) {
            const [rs, re] = _grupoSegmentRange(c, sel);
            const doors = _doorRangesPorParede(c.name, c, sel.parede);
            const free = _subtractRanges(rs, re, doors);
            freeM = free.reduce((s, [a, b]) => s + (b - a), 0);
            blockedM = Math.max(0, segLenM - freeM);
          }
          const cabeAuto = largEstM > 0 ? Math.floor(freeM / largEstM) : 0;
          const fracaoBtns = FRACAO_PRESETS.map((fp) => {
            const selF = Math.abs((parseFloat(sel.fracao) || 1) - fp.v) < 0.01;
            return `<button type="button" data-grupo-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" data-grupo-id="${escapeAttr(sel.id)}" data-grupo-fracao="${fp.v}" title="${escapeAttr(fp.desc)}" style="padding:3px 9px;border:1.5px solid ${selF ? "#3b82f6" : "var(--border-color)"};background:${selF ? "rgba(59,130,246,0.10)" : "var(--bg-card)"};color:${selF ? "#3b82f6" : "var(--text-primary)"};border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">${fp.label}</button>`;
          }).join("");
          const alinhamentoBtns = [
            { id: "inicio", label: "⇤ Início" },
            { id: "centro", label: "⇔ Centro" },
            { id: "fim", label: "Fim ⇥" },
          ]
            .map((a) => {
              const selA = (sel.alinhamento || "centro") === a.id;
              return `<button type="button" data-grupo-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" data-grupo-id="${escapeAttr(sel.id)}" data-grupo-alinhamento="${a.id}" style="padding:3px 9px;border:1.5px solid ${selA ? "#3b82f6" : "var(--border-color)"};background:${selA ? "rgba(59,130,246,0.10)" : "var(--bg-card)"};color:${selA ? "#3b82f6" : "var(--text-primary)"};border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">${a.label}</button>`;
            })
            .join("");
          html += `<div style="border:1.5px solid #3b82f6;border-radius:10px;padding:11px;background:rgba(59,130,246,0.04);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
              <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">📐 Editando grupo em <span style="color:#3b82f6;">${escapeHtml(lblSel)}</span></div>
              <span style="font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${segLenM > 0 ? segLenM.toFixed(2) : "—"}m${blockedM > 0.01 ? ` (livre: <strong style="color:#16a34a;">${freeM.toFixed(2)}m</strong>, porta: <strong style="color:#ef4444;">${blockedM.toFixed(2)}m</strong>)` : ""} · cabe ~${cabeAuto}</span>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-bottom:7px;">
              <span style="font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);min-width:54px;">Fração:</span>
              ${fracaoBtns}
              <input type="range" min="10" max="100" step="5" value="${sliderPct}" data-grupo-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" data-grupo-id="${escapeAttr(sel.id)}" data-grupo-slider="1" style="flex:1;min-width:120px;max-width:220px;accent-color:#3b82f6;"/>
              <span style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#3b82f6;min-width:38px;text-align:right;">${sliderPct}%</span>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-bottom:7px;">
              <span style="font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);min-width:54px;">Alinhar:</span>
              ${alinhamentoBtns}
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <span style="font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);min-width:54px;">Qtd:</span>
              <input type="number" min="0" max="${isWallSel ? 50 : 1}" step="1" value="${parseInt(sel.qtd) || 0}" data-grupo-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" data-grupo-id="${escapeAttr(sel.id)}" data-grupo-qtd="1" ${!isWallSel ? 'title="Ilhas: máximo 1 módulo por grupo"' : ""} style="width:70px;padding:3px 6px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:4px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;text-align:center;background:${sel.qtdAuto ? "var(--bg-tertiary)" : "var(--bg-card)"};"/>
              <button type="button" data-grupo-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" data-grupo-id="${escapeAttr(sel.id)}" data-grupo-auto="1" title="Calcular automaticamente" style="padding:3px 9px;border:1.5px solid ${sel.qtdAuto ? "#3b82f6" : "var(--border-color)"};background:${sel.qtdAuto ? "rgba(59,130,246,0.10)" : "var(--bg-card)"};color:${sel.qtdAuto ? "#3b82f6" : "var(--text-primary)"};border-radius:5px;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">${sel.qtdAuto ? "⚙ auto" : "fixar manual"}</button>
              <button type="button" data-grupo-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" data-grupo-id="${escapeAttr(sel.id)}" data-grupo-remove="1" style="margin-left:auto;padding:3px 10px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);background:transparent;color:#ef4444;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">🗑️ Remover grupo</button>
              ${conf && blockedM > 0.01 ? `<span style="font-size:10.5px;color:#ef4444;width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-top:3px;">⚠️ <strong>${blockedM.toFixed(2)}m</strong> bloqueado pela porta — use <strong>fração menor</strong> ou alinhe a um lado para evitar a área vermelha.</span>` : conf ? `<span style="font-size:10px;color:#f59e0b;width:100%;">⚠️ esta parede tem porta — observe a faixa vermelha</span>` : ""}
            </div>
          </div>`;
        } else if (grupos.length === 0) {
          html += `<div style="font-size:11.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;padding:14px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:8px;text-align:center;">👆 Clique em uma parede ou eixo de ilha na planta acima para adicionar o primeiro grupo.</div>`;
        } else {
          html += `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;padding:10px;text-align:center;">Selecione um grupo (clique no chip ou na parede correspondente) para editar fração, alinhamento ou quantidade.</div>`;
        }
        return html;
      }

      function _bindEstanteModalEvents(overlay, c) {
        const body = overlay.querySelector("[data-modal-body]");
        if (!body) return;
        const getSelGid = () => overlay.dataset.selGid || "";
        const setSelGid = (gid) => {
          overlay.dataset.selGid = gid || "";
        };
        const rerenderModal = () => {
          body.innerHTML = _renderEstanteEditorBodyHTML(c, getSelGid());
          _bindEstanteModalEvents(overlay, c);
          if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === "function")
            refreshChamberVisualizer();
        };
        const _findGrupo = (gid) => {
          const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
          return (est.grupos || []).find((g) => g.id === gid);
        };
        const persist = () => {
          try {
            saveToStorage();
          } catch (e) {}
        };
        const syncDerived = () => {
          const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
          est.quantidade = _grupoTotalQtd(est);
          est.encosto = _gruposToEncostoLegacy(est.grupos);
        };

        // Tipo / Níveis
        body.querySelectorAll("[data-estante-comp]").forEach((el) => {
          const field = el.getAttribute("data-estante-field");
          const change = () => {
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
            est[field] = el.value;
            persist();
            rerenderModal();
          };
          el.addEventListener("change", change);
          el.addEventListener("input", change);
        });

        // Clique numa parede/eixo de ilha → toggle: se já é a parede do grupo selecionado, deseleciona;
        // se há outro grupo nessa parede, seleciona-o; senão, adiciona um novo.
        body.querySelectorAll("[data-pick-parede]").forEach((el) => {
          el.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const parede = el.getAttribute("data-pick-parede");
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
            const curSel = (est.grupos || []).find((g) => g.id === getSelGid());
            // Toggle off: clique na mesma parede do grupo já selecionado
            if (curSel && curSel.parede === parede) {
              setSelGid("");
              rerenderModal();
              return;
            }
            const existing = (est.grupos || []).filter(
              (g) => g.parede === parede,
            );
            if (existing.length > 0) {
              setSelGid(existing[existing.length - 1].id);
            } else {
              const g = _newEstanteGrupo(parede);
              g.qtd = _autoQtdGrupo(c, g, est.tipo);
              est.grupos.push(g);
              setSelGid(g.id);
              syncDerived();
              persist();
            }
            rerenderModal();
          });
        });

        // Selecionar grupo via pill
        body.querySelectorAll("[data-grupo-select]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const gid = btn.getAttribute("data-grupo-select");
            setSelGid(getSelGid() === gid ? "" : gid);
            rerenderModal();
          });
        });

        // Remover grupo
        body.querySelectorAll("[data-grupo-remove]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const gid = btn.getAttribute("data-grupo-id");
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
            est.grupos = (est.grupos || []).filter((g) => g.id !== gid);
            if (getSelGid() === gid) setSelGid("");
            syncDerived();
            persist();
            rerenderModal();
          });
        });

        // Fração (presets)
        body.querySelectorAll("[data-grupo-fracao]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const gid = btn.getAttribute("data-grupo-id");
            const v = parseFloat(btn.getAttribute("data-grupo-fracao")) || 1;
            const g = _findGrupo(gid);
            if (!g) return;
            g.fracao = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(1, v));
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
            if (g.qtdAuto) g.qtd = _autoQtdGrupo(c, g, est.tipo);
            syncDerived();
            persist();
            rerenderModal();
          });
        });

        // Slider — atualiza ao vivo a planta dentro do modal sem rerender completo
        body.querySelectorAll("[data-grupo-slider]").forEach((rng) => {
          const gid = rng.getAttribute("data-grupo-id");
          const live = () => {
            const g = _findGrupo(gid);
            if (!g) return;
            g.fracao = Math.max(
              0.1,
              Math.min(1, (parseFloat(rng.value) || 100) / 100),
            );
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
            if (g.qtdAuto) g.qtd = _autoQtdGrupo(c, g, est.tipo);
            syncDerived();
            persist();
            // Atualiza apenas o SVG da planta + label do %
            const host = body.querySelector("[data-planta-host]");
            if (host) {
              host.innerHTML = _renderEstantePlantaPickerSVG(c, getSelGid());
              // Re-bind clicks no SVG recém-renderizado
              host.querySelectorAll("[data-pick-parede]").forEach((el) => {
                el.addEventListener("click", () => {
                  const parede = el.getAttribute("data-pick-parede");
                  const est2 = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
                  const curSel2 = (est2.grupos || []).find(
                    (g2) => g2.id === getSelGid(),
                  );
                  if (curSel2 && curSel2.parede === parede) {
                    setSelGid("");
                    rerenderModal();
                    return;
                  }
                  const existing = (est2.grupos || []).filter(
                    (g2) => g2.parede === parede,
                  );
                  if (existing.length > 0)
                    setSelGid(existing[existing.length - 1].id);
                  else {
                    const ng = _newEstanteGrupo(parede);
                    ng.qtd = _autoQtdGrupo(c, ng, est2.tipo);
                    est2.grupos.push(ng);
                    setSelGid(ng.id);
                    syncDerived();
                    persist();
                  }
                  rerenderModal();
                });
              });
            }
            const lbl =
              rng.parentElement &&
              rng.parentElement.querySelector("[data-grupo-slider] + span");
            if (lbl) lbl.textContent = `${Math.round(g.fracao * 100)}%`;
            if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === "function")
              refreshChamberVisualizer();
          };
          rng.addEventListener("input", live);
          rng.addEventListener("change", () => {
            live();
            rerenderModal();
          });
        });

        // Alinhamento
        body.querySelectorAll("[data-grupo-alinhamento]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const gid = btn.getAttribute("data-grupo-id");
            const al = btn.getAttribute("data-grupo-alinhamento");
            const g = _findGrupo(gid);
            if (!g) return;
            g.alinhamento = al;
            persist();
            rerenderModal();
          });
        });

        // Qtd manual
        body.querySelectorAll("[data-grupo-qtd]").forEach((inp) => {
          const gid = inp.getAttribute("data-grupo-id");
          const change = () => {
            const g = _findGrupo(gid);
            if (!g) return;
            const isIlha = g.parede === "ilhaV" || g.parede === "ilhaH";
            let q = Math.max(0, parseInt(inp.value) || 0);
            if (isIlha) q = Math.min(1, q);
            g.qtd = q;
            g.qtdAuto = false;
            syncDerived();
            persist();
            if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === "function")
              refreshChamberVisualizer();
          };
          inp.addEventListener("input", change);
          inp.addEventListener("change", () => {
            change();
            rerenderModal();
          });
        });

        // Toggle auto
        body.querySelectorAll("[data-grupo-auto]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const gid = btn.getAttribute("data-grupo-id");
            const g = _findGrupo(gid);
            if (!g) return;
            g.qtdAuto = !g.qtdAuto;
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
            if (g.qtdAuto) g.qtd = _autoQtdGrupo(c, g, est.tipo);
            syncDerived();
            persist();
            rerenderModal();
          });
        });
      }

      function openEstantesModal(c) {
        const existing = document.getElementById("estantesOverlay");
        if (existing) existing.remove();
        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "estantesOverlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:10260;padding:12px;";
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:14px;width:100%;max-width:780px;max-height:92vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);overflow:hidden;">
            <div style="padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
              <div>
                <h3 style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;margin:0;">📚 Estantes — ${escapeHtml(c.name)}</h3>
                <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;">Tipo, níveis e grupos (parede + fração + alinhamento) deste compartimento.</div>
              </div>
              <button id="esClose" type="button" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:18px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div data-modal-body style="padding:16px 18px;overflow-y:auto;flex:1;">${_renderEstanteEditorBodyHTML(c)}</div>
            <div style="padding:10px 18px;border-top:1px solid var(--border-color);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;">
              <button id="esClear" type="button" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:#ef4444;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">🗑️ Limpar tudo</button>
              <button id="esDone" type="button" style="padding:7px 14px;background:var(--color-primary);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;">Concluir</button>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        const close = () => {
          overlay.remove();
          renderCurrentStep();
        };
        overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === overlay) close();
        });
        overlay.querySelector("#esClose").addEventListener("click", close);
        overlay.querySelector("#esDone").addEventListener("click", close);
        overlay.querySelector("#esClear").addEventListener("click", () => {
          if (!confirm(`Remover todas as estantes do compartimento ${c.name}?`))
            return;
          const est = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
          est.tipo = "";
          est.niveis = "";
          est.quantidade = "";
          est.encosto = "";
          est.grupos = [];
          try {
            saveToStorage();
          } catch (e) {}
          close();
        });
        _bindEstanteModalEvents(overlay, c);
      }
      window.openEstantesModal = openEstantesModal;

      // Resumo compacto inline: mini-preview + label + botão para abrir o modal completo.
      function renderEncostoVisualSelector(c, currentValue) {
        const layout = parseEncostoLayout(currentValue);
        const portasSides = _portasPorParede(c.name);
        const aspectW = Math.max(0.1, c.x1 - c.x0);
        const aspectH = Math.max(0.1, c.y1 - c.y0);
        const previewSvg = renderEncostoMiniPreviewSVG(layout, {
          W: 110,
          H: 78,
          aspectW,
          aspectH,
          portasSides,
        });
        const conflicts = (layout.sides || []).filter((s) => portasSides[s]);
        const conflictMsg = conflicts.length
          ? `⚠️ Conflito com porta em: ${conflicts.map((s) => ({ top: "frontal", bottom: "posterior", left: "esquerda", right: "direita" })[s]).join(", ")}`
          : "";
        const isEmpty = (layout.sides || []).length === 0 && !layout.ilha;
        return `<div style="display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;">
          <div style="flex:0 0 auto;background:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:3px;">${previewSvg}</div>
          <div style="flex:1;min-width:160px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;">
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Layout atual:</div>
            <div style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:${isEmpty ? "var(--text-secondary)" : "var(--text-primary)"};">${escapeHtml(encostoLabelPt(layout))}</div>
            ${conflictMsg ? `<div style="font-size:10.5px;color:#f59e0b;line-height:1.3;">${conflictMsg}</div>` : ""}
          </div>
          <button type="button" data-open-estante-modal="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="padding:8px 14px;background:var(--color-primary);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">
            📐 ${isEmpty ? "Definir layout" : "Mudar layout"}
          </button>
        </div>`;
      }

      function _migrateLegacyEstanteToFirstComp() {
        const s4 = formData.step4 || {};
        if (!s4.estante_tipo && !s4.estante_quantidade && !s4.estante_niveis)
          return;
        if (
          s4.estantes_por_comp &&
          Object.keys(s4.estantes_por_comp).length > 0
        ) {
          const hasFilled = Object.values(s4.estantes_por_comp).some(
            (e) => e.tipo || e.quantidade || e.niveis,
          );
          if (hasFilled) return;
        }
        let comps = [];
        try {
          const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
          comps = rcComputeCompartments(snap);
        } catch (e) {}
        const first = (comps[0] && comps[0].name) || "C1";
        if (!formData.step4.estantes_por_comp)
          formData.step4.estantes_por_comp = {};
        formData.step4.estantes_por_comp[first] = {
          tipo: s4.estante_tipo || "",
          quantidade: s4.estante_quantidade || "",
          niveis: s4.estante_niveis || "",
        };
      }

      function syncStep4PortasWithCompartments() {
        if (!formData.step4) formData.step4 = {};
        if (!Array.isArray(formData.step4.portas)) formData.step4.portas = [];
        const arr = formData.step4.portas;
        let comps = [];
        try {
          const snap =
            typeof getChamberSnapshot === "function"
              ? getChamberSnapshot()
              : null;
          comps = snap ? rcComputeCompartments(snap) : [];
        } catch (e) {
          comps = [];
        }

        // Migrate legacy single-porta on first run
        if (
          arr.length === 0 &&
          (formData.step4.porta_tipo || formData.step4.porta_largura)
        ) {
          const qtd = Math.max(
            1,
            parseInt(formData.step4.porta_quantidade) || 1,
          );
          const baseId = comps[0]?.name || "C1";
          for (let i = 0; i < qtd; i++) {
            arr.push({
              compartimento_id: comps[i]?.name || baseId,
              tipo: formData.step4.porta_tipo || "",
              largura: formData.step4.porta_largura || "",
              altura: formData.step4.porta_altura || "",
              sentido_abertura: formData.step4.porta_sentido_abertura || "",
              parede: formData.step4.porta_parede || "",
              posicao_pct: formData.step4.porta_posicao_pct || 50,
              acessorios: formData.step4.porta_acessorios || "",
            });
          }
        }

        // NÃO criar portas vazias automaticamente — o usuário deve adicionar
        // explicitamente pelo assistente. A validação já avisa quando faltam.
        // Apenas remover portas órfãs apontando para compartimentos inexistentes.
        if (comps.length > 0) {
          const validIds = new Set(comps.map((c) => c.name));
          for (let i = arr.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const id = arr[i].compartimento_id;
            if (id && !validIds.has(id)) arr.splice(i, 1);
          }
        }

        try {
          saveToStorage();
        } catch (e) {}
      }

      function _portaCompartmentOptions() {
        let comps = [];
        try {
          const snap =
            typeof getChamberSnapshot === "function"
              ? getChamberSnapshot()
              : null;
          comps = snap ? rcComputeCompartments(snap) : [];
        } catch (e) {}
        return comps.length > 0 ? comps.map((c) => c.name) : ["C1"];
      }

      function renderPortasManager() {
        // Sync & migrate
        try {
          _migrateLegacyEstanteToFirstComp();
        } catch (e) {}
        const portas = (formData.step4 && formData.step4.portas) || [];
        const compOpts = _portaCompartmentOptions();
        const errors =
          (validationErrors.step4 && validationErrors.step4._portas) || {};

        let comps = [];
        try {
          const snap =
            typeof getChamberSnapshot === "function"
              ? getChamberSnapshot()
              : null;
          comps = snap ? rcComputeCompartments(snap) : [];
        } catch (e) {
          comps = [];
        }
        if (comps.length === 0) {
          comps = [
            {
              name: "C1",
              w: 0,
              h: 0,
              area: 0,
              x0: 0,
              y0: 0,
              x1: 0,
              y1: 0,
              config: {},
            },
          ];
        }
        const isSingle = comps.length === 1;
        const compsWithoutPorta = comps.filter(
          (c) => !portas.some((p) => p.compartimento_id === c.name),
        ).length;

        const renderPortaCard = (p, idx) => {
          const style = _doorStyleFor(p.tipo);
          const dimTxt =
            p.largura && p.altura
              ? `${p.largura}×${p.altura}mm`
              : "sem dimensão";
          const paredeTxt = p.parede
            ? p.parede.replace(/^Parede\s+/i, "")
            : "sem parede";
          const acessoriosTxt = p.acessorios
            ? String(p.acessorios)
                .split(",")
                .map((s) => s.trim())
                .filter(Boolean)
            : [];
          const sentidoTxt = p.sentido_abertura
            ? p.sentido_abertura
                .replace(/^Abertura\s+/i, "")
                .replace(" (Interna)", "")
                .replace(" (Externa)", "")
                .replace(" (Vai-e-Vem)", "")
            : "";
          return `<div class="array-item" data-porta-card-idx="${idx}" style="border-left:4px solid ${style.color};margin-bottom:8px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:8px;">
            <div class="array-item-header" style="padding:10px 12px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;flex:1;">
                <span style="font-size:18px;line-height:1;">${style.icon}</span>
                <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;">
                  <strong style="font-size:13px;">${escapeHtml(p.tipo || "— configurar —")}</strong>
                  <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">
                    <span>📏 ${dimTxt}</span>
                    <span>🧱 ${escapeHtml(paredeTxt)}</span>
                    ${sentidoTxt ? `<span>↔️ ${escapeHtml(sentidoTxt)}</span>` : ""}
                    ${p.posicao_pct !== "" && p.posicao_pct != null ? `<span>📍 ${p.posicao_pct}%</span>` : ""}
                  </div>
                  ${
                    acessoriosTxt.length
                      ? `<div style="display:flex;gap:3px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:3px;">${acessoriosTxt
                          .slice(0, 4)
                          .map(
                            (a) =>
                              `<span style="font-size:9px;background:${style.color}22;color:${style.color};padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600;">${escapeHtml(a)}</span>`,
                          )
                          .join(
                            "",
                          )}${acessoriosTxt.length > 4 ? `<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);">+${acessoriosTxt.length - 4}</span>` : ""}</div>`
                      : ""
                  }
                </div>
              </span>
              <span style="display:flex;gap:4px;">
                <button type="button" data-open-porta-wizard="" data-edit-porta-idx="${idx}" style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-primary);padding:5px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">✏️ Editar</button>
                <button type="button" class="btn-remove-item" data-porta-remove="${idx}" title="Remover porta">✕</button>
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        };

        let html = `<div class="array-section" id="portasManager">
          <div class="array-header">
            <h4>🚪 Portas, Estantes & Acessórios <span style="font-weight:400;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:12px;">(por compartimento)</span></h4>
            <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${portas.length} porta(s) · ${comps.length} compartimento(s)</span>
          </div>
          <div style="font-size:11px;background:rgba(14,165,233,0.06);border-left:3px solid var(--color-info,#0ea5e9);padding:7px 10px;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.5;">
            ℹ️ Configure portas e estantes por compartimento.
            ${compsWithoutPorta > 0 ? `<strong style="color:var(--color-warning);"> ⚠️ ${compsWithoutPorta} compartimento(s) sem porta.</strong>` : ""}
          </div>`;

        if (errors._array)
          html += `<span class="field-error show" style="display:block;margin-bottom:8px;">${errors._array.join(" ")}</span>`;

        comps.forEach((c) => {
          const equip = _getCompartmentEquipment(c.name);
          const compPortas = portas
            .map((p, idx) => ({ p, idx }))
            .filter((x) => x.p.compartimento_id === c.name);
          const t = equip.temp;
          const tempColor =
            typeof rcColorForTemp === "function"
              ? rcColorForTemp(t)
              : "#cbd5e1";
          const tempBadge =
            t != null && !isNaN(t)
              ? `<span style="display:inline-block;background:${tempColor};color:#fff;font-weight:700;font-size:10px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:6px;">${t}°C</span>`
              : `<span style="display:inline-block;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.15);color:var(--color-error);font-weight:600;font-size:10px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;margin-left:6px;">SEM TEMP</span>`;
          // Badges de equipamento — versão minimalista (só ícones com tooltip)
          const equipIcons = [];
          if (equip.empilhadeira)
            equipIcons.push(
              '<span title="Empilhadeira" style="font-size:13px;">🏗️</span>',
            );
          if (equip.paleteira)
            equipIcons.push(
              '<span title="Paleteira" style="font-size:13px;">🛒</span>',
            );
          if (equip.frequenciaAlta)
            equipIcons.push(
              '<span title="Alta frequência" style="font-size:13px;">⚡</span>',
            );
          if (equip.produtoQuente)
            equipIcons.push(
              '<span title="Produto quente" style="font-size:13px;">🌡️</span>',
            );

          // Hints condensados em apenas 1-2 mensagens críticas
          const hints = [];
          if (compPortas.length === 0)
            hints.push("⚠️ Sem porta — adicione pelo menos uma.");
          if (equip.empilhadeira)
            hints.push("🏗️ Empilhadeira → use porta 2400×3000mm.");
          else if (equip.paleteira)
            hints.push("🛒 Paleteira → mín. 1500×2200mm.");
          if (equip.frequenciaAlta)
            hints.push("⚡ Alta freq. → considere Roll-up + Cortina PVC.");
          if (t != null && t < -10)
            hints.push(`❄️ ${t}°C → só Giratória/Correr Isotérmica.`);

          // Quick-add presets ordered by relevance
          const order = [];
          if (equip.empilhadeira) order.push("empilhadeira");
          if (equip.paleteira) order.push("paleteira");
          if (equip.frequenciaAlta) order.push("rapida");
          if (compPortas.length === 0) order.push("padrao");
          order.push(
            "padrao",
            "expedicao",
            "paleteira",
            "rapida",
            "emergencia",
          );
          if (t == null || t >= -10) order.push("expositora");
          order.push("auxiliar");
          const seen = new Set();
          const presets = order.filter((k) => {
            if (seen.has(k)) return false;
            seen.add(k);
            return !!PORTA_PRESETS[k];
          });

          const compHeader = isSingle ? "🏠 Câmara inteira" : c.name;
          const compDimTxt = c.w && c.h ? `${c.w}×${c.h}m · ${c.area}m²` : "";

          html += `<div class="comp-card" data-comp-card="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px;background:var(--bg-card);border-left:5px solid ${tempColor};">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
              <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                <strong style="font-size:14px;color:var(--text-primary);">${compHeader}</strong>${tempBadge}
                ${compDimTxt ? `<span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${compDimTxt} · ${compPortas.length} porta(s)</span>` : ""}
                ${equipIcons.length ? `<span style="display:inline-flex;gap:4px;margin-left:4px;">${equipIcons.join("")}</span>` : ""}
              </div>
            </div>`;

          if (hints.length > 0) {
            html += `<div style="font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.5;">
              ${hints.map((h) => `<div>${h}</div>`).join("")}
            </div>`;
          }

          // Portas section — minimalista
          html += `<div style="margin-bottom:8px;">
            <div style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:4px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;">🚪 Portas (${compPortas.length})</div>`;
          if (compPortas.length === 0) {
            html += `<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;padding:8px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:6px;text-align:center;">Nenhuma porta — use o botão abaixo</div>`;
          } else {
            compPortas.forEach(({ p, idx }) => {
              html += renderPortaCard(p, idx);
            });
          }

          // Primary CTA: open wizard
          html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;align-items:center;">
            <button type="button" data-open-porta-wizard="" data-add-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="background:var(--color-primary);border:none;color:#fff;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">
              <i data-lucide="plus" style="width:13px;height:13px;"></i> Adicionar Porta
            </button>
            <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">ou:</span>
          </div>`;

          // Quick-add chips: open wizard pre-filled with preset
          html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:6px;">`;
          presets.forEach((key) => {
            const pre = PORTA_PRESETS[key];
            html += `<button type="button" class="btn-add-preset" data-open-porta-wizard="" data-add-preset="${key}" data-add-comp="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:5px 9px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;" title="${escapeAttr(pre.desc)}">
              ${pre.icon} ${escapeHtml(pre.label.split(" (")[0])}
            </button>`;
          });
          html += `</div>`;
          html += `</div>`;

          // Estantes per-compartment (modelo de GRUPOS) — RESUMO INFORMATIVO + modal
          const estante = _getEstantePerComp(c.name);
          // Recalcula qtd automática a cada render para refletir mudanças no tipo/parede
          _refreshEstanteAutoQtd(c.name, c);
          const grupos = estante.grupos || [];
          const totalEst = _grupoTotalQtd(estante);
          const portasSidesC = _portasPorParede(c.name);
          const isEmpty = !estante.tipo && grupos.length === 0;
          const hasConflict = grupos.some(
            (g) =>
              portasSidesC[g.parede] &&
              (g.parede === "top" ||
                g.parede === "bottom" ||
                g.parede === "left" ||
                g.parede === "right"),
          );

          html += `<div style="margin-top:12px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px dashed var(--border-color);">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
              <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.5px;">📚 Estantes deste compartimento</div>
              <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${totalEst} estante(s)${grupos.length ? ` · ${grupos.length} grupo(s)` : ""}</span>
            </div>`;

          if (isEmpty) {
            html += `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px dashed var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;padding:10px;">
              <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-style:italic;flex:1;">Nenhuma estante configurada.</span>
              <button type="button" data-open-estantes-modal="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="background:var(--color-primary);border:none;color:#fff;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;">📐 Configurar estantes</button>
            </div>`;
          } else {
            // Resumo informativo
            const tipoTxt = estante.tipo ? estante.tipo : "— sem tipo —";
            const niveisTxt = estante.niveis
              ? `${estante.niveis} níveis`
              : "— níveis não definidos —";
            const fracLabel = (v) => {
              const fp = FRACAO_PRESETS.find((f) => Math.abs(f.v - v) < 0.01);
              return fp ? fp.label : `${Math.round(v * 100)}%`;
            };
            const alLabel = (a) =>
              ({ inicio: "⇤", centro: "⇔", fim: "⇥" })[a || "centro"] || "⇔";
            const grupoBadges =
              grupos.length === 0
                ? `<span style="font-size:11px;color:#f59e0b;font-style:italic;">⚠️ tipo definido mas nenhum grupo adicionado</span>`
                : grupos
                    .map((g, gi) => {
                      const conf =
                        portasSidesC[g.parede] &&
                        (g.parede === "top" ||
                          g.parede === "bottom" ||
                          g.parede === "left" ||
                          g.parede === "right");
                      const bg = conf
                        ? "rgba(245,158,11,0.10)"
                        : "var(--bg-card)";
                      const bd = conf ? "#f59e0b" : "var(--border-color)";
                      return `<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;background:${bg};border:1px solid ${bd};border-radius:12px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-primary);">
                    <strong style="color:#a16207;">G${gi + 1}</strong>
                    ${escapeHtml(PAREDE_LABELS_PT[g.parede] || g.parede)}
                    · ${fracLabel(parseFloat(g.fracao) || 1)} ${alLabel(g.alinhamento)}
                    · <strong>${parseInt(g.qtd) || 0}</strong>${conf ? " ⚠️" : ""}
                  </span>`;
                    })
                    .join(" ");

            html += `<div style="background:var(--bg-tertiary);border:1px solid ${hasConflict ? "#f59e0b" : "var(--border-color)"};border-left:3px solid #a16207;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;">
              <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;">
                <div style="flex:1;min-width:200px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;">
                  <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">📚 ${escapeHtml(tipoTxt)}</div>
                  <div style="font-size:10.5px;color:var(--text-secondary);">${escapeHtml(niveisTxt)} · ${totalEst} estante(s) total</div>
                </div>
                <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
                  <button type="button" data-open-estantes-modal="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" style="background:var(--color-primary);border:none;color:#fff;padding:6px 11px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;">✏️ Editar</button>
                  <button type="button" data-clear-estantes="${escapeAttr(c.name)}" title="Remover todas as estantes deste compartimento" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:#ef4444;padding:6px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">🗑️ Limpar</button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;">${grupoBadges}</div>
              ${hasConflict ? `<div style="font-size:10px;color:#f59e0b;margin-top:6px;">⚠️ Algum grupo está em uma parede que tem porta — verifique o conflito.</div>` : ""}
            </div>`;
          }
          html += `</div>`;

          html += `</div>`;
        });

        html += `</div>`;
        return html;
      }

      // ---- Visual chip-based selector for chamber-level acessórios (step 4) ----
      const ACESSORIOS_CAMARA = {
        cortina_pvc: {
          label: "Cortina de PVC",
          icon: "🪟",
          desc: "Reduz perda térmica nas aberturas",
          field: "cortina_pvc",
          options: [
            {
              value: "Não",
              label: "Sem cortina",
              icon: "⊘",
              desc: "Não instalar",
            },
            {
              value: "Sim - Transparente",
              label: "Transparente",
              icon: "🪟",
              desc: "Para T ≥ 0°C — visualização",
            },
            {
              value: "Sim - Polar (Anti-UV)",
              label: "Polar (-UV)",
              icon: "❄️",
              desc: "Para T < 0°C — flexível em frio",
            },
          ],
        },
        alarme: {
          label: "Alarme de Temperatura",
          icon: "🚨",
          desc: "Avisa em caso de falha do sistema",
          field: "alarme",
          options: [
            {
              value: "Não",
              label: "Sem alarme",
              icon: "⊘",
              desc: "Sem monitoramento",
            },
            {
              value: "Sim - Sonoro",
              label: "Sonoro",
              icon: "🔔",
              desc: "Sirene básica",
            },
            {
              value: "Sim - Sonoro + Visual",
              label: "Sonoro + Visual",
              icon: "🚨",
              desc: "Sirene + sinaleiro luminoso (recomendado)",
            },
            {
              value: "Sim - Com Discador GSM",
              label: "GSM/SMS",
              icon: "📱",
              desc: "Avisa por SMS — segmento crítico",
            },
          ],
        },
        estrutura_unidade_condensadora: {
          label: "Estrutura p/ Unidade Condensadora",
          icon: "🏗️",
          desc: "Onde fica instalada a unidade externa",
          field: "estrutura_unidade_condensadora",
          options: [
            {
              value: "Não necessária",
              label: "Não nec.",
              icon: "⊘",
              desc: "Já existe local",
            },
            {
              value: "Sobre laje - base metálica",
              label: "Sobre laje",
              icon: "🏢",
              desc: "Estrutura metálica sobre laje",
            },
            {
              value: "Parede - suporte mão francesa",
              label: "Mão francesa",
              icon: "🧱",
              desc: "Suporte fixado na parede",
            },
            {
              value: "Estrutura elevada com escada",
              label: "Elevada",
              icon: "🪜",
              desc: "Plataforma com escada de acesso",
            },
          ],
        },
      };

      function _step4ProductContext() {
        // Coleta dados de produto/temperatura para filtrar acessórios
        let comps = [];
        try {
          const snap =
            typeof getChamberSnapshot === "function"
              ? getChamberSnapshot()
              : null;
          comps = snap ? rcComputeCompartments(snap) : [];
        } catch (e) {}
        let minTemp = Infinity,
          maxTemp = -Infinity;
        const cats = new Set();
        comps.forEach((c) => {
          const cf = c.config || {};
          if (isFinite(cf.temperatura_setpoint)) {
            minTemp = Math.min(minTemp, cf.temperatura_setpoint);
            maxTemp = Math.max(maxTemp, cf.temperatura_setpoint);
          }
