          if (cf.categoria_produto) cats.add(cf.categoria_produto);
        });
        if (!isFinite(minTemp)) minTemp = null;
        if (!isFinite(maxTemp)) maxTemp = null;
        const hasNegative = minTemp != null && minTemp < 0;
        const hasPositive = maxTemp != null && maxTemp >= 0;
        const isCritico =
          cats.has("farmacia_caixa") ||
          cats.has("sorvete") ||
          cats.has("congelados_caixa") ||
          cats.has("pescado_caixa");
        const isFarma = cats.has("farmacia_caixa");
        const hasFreqAlta = comps.some(
          (c) => c.config?.frequencia_aberturas === "alta",
        );
        const empilhadeira = comps.some(
          (c) =>
            c.config?.empilhadeira === "sim" || c.config?.empilhadeira === true,
        );
        const paleteira = comps.some(
          (c) => c.config?.paleteira === "sim" || c.config?.paleteira === true,
        );
        return {
          minTemp,
          maxTemp,
          hasNegative,
          hasPositive,
          isCritico,
          isFarma,
          hasFreqAlta,
          cats,
          empilhadeira,
          paleteira,
        };
      }

      function renderStep4AcessoriosVisual() {
        if (!formData.step4) formData.step4 = {};
        const s4 = formData.step4;
        // Defaults "Nenhum" para acessórios — só aplica se ainda não foram tocados (undefined).
        // Isso permite ao usuário limpar (string vazia) sem voltar para o default.
        if (s4.cortina_pvc === undefined) s4.cortina_pvc = "Não";
        if (s4.alarme === undefined) s4.alarme = "Não";
        if (s4.estrutura_unidade_condensadora === undefined)
          s4.estrutura_unidade_condensadora = "Não necessária";
        const ctx = _step4ProductContext();
        let html = `<div id="step4AcessoriosBlock" style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin:14px 0;">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
            <h4 style="font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0;">✨ Acessórios da Câmara</h4>
            <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Proteções, alarmes e estrutura — clique para selecionar (clique novamente para limpar).</span>
            ${ctx.minTemp != null ? `<span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);background:var(--bg-tertiary);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:10px;">temp: ${ctx.minTemp}°C${ctx.maxTemp !== ctx.minTemp ? " a " + ctx.maxTemp + "°C" : ""}</span>` : ""}
          </div>`;

        Object.values(ACESSORIOS_CAMARA).forEach((group) => {
          // Filtra opções que não fazem sentido para o produto/temperatura
          const visible = group.options.filter((opt) => {
            // Cortina PVC
            if (group.field === "cortina_pvc") {
              if (
                opt.value === "Sim - Transparente" &&
                ctx.hasNegative &&
                !ctx.hasPositive
              )
                return false; // só negativo → polar
              if (
                opt.value === "Sim - Polar (Anti-UV)" &&
                !ctx.hasNegative &&
                ctx.minTemp != null
              )
                return false; // só positivo → transparente basta
            }
            // Alarme
            if (group.field === "alarme") {
              // GSM só faz sentido em segmento crítico (farmácia, congelados profundos)
              if (
                opt.value === "Sim - Com Discador GSM" &&
                !ctx.isCritico &&
                ctx.minTemp != null
              )
                return false;
            }
            return true;
          });
          if (visible.length === 0) return;

          // Smart recommendation por opção
          const isSmart = (opt) => {
            if (group.field === "cortina_pvc") {
              if (
                opt.value === "Sim - Polar (Anti-UV)" &&
                ctx.hasNegative &&
                ctx.hasFreqAlta
              )
                return true;
              if (
                opt.value === "Sim - Transparente" &&
                ctx.hasPositive &&
                !ctx.hasNegative &&
                ctx.hasFreqAlta
              )
                return true;
            }
            if (group.field === "alarme") {
              if (opt.value === "Sim - Com Discador GSM" && ctx.isFarma)
                return true;
              if (
                opt.value === "Sim - Sonoro + Visual" &&
                ctx.isCritico &&
                !ctx.isFarma
              )
                return true;
            }
            return false;
          };

          const cur = s4[group.field] || "";
          const filteredCount = group.options.length - visible.length;
          html += `<div style="margin-bottom:14px;">
            <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
              <span style="font-size:16px;">${group.icon}</span>
              <strong style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-primary);">${escapeHtml(group.label)}</strong>
              <span style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);">— ${escapeHtml(group.desc)}</span>
              ${filteredCount > 0 ? `<span style="font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);background:var(--bg-tertiary);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;" title="Opções ocultas porque não fazem sentido para a temperatura/produto">${filteredCount} opção(ões) oculta(s)</span>` : ""}
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;">
              ${visible
                .map((opt) => {
                  const sel = cur === opt.value;
                  const isOff =
                    /^não/i.test(opt.value) || opt.value === "Não necessária";
                  const accent = isOff
                    ? "var(--text-secondary)"
                    : "var(--color-primary)";
                  const smart = isSmart(opt);
                  return `<button type="button" class="acc-camara-chip" data-acc-camara-field="${group.field}" data-acc-camara-value="${escapeAttr(opt.value)}" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:2px solid ${sel ? accent : smart ? "var(--color-warning)" : "var(--border-color)"};background:${sel ? accent : "var(--bg-tertiary)"};color:${sel ? "#fff" : "var(--text-primary)"};font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;text-align:left;min-width:120px;">
                  <span style="font-size:16px;">${opt.icon}</span>
                  <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;line-height:1.3;flex:1;">
                    <span>${escapeHtml(opt.label)}${smart && !sel ? ' <span style="color:var(--color-warning);">⭐</span>' : ""}</span>
                    <span style="font-size:9px;font-weight:500;opacity:0.85;">${escapeHtml(opt.desc)}</span>
                  </div>
                  ${sel ? '<span style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;">✓</span>' : ""}
                </button>`;
                })
                .join("")}
            </div>
          </div>`;
        });

        html += `</div>`;
        return html;
      }

      function bindStep4AcessoriosChips() {
        const panel = document.getElementById("stepPanels");
        if (!panel) return;
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-acc-camara-field]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const f = btn.getAttribute("data-acc-camara-field");
            const v = btn.getAttribute("data-acc-camara-value");
            if (!formData.step4) formData.step4 = {};
            // Toggle: clicando no mesmo valor selecionado, limpa
            const cur = formData.step4[f] || "";
            formData.step4[f] = cur === v ? "" : v;
            try {
              saveToStorage();
            } catch (e) {}
            // Re-render apenas o bloco (HTML completo, evita patches frágeis)
            const oldBlock = document.getElementById("step4AcessoriosBlock");
            if (oldBlock) {
              const wrap = document.createElement("div");
              wrap.innerHTML = renderStep4AcessoriosVisual();
              const newBlock = wrap.firstElementChild;
              oldBlock.replaceWith(newBlock);
              bindStep4AcessoriosChips();
              if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") {
                try {
                  lucide.createIcons();
                } catch (e) {}
              }
            }
          });
        });
      }

      function bindPortasEvents() {
        const panel = document.getElementById("stepPanels");
        if (!panel) return;

        const rerender = () => {
          const mgr = document.getElementById("portasManager");
          if (mgr) {
            const wrap = document.createElement("div");
            wrap.innerHTML = renderPortasManager();
            mgr.replaceWith(wrap.firstElementChild);
            bindPortasEvents();
            if (typeof lucide !== "undefined") lucide.createIcons();
          }
          if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === "function")
            refreshChamberVisualizer();
        };

        // Per-compartment estantes (tipo/niveis no nível do compartimento)
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-estante-comp]").forEach((el) => {
          const compName = el.getAttribute("data-estante-comp");
          const field = el.getAttribute("data-estante-field");
          const fixedValue = el.getAttribute("data-estante-value"); // chip buttons
          const handler = (val) => {
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(compName);
            est[field] = val;
            try {
              saveToStorage();
            } catch (e) {}
            // Mudança de tipo/níveis afeta auto-qtd e cards visuais → re-render do manager
            if (field === "tipo" || field === "niveis" || field === "encosto") {
              rerender();
            } else if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === "function") {
              refreshChamberVisualizer();
            }
          };
          if (fixedValue !== null) {
            el.addEventListener("click", () => handler(fixedValue));
          } else {
            const change = () => handler(el.value);
            el.addEventListener("input", change);
            el.addEventListener("change", change);
          }
        });

        // ---- Estantes (modal): abrir editor / limpar ----
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-open-estantes-modal]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const compName = btn.getAttribute("data-open-estantes-modal");
            let comps = [];
            try {
              const snap =
                typeof getChamberSnapshot === "function"
                  ? getChamberSnapshot()
                  : null;
              comps = snap ? rcComputeCompartments(snap) : [];
            } catch (e) {
              comps = [];
            }
            const c = comps.find((x) => x.name === compName) || {
              name: compName,
              x0: 0,
              y0: 0,
              x1: 1,
              y1: 1,
              w: 1,
              h: 1,
            };
            openEstantesModal(c);
          });
        });
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-clear-estantes]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const compName = btn.getAttribute("data-clear-estantes");
            if (
              !confirm(
                `Remover todas as estantes do compartimento ${compName}?`,
              )
            )
              return;
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(compName);
            est.tipo = "";
            est.niveis = "";
            est.quantidade = "";
            est.encosto = "";
            est.grupos = [];
            try {
              saveToStorage();
            } catch (e) {}
            rerender();
          });
        });

        // Existing porta field bindings
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-porta-idx]").forEach((el) => {
          const idx = parseInt(el.getAttribute("data-porta-idx"));
          const field = el.getAttribute("data-porta-field");
          const handler = () => {
            if (!Array.isArray(formData.step4.portas))
              formData.step4.portas = [];
            if (!formData.step4.portas[idx]) formData.step4.portas[idx] = {};
            formData.step4.portas[idx][field] = el.value;
            // If compartment changed, auto-correct parede if it's no longer on perimeter
            if (field === "compartimento_id") {
              try {
                const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
                const comps = rcComputeCompartments(snap);
                const newComp = comps.find((c) => c.name === el.value);
                if (newComp) {
                  const allowed = _perimeterWallsForCompartment(newComp, snap);
                  const cur = formData.step4.portas[idx].parede;
                  if (!cur || !allowed.includes(cur)) {
                    const existing = formData.step4.portas.filter(
                      (q, qi) => qi !== idx && q.compartimento_id === el.value,
                    );
                    formData.step4.portas[idx].parede = _pickWallForCompartment(
                      newComp,
                      snap,
                      existing,
                    );
                  }
                }
              } catch (e) {}
            }
            try {
              saveToStorage();
            } catch (e) {}
            // Re-render manager so parede options reflect new compartment
            if (field === "compartimento_id") {
              rerender();
              return;
            }
            if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === "function")
              refreshChamberVisualizer();
          };
          el.addEventListener("input", handler);
          el.addEventListener("change", handler);
        });

        // Remove porta
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-porta-remove]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const idx = parseInt(btn.getAttribute("data-porta-remove"));
            formData.step4.portas.splice(idx, 1);
            try {
              saveToStorage();
            } catch (e) {}
            rerender();
          });
        });

        // Quick-add presets
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-open-porta-wizard]").forEach((btn) => {
          btn.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const presetKey = btn.getAttribute("data-add-preset") || null;
            const compName = btn.getAttribute("data-add-comp") || null;
            const editIdxAttr = btn.getAttribute("data-edit-porta-idx");
            const editIdx = editIdxAttr != null ? parseInt(editIdxAttr) : -1;
            openPortaModal({
              compName:
                compName ||
                formData.step4?.portas?.[editIdx]?.compartimento_id ||
                null,
              presetKey: presetKey,
              editIdx: editIdx >= 0 ? editIdx : undefined,
            });
          });
        });

        // Per-compartment estantes
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-estante-comp]").forEach((el) => {
          const compName = el.getAttribute("data-estante-comp");
          const field = el.getAttribute("data-estante-field");
          const fixedValue = el.getAttribute("data-estante-value"); // chip buttons
          const handler = (val) => {
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(compName);
            est[field] = val;
            try {
              saveToStorage();
            } catch (e) {}
            if (field === "encosto") {
              // Re-render apenas para atualizar o estado visual dos chips
              renderCurrentStep();
            } else if (typeof refreshChamberVisualizer === "function") {
              refreshChamberVisualizer();
            }
          };
          if (fixedValue !== null) {
            // Chip button (e.g., encosto)
            el.addEventListener("click", () => handler(fixedValue));
          } else {
            const change = () => handler(el.value);
            el.addEventListener("input", change);
            el.addEventListener("change", change);
          }
        });

        // SVG visual selector (paredes clicáveis + ilha) — toggle multi-seleção
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-encosto-side]").forEach((g) => {
          const compName = g.getAttribute("data-encosto-comp");
          const side = g.getAttribute("data-encosto-side");
          if (!compName || !side) return;
          g.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(compName);
            const cur = parseEncostoSides(est.encosto);
            let next;
            if (side === "center") {
              next = cur.includes("center") ? [] : ["center"];
            } else {
              const set = new Set(cur.filter((s) => s !== "center"));
              if (set.has(side)) set.delete(side);
              else set.add(side);
              next = Array.from(set);
            }
            est.encosto = sidesToEncostoCode(next);
            try {
              saveToStorage();
            } catch (e) {}
            renderCurrentStep();
          });
        });

        // Presets de encosto (Limpar, L, U, Perímetro, Ilha)
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-encosto-preset]").forEach((b) => {
          const compName = b.getAttribute("data-encosto-comp");
          const code = b.getAttribute("data-encosto-preset") || "";
          if (!compName) return;
          b.addEventListener("click", () => {
            const est = _getEstantePerComp(compName);
            est.encosto = code; // string vazia = sem encosto definido
            try {
              saveToStorage();
            } catch (e) {}
            renderCurrentStep();
          });
        });

        // Botão "Definir/Mudar layout" → abre modal completo
        panel.querySelectorAll("[data-open-estante-modal]").forEach((b) => {
          const compName = b.getAttribute("data-open-estante-modal");
          if (!compName) return;
          b.addEventListener("click", () => {
            // Resolve o objeto do compartimento (precisa de x0/y0/x1/y1)
            let comps = [];
            try {
              const snap =
                typeof getChamberSnapshot === "function"
                  ? getChamberSnapshot()
                  : null;
              comps = snap ? rcComputeCompartments(snap) : [];
            } catch (e) {
              comps = [];
            }
            const c = comps.find((x) => x.name === compName) || {
              name: compName,
              x0: 0,
              y0: 0,
              x1: 1,
              y1: 1,
            };
            openEstanteLayoutModal(c);
          });
        });
      }

      function runRealityCheck() {
        // Garantir que cada compartimento tenha (no mínimo) 1 porta atribuída,
        // mesmo antes do usuário abrir a Etapa 4. Isso evita o falso-alarme
        // "Compartimento Cx não tem porta configurada" no painel de Análise
        // enquanto o usuário ainda está na Etapa 3.
        try {
          if (typeof syncStep4PortasWithCompartments === "function") {
            syncStep4PortasWithCompartments();
          }
        } catch (e) {}
        const s3 = formData.step3 || {};
        const s4 = formData.step4 || {};
        const s6 = formData.step6 || {};
        const compartimentos = s6.compartimentos || [];
        const comp = compartimentos[0] || {};
        const uso = rcGetUsoFromForm();

        const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
        const compartments = rcComputeCompartments(snap);
        const issues = [];
        const collect = (arr) => {
          if (Array.isArray(arr)) issues.push(...arr);
        };

        collect(rcValidateModularGrid(s3));
        collect(rcValidatePanelThickness(s3, comp));
        collect(rcValidateFloor(s3, comp, uso));
        collect(rcValidateDivisorias(snap));
        collect(rcValidateClima(snap, comp));

        const carga = rcCalculateThermalLoadByCompartment(
          compartments,
          snap,
          comp,
          uso,
        );
        collect(rcValidateCompressor(carga, comp));
        collect(rcValidateDoor(s4, snap, comp, uso));
        collect(rcValidateAccessories(s4, comp, uso));
        collect(rcValidateDoorVsShelves(s4, snap, compartments));
        collect(rcValidateEquipmentVsStructure(snap, compartments));
        collect(rcValidateCapacity(snap, uso));
        collect(rcValidateCompartmentConfig(compartments, snap));
        collect(rcValidateCompartmentRequiredFields(compartments));
        collect(rcValidateCompartmentLuminarias(compartments));
        collect(rcValidateCompartmentDoors(compartments, s4));

        // Fit score
        let score = 100;
        for (const it of issues) {
          if (it.level === "error") score -= 20;
          else if (it.level === "warning") score -= 7;
          else if (it.level === "suggestion") score -= 2;
        }
        if (formData._client_id) score += 3;
        if (snap.volume > 0 && compartimentos.length) score += 2;
        score = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, score));

        const blocking = issues.some((i) => i.level === "error");
        const result = {
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
          derived: {
            volume_m3: +(snap.volume || 0).toFixed(2),
            area_piso_m2: +(snap.area || 0).toFixed(2),
            carga_termica: carga,
            fit_score: score,
            compartments: compartments,
            compartments_count: compartments.length,
          },
          issues,
          blocking,
          counts: {
            error: issues.filter((i) => i.level === "error").length,
            warning: issues.filter((i) => i.level === "warning").length,
            info: issues.filter((i) => i.level === "info").length,
            suggestion: issues.filter((i) => i.level === "suggestion").length,
          },
        };
        formData._reality_check = result;
        try {
          localStorage.setItem("wizard_reality_check", JSON.stringify(result));
        } catch (e) {}
        return result;
      }

      // ---- Sidebar UI ----
      function ensureRcSidebar() {
        let sb = document.getElementById("rcSidebar");
        if (sb) return sb;
        const wizardContainer = document.querySelector(".wizard-container");
        if (!wizardContainer) return null;
        sb = document.createElement("section");
        sb.id = "rcSidebar";
        sb.className = "rc-panel collapsed";
        sb.innerHTML = `
          <div class="rc-panel-header" id="rcSidebarHeader">
            <span class="rc-panel-title">📊 Análise</span>
            <div class="rc-panel-summary" id="rcPanelSummary"></div>
            <button type="button" class="rc-toggle-btn" id="rcSidebarToggle" title="Expandir/Recolher">▾</button>
          </div>
          <div class="rc-panel-body" id="rcSidebarBody"></div>
        `;
        // Insert at top of wizard-container, before step-indicator
        const stepIndicator = wizardContainer.querySelector(".step-indicator");
        if (stepIndicator) wizardContainer.insertBefore(sb, stepIndicator);
        else wizardContainer.prepend(sb);

        const header = sb.querySelector("#rcSidebarHeader");
        header.addEventListener("click", () => {
          sb.classList.toggle("collapsed");
        });
        return sb;
      }

      function rcLevelLabel(lv) {
        return (
          {
            error: "🔴 ERRO",
            warning: "⚠️ AVISO",
            info: "ℹ️ INFO",
            suggestion: "💡 SUGESTÃO",
          }[lv] || lv
        );
      }

      function refreshRcSidebar() {
        const app = document.getElementById("appContainer");
        const sb = ensureRcSidebar();
        if (!sb) return;
        if (!app || app.style.display === "none") {
          sb.classList.add("hidden");
          return;
        }
        sb.classList.remove("hidden");

        const rc = runRealityCheck();
        const fitColor =
          rc.derived.fit_score >= 90
            ? "#22c55e"
            : rc.derived.fit_score >= 70
              ? "#3b82f6"
              : rc.derived.fit_score >= 50
                ? "#f97316"
                : "#ef4444";
        const fitLabel =
          rc.derived.fit_score >= 90
            ? "Excelente"
            : rc.derived.fit_score >= 70
              ? "Bom"
              : rc.derived.fit_score >= 50
                ? "Atenção"
                : "Bloqueado";

        // ---- HEADER SUMMARY (always visible) ----
        const summary = sb.querySelector("#rcPanelSummary");
        const vol =
          rc.derived.volume_m3 > 0 ? rc.derived.volume_m3 + " m³" : "— m³";
        const carga = rc.derived.carga_termica?.kcal_h
          ? rc.derived.carga_termica.kcal_h + " Kcal/h"
          : "— Kcal/h";
        summary.innerHTML = `
          <span class="rc-summary-stat"><strong>${vol}</strong></span>
          <span class="rc-summary-stat">${carga}</span>
          <span class="rc-summary-fit">
            <span>Fit <strong>${rc.derived.fit_score}</strong> · ${fitLabel}</span>
            <span class="rc-summary-bar"><span class="rc-summary-bar-fill" style="width:${rc.derived.fit_score}%;background:${fitColor};"></span></span>
          </span>
          <span class="rc-counts-inline">
            ${rc.counts.error ? `<span class="rc-c rc-c-error">🔴 ${rc.counts.error}</span>` : ""}
            ${rc.counts.warning ? `<span class="rc-c rc-c-warn">⚠️ ${rc.counts.warning}</span>` : ""}
            ${rc.counts.info ? `<span class="rc-c rc-c-info">ℹ️ ${rc.counts.info}</span>` : ""}
            ${rc.counts.suggestion ? `<span class="rc-c rc-c-sug">💡 ${rc.counts.suggestion}</span>` : ""}
          </span>
        `;

        // ---- BODY (only when expanded) ----
        const body = sb.querySelector("#rcSidebarBody");
        const tFormulaCarga = `Volume × fator(°C) × multiplicadores\nFator (°C): >15→30 · 5-15→50 · 0-5→70 · -18→95 · -25→125 · -35→250 · <-35→380\nMultiplicadores: alta freq +25% · prod quente +30% · sol +15% · pessoas +12% · empilh +12% · ilum +8% · margem segurança +10%`;
        const tFormulaVol = `Volume Interno = (Comp - 2×esp) × (Larg - 2×esp) × (Alt - 2×esp)\nesp = espessura do painel (m)`;
        const tFormulaArea = `Área Piso Interna = (Comp - 2×esp) × (Larg - 2×esp)`;
        const tFormulaPot = `Potência (kW) = Carga Térmica (Kcal/h) ÷ 860`;

        // ---- Pre-flight checks: what's still missing? ----
        const s3 = (formData && formData.step3) || {};
        const dimsOk = !!(
          parseFloat(s3.comprimento) > 0 &&
          parseFloat(s3.largura) > 0 &&
          parseFloat(s3.altura) > 0
        );
        const comps =
          (formData && formData.step6 && formData.step6.compartimentos) || [];
        const tempsOk =
          comps.length > 0 &&
          comps.some(
            (c) =>
              c &&
              c.temperatura_setpoint !== "" &&
              c.temperatura_setpoint != null &&
              !Number.isNaN(parseFloat(c.temperatura_setpoint)),
          );
        const anyManualCarga = comps.some(
          (c) =>
            c && c.carga_termica_kcal && parseFloat(c.carga_termica_kcal) > 0,
        );
        const cargaVal = rc.derived.carga_termica?.kcal_h;
        const kwVal = rc.derived.carga_termica?.kw_termico;

        // ---- Stat helper ----
        const stat = (
          label,
          formula,
          mainVal,
          unit,
          ready,
          subStatus,
          badge,
        ) => {
          const cls = ready ? "is-ready" : "is-pending";
          const valHtml = ready
            ? `${mainVal}<span class="unit">${unit}</span>`
            : `—<span class="unit">${unit}</span>`;
          const sub = subStatus
            ? `<div class="substatus ${subStatus.cls || ""}">${subStatus.text}</div>`
            : "";
          const badgeHtml = badge
            ? `<span class="badge-auto ${badge.cls || ""}" title="${badge.title || ""}">${badge.text}</span>`
            : "";
          return `<div class="rc-derived-stat ${cls}" title="${escapeAttr(formula)}">
            ${badgeHtml}
            <div class="label">${label}</div>
            <div class="value">${valHtml}</div>
            ${sub}
          </div>`;
        };

        let html = "";
        html += `<div class="rc-derived">
          ${stat(
            "Volume Interno",
            tFormulaVol,
            rc.derived.volume_m3 || 0,
            " m³",
            !!(rc.derived.volume_m3 > 0),
            !dimsOk
              ? { text: "Falta preencher dimensões", cls: "warn" }
              : { text: "Calculado da Etapa 3", cls: "ok" },
          )}
          ${stat(
            "Área Piso",
            tFormulaArea,
            rc.derived.area_piso_m2 || 0,
            " m²",
            !!(rc.derived.area_piso_m2 > 0),
            !dimsOk
              ? { text: "Falta preencher dimensões", cls: "warn" }
              : { text: "Útil interna (descontando painéis)", cls: "ok" },
          )}
          ${stat(
            "Carga Térmica",
            tFormulaCarga,
            cargaVal || 0,
            " Kcal/h",
            !!cargaVal,
            !dimsOk
              ? { text: "Aguardando dimensões", cls: "warn" }
              : !tempsOk
                ? {
                    text: "Aguardando temperatura no compartimento",
                    cls: "warn",
                  }
                : { text: "Estimado do volume + setpoint", cls: "ok" },
            anyManualCarga
              ? {
                  text: "manual",
                  cls: "manual",
                  title:
                    "Você sobrescreveu o cálculo automático informando Carga Térmica no compartimento",
                }
              : cargaVal
                ? {
                    text: "auto",
                    cls: "",
                    title:
                      "Calculada automaticamente — deixe o campo 'Carga Térmica' do compartimento vazio para manter este valor",
                  }
                : null,
          )}
          ${stat(
            "Potência",
            tFormulaPot,
            kwVal || 0,
            " kW",
            !!kwVal,
            !cargaVal
              ? { text: "Depende da carga térmica", cls: "" }
              : { text: "Carga ÷ 860 (1 kW = 860 Kcal/h)", cls: "ok" },
          )}
        </div>`;

        // ---- Contextual checklist (substitui o botão "Configurar Etapa 3") ----
        // Só mostramos se realmente faltar algo. Se tudo está OK, sumimos para
        // não poluir o painel.
        const checklistItems = [];
        if (!dimsOk) {
          checklistItems.push({
            ok: false,
            text: "Preencher dimensões na Etapa 3",
            jump: 3,
          });
        }
        if (!comps.length) {
          checklistItems.push({
            ok: false,
            text: "Definir ao menos 1 compartimento (Etapa 3)",
            jump: 3,
          });
        }
        if (comps.length && !tempsOk) {
          checklistItems.push({
            ok: false,
            text: "Definir temperatura setpoint na Etapa 6",
            jump: 6,
          });
        }
        if (checklistItems.length) {
          html += `<div class="rc-checklist">
            <div class="rc-checklist-title">📋 Para completar a análise</div>
            ${checklistItems
              .map(
                (it) => `<div class="rc-checklist-item ${it.ok ? "done" : ""}">
              <span class="ico">${it.ok ? "✅" : "⚪"}</span>
              <span>${escapeHtml(it.text)}</span>
              ${
                !it.ok
                  ? `<button type="button" onclick="navigateToStep(${it.jump})">Ir para etapa ${it.jump}</button>`
                  : ""
              }
            </div>`,
              )
              .join("")}
          </div>`;
        }

        if (!rc.issues.length) {
          if (dimsOk && tempsOk) {
            html += `<div class="rc-allgood">
              ✓ Projeto consistente. Nenhum problema técnico detectado.
              <span class="rc-allgood-sub">Todas as etapas validadas pelo Reality Check.</span>
            </div>`;
          } else {
            html += `<div class="rc-empty">A análise técnica aparecerá aqui conforme você preenche o formulário.</div>`;
          }
        } else {
          const order = { error: 0, warning: 1, info: 2, suggestion: 3 };
          const sorted = [...rc.issues].sort(
            (a, b) => (order[a.level] || 9) - (order[b.level] || 9),
          );
          // Split into "current step (or earlier)" vs "future steps".
          // Future-step issues are still shown but visually separated, so the
          // user editing an existing budget doesn't think a step-4 door note
          // is blocking step-3 navigation.
          const stepOfSorted = sorted.map((it) => ({
            it,
            origIdx: sorted.indexOf(it),
            step: rcIssueStep(it),
          }));
          const cur = currentStep || 1;
          const nowList = stepOfSorted.filter((x) => x.step <= cur);
          const laterList = stepOfSorted.filter((x) => x.step > cur);

          const renderIssue = ({ it, origIdx, step: stepN }) => {
            const fld = it.autofix?.field || it.field || "";
            const compRef = it.compartment || "";
            const clickable =
              stepN || fld || compRef ? " rc-issue-clickable" : "";
            const dataAttrs = `data-rc-step="${stepN || ""}" data-rc-field="${escapeAttr(fld)}" data-rc-compartment="${escapeAttr(compRef)}"`;
            const stepTag = stepN
              ? `<span class="rc-step-tag">Etapa ${stepN}</span>`
              : "";
            let inner = `<div class="rc-issue rc-issue-${it.level}${clickable}" ${dataAttrs} onclick="rcJumpToField(this)">
              <strong>${rcLevelLabel(it.level)}${it.category ? " · " + it.category : ""}${compRef ? " · " + escapeHtml(compRef) : ""}${stepTag}</strong>
              ${escapeHtml(it.message || "")}`;
            if (it.autofix) {
              const btnLabel = it.autofix.label || "Aplicar correção";
              inner += `<div class="rc-issue-actions">
                <button type="button" class="primary" onclick="event.stopPropagation();applyRcAutofix(${origIdx})">${escapeHtml(btnLabel)}</button>
                ${stepN && stepN !== cur ? `<button type="button" onclick="event.stopPropagation();navigateToStep(${stepN})">Ir para Etapa ${stepN}</button>` : ""}
              </div>`;
            } else if (compRef) {
              // Only pass focusField when it actually maps to a field inside
              // the compartment modal (avoids opening with a no-op focus).
              const focusArg =
                fld && RC_COMP_FIELD_TO_MODAL_EL[fld]
                  ? `, '${escapeAttr(fld)}'`
                  : "";
              const fieldLabelExtra =
                fld && RC_COMP_FIELD_TO_MODAL_EL[fld]
                  ? ` · ${escapeHtml(fld)}`
                  : "";
              inner += `<div class="rc-issue-actions">
                <button type="button" class="primary" onclick="event.stopPropagation();rcOpenCompartmentFromIssue('${escapeAttr(compRef)}'${focusArg})">⚙️ Configurar ${escapeHtml(compRef)}${fieldLabelExtra}</button>
              </div>`;
            } else if (stepN && stepN !== cur) {
              inner += `<div class="rc-issue-actions">
                <button type="button" onclick="event.stopPropagation();navigateToStep(${stepN})">Ir para Etapa ${stepN}</button>
              </div>`;
            }
            inner += `</div>`;
            return inner;
          };

          html += `<div class="rc-issues-list">`;
          nowList.forEach((row) => {
            html += renderIssue(row);
          });
          if (laterList.length) {
            html += `<div class="rc-issues-later-header">📌 Pendências de etapas futuras (não bloqueiam esta etapa)</div>`;
            laterList.forEach((row) => {
              html += renderIssue(row);
            });
          }
          html += `</div>`;
        }
        body.innerHTML = html;
        sb.dataset.rcIssues = JSON.stringify(rc.issues);
        // Render inline badges on the form fields themselves
        renderInlineRcBadges(rc.issues);
      }

      // --- Inline RC: render badges next to the offending field ---
      function renderInlineRcBadges(issues) {
        // Clear previous badges + flag classes
        document
          .querySelectorAll(".rc-inline-issues")
          .forEach((el) => el.remove());
        document
          .querySelectorAll(
            ".form-group.rc-flagged-error, .form-group.rc-flagged-warning",
          )
          .forEach((el) => {
            el.classList.remove("rc-flagged-error", "rc-flagged-warning");
          });
        if (!issues || !issues.length) return;
        const panel =
          document.querySelector("#stepPanels .step-panel.active") ||
          document.getElementById("stepPanels");
        if (!panel) return;
        // Same sort as the side panel so autofix idx matches
        const order = { error: 0, warning: 1, info: 2, suggestion: 3 };
        const sorted = [...issues].sort(
          (a, b) => (order[a.level] || 9) - (order[b.level] || 9),
        );
        // Group by field-in-current-step
        const byField = {};
        sorted.forEach((it, idx) => {
          const stepN = it.autofix?.step
            ? parseInt(String(it.autofix.step).replace("step", ""), 10)
            : null;
          const fld = it.autofix?.field || it.field;
          if (!fld) return;
          if (stepN && stepN !== currentStep) return;
          (byField[fld] = byField[fld] || []).push({ it, idx });
        });
        Object.keys(byField).forEach((fname) => {
          const target = panel.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${fname}"]`);
          if (!target) return;
          const group = target.closest(".form-group") || target.parentElement;
          if (!group) return;
          // Determine worst level for the ring color
          const worst = byField[fname].some((x) => x.it.level === "error")
            ? "error"
            : byField[fname].some((x) => x.it.level === "warning")
              ? "warning"
              : null;
          if (worst) group.classList.add("rc-flagged-" + worst);
          const wrap = document.createElement("div");
          wrap.className = "rc-inline-issues";
          wrap.innerHTML = byField[fname]
            .map(({ it, idx }) => {
              const lvlClass = `rc-inline-${it.level === "error" ? "error" : it.level === "warning" ? "warning" : it.level === "suggestion" ? "suggestion" : "info"}`;
              const tag =
                it.level === "error"
                  ? "🔴 ERRO"
                  : it.level === "warning"
                    ? "⚠️ AVISO"
                    : it.level === "suggestion"
                      ? "💡 SUGESTÃO"
                      : "ℹ️ INFO";
              const fixBtn = it.autofix
                ? `<button type="button" onclick="applyRcAutofix(${idx})">✨ Corrigir automaticamente</button>`
                : "";
              return `<div class="rc-inline-issue ${lvlClass}">
              <span class="rc-msg"><span class="rc-tag">${tag}</span>${escapeHtml(it.message || "")}</span>
              ${fixBtn}
            </div>`;
            })
            .join("");
          // Insert at the very end of the form-group (after field-error span)
          group.appendChild(wrap);
        });
      }

      // Click a panel issue → jump to the matching field/step
      function rcJumpToField(el) {
        const stepN = parseInt(el.dataset.rcStep, 10);
        const fname = el.dataset.rcField;
        const compName = el.dataset.rcCompartment;
        const targetStep = stepN || (compName ? 3 : NaN);
        const goTo = (cb) => {
          if (targetStep && targetStep !== currentStep) {
            currentStep = targetStep;
            renderCurrentStep();
            setTimeout(() => {
              refreshRcSidebar();
              cb();
            }, 220);
          } else {
            cb();
          }
        };
        goTo(() => {
          // 1. If the issue references a compartment, open the per-compartment
          //    modal (Etapa 3) — a lot of fields live inside it.
          if (compName && typeof openCompartmentConfig === "function") {
            // Close any prior modal first
            const prev = document.getElementById("compConfigOverlay");
            if (prev) prev.remove();
            try {
              // Only forward `fname` to the modal when it actually maps to a
              // field inside it — otherwise the highlight retries forever.
              const focusInModal =
                fname && RC_COMP_FIELD_TO_MODAL_EL[fname] ? fname : undefined;
              openCompartmentConfig(compName, focusInModal);
            } catch (e) {
              console.warn("Falha ao abrir config do compartimento", e);
            }
            return;
          }
          // 2. Otherwise scroll/focus the named field on the current step.
          if (fname) rcScrollToField(fname);
        });
      }

      // Used by the inline "Configurar X" button on issues without autofix.
      // `focusField` is the issue.field (e.g. "qtd_luminarias",
      // "categoria_produto") — used to scroll/flash the corresponding input
      // inside the modal so the user knows exactly what to fill.
      function rcOpenCompartmentFromIssue(compName, focusField) {
        if (!compName) return;
        const doOpen = () => {
          try {
            openCompartmentConfig(compName, focusField);
          } catch (e) {}
        };
        if (currentStep !== 3) {
          currentStep = 3;
          renderCurrentStep();
          setTimeout(() => {
            refreshRcSidebar();
            doOpen();
          }, 220);
        } else {
          doOpen();
        }
      }
      window.rcOpenCompartmentFromIssue = rcOpenCompartmentFromIssue;

      // Maps a Reality Check `issue.field` (data model) to the input/select
      // id inside the compartment-config modal so we can focus/flash it.
      const RC_COMP_FIELD_TO_MODAL_EL = {
        temperatura_setpoint: "cfgTempRangeSlider",
        categoria_produto: "cfgCategoria",
        frequencia_aberturas: "cfgFreq",
        kg_estoque_alvo: "cfgKg",
        qtd_luminarias: "cfgLum",
        empilhadeira: "cfgEmpilh",
        paleteira: "cfgPalet",
        produto_quente: "cfgQuente",
        segmento_critico: "cfgCritico",
        observacoes: "cfgObs",
      };

      // Inside the compartment-config modal, scroll the target field into
      // view and apply a brief highlight. Safe to call even if the modal
      // hasn't rendered yet (it retries on next animation frame).
      function rcFocusFieldInCompartmentModal(field) {
        if (!field) return;
        const elId = RC_COMP_FIELD_TO_MODAL_EL[field] || field;
        const overlay = document.getElementById("compConfigOverlay");
        if (!overlay) {
          // Modal not mounted yet — retry once on next frame.
          requestAnimationFrame(() =>
            rcFocusFieldInCompartmentModal(field),
          );
          return;
        }
        const el = overlay.querySelector("#" + elId) || overlay.querySelector(`[name="${elId}"]`);
        if (!el) return;
        // Find a sensible wrapping container to flash so labels are visible too
        const wrap =
          el.closest("label") || el.closest("details") || el.parentElement;
        const flashTarget = wrap || el;
        try {
          flashTarget.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
        } catch (e) {}
        try {
          el.focus({ preventScroll: true });
        } catch (e) {}
        const prevBg = flashTarget.style.backgroundColor;
        const prevTrans = flashTarget.style.transition;
        flashTarget.style.transition = "background-color 0.45s ease";
        flashTarget.style.backgroundColor = "rgba(255,189,89,0.35)";
        setTimeout(() => {
          flashTarget.style.backgroundColor = prevBg || "";
          flashTarget.style.transition = prevTrans || "";
        }, 1100);
      }
      window.rcFocusFieldInCompartmentModal = rcFocusFieldInCompartmentModal;
      function rcScrollToField(fname) {
        if (!fname) return;
        const target = document.querySelector(`[data-field-name="${fname}"]`);
        if (!target) return;
        const group = target.closest(".form-group") || target;
        group.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "center" });
        // Brief flash
        const orig = group.style.transition;
        group.style.transition = "background 0.4s";
        const prev = group.style.background;
        group.style.background = "rgba(255,189,89,0.25)";
        setTimeout(() => {
          group.style.background = prev;
          group.style.transition = orig;
        }, 900);
        // Focus first interactive element
        const focusEl = target.matches("input,select,textarea")
          ? target
          : target.querySelector("input,select,textarea");
        if (focusEl)
          try {
            focusEl.focus({ preventScroll: true });
          } catch (e) {}
      }
      window.rcJumpToField = rcJumpToField;
      window.rcScrollToField = rcScrollToField;

      function applyRcAutofix(idx) {
        const sb = document.getElementById("rcSidebar");
        let issues = [];
        try {
          issues = JSON.parse(sb?.dataset.rcIssues || "[]");
        } catch (e) {}
        const order = { error: 0, warning: 1, info: 2, suggestion: 3 };
        const sorted = [...issues].sort(
          (a, b) => (order[a.level] || 9) - (order[b.level] || 9),
        );
        const it = sorted[idx];
        if (!it || !it.autofix) return;
        const { step, field, value, path } = it.autofix;
        if (!field && !path) return;

        // Caso especial: ajuste do total de luminárias deve distribuir entre
        // os compartimentos (campo é read-only, somatório automático).
        if (step === "step3" && field === "qtd_luminarias") {
          if (typeof applySuggestion === "function") {
            applySuggestion("step3", "qtd_luminarias", value, document.body);
            addChatMessage(
              `✅ Correção aplicada: **${field}** → \`${value}\` (distribuído entre compartimentos)`,
              "system",
            );
            return;
          }
        }

        // Nested-path autofix (e.g. "step6.compartimentos[0].tipo_compressor").
        // Walks the dotted/bracketed path and writes the value at the leaf,
        // creating intermediate objects/arrays as needed.
        if (path) {
          const tokens = String(path)
            .replace(/\[(\d+)\]/g, ".$1")
            .split(".")
            .filter(Boolean);
          if (tokens.length >= 2) {
            let cur = formData;
            for (let i = 0; i < tokens.length - 1; i++) {
              const k = tokens[i];
              const nextK = tokens[i + 1];
              const nextIsIndex = /^\d+$/.test(nextK);
              if (cur[k] == null) cur[k] = nextIsIndex ? [] : {};
              cur = cur[k];
            }
            const leaf = tokens[tokens.length - 1];
            cur[leaf] = value;
            saveToStorage();
            const targetStep = step
              ? parseInt(String(step).replace(/[^0-9]/g, ""), 10)
              : NaN;
            if (targetStep && currentStep === targetStep) renderCurrentStep();
            refreshChamberVisualizer();
            refreshRcSidebar();
            addChatMessage(
              `✅ Correção aplicada: **${field || leaf}** → \`${value}\``,
              "system",
            );
            return;
          }
        }

        if (!step) return;
        if (!formData[step]) formData[step] = {};
        formData[step][field] = value;
        saveToStorage();
        // If currently viewing affected step, re-render
        if (currentStep && "step" + currentStep === step) {
          renderCurrentStep();
        }
        refreshChamberVisualizer();
        refreshRcSidebar();
        addChatMessage(
          `✅ Correção aplicada: **${field}** → \`${value}\``,
          "system",
        );
      }

      // ---- Modal de Configuração por Compartimento ----
      function openCompartmentConfig(compName, focusField) {
        const snap = getChamberSnapshot();
        const comps = rcComputeCompartments(snap);
        const c = comps.find((x) => x.name === compName);
        if (!c) {
          uiAlert(`Compartimento ${compName} não encontrado.`, {
            variant: "error",
          });
          return;
        }
        const cfgAll = rcGetCompartmentsConfig();
        const cfg = cfgAll[compName] || {};

        const overlay = document.createElement("div");
        overlay.id = "compConfigOverlay";
        overlay.style.cssText =
          "position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5);display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;z-index:10250;overflow-y:auto;padding:24px 12px;";
        const initialTemp =
          cfg.temperatura_setpoint != null
            ? parseFloat(cfg.temperatura_setpoint)
            : NaN;
        const catOpts = rcBuildCategoryOptionsHTML(
          cfg.categoria_produto || "",
          initialTemp,
        );
        const initialCatHint = rcCategoryHintHTML(
          cfg.categoria_produto || "",
          initialTemp,
        );
        const freqOpts = ["baixa", "media", "alta"]
          .map(
            (f) =>
              `<option value="${f}" ${cfg.frequencia_aberturas === f ? "selected" : ""}>${f === "baixa" ? "Baixa (<5/h)" : f === "media" ? "Média (5-15/h)" : "Alta (>15/h)"}</option>`,
          )
          .join("");
        overlay.innerHTML = `
          <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:12px;padding:20px;width:100%;max-width:560px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);margin:auto;min-width:0;">
            <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px;">
              <h3 style="font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);margin:0;">⚙️ Configurar Compartimento ${c.name}</h3>
              <button onclick="document.getElementById('compConfigOverlay').remove()" style="background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-secondary);font-size:18px;">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:14px;">
              ${c.w}m × ${c.h}m · ${c.area}m² (canto ${c.x0.toFixed(2)},${c.y0.toFixed(2)}m)
            </div>
            <div style="display:grid;gap:10px;min-width:0;">
              <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">
                <div style="margin-bottom:6px;">
                  Temperatura de Operação <span style="color:var(--color-error);">*</span>
                </div>
                <div id="cfgTempSlider" style="position:relative;user-select:none;touch-action:pan-y;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);background:var(--bg-input);padding:0;overflow:hidden;">
                  <div style="display:flex;align-items:stretch;height:56px;">
                    <button type="button" id="cfgTempPrev" aria-label="Anterior" style="flex:0 0 44px;border:none;background:transparent;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:color 0.15s;">‹</button>
                    <div id="cfgTempDisplay" style="flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;position:relative;">
                      <span id="cfgTempLabel" style="font-size:22px;font-weight:800;color:var(--text-primary);transition:transform 0.25s ease,opacity 0.25s ease;">— °C</span>
                      <span id="cfgTempSub" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;transition:opacity 0.2s;">Deslize ou toque nas setas</span>
                    </div>
                    <button type="button" id="cfgTempNext" aria-label="Próximo" style="flex:0 0 44px;border:none;background:transparent;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;font-size:22px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:color 0.15s;">›</button>
                  </div>
                  <div id="cfgTempDots" style="display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 0 10px;"></div>
                </div>
                <div id="cfgTempDesc" style="margin-top:6px;padding:10px 12px;background:var(--color-primary-soft, rgba(77,137,170,0.08));border-left:3px solid var(--color-primary);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--text-primary);min-height:18px;">
                  Selecione a temperatura para ver detalhes de uso.
                </div>
                <div style="margin-top:8px;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:8px;">
                  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:4px;">
                    <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Ajuste fino / temperatura customizada</span>
                    <span id="cfgRangeVal" style="font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-primary);">— °C</span>
                  </div>
                  <input type="range" id="cfgTempRangeSlider" min="-40" max="15" step="1" value="${cfg.temperatura_setpoint != null ? cfg.temperatura_setpoint : "-10"}" style="width:100%;accent-color:var(--color-primary);cursor:pointer;"/>
                  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:9px;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:2px;">
                    <span>-40 °C</span><span>-25</span><span>-10</span><span>0</span><span>+15 °C</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <input type="hidden" id="cfgTemp" value="${cfg.temperatura_setpoint != null ? cfg.temperatura_setpoint : ""}"/>
              </div>
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Finalidade / Categoria do Produto
                <select id="cfgCategoria" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;">
                  ${catOpts}
                </select>
                <div id="cfgCategoriaHint" style="margin-top:6px;font-size:11px;line-height:1.5;">${initialCatHint}</div>
              </label>
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Descrição livre (opcional)
                <input type="text" id="cfgFinalidade" value="${escapeAttr(cfg.finalidade || "")}" placeholder="Ex: Resfriamento de carne suína" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;"/>
              </label>
              <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(0,1fr);gap:10px;">
                <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);min-width:0;">Estoque-alvo (kg)
                  <input type="number" id="cfgKg" min="0" step="50" value="${cfg.kg_estoque_alvo != null ? cfg.kg_estoque_alvo : ""}" placeholder="Ex: 2000" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;"/>
                </label>
                <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);min-width:0;">Frequência aberturas/h <span style="color:var(--color-error);">*</span>
                  <select id="cfgFreq" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;">
                    <option value="">— Selecione —</option>
                    ${freqOpts}
                  </select>
                </label>
              </div>
              <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">
                <span style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;">
                  <span>💡 Quantidade de Luminárias neste compartimento <span style="color:var(--color-error);">*</span></span>
                  <span id="cfgLumSugestao" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-secondary);font-weight:600;"></span>
                </span>
                <input type="number" id="cfgLum" min="0" max="20" step="1" value="${cfg.qtd_luminarias != null ? cfg.qtd_luminarias : ""}" placeholder="Obrigatório — sugestão ao lado" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;"/>
              </label>
              <details ${cfg.empilhadeira || cfg.paleteira || cfg.produto_quente || cfg.segmento_critico || (cfg.observacoes && cfg.observacoes.length) ? "open" : ""} style="border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);">
                <summary style="cursor:pointer;padding:8px 12px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);user-select:none;">⚙️ Mais opções (logística + observações)</summary>
                <div style="padding:10px 12px 12px;display:grid;gap:10px;">
                  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(0,1fr);gap:8px;">
                    <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                      <input type="checkbox" id="cfgEmpilh" ${cfg.empilhadeira ? "checked" : ""}/> Empilhadeira
                    </label>
                    <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                      <input type="checkbox" id="cfgPalet" ${cfg.paleteira ? "checked" : ""}/> Paleteira
                    </label>
                    <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                      <input type="checkbox" id="cfgQuente" ${cfg.produto_quente ? "checked" : ""}/> Produto entra quente
                    </label>
                    <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                      <input type="checkbox" id="cfgCritico" ${cfg.segmento_critico ? "checked" : ""}/> Segmento crítico
                    </label>
                  </div>
                  <label style="font-size:12px;color:var(--text-secondary);">Observações
                    <textarea id="cfgObs" rows="2" maxlength="300" style="width:100%;margin-top:4px;padding:8px;border:1px solid var(--border-color);border-radius:6px;background:var(--bg-input);color:var(--text-primary);font-size:13px;resize:vertical;">${escapeHtml(cfg.observacoes || "")}</textarea>
                  </label>
                </div>
              </details>
              <div id="cfgAnalysis" style="font-size:11px;background:var(--bg-tertiary);border-radius:6px;padding:10px;line-height:1.5;"></div>
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:space-between;margin-top:14px;">
              <button onclick="clearCompartmentConfig('${c.name}')" style="padding:8px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--color-error);color:var(--color-error);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Limpar</button>
              <span style="display:flex;gap:8px;">
                <button onclick="document.getElementById('compConfigOverlay').remove()" style="padding:8px 14px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border-color);color:var(--text-secondary);border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;">Cancelar</button>
                <button id="cfgSaveBtn" onclick="saveCompartmentConfig('${c.name}')" style="padding:8px 14px;background:var(--color-primary);color:#fff;border:none;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;">Salvar</button>
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
        overlay.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
          if (e.target === overlay) overlay.remove();
        });

        const tempEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgTemp");
        const catEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgCategoria");
        const kgEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgKg");
        const empEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgEmpilh");
        const palEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgPalet");
        const quenteEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgQuente");
        const freqEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgFreq");
        const analysisEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgAnalysis");
        const lumEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgLum");
        const lumSug = overlay.querySelector("#cfgLumSugestao");
        const saveBtn = overlay.querySelector("#cfgSaveBtn");

        // ============================================================
        // SCHEMA DE VALIDAÇÃO DO MODAL (estilo Zod, mas sem dependência).
        // Cada entry descreve o input, sua regra e como localizá-lo no DOM.
        // É a fonte única de verdade para: render inline de erros, banner
        // de "campos faltando" no topo, habilitar/desabilitar Salvar, e
        // mensagem ao salvar. Antes existiam 3 listas espalhadas pelo
        // código (Etapa 3 wizard / modal / Reality Check) que divergiam.
        // ============================================================
        const COMP_MODAL_SCHEMA = [
          {
            key: "temperatura_setpoint",
            label: "Temperatura de operação",
            elId: "cfgTemp",
            wrapId: "cfgTempSlider",
            parse: (v) => parseFloat(v),
            check: (n) =>
              !isFinite(n)
                ? "Selecione uma temperatura."
                : n < -40 || n > 15
                  ? "Use um valor entre -40°C e +15°C."
                  : null,
          },
          {
            key: "categoria_produto",
            label: "Categoria/finalidade do produto",
            elId: "cfgCategoria",
            parse: (v) => (v || "").trim(),
            check: (s) =>
              !s ? "Escolha o tipo de produto armazenado." : null,
          },
          {
            key: "frequencia_aberturas",
            label: "Frequência de aberturas/hora",
            elId: "cfgFreq",
            parse: (v) => (v || "").trim(),
            check: (s) =>
              !s
                ? "Selecione a frequência (baixa/média/alta)."
                : null,
          },
          {
            key: "qtd_luminarias",
            label: "Quantidade de luminárias",
            elId: "cfgLum",
            parse: (v) => parseInt(v),
            check: (n) =>
              !isFinite(n)
                ? "Informe quantas luminárias este compartimento terá."
                : n < 0 || n > 50
                  ? "Use um valor entre 0 e 50 luminárias."
                  : null,
          },
          {
            key: "kg_estoque_alvo",
            label: "Estoque-alvo (kg)",
            elId: "cfgKg",
            optional: true,
            parse: (v) => (v === "" ? null : parseFloat(v)),
            check: (n) =>
              n != null && (!isFinite(n) || n < 0)
                ? "Use um número positivo (ou deixe vazio)."
                : null,
          },
        ];

        function _compModalReadValues() {
          const out = {};
          COMP_MODAL_SCHEMA.forEach((f) => {
            const el = overlay.querySelector("#" + f.elId);
            out[f.key] = el ? el.value : "";
          });
          return out;
        }

        function _compModalValidate() {
          const raw = _compModalReadValues();
          const errors = {};
          const missingRequired = [];
          COMP_MODAL_SCHEMA.forEach((f) => {
            const parsed = f.parse(raw[f.key]);
            const msg = f.check(parsed);
            if (msg) {
              errors[f.key] = msg;
              if (!f.optional) missingRequired.push(f);
            }
          });
          return {
            ok: missingRequired.length === 0,
            errors,
            missingRequired,
          };
        }

        // Injeta (uma vez) o banner no topo + spans de erro abaixo de cada
        // campo. Renderizado/atualizado por _compModalRefreshValidation.
        function _compModalEnsureValidationUI() {
          // Banner no topo do modal
          let banner = overlay.querySelector("#cfgValidationBanner");
          if (!banner) {
            const card = overlay.firstElementChild;
            const dimsLine = card && card.children[1];
            banner = document.createElement("div");
            banner.id = "cfgValidationBanner";
            banner.style.cssText =
              "display:none;margin:0 0 12px 0;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid;font-size:12px;line-height:1.45;";
            if (dimsLine && dimsLine.nextSibling) {
              card.insertBefore(banner, dimsLine.nextSibling);
            } else if (card) {
              card.insertBefore(banner, card.children[2] || null);
            }
          }
          // Span de erro embaixo de cada input
          COMP_MODAL_SCHEMA.forEach((f) => {
            const el = overlay.querySelector("#" + f.elId);
            if (!el) return;
            const wrap = el.closest("label") || el.parentElement;
            if (!wrap) return;
            let err = wrap.querySelector(
              `.cfg-field-error[data-key="${f.key}"]`,
            );
            if (!err) {
              err = document.createElement("div");
              err.className = "cfg-field-error";
              err.dataset.key = f.key;
              err.style.cssText =
                "display:none;margin-top:4px;font-size:11px;color:#dc2626;font-weight:600;";
              wrap.appendChild(err);
            }
          });
        }

        function _compModalRefreshValidation() {
          _compModalEnsureValidationUI();
          const { ok, errors, missingRequired } = _compModalValidate();
          // Per-field markers
          COMP_MODAL_SCHEMA.forEach((f) => {
            const el = overlay.querySelector("#" + f.elId);
            if (!el) return;
            const errSpan = overlay.querySelector(
              `.cfg-field-error[data-key="${f.key}"]`,
            );
            if (errors[f.key]) {
              el.style.borderColor = "#dc2626";
              el.style.boxShadow = "0 0 0 1px #dc2626 inset";
              if (errSpan) {
                errSpan.textContent = "✗ " + errors[f.key];
                errSpan.style.display = "block";
              }
            } else {
              el.style.borderColor = "";
              el.style.boxShadow = "";
              if (errSpan) errSpan.style.display = "none";
            }
          });
          // Top banner
          const banner = overlay.querySelector("#cfgValidationBanner");
          if (banner) {
            if (missingRequired.length === 0) {
              banner.style.display = "none";
            } else {
              banner.style.display = "block";
              banner.style.background = "rgba(220,38,38,0.08)";
              banner.style.borderColor = "rgba(220,38,38,0.35)";
              banner.style.color = "#991b1b";
              const items = missingRequired
                .map(
                  (f) =>
                    `<li style="margin:2px 0;"><a href="#" data-cfg-goto="${f.elId}" style="color:inherit;text-decoration:underline;font-weight:600;">${escapeHtml(f.label)}</a></li>`,
                )
                .join("");
              banner.innerHTML = `
                <div style="font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;">⚠️ Faltam ${missingRequired.length} campo(s) obrigatório(s) neste compartimento</div>
                <ul style="margin:4px 0 0 18px;padding:0;">${items}</ul>
              `;
              banner.querySelectorAll("[data-cfg-goto]").forEach((a) => {
                a.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
                  e.preventDefault();
                  const id = a.getAttribute("data-cfg-goto");
                  const target = overlay.querySelector("#" + id);
                  if (target) {
                    (target.closest("label") || target).scrollIntoView({
                      behavior: "smooth",
                      block: "center",
                    });
                    try {
                      target.focus({ preventScroll: true });
                    } catch (e) {}
                  }
                });
              });
            }
          }
          // Save button state
          if (saveBtn) {
            saveBtn.disabled = !ok;
            saveBtn.style.opacity = ok ? "1" : "0.55";
            saveBtn.style.cursor = ok ? "pointer" : "not-allowed";
            saveBtn.title = ok
              ? ""
              : `Faltam: ${missingRequired.map((f) => f.label).join(", ")}`;
          }
          return ok;
        }
        // Exposto para o saveCompartmentConfig usar.
        overlay._compModalValidate = _compModalValidate;
        overlay._compModalRefreshValidation = _compModalRefreshValidation;

        function liveAnalysis() {
          const t = parseFloat(tempEl.value);
          const cat = catEl.value;
          const kg = parseFloat(kgEl.value) || 0;
          const useEmp = empEl.checked,
            usePal = palEl.checked,
            quente = quenteEl.checked;
          const freq = freqEl.value;

          let html = "";
          if (!isFinite(t)) {
            html += `<span style="color:var(--color-error);">⚠️ Sem temperatura, não é possível calcular carga térmica nem validar painel.</span>`;
          } else {
            // Volume útil deste compartimento (alturaInt × área compartimento)
            const altInt = Math.max(0, snap.altInt || 0);
            const volComp = c.area * altInt;
            // Carga térmica isolada deste compartimento
            const row = rcFindRange(RC_THERMAL_FACTOR_TABLE, t);
            let carga = volComp * row.factor;
            if (freq === "alta") carga *= 1.25;
            if (quente) carga *= 1.3;
            if (useEmp) carga *= 1.12;
            if (c.config?.parede_externa_sol) carga *= 1.15;
            carga *= 1.1;
            const kw = +(carga / 860).toFixed(2);
            html += `<strong>📊 Análise local de ${c.name}:</strong><br>`;
            html += `• Volume útil: ${volComp.toFixed(2)} m³ (área ${c.area}m² × altura ${altInt.toFixed(2)}m)<br>`;
            html += `• Carga térmica isolada: <strong>${Math.round(carga)} Kcal/h</strong> (${kw} kW)<br>`;
            html += `• Faixa de painel mínima (PU): <strong>${rcFindRange(RC_MIN_THICKNESS_PU, t).mm} mm</strong><br>`;

            if (cat) {
              const dens = RC_STORAGE_DENSITY[cat] || 250;
              const fatorUtil = useEmp || usePal ? 0.55 : 0.7;
              const capKg = Math.round(volComp * fatorUtil * dens);
              if (kg > 0) {
                const ratio = kg / capKg;
                const cor =
                  ratio > 1.1
                    ? "var(--color-error)"
                    : ratio < 0.4
                      ? "var(--color-warning,#f97316)"
                      : "var(--color-success,#22c55e)";
                html += `• Capacidade estimada: ~${capKg}kg · alvo ${kg}kg = <span style="color:${cor};font-weight:700;">${Math.round(ratio * 100)}%</span><br>`;
              } else {
                html += `• Capacidade estimada: ~${capKg}kg de ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]} (volume × densidade × utilização ${Math.round(fatorUtil * 100)}%)<br>`;
              }
            }
            // Cross-warnings
            const warns = [];
            const infos = [];
            // Empilhadeira requirements
            if (useEmp) {
              if (c.w < 2.5 || c.h < 2.5)
                warns.push(
                  "Compartimento pequeno para empilhadeira (mínimo recomendado 2,5m de lado).",
                );
              if (altInt < 3.5)
                warns.push(
                  `Altura interna ${altInt.toFixed(2)}m insuficiente para empilhadeira (mín. recomendado: 3,50m para circulação + rack).`,
                );
              infos.push(
                "🚛 <strong>Porta mínima p/ empilhadeira:</strong> 2400×3000mm (largura×altura). Piso reforçado obrigatório.",
              );
              infos.push(
                "🚛 <strong>Corredor:</strong> mín. 3,20m entre racks para manobra.",
              );
            }
            // Paleteira requirements
            if (usePal && !useEmp) {
              if (altInt < 2.5)
                warns.push(
                  `Altura interna ${altInt.toFixed(2)}m baixa para paleteira (mín. recomendado: 2,50m).`,
                );
              infos.push(
                "🏗️ <strong>Porta mínima p/ paleteira:</strong> 1500×2200mm. Piso liso e nivelado recomendado.",
              );
            }
            // Temperature vs category (faixa por categoria + heurísticas legadas)
            if (cat) {
              const r = RC_USO_TEMP_RANGES[cat];
              if (r && (t < r.min || t > r.max)) {
                warns.push(
                  `Temperatura ${t}°C fora da faixa de <strong>${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]}</strong> (${r.min}°C a ${r.max}°C).`,
                );
              } else if (r && (t < r.ideal[0] || t > r.ideal[1])) {
                infos.push(
                  `🌡️ ${t}°C é tolerável para ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]}, mas o ideal é ${r.ideal[0]}°C a ${r.ideal[1]}°C.`,
                );
              }
            }
            if (t < -10 && cat && /hortifruti|flores|bebidas/.test(cat))
              warns.push(
                `Temperatura ${t}°C inadequada para ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]}.`,
              );
            if (t > 8 && cat && /sorvete|congelados|carne/.test(cat))
              warns.push(
                `Temperatura ${t}°C alta demais para ${RC_USO_LABELS[cat]}.`,
              );
            // Frequency impact
            if (freq === "alta")
              infos.push(
                "🚪 <strong>Alta frequência:</strong> cortina PVC recomendada para reduzir consumo (~20%).",
              );
            // Produto quente
            if (quente)
              infos.push(
                "🔥 <strong>Produto quente:</strong> +30% na carga térmica. Considere antecâmara ou pré-resfriamento.",
              );

            if (warns.length) {
              html +=
                `<br><strong style="color:var(--color-error);">⚠️ Alertas:</strong><br>` +
                warns.map((w) => "• " + w).join("<br>");
            }
            if (infos.length) {
              html +=
                `<br><strong style="color:var(--color-info,#0ea5e9);">📋 Requisitos de logística:</strong><br>` +
                infos.map((i) => "• " + i).join("<br>");
            }
          }
          // Luminárias suggestion (Reality Check shared logic)
          const lumRec = rcRecommendLuminarias(c, cat, t);
          const lumVal = parseInt(lumEl.value);
          const lumActual =
            isFinite(lumVal) && lumVal >= 0 ? lumVal : lumRec.recommended;
          const lumStatus = rcEvaluateLuminarias(lumActual, lumRec);
          if (lumSug) {
            const txt =
              isFinite(lumVal) && lumVal >= 0
                ? `${lumStatus.icon} ${lumStatus.label}`
                : `Sugerido: ${lumRec.recommended} (~${lumRec.lux} lux)`;
            lumSug.textContent = txt;
            lumSug.style.color = lumStatus.color || "var(--text-secondary)";
          }
          analysisEl.innerHTML = html;

          // Atualiza grupos da finalidade conforme a temperatura muda
          const tempKey = isFinite(t) ? String(t) : "";
          if (catEl.dataset.lastTempKey !== tempKey) {
            const keep = catEl.value;
            catEl.innerHTML = rcBuildCategoryOptionsHTML(keep, t);
            catEl.value = keep; // preserva seleção (mesmo que vire "não recomendada")
            catEl.dataset.lastTempKey = tempKey;
          }
          // Dica contextual abaixo da finalidade
          const hintEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgCategoriaHint");
          if (hintEl) hintEl.innerHTML = rcCategoryHintHTML(catEl.value, t);
        }
        [tempEl, catEl, kgEl, empEl, palEl, quenteEl, freqEl, lumEl].forEach(
          (el) =>
            el &&
            el.addEventListener("input", () => {
              liveAnalysis();
              _compModalRefreshValidation();
            }),
        );
        if (catEl)
          catEl.addEventListener("change", () => {
            liveAnalysis();
            _compModalRefreshValidation();
          });
        // Temperature slider navigation
        const TEMP_OPTIONS = [
          {
            v: -25,
            label: "-25 °C",
            desc: "Congelamento profundo · sorvetes, pescados, carnes longas",
          },
          {
            v: -18,
            label: "-18 °C",
            desc: "Padrão para alimentos congelados (ANVISA / RDC)",
          },
          {
            v: -10,
            label: "-10 °C",
            desc: "Pré-congelamento / armazenagem temporária",
          },
          {
            v: 0,
            label: "0 °C",
            desc: "Resfriamento profundo · pescado fresco",
          },
          {
            v: 2,
            label: "2 °C",
            desc: "Carnes resfriadas, laticínios e embutidos",
          },
          {
            v: 4,
            label: "4 °C",
            desc: "Padrão para resfriados (refrigerador comercial)",
          },
          {
            v: 6,
            label: "6 °C",
            desc: "Frutas, hortaliças e produtos prontos",
          },
          {
            v: 8,
            label: "8 °C",
            desc: "Bebidas, ovos, frutas tropicais sensíveis ao frio",
          },
          {
            v: 12,
            label: "12 °C",
            desc: "Adega / climatizado · vinhos, chocolates, banana",
          },
          {
            v: 15,
            label: "15 °C",
            desc: "Limite superior · ambiente seco controlado",
          },
        ];
        const tempDescEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgTempDesc");
        const tempLabelEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgTempLabel");
        const tempSubEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgTempSub");
        const tempDotsEl = overlay.querySelector("#cfgTempDots");
        const tempSlider = overlay.querySelector("#cfgTempSlider");
        const tempPrev = overlay.querySelector("#cfgTempPrev");
        const tempNext = overlay.querySelector("#cfgTempNext");

        let tempIdx = -1; // no selection
        const curVal = parseFloat(tempEl.value);
        if (isFinite(curVal)) {
          tempIdx = TEMP_OPTIONS.findIndex((t) => t.v === curVal);
        }

        // Render dots
        function renderDots() {
          if (!tempDotsEl) return;
          tempDotsEl.innerHTML = TEMP_OPTIONS.map(
            (_, i) =>
              `<span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:${i === tempIdx ? "var(--color-primary)" : "var(--border-color)"};transition:background 0.2s;"></span>`,
          ).join("");
        }

        function updateTempUI(animate) {
          const opt = tempIdx >= 0 ? TEMP_OPTIONS[tempIdx] : null;
          const curTemp = parseFloat(tempEl.value);
          if (opt) {
            tempEl.value = opt.v;
            if (tempLabelEl) {
              if (animate) {
                tempLabelEl.style.opacity = "0";
                setTimeout(() => {
